authors_text: Benjamin Doerr,Andrew James Kelley
title: Fourier Analysis Meets Runtime Analysis: Precise Runtimes on Plateaus
title_zh: 傅立叶分析与运行时分析的结合：平台上的精确运行时
comment: 43 pages. This is the full version of a paper appearing in the proceedings of GECCO 2023. Version 3 improves notation, adds more references, and fixes a small error
comments: 43 pages. This is the full version of a paper appearing in the proceedings of GECCO 2023. Version 3 improves notation, adds more references, and fixes a small error
abstract: We propose a new method based on discrete Fourier analysis to analyze the time evolutionary algorithms spend on plateaus. This immediately gives a concise proof of the classic estimate of the expected runtime of the $(1+1)$ evolutionary algorithm on the Needle problem due to Garnier, Kallel, and Schoenauer (1999). We also use this method to analyze the runtime of the $(1+1)$ evolutionary algorithm on a new benchmark consisting of $n/\ell$ plateaus of effective size $2^\ell-1$ which have to be optimized sequentially in a LeadingOnes fashion. Using our new method, we determine the precise expected runtime both for static and fitness-dependent mutation rates. We also determine the asymptotically optimal static and fitness-dependent mutation rates. For $\ell = o(n)$, the optimal static mutation rate is approximately $1.59/n$. The optimal fitness dependent mutation rate, when the first $k$ fitness-relevant bits have been found, is asymptotically $1/(k+1)$. These results, so far only proven for the single-instance problem LeadingOnes, thus hold for a much broader class of problems. We expect similar extensions to be true for other important results on LeadingOnes. We are also optimistic that our Fourier analysis approach can be applied to other plateau problems as well.
summary: We propose a new method based on discrete Fourier analysis to analyze the time evolutionary algorithms spend on plateaus. This immediately gives a concise proof of the classic estimate of the expected runtime of the $(1+1)$ evolutionary algorithm on the Needle problem due to Garnier, Kallel, and Schoenauer (1999). We also use this method to analyze the runtime of the $(1+1)$ evolutionary algorithm on a new benchmark consisting of $n/\ell$ plateaus of effective size $2^\ell-1$ which have to be optimized sequentially in a LeadingOnes fashion. Using our new method, we determine the precise expected runtime both for static and fitness-dependent mutation rates. We also determine the asymptotically optimal static and fitness-dependent mutation rates. For $\ell = o(n)$, the optimal static mutation rate is approximately $1.59/n$. The optimal fitness dependent mutation rate, when the first $k$ fitness-relevant bits have been found, is asymptotically $1/(k+1)$. These results, so far only proven for the single-instance problem LeadingOnes, thus hold for a much broader class of problems. We expect similar extensions to be true for other important results on LeadingOnes. We are also optimistic that our Fourier analysis approach can be applied to other plateau problems as well.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于离散傅里叶分析的新方法来分析进化算法在平台上花费的时间。这立即给出了 Garnier、Kallel 和 Schoenauer (1999) 对 Needle 问题上 $(1+1)$ 进化算法的预期运行时间的经典估计的简明证明。我们还使用此方法来分析 $(1+1)$ 进化算法在新基准上的运行时间，该基准由有效大小为 $2^\ell-1$ 的 $n/\ell$ 高原组成，必须以LeadingOnes 方式顺序优化。使用我们的新方法，我们确定了静态突变率和适应度相关突变率的精确预期运行时间。我们还确定了渐近最优的静态突变率和适应度相关的突变率。对于 $\ell = o(n)$，最佳静态突变率约为 $1.59/n$。当找到第一个 $k$ 个适应度相关位时，最佳适应度相关突变率渐近为 $1/(k+1)$。到目前为止，这些结果仅针对单实例问题LeadingOnes 得到验证，因此适用于更广泛的问题。我们预计LeadingOnes 上的其他重要结果也会有类似的扩展。我们也乐观地认为我们的傅里叶分析方法也可以应用于其他高原问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离散傅里叶分析的新方法，用于精确分析进化算法在高原问题上的运行时间，并应用于Needle问题和新设计的基准问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以精确分析进化算法在高原区域的运行时间，而傅里叶分析能提供更精确的数学工具，从而改进对复杂优化问题的理论理解。
AI.method: 利用离散傅里叶分析技术，结合静态和适应性突变率，分析(1+1)进化算法在高原问题上的时间复杂度，包括Needle问题和多阶段高原基准问题。
AI.result: 确定了静态突变率1.59/n和适应性突变率1/(k+1)的渐近最优性，精确计算了预期运行时间，并扩展了LeadingOnes问题的结论至更广泛的问题类别。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶分析方法为高原问题的运行时间分析提供了新视角，未来可推广至其他优化问题，且结果表明该方法具有广泛适用性。

We are also optimistic that our Fourier analysis approach can be applied to other plateau problems as well. 我们提出了一种基于离散傅里叶分析的新方法来分析进化算法在平台上花费的时间。这立即给出了 Garnier、Kallel 和 Schoenauer (1999) 对 Needle 问题上 $(1+1)$ 进化算法的预期运行时间的经典估计的简明证明。我们还使用此方法来分析 $(1+1)$ 进化算法在新基准上的运行时间，该基准由有效大小为 $2^\ell-1$ 的 $n/\ell$ 高原组成，必须以LeadingOnes 方式顺序优化。使用我们的新方法，我们确定了静态突变率和适应度相关突变率的精确预期运行时间。我们还确定了渐近最优的静态突变率和适应度相关的突变率。对于 $\ell = o(n)$，最佳静态突变率约为 $1.59/n$。当找到第一个 $k$ 个适应度相关位时，最佳适应度相关突变率渐近为 $1/(k+1)$。到目前为止，这些结果仅针对单实例问题LeadingOnes 得到验证，因此适用于更广泛的问题。我们预计LeadingOnes 上的其他重要结果也会有类似的扩展。我们也乐观地认为我们的傅里叶分析方法也可以应用于其他高原问题。 本文提出一种基于离散傅里叶分析的新方法，用于精确分析进化算法在高原问题上的运行时间，并应用于Needle问题和新设计的基准问题。 Benjamin Doerr,Andrew James Kelley cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.DS

authors_text: Zichong Wang,Yang Zhou,David Lo,Wenbin Zhang
title: Towards Fair Machine Learning Software: Understanding and Addressing Model Bias Through Counterfactual Thinking
title_zh: 迈向公平的机器学习软件：通过反事实思维理解和解决模型偏差
abstract: The increasing use of Machine Learning (ML) software can lead to unfair and unethical decisions, thus fairness bugs in software are becoming a growing concern. Addressing these fairness bugs often involves sacrificing ML performance, such as accuracy. To address this issue, we present a novel counterfactual approach that uses counterfactual thinking to tackle the root causes of bias in ML software. In addition, our approach combines models optimized for both performance and fairness, resulting in an optimal solution in both aspects. We conducted a thorough evaluation of our approach on 10 benchmark tasks using a combination of 5 performance metrics, 3 fairness metrics, and 15 measurement scenarios, all applied to 8 real-world datasets. The conducted extensive evaluations show that the proposed method significantly improves the fairness of ML software while maintaining competitive performance, outperforming state-of-the-art solutions in 84.6% of overall cases based on a recent benchmarking tool.
summary: The increasing use of Machine Learning (ML) software can lead to unfair and unethical decisions, thus fairness bugs in software are becoming a growing concern. Addressing these fairness bugs often involves sacrificing ML performance, such as accuracy. To address this issue, we present a novel counterfactual approach that uses counterfactual thinking to tackle the root causes of bias in ML software. In addition, our approach combines models optimized for both performance and fairness, resulting in an optimal solution in both aspects. We conducted a thorough evaluation of our approach on 10 benchmark tasks using a combination of 5 performance metrics, 3 fairness metrics, and 15 measurement scenarios, all applied to 8 real-world datasets. The conducted extensive evaluations show that the proposed method significantly improves the fairness of ML software while maintaining competitive performance, outperforming state-of-the-art solutions in 84.6% of overall cases based on a recent benchmarking tool.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 软件的使用越来越多可能会导致不公平和不道德的决策，因此软件中的公平性错误正成为越来越令人担忧的问题。解决这些公平性错误通常需要牺牲机器学习性能，例如准确性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的反事实方法，该方法使用反事实思维来解决机器学习软件中偏见的根本原因。此外，我们的方法结合了针对性能和公平性进行优化的模型，从而在两个方面都得到了最佳解决方案。我们结合 5 个性能指标、3 个公平指标和 15 个测量场景，对 10 个基准任务的方法进行了全面评估，所有这些都应用于 8 个真实数据集。进行的广泛评估表明，所提出的方法在保持竞争性能的同时显着提高了机器学习软件的公平性，根据最近的基准测试工具，在 84.6% 的总体案例中优于最先进的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于反事实推理的方法，解决机器学习软件中的公平性问题，同时保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提升公平性时往往牺牲模型性能，需寻找兼顾两者的方法。
AI.method: 结合反事实推理与多目标优化模型，同时提升公平性与性能。
AI.result: 在10个基准任务中，公平性显著提升且性能保持竞争力，优于现有方法84.6%的案例。
AI.conclusion: 反事实方法能有效平衡公平性与性能，为公平机器学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Zichong Wang,Nripsuta Saxena,Tongjia Yu,Sneha Karki,Tyler Zetty,Israat Haque,Shan Zhou,Dukka Kc,Ian Stockwell,Albert Bifet,Wenbin Zhang
title: Preventing Discriminatory Decision-making in Evolving Data Streams
title_zh: 防止不断发展的数据流中的歧视性决策
abstract: Bias in machine learning has rightly received significant attention over the last decade. However, most fair machine learning (fair-ML) work to address bias in decision-making systems has focused solely on the offline setting. Despite the wide prevalence of online systems in the real world, work on identifying and correcting bias in the online setting is severely lacking. The unique challenges of the online environment make addressing bias more difficult than in the offline setting. First, Streaming Machine Learning (SML) algorithms must deal with the constantly evolving real-time data stream. Second, they need to adapt to changing data distributions (concept drift) to make accurate predictions on new incoming data. Adding fairness constraints to this already complicated task is not straightforward. In this work, we focus on the challenges of achieving fairness in biased data streams while accounting for the presence of concept drift, accessing one sample at a time. We present Fair Sampling over Stream ($FS^2$), a novel fair rebalancing approach capable of being integrated with SML classification algorithms. Furthermore, we devise the first unified performance-fairness metric, Fairness Bonded Utility (FBU), to evaluate and compare the trade-off between performance and fairness of different bias mitigation methods efficiently. FBU simplifies the comparison of fairness-performance trade-offs of multiple techniques through one unified and intuitive evaluation, allowing model designers to easily choose a technique. Overall, extensive evaluations show our measures surpass those of other fair online techniques previously reported in the literature.
summary: Bias in machine learning has rightly received significant attention over the last decade. However, most fair machine learning (fair-ML) work to address bias in decision-making systems has focused solely on the offline setting. Despite the wide prevalence of online systems in the real world, work on identifying and correcting bias in the online setting is severely lacking. The unique challenges of the online environment make addressing bias more difficult than in the offline setting. First, Streaming Machine Learning (SML) algorithms must deal with the constantly evolving real-time data stream. Second, they need to adapt to changing data distributions (concept drift) to make accurate predictions on new incoming data. Adding fairness constraints to this already complicated task is not straightforward. In this work, we focus on the challenges of achieving fairness in biased data streams while accounting for the presence of concept drift, accessing one sample at a time. We present Fair Sampling over Stream ($FS^2$), a novel fair rebalancing approach capable of being integrated with SML classification algorithms. Furthermore, we devise the first unified performance-fairness metric, Fairness Bonded Utility (FBU), to evaluate and compare the trade-off between performance and fairness of different bias mitigation methods efficiently. FBU simplifies the comparison of fairness-performance trade-offs of multiple techniques through one unified and intuitive evaluation, allowing model designers to easily choose a technique. Overall, extensive evaluations show our measures surpass those of other fair online techniques previously reported in the literature.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年里，机器学习中的偏见理所当然地受到了极大的关注。然而，大多数解决决策系统偏见的公平机器学习 (fair-ML) 工作都只关注离线环境。尽管在线系统在现实世界中广泛流行，但识别和纠正在线环境中的偏见的工作却严重缺乏。在线环境的独特挑战使得解决偏见比线下环境更加困难。首先，流式机器学习（SML）算法必须处理不断变化的实时数据流。其次，他们需要适应不断变化的数据分布（概念漂移），以便对新传入的数据做出准确的预测。向这项已经很复杂的任务添加公平约束并不简单。在这项工作中，我们重点关注在有偏差的数据流中实现公平性的挑战，同时考虑概念漂移的存在，一次访问一个样本。我们提出了流公平采样 ($FS^2$)，这是一种新颖的公平再平衡方法，能够与 SML 分类算法集成。此外，我们设计了第一个统一的性能公平性指标——公平保税效用（FBU），以有效地评估和比较不同偏差缓解方法的性能和公平性之间的权衡。 FBU 通过统一直观的评估简化了多种技术的公平性与性能权衡的比较，使模型设计者能够轻松选择一种技术。总体而言，广泛的评估表明我们的措施超越了文献中先前报道的其他公平在线技术。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在线系统中数据流演变和概念漂移带来的歧视性决策问题，提出新的公平性方法。
AI.motivation: 现有公平机器学习研究多集中于离线场景，而在线系统面临实时数据流和概念漂移的挑战，导致公平性难以保障。
AI.method: 提出FS²算法实现数据流的公平重采样，并设计FBU指标统一评估性能与公平性的权衡。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在公平性与性能的平衡上优于现有在线公平技术。
AI.conclusion: FS²与FBU为在线数据流的公平决策提供了有效解决方案，可适应动态变化的现实场景。

authors_text: Wenbin Zhang,Zichong Wang,Juyong Kim,Cheng Cheng,Thomas Oommen,Pradeep Ravikumar,Jeremy Weiss
title: Individual Fairness under Uncertainty
title_zh: 不确定性下的个人公平
abstract: Algorithmic fairness, the research field of making machine learning (ML) algorithms fair, is an established area in ML. As ML technologies expand their application domains, including ones with high societal impact, it becomes essential to take fairness into consideration during the building of ML systems. Yet, despite its wide range of socially sensitive applications, most work treats the issue of algorithmic bias as an intrinsic property of supervised learning, i.e., the class label is given as a precondition. Unlike prior studies in fairness, we propose an individual fairness measure and a corresponding algorithm that deal with the challenges of uncertainty arising from censorship in class labels, while enforcing similar individuals to be treated similarly from a ranking perspective, free of the Lipschitz condition in the conventional individual fairness definition. We argue that this perspective represents a more realistic model of fairness research for real-world application deployment and show how learning with such a relaxed precondition draws new insights that better explains algorithmic fairness. We conducted experiments on four real-world datasets to evaluate our proposed method compared to other fairness models, demonstrating its superiority in minimizing discrimination while maintaining predictive performance with uncertainty present.
summary: Algorithmic fairness, the research field of making machine learning (ML) algorithms fair, is an established area in ML. As ML technologies expand their application domains, including ones with high societal impact, it becomes essential to take fairness into consideration during the building of ML systems. Yet, despite its wide range of socially sensitive applications, most work treats the issue of algorithmic bias as an intrinsic property of supervised learning, i.e., the class label is given as a precondition. Unlike prior studies in fairness, we propose an individual fairness measure and a corresponding algorithm that deal with the challenges of uncertainty arising from censorship in class labels, while enforcing similar individuals to be treated similarly from a ranking perspective, free of the Lipschitz condition in the conventional individual fairness definition. We argue that this perspective represents a more realistic model of fairness research for real-world application deployment and show how learning with such a relaxed precondition draws new insights that better explains algorithmic fairness. We conducted experiments on four real-world datasets to evaluate our proposed method compared to other fairness models, demonstrating its superiority in minimizing discrimination while maintaining predictive performance with uncertainty present.
abstract_zh: 算法公平性是使机器学习 (ML) 算法公平的研究领域，是 ML 中的一个既定领域。随着机器学习技术不断扩展其应用领域，包括具有较高社会影响力的领域，在构建机器学习系统时考虑公平性变得至关重要。然而，尽管其具有广泛的社会敏感应用，但大多数工作将算法偏差问题视为监督学习的固有属性，即给出类别标签作为前提条件。与之前的公平性研究不同，我们提出了一种个人公平性衡量标准和相应的算法，以应对类别标签审查带来的不确定性挑战，同时从排名角度强制相似的个人受到类似的对待，不受传统个人公平性定义中的利普希茨条件的影响。我们认为，这种观点代表了现实世界应用程序部署的公平性研究的更现实的模型，并展示了在如此宽松的前提条件下进行学习如何得出新的见解，从而更好地解释算法公平性。我们对四个真实世界的数据集进行了实验，以评估我们提出的方法与其他公平模型的比较，证明其在最大限度地减少歧视方面的优越性，同时在存在不确定性的情况下保持预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在类标签存在审查不确定性的情况下，无需满足传统个体公平性定义中的Lipschitz条件，通过排名视角实现个体公平性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法公平性研究大多假设类标签已知且确定，但现实场景中标签可能存在审查不确定性，传统方法难以处理此类问题，需建立更贴近实际的公平性模型。
AI.method: 设计了一种新的个体公平性度量标准及对应算法，通过排名视角确保相似个体被相似对待，并在类标签不确定性条件下放松Lipschitz约束。

search_text: Individual Fairness under Uncertainty 不确定性下的个人公平 Algorithmic fairness, the research field of making machine learning (ML) algorithms fair, is an established area in ML. As ML technologies expand their application domains, including ones with high societal impact, it becomes essential to take fairness into consideration during the building of ML systems. Yet, despite its wide range of socially sensitive applications, most work treats the issue of algorithmic bias as an intrinsic property of supervised learning, i.e., the class label is given as a precondition. Unlike prior studies in fairness, we propose an individual fairness measure and a corresponding algorithm that deal with the challenges of uncertainty arising from censorship in class labels, while enforcing similar individuals to be treated similarly from a ranking perspective, free of the Lipschitz condition in the conventional individual fairness definition. We argue that this perspective represents a more realistic model of fairness research for real-world application deployment and show how learning with such a relaxed precondition draws new insights that better explains algorithmic fairness. We conducted experiments on four real-world datasets to evaluate our proposed method compared to other fairness models, demonstrating its superiority in minimizing discrimination while maintaining predictive performance with uncertainty present. 算法公平性是使机器学习 (ML) 算法公平的研究领域，是 ML 中的一个既定领域。随着机器学习技术不断扩展其应用领域，包括具有较高社会影响力的领域，在构建机器学习系统时考虑公平性变得至关重要。然而，尽管其具有广泛的社会敏感应用，但大多数工作将算法偏差问题视为监督学习的固有属性，即给出类别标签作为前提条件。与之前的公平性研究不同，我们提出了一种个人公平性衡量标准和相应的算法，以应对类别标签审查带来的不确定性挑战，同时从排名角度强制相似的个人受到类似的对待，不受传统个人公平性定义中的利普希茨条件的影响。我们认为，这种观点代表了现实世界应用程序部署的公平性研究的更现实的模型，并展示了在如此宽松的前提条件下进行学习如何得出新的见解，从而更好地解释算法公平性。我们对四个真实世界的数据集进行了实验，以评估我们提出的方法与其他公平模型的比较，证明其在最大限度地减少歧视方面的优越性，同时在存在不确定性的情况下保持预测性能。 本文提出了一种在类标签存在审查不确定性的情况下，无需满足传统个体公平性定义中的Lipschitz条件，通过排名视角实现个体公平性的新方法。 Wenbin Zhang,Zichong Wang,Juyong Kim,Cheng Cheng,Thomas Oommen,Pradeep Ravikumar,Jeremy Weiss cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Safwan Hossain,Yiling Chen
title: Equilibrium of Data Markets with Externality
title_zh: 具有外部性的数据市场均衡
abstract: We model real-world data markets, where sellers post fixed prices and buyers are free to purchase from any set of sellers, as a simultaneous game. A key component here is the negative externality buyers induce on one another due to data purchases. Starting with a simple setting where buyers know their valuations a priori, we characterize both the existence and welfare properties of the pure Nash equilibrium in the presence of such externality. While the outcomes are bleak without any intervention, mirroring the limitations of current data markets, we prove that for a standard class of externality functions, platforms intervening through a transaction cost can lead to a pure equilibrium with strong welfare guarantees. We next consider a more realistic setting where buyers learn their valuations over time through market interactions. Our intervention is feasible here as well, and we consider learning algorithms to achieve low regret concerning both individual and cumulative utility metrics. Lastly, we analyze the promises of this intervention under a much richer externality model.
summary: We model real-world data markets, where sellers post fixed prices and buyers are free to purchase from any set of sellers, as a simultaneous game. A key component here is the negative externality buyers induce on one another due to data purchases. Starting with a simple setting where buyers know their valuations a priori, we characterize both the existence and welfare properties of the pure Nash equilibrium in the presence of such externality. While the outcomes are bleak without any intervention, mirroring the limitations of current data markets, we prove that for a standard class of externality functions, platforms intervening through a transaction cost can lead to a pure equilibrium with strong welfare guarantees. We next consider a more realistic setting where buyers learn their valuations over time through market interactions. Our intervention is feasible here as well, and we consider learning algorithms to achieve low regret concerning both individual and cumulative utility metrics. Lastly, we analyze the promises of this intervention under a much richer externality model.
abstract_zh: 我们对现实世界的数据市场进行建模，其中卖家发布固定价格，而买家可以自由地从任何一组卖家那里购买，作为同步游戏。这里的一个关键组成部分是购买者因数据购买而相互造成的负外部性。从买家先验地知道他们的估值的简单设置开始，我们描述了在存在这种外部性的情况下纯纳什均衡的存在性和福利属性。虽然在没有任何干预的情况下结果是黯淡的，反映了当前数据市场的局限性，但我们证明，对于标准类别的外部性函数，通过交易成本进行干预的平台可以带来具有强大福利保证的纯粹均衡。接下来我们考虑一个更现实的环境，买家通过市场互动随着时间的推移了解他们的估值。我们的干预在这里也是可行的，我们考虑学习算法来实现个人和累积效用指标的低后悔。最后，我们在更丰富的外部性模型下分析了这种干预的前景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究数据市场中买方负外部性对均衡的影响，并提出通过交易成本干预改善市场效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 现实数据市场因买方数据购买行为产生负外部性，导致市场效率低下，需探索有效干预机制以提升社会福利。
AI.method: 将数据市场建模为同时博弈，分析纯纳什均衡的存在性；引入交易成本干预机制，并设计学习算法应对动态估值场景。
AI.result: 无干预时市场均衡福利低下，交易成本干预可实现强福利保障均衡；学习算法有效降低个体与累积效用遗憾。
AI.conclusion: 平台通过交易成本干预能有效改善数据市场均衡，动态学习算法适应复杂场景，未来可拓展至更丰富的外部性模型。

authors_text: Dominic Maggio,Courtney Mario,Brett Streetman,Ted Steiner,Luca Carlone
title: Vision-Based Terrain Relative Navigation on High-Altitude Balloon and Sub-Orbital Rocket
title_zh: 高空气球和亚轨道火箭上基于视觉的地形相对导航
abstract: We present an experimental analysis on the use of a camera-based approach for high-altitude navigation by associating mapped landmarks from a satellite image database to camera images, and by leveraging inertial sensors between camera frames. We evaluate performance of both a sideways-tilted and downward-facing camera on data collected from a World View Enterprises high-altitude balloon with data beginning at an altitude of 33 km and descending to near ground level (4.5 km) with 1.5 hours of flight time. We demonstrate less than 290 meters of average position error over a trajectory of more than 150 kilometers. In addition to showing performance across a range of altitudes, we also demonstrate the robustness of the Terrain Relative Navigation (TRN) method to rapid rotations of the balloon, in some cases exceeding 20 degrees per second, and to camera obstructions caused by both cloud coverage and cords swaying underneath the balloon. Additionally, we evaluate performance on data collected by two cameras inside the capsule of Blue Origin's New Shepard rocket on payload flight NS-23, traveling at speeds up to 880 km/hr, and demonstrate less than 55 meters of average position error.
summary: We present an experimental analysis on the use of a camera-based approach for high-altitude navigation by associating mapped landmarks from a satellite image database to camera images, and by leveraging inertial sensors between camera frames. We evaluate performance of both a sideways-tilted and downward-facing camera on data collected from a World View Enterprises high-altitude balloon with data beginning at an altitude of 33 km and descending to near ground level (4.5 km) with 1.5 hours of flight time. We demonstrate less than 290 meters of average position error over a trajectory of more than 150 kilometers. In addition to showing performance across a range of altitudes, we also demonstrate the robustness of the Terrain Relative Navigation (TRN) method to rapid rotations of the balloon, in some cases exceeding 20 degrees per second, and to camera obstructions caused by both cloud coverage and cords swaying underneath the balloon. Additionally, we evaluate performance on data collected by two cameras inside the capsule of Blue Origin's New Shepard rocket on payload flight NS-23, traveling at speeds up to 880 km/hr, and demonstrate less than 55 meters of average position error.
abstract_zh: 我们通过将卫星图像数据库中的映射地标与相机图像相关联，并利用相机帧之间的惯性传感器，对使用基于相机的高空导航方法进行了实验分析。我们根据从 World View Enterprises 高空气球收集的数据来评估侧向倾斜和朝下相机的性能，数据从 33 公里的高度开始，在 1.5 小时的飞行时间内下降到接近地面（4.5 公里）。我们证明了在超过 150 公里的轨迹上平均位置误差小于 290 米。除了展示不同高度范围内的性能外，我们还展示了地形相对导航 (TRN) 方法对气球快速旋转（在某些情况下超过每秒 20 度）以及云层覆盖和气球下方绳索摇摆造成的摄像机障碍的鲁棒性。此外，我们还评估了蓝色起源 New Shepard 火箭太空舱内两个摄像头在 NS-23 有效载荷飞行中收集的数据的性能，飞行速度高达 880 公里/小时，并证明平均位置误差小于 55 米。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的高空气球和亚轨道火箭地形相对导航方法。
AI.motivation: 在高空气球和亚轨道飞行器上实现精确的地形相对导航，以支持自主导航和定位。
AI.method: 通过将卫星图像数据库中的地标与相机图像进行关联，并利用惯性传感器在相机帧之间进行数据融合，实现了基于视觉的导航。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，在超过150公里的航程中，平均位置误差小于290米；在亚轨道飞行器上，平均位置误差小于55米。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在不同高度和复杂环境条件下表现出良好的鲁棒性，适用于高空气球和亚轨道飞行器的导航。

Additionally, we evaluate performance on data collected by two cameras inside the capsule of Blue Origin's New Shepard rocket on payload flight NS-23, traveling at speeds up to 880 km/hr, and demonstrate less than 55 meters of average position error. 我们通过将卫星图像数据库中的映射地标与相机图像相关联，并利用相机帧之间的惯性传感器，对使用基于相机的高空导航方法进行了实验分析。我们根据从 World View Enterprises 高空气球收集的数据来评估侧向倾斜和朝下相机的性能，数据从 33 公里的高度开始，在 1.5 小时的飞行时间内下降到接近地面（4.5 公里）。我们证明了在超过 150 公里的轨迹上平均位置误差小于 290 米。除了展示不同高度范围内的性能外，我们还展示了地形相对导航 (TRN) 方法对气球快速旋转（在某些情况下超过每秒 20 度）以及云层覆盖和气球下方绳索摇摆造成的摄像机障碍的鲁棒性。此外，我们还评估了蓝色起源 New Shepard 火箭太空舱内两个摄像头在 NS-23 有效载荷飞行中收集的数据的性能，飞行速度高达 880 公里/小时，并证明平均位置误差小于 55 米。 本文介绍了一种基于视觉的高空气球和亚轨道火箭地形相对导航方法。 Dominic Maggio,Courtney Mario,Brett Streetman,Ted Steiner,Luca Carlone cs.CV

authors_text: Bita Rouhani,Ritchie Zhao,Venmugil Elango,Rasoul Shafipour,Mathew Hall,Maral Mesmakhosroshahi,Ankit More,Levi Melnick,Maximilian Golub,Girish Varatkar,Lei Shao,Gaurav Kolhe,Dimitry Melts,Jasmine Klar,Renee L'Heureux,Matt Perry,Doug Burger,Eric Chung,Zhaoxia Deng,Sam Naghshineh,Jongsoo Park,Maxim Naumov
title: With Shared Microexponents, A Little Shifting Goes a Long Way
title_zh: 有了共享的微指数，一点点的改变就能带来很大的帮助
abstract: This paper introduces Block Data Representations (BDR), a framework for exploring and evaluating a wide spectrum of narrow-precision formats for deep learning. It enables comparison of popular quantization standards, and through BDR, new formats based on shared microexponents (MX) are identified, which outperform other state-of-the-art quantization approaches, including narrow-precision floating-point and block floating-point. MX utilizes multiple levels of quantization scaling with ultra-fine scaling factors based on shared microexponents in the hardware. The effectiveness of MX is demonstrated on real-world models including large-scale generative pretraining and inferencing, and production-scale recommendation systems.
summary: This paper introduces Block Data Representations (BDR), a framework for exploring and evaluating a wide spectrum of narrow-precision formats for deep learning. It enables comparison of popular quantization standards, and through BDR, new formats based on shared microexponents (MX) are identified, which outperform other state-of-the-art quantization approaches, including narrow-precision floating-point and block floating-point. MX utilizes multiple levels of quantization scaling with ultra-fine scaling factors based on shared microexponents in the hardware. The effectiveness of MX is demonstrated on real-world models including large-scale generative pretraining and inferencing, and production-scale recommendation systems.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了块数据表示（BDR），这是一个用于探索和评估深度学习的各种窄精度格式的框架。它可以比较流行的量化标准，并通过 BDR 识别基于共享微指数 (MX) 的新格式，该格式优于其他最先进的量化方法，包括窄精度浮点和块浮点。 MX 利用基于硬件中共享微指数的多级量化缩放和超精细缩放因子。 MX 的有效性在现实世界模型中得到了证明，包括大规模生成预训练和推理以及生产规模的推荐系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Block Data Representations（BDR）的框架，用于探索和评估深度学习中的窄精度数据格式，并引入了基于共享微指数（MX）的新格式以提升量化性能。
AI.motivation: 现有量化方法在精度和效率之间难以平衡，需要更高效的窄精度数据表示来提升深度学习模型的性能。
AI.method: 通过Block Data Representations框架比较多种量化标准，设计基于共享微指数（MX）的新型数据表示方法，利用多级量化缩放和超细缩放因子优化精度。
AI.result: MX在大规模生成预训练、推理及推荐系统中表现出优于现有量化方法的性能，包括窄精度浮点和块浮点。
AI.conclusion: 共享微指数（MX）方法在实际应用中有效，为深度学习中的高效量化提供了新方向。

authors_text: Libo Zhang,Yang Chen,Toru Takisaka,Bakh Khoussainov,Michael Witbrock,Jiamou Liu
title: Learning Density-Based Correlated Equilibria for Markov Games
title_zh: 基于学习密度的马尔可夫博弈相关均衡
abstract: Correlated Equilibrium (CE) is a well-established solution concept that captures coordination among agents and enjoys good algorithmic properties. In real-world multi-agent systems, in addition to being in an equilibrium, agents' policies are often expected to meet requirements with respect to safety, and fairness. Such additional requirements can often be expressed in terms of the state density which measures the state-visitation frequencies during the course of a game. However, existing CE notions or CE-finding approaches cannot explicitly specify a CE with particular properties concerning state density; they do so implicitly by either modifying reward functions or using value functions as the selection criteria. The resulting CE may thus not fully fulfil the state-density requirements. In this paper, we propose Density-Based Correlated Equilibria (DBCE), a new notion of CE that explicitly takes state density as selection criterion. Concretely, we instantiate DBCE by specifying different state-density requirements motivated by real-world applications. To compute DBCE, we put forward the Density Based Correlated Policy Iteration algorithm for the underlying control problem. We perform experiments on various games where results demonstrate the advantage of our CE-finding approach over existing methods in scenarios with state-density concerns.
summary: Correlated Equilibrium (CE) is a well-established solution concept that captures coordination among agents and enjoys good algorithmic properties. In real-world multi-agent systems, in addition to being in an equilibrium, agents' policies are often expected to meet requirements with respect to safety, and fairness. Such additional requirements can often be expressed in terms of the state density which measures the state-visitation frequencies during the course of a game. However, existing CE notions or CE-finding approaches cannot explicitly specify a CE with particular properties concerning state density; they do so implicitly by either modifying reward functions or using value functions as the selection criteria. The resulting CE may thus not fully fulfil the state-density requirements. In this paper, we propose Density-Based Correlated Equilibria (DBCE), a new notion of CE that explicitly takes state density as selection criterion. Concretely, we instantiate DBCE by specifying different state-density requirements motivated by real-world applications. To compute DBCE, we put forward the Density Based Correlated Policy Iteration algorithm for the underlying control problem. We perform experiments on various games where results demonstrate the advantage of our CE-finding approach over existing methods in scenarios with state-density concerns.
abstract_zh: 相关均衡（CE）是一个完善的解决方案概念，它捕获代理之间的协调并具有良好的算法特性。在现实世界的多智能体系统中，除了处于均衡状态之外，智能体的策略通常还需要满足安全性和公平性的要求。这种额外的要求通常可以用状态密度来表达，状态密度衡量游戏过程中状态访问的频率。然而，现有的CE概念或CE寻找方法无法明确指定具有有关状态密度的特定属性的CE；他们通过修改奖励函数或使用价值函数作为选择标准来隐式地这样做。因此，所得的 CE 可能无法完全满足状态密度要求。在本文中，我们提出了基于密度的相关均衡（DBCE），这是 CE 的一个新概念，明确以状态密度作为选择标准。具体来说，我们通过指定由实际应用程序驱动的不同状态密度要求来实例化 DBCE。为了计算 DBCE，我们针对底层控制问题提出了基于密度的相关策略迭代算法。我们对各种游戏进行了实验，结果表明，在涉及状态密度问题的场景中，我们的 CE 查找方法相对于现有方法具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于状态密度的关联均衡（DBCE）概念，并设计了一种计算该均衡的算法，以满足现实世界多智能体系统中对安全性和公平性的需求。
AI.motivation: 现有的关联均衡概念无法显式地满足对状态密度的要求，通常通过修改奖励函数或使用价值函数作为选择标准来隐式实现，这可能导致最终的均衡无法完全满足状态密度需求。
AI.method: 本文提出了基于状态密度的关联均衡（DBCE）概念，并设计了密度基于的关联策略迭代算法，以解决底层控制问题。
AI.result: 在多个游戏上的实验结果表明，本文提出的寻找关联均衡的方法在具有状态密度需求的场景中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的DBCE概念和算法能够显式地满足状态密度要求，为现实世界中的多智能体系统提供了一种更有效的均衡求解方法。

authors_text: Mohammad Mohammadzadeh,Ali Ghadami,Alireza Taheri,Saeed Behzadipour
title: cGAN-Based High Dimensional IMU Sensor Data Generation for Enhanced Human Activity Recognition in Therapeutic Activities
title_zh: 基于 cGAN 的高维 IMU 传感器数据生成，用于增强治疗活动中的人类活动识别
abstract: Human activity recognition is a core technology for applications such as rehabilitation, health monitoring, and human-computer interactions. Wearable devices, especially IMU sensors, provide rich features of human movements at a reasonable cost, which can be leveraged in activity recognition. Developing a robust classifier for activity recognition has always been of interest to researchers. One major problem is that there is usually a deficit of training data, which makes developing deep classifiers difficult and sometimes impossible. In this work, a novel GAN network called TheraGAN was developed to generate IMU signals associated with rehabilitation activities. The generated signal comprises data from a 6-channel IMU, i.e., angular velocities and linear accelerations. Also, introducing simple activities simplified the generation process for activities of varying lengths. To evaluate the generated signals, several qualitative and quantitative studies were conducted, including perceptual similarity analysis, comparing manually extracted features to those from real data, visual inspection, and an investigation into how the generated data affects the performance of three deep classifiers trained on the generated and real data. The results showed that the generated signals closely mimicked the real signals, and adding generated data resulted in a significant improvement in the performance of all tested networks. Among the tested networks, the LSTM classifier demonstrated the most significant improvement, achieving a 13.27% boost, effectively addressing the challenge of data scarcity. This shows the validity of the generated data as well as TheraGAN as a tool to build more robust classifiers in case of imbalanced and insufficient data problems.
summary: Human activity recognition is a core technology for applications such as rehabilitation, health monitoring, and human-computer interactions. Wearable devices, especially IMU sensors, provide rich features of human movements at a reasonable cost, which can be leveraged in activity recognition. Developing a robust classifier for activity recognition has always been of interest to researchers. One major problem is that there is usually a deficit of training data, which makes developing deep classifiers difficult and sometimes impossible. In this work, a novel GAN network called TheraGAN was developed to generate IMU signals associated with rehabilitation activities. The generated signal comprises data from a 6-channel IMU, i.e., angular velocities and linear accelerations. Also, introducing simple activities simplified the generation process for activities of varying lengths. To evaluate the generated signals, several qualitative and quantitative studies were conducted, including perceptual similarity analysis, comparing manually extracted features to those from real data, visual inspection, and an investigation into how the generated data affects the performance of three deep classifiers trained on the generated and real data. The results showed that the generated signals closely mimicked the real signals, and adding generated data resulted in a significant improvement in the performance of all tested networks. Among the tested networks, the LSTM classifier demonstrated the most significant improvement, achieving a 13.27% boost, effectively addressing the challenge of data scarcity. This shows the validity of the generated data as well as TheraGAN as a tool to build more robust classifiers in case of imbalanced and insufficient data problems.
abstract_zh: 人体活动识别是康复、健康监测、人机交互等应用的核心技术。可穿戴设备，尤其是 IMU 传感器，以合理的成本提供丰富的人体运动特征，可用于活动识别。开发用于活动识别的强大分类器一直是研究人员感兴趣的。一个主要问题是通常缺乏训练数据，这使得开发深度分类器变得困难，有时甚至是不可能的。在这项工作中，开发了一种名为 TheraGAN 的新型 GAN 网络，用于生成与康复活动相关的 IMU 信号。生成的信号包括来自 6 通道 IMU 的数据，即角速度和线性加速度。此外，引入简单的活动简化了不同长度的活动的生成过程。为了评估生成的信号，进行了多项定性和定量研究，包括感知相似性分析、将手动提取的特征与真实数据的特征进行比较、目视检查，以及调查生成的数据如何影响在生成的数据和真实数据上训练的三个深度分类器的性能。结果表明，生成的信号非常接近真实信号，并且添加生成的数据导致所有测试网络的性能显着提高。在测试的网络中，LSTM分类器表现出最显着的改进，实现了13.27%的提升，有效解决了数据稀缺的挑战。这表明了生成的数据以及 TheraGAN 作为一种工具的有效性，可以在数据不平衡和不足的情况下构建更强大的分类器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于cGAN的TheraGAN网络，生成高维IMU传感器数据以增强治疗活动中的人类活动识别性能。
AI.motivation: 可穿戴IMU传感器数据在活动识别中至关重要，但训练数据不足限制了深度分类器的开发，尤其在治疗场景中存在数据不平衡和稀缺问题。
AI.method: 设计TheraGAN生成6通道IMU信号（角速度和线性加速度），通过感知相似性分析、特征对比、视觉检验及分类器性能测试验证生成数据质量。
AI.result: 生成信号与真实数据高度相似，加入生成数据后所有测试分类器性能显著提升，其中LSTM分类器提升达13.27%。
AI.conclusion: TheraGAN有效解决了数据稀缺问题，生成数据可作为增强分类器鲁棒性的可靠工具，尤其适用于治疗场景的不平衡数据集。

search_text: cGAN-Based High Dimensional IMU Sensor Data Generation for Enhanced Human Activity Recognition in Therapeutic Activities 基于 cGAN 的高维 IMU 传感器数据生成，用于增强治疗活动中的人类活动识别 Human activity recognition is a core technology for applications such as rehabilitation, health monitoring, and human-computer interactions. Wearable devices, especially IMU sensors, provide rich features of human movements at a reasonable cost, which can be leveraged in activity recognition. Developing a robust classifier for activity recognition has always been of interest to researchers. One major problem is that there is usually a deficit of training data, which makes developing deep classifiers difficult and sometimes impossible. In this work, a novel GAN network called TheraGAN was developed to generate IMU signals associated with rehabilitation activities. The generated signal comprises data from a 6-channel IMU, i.e., angular velocities and linear accelerations. Also, introducing simple activities simplified the generation process for activities of varying lengths. To evaluate the generated signals, several qualitative and quantitative studies were conducted, including perceptual similarity analysis, comparing manually extracted features to those from real data, visual inspection, and an investigation into how the generated data affects the performance of three deep classifiers trained on the generated and real data. The results showed that the generated signals closely mimicked the real signals, and adding generated data resulted in a significant improvement in the performance of all tested networks. Among the tested networks, the LSTM classifier demonstrated the most significant improvement, achieving a 13.27% boost, effectively addressing the challenge of data scarcity. This shows the validity of the generated data as well as TheraGAN as a tool to build more robust classifiers in case of imbalanced and insufficient data problems. 人体活动识别是康复、健康监测、人机交互等应用的核心技术。可穿戴设备，尤其是 IMU 传感器，以合理的成本提供丰富的人体运动特征，可用于活动识别。开发用于活动识别的强大分类器一直是研究人员感兴趣的。一个主要问题是通常缺乏训练数据，这使得开发深度分类器变得困难，有时甚至是不可能的。在这项工作中，开发了一种名为 TheraGAN 的新型 GAN 网络，用于生成与康复活动相关的 IMU 信号。生成的信号包括来自 6 通道 IMU 的数据，即角速度和线性加速度。此外，引入简单的活动简化了不同长度的活动的生成过程。为了评估生成的信号，进行了多项定性和定量研究，包括感知相似性分析、将手动提取的特征与真实数据的特征进行比较、目视检查，以及调查生成的数据如何影响在生成的数据和真实数据上训练的三个深度分类器的性能。结果表明，生成的信号非常接近真实信号，并且添加生成的数据导致所有测试网络的性能显着提高。在测试的网络中，LSTM分类器表现出最显着的改进，实现了13.27%的提升，有效解决了数据稀缺的挑战。这表明了生成的数据以及 TheraGAN 作为一种工具的有效性，可以在数据不平衡和不足的情况下构建更强大的分类器。 本文提出基于cGAN的TheraGAN网络，生成高维IMU传感器数据以增强治疗活动中的人类活动识别性能。 Mohammad Mohammadzadeh,Ali Ghadami,Alireza Taheri,Saeed Behzadipour cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Benjamin Bowman,Alessandro Achille,Luca Zancato,Matthew Trager,Pramuditha Perera,Giovanni Paolini,Stefano Soatto
title: À-la-carte Prompt Tuning (APT): Combining Distinct Data Via Composable Prompting
title_zh: 点菜提示调整 (APT)：通过可组合提示组合不同的数据
abstract: We introduce À-la-carte Prompt Tuning (APT), a transformer-based scheme to tune prompts on distinct data so that they can be arbitrarily composed at inference time. The individual prompts can be trained in isolation, possibly on different devices, at different times, and on different distributions or domains. Furthermore each prompt only contains information about the subset of data it was exposed to during training. During inference, models can be assembled based on arbitrary selections of data sources, which we call "à-la-carte learning". À-la-carte learning enables constructing bespoke models specific to each user's individual access rights and preferences. We can add or remove information from the model by simply adding or removing the corresponding prompts without retraining from scratch. We demonstrate that à-la-carte built models achieve accuracy within $5\%$ of models trained on the union of the respective sources, with comparable cost in terms of training and inference time. For the continual learning benchmarks Split CIFAR-100 and CORe50, we achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: We introduce À-la-carte Prompt Tuning (APT), a transformer-based scheme to tune prompts on distinct data so that they can be arbitrarily composed at inference time. The individual prompts can be trained in isolation, possibly on different devices, at different times, and on different distributions or domains. Furthermore each prompt only contains information about the subset of data it was exposed to during training. During inference, models can be assembled based on arbitrary selections of data sources, which we call "à-la-carte learning". À-la-carte learning enables constructing bespoke models specific to each user's individual access rights and preferences. We can add or remove information from the model by simply adding or removing the corresponding prompts without retraining from scratch. We demonstrate that à-la-carte built models achieve accuracy within $5\%$ of models trained on the union of the respective sources, with comparable cost in terms of training and inference time. For the continual learning benchmarks Split CIFAR-100 and CORe50, we achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了点菜提示调整（APT），这是一种基于变压器的方案，用于调整不同数据的提示，以便它们可以在推理时任意组合。各个提示可以单独进行训练，可能在不同的设备上、在不同的时间、在不同的发行版或域上进行训练。此外，每个提示仅包含有关训练期间接触到的数据子集的信息。在推理过程中，可以根据任意选择的数据源来组装模型，我们称之为“点菜学习”。点菜学习可以构建针对每个用户的个人访问权限和偏好的定制模型。我们可以通过简单地添加或删除相应的提示来添加或删除模型中的信息，而无需从头开始重新训练。我们证明，单点构建的模型与在各自来源的联合上训练的模型相比，其准确度在 5%$ 以内，并且在训练和推理时间方面的成本相当。对于持续学习基准 Split CIFAR-100 和 CORe50，我们实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为À-la-carte Prompt Tuning (APT)的方法，通过可组合的提示调优，实现对不同数据源的独立训练与灵活组合，构建个性化模型。
AI.motivation: 传统模型调整需重新训练整体结构，而APT通过独立训练提示并动态组合，可灵活适配用户需求与数据分布，降低训练成本并支持持续学习。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构，将提示分解为独立模块分别训练，每个提示仅包含对应数据子集的信息，推理时按需组合不同数据源的提示构建模型。
AI.result: APT构建的模型在准确率上与联合训练模型相差不超过5%，且训练/推理效率相当，在Split CIFAR-100和CORe50基准上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: APT通过模块化提示调优实现了高效、灵活的个性化模型构建，在保持性能的同时满足动态数据需求与用户偏好。

The individual prompts can be trained in isolation, possibly on different devices, at different times, and on different distributions or domains. Furthermore each prompt only contains information about the subset of data it was exposed to during training. During inference, models can be assembled based on arbitrary selections of data sources, which we call "à-la-carte learning". À-la-carte learning enables constructing bespoke models specific to each user's individual access rights and preferences. We can add or remove information from the model by simply adding or removing the corresponding prompts without retraining from scratch. We demonstrate that à-la-carte built models achieve accuracy within $5\%$ of models trained on the union of the respective sources, with comparable cost in terms of training and inference time. authors_text: Mingfei Sun,Benjamin Ellis,Anuj Mahajan,Sam Devlin,Katja Hofmann,Shimon Whiteson
title: Trust-Region-Free Policy Optimization for Stochastic Policies
title_zh: 随机策略的无信任域策略优化
abstract: Trust Region Policy Optimization (TRPO) is an iterative method that simultaneously maximizes a surrogate objective and enforces a trust region constraint over consecutive policies in each iteration. The combination of the surrogate objective maximization and the trust region enforcement has been shown to be crucial to guarantee a monotonic policy improvement. However, solving a trust-region-constrained optimization problem can be computationally intensive as it requires many steps of conjugate gradient and a large number of on-policy samples. In this paper, we show that the trust region constraint over policies can be safely substituted by a trust-region-free constraint without compromising the underlying monotonic improvement guarantee. The key idea is to generalize the surrogate objective used in TRPO in a way that a monotonic improvement guarantee still emerges as a result of constraining the maximum advantage-weighted ratio between policies. This new constraint outlines a conservative mechanism for iterative policy optimization and sheds light on practical ways to optimize the generalized surrogate objective. We show that the new constraint can be effectively enforced by being conservative when optimizing the generalized objective function in practice. We call the resulting algorithm Trust-REgion-Free Policy Optimization (TREFree) as it is free of any explicit trust region constraints. Empirical results show that TREFree outperforms TRPO and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in terms of policy performance and sample efficiency.
summary: Trust Region Policy Optimization (TRPO) is an iterative method that simultaneously maximizes a surrogate objective and enforces a trust region constraint over consecutive policies in each iteration. The combination of the surrogate objective maximization and the trust region enforcement has been shown to be crucial to guarantee a monotonic policy improvement. However, solving a trust-region-constrained optimization problem can be computationally intensive as it requires many steps of conjugate gradient and a large number of on-policy samples. In this paper, we show that the trust region constraint over policies can be safely substituted by a trust-region-free constraint without compromising the underlying monotonic improvement guarantee. The key idea is to generalize the surrogate objective used in TRPO in a way that a monotonic improvement guarantee still emerges as a result of constraining the maximum advantage-weighted ratio between policies. This new constraint outlines a conservative mechanism for iterative policy optimization and sheds light on practical ways to optimize the generalized surrogate objective. We show that the new constraint can be effectively enforced by being conservative when optimizing the generalized objective function in practice. We call the resulting algorithm Trust-REgion-Free Policy Optimization (TREFree) as it is free of any explicit trust region constraints. Empirical results show that TREFree outperforms TRPO and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in terms of policy performance and sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 信任域策略优化 (TRPO) 是一种迭代方法，可同时最大化代理目标并在每次迭代中对连续策略强制执行信任域约束。替代目标最大化和信任域执行的结合已被证明对于保证单调策略改进至关重要。然而，解决信任域约束的优化问题可能需要大量计算，因为它需要许多共轭梯度步骤和大量的在策略样本。在本文中，我们证明了策略上的信任域约束可以安全地用无信任域约束来替代，而不会损害底层的单调改进保证。关键思想是推广 TRPO 中使用的替代目标，使得由于限制政策之间的最大优势加权比率而仍然出现单调改进保证。这个新的约束概述了迭代策略优化的保守机制，并揭示了优化广义替代目标的实用方法。我们表明，在实践中优化广义目标函数时，可以通过保守来有效地执行新的约束。我们将生成的算法称为无信任区域策略优化 (TREFree)，因为它没有任何显式信任区域约束。实证结果表明，TREFree 在策略性能和样本效率方面优于 TRPO 和近端策略优化（PPO）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需显式信任区域约束的策略优化方法TREFree，通过改进TRPO的代理目标函数，在保证单调策略改进的同时提升计算效率。
AI.motivation: TRPO虽能保证策略单调改进，但其信任区域约束计算成本高，需大量共轭梯度迭代和on-policy样本，限制了实际应用效率。
AI.method: 通过推广TRPO的代理目标函数，用优势加权比约束替代信任区域约束，设计保守优化机制，在无需显式信任区域的情况下仍可保证单调改进，形成TREFree算法。
AI.result: 实验表明TREFree在策略性能和样本效率上均优于TRPO和PPO，验证了方法有效性。

search_text: Trust-Region-Free Policy Optimization for Stochastic Policies 随机策略的无信任域策略优化 Trust Region Policy Optimization (TRPO) is an iterative method that simultaneously maximizes a surrogate objective and enforces a trust region constraint over consecutive policies in each iteration. The combination of the surrogate objective maximization and the trust region enforcement has been shown to be crucial to guarantee a monotonic policy improvement. However, solving a trust-region-constrained optimization problem can be computationally intensive as it requires many steps of conjugate gradient and a large number of on-policy samples. In this paper, we show that the trust region constraint over policies can be safely substituted by a trust-region-free constraint without compromising the underlying monotonic improvement guarantee. The key idea is to generalize the surrogate objective used in TRPO in a way that a monotonic improvement guarantee still emerges as a result of constraining the maximum advantage-weighted ratio between policies. This new constraint outlines a conservative mechanism for iterative policy optimization and sheds light on practical ways to optimize the generalized surrogate objective. We show that the new constraint can be effectively enforced by being conservative when optimizing the generalized objective function in practice. We call the resulting algorithm Trust-REgion-Free Policy Optimization (TREFree) as it is free of any explicit trust region constraints. Empirical results show that TREFree outperforms TRPO and Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) in terms of policy performance and sample efficiency. 信任域策略优化 (TRPO) 是一种迭代方法，可同时最大化代理目标并在每次迭代中对连续策略强制执行信任域约束。替代目标最大化和信任域执行的结合已被证明对于保证单调策略改进至关重要。然而，解决信任域约束的优化问题可能需要大量计算，因为它需要许多共轭梯度步骤和大量的在策略样本。在本文中，我们证明了策略上的信任域约束可以安全地用无信任域约束来替代，而不会损害底层的单调改进保证。关键思想是推广 TRPO 中使用的替代目标，使得由于限制政策之间的最大优势加权比率而仍然出现单调改进保证。这个新的约束概述了迭代策略优化的保守机制，并揭示了优化广义替代目标的实用方法。我们表明，在实践中优化广义目标函数时，可以通过保守来有效地执行新的约束。我们将生成的算法称为无信任区域策略优化 (TREFree)，因为它没有任何显式信任区域约束。实证结果表明，TREFree 在策略性能和样本效率方面优于 TRPO 和近端策略优化（PPO）。 本文提出了一种无需显式信任区域约束的策略优化方法TREFree，通过改进TRPO的代理目标函数，在保证单调策略改进的同时提升计算效率。 Mingfei Sun,Benjamin Ellis,Anuj Mahajan,Sam Devlin,Katja Hofmann,Shimon Whiteson cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hareesh Ravi,Sachin Kelkar,Midhun Harikumar,Ajinkya Kale
title: PRedItOR: Text Guided Image Editing with Diffusion Prior
title_zh: PREdAtOR：使用扩散先验进行文本引导图像编辑
abstract: Diffusion models have shown remarkable capabilities in generating high quality and creative images conditioned on text. An interesting application of such models is structure preserving text guided image editing. Existing approaches rely on text conditioned diffusion models such as Stable Diffusion or Imagen and require compute intensive optimization of text embeddings or fine-tuning the model weights for text guided image editing. We explore text guided image editing with a Hybrid Diffusion Model (HDM) architecture similar to DALLE-2. Our architecture consists of a diffusion prior model that generates CLIP image embedding conditioned on a text prompt and a custom Latent Diffusion Model trained to generate images conditioned on CLIP image embedding. We discover that the diffusion prior model can be used to perform text guided conceptual edits on the CLIP image embedding space without any finetuning or optimization. We combine this with structure preserving edits on the image decoder using existing approaches such as reverse DDIM to perform text guided image editing. Our approach, PRedItOR does not require additional inputs, fine-tuning, optimization or objectives and shows on par or better results than baselines qualitatively and quantitatively. We provide further analysis and understanding of the diffusion prior model and believe this opens up new possibilities in diffusion models research.
summary: Diffusion models have shown remarkable capabilities in generating high quality and creative images conditioned on text. An interesting application of such models is structure preserving text guided image editing. Existing approaches rely on text conditioned diffusion models such as Stable Diffusion or Imagen and require compute intensive optimization of text embeddings or fine-tuning the model weights for text guided image editing. We explore text guided image editing with a Hybrid Diffusion Model (HDM) architecture similar to DALLE-2. Our architecture consists of a diffusion prior model that generates CLIP image embedding conditioned on a text prompt and a custom Latent Diffusion Model trained to generate images conditioned on CLIP image embedding. We discover that the diffusion prior model can be used to perform text guided conceptual edits on the CLIP image embedding space without any finetuning or optimization. We combine this with structure preserving edits on the image decoder using existing approaches such as reverse DDIM to perform text guided image editing. Our approach, PRedItOR does not require additional inputs, fine-tuning, optimization or objectives and shows on par or better results than baselines qualitatively and quantitatively. We provide further analysis and understanding of the diffusion prior model and believe this opens up new possibilities in diffusion models research.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在生成以文本为条件的高质量和创造性图像方面表现出了卓越的能力。这种模型的一个有趣的应用是结构保留文本引导图像编辑。现有方法依赖于文本条件扩散模型，例如稳定扩散或 Imagen，并且需要对文本嵌入进行计算密集型优化或微调模型权重以进行文本引导图像编辑。我们使用类似于 DALLE-2 的混合扩散模型 (HDM) 架构探索文本引导图像编辑。我们的架构由一个扩散先验模型和一个自定义潜在扩散模型组成，该模型可生成以文本提示为条件的 CLIP 图像嵌入，该模型经过训练以生成以 CLIP 图像嵌入为条件的图像。我们发现扩散先验模型可用于在 CLIP 图像嵌入空间上执行文本引导的概念编辑，而无需任何微调或优化。我们将其与图像解码器上的结构保留编辑相结合，使用现有方法（例如反向 DDIM）来执行文本引导图像编辑。我们的方法 PRedItOR 不需要额外的输入、微调、优化或目标，并且在定性和定量上显示出与基线相当或更好的结果。我们对扩散先验模型进行了进一步的分析和理解，并相信这为扩散模型研究开辟了新的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRedItOR方法，通过结合扩散先验模型和潜在扩散模型，实现无需微调或优化的文本引导图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导图像编辑方法依赖于计算密集型的嵌入优化或模型微调，而本文旨在探索无需额外输入或训练的高效编辑方案。
AI.method: 采用类似DALLE-2的混合扩散模型架构，包含生成CLIP图像嵌入的扩散先验模型和基于CLIP嵌入的潜在扩散模型，结合反向DDIM进行结构保持编辑。
AI.result: PRedItOR在定性和定量评估中均达到或超越基线方法效果，且无需额外输入、微调或优化步骤。
AI.conclusion: 扩散先验模型在概念编辑中的有效性为扩散模型研究开辟了新方向，同时提供了对先验模型的深入分析。

authors_text: Yike Zhang,Jack Noble
title: Self-supervised Registration and Segmentation of the Ossicles with A Single Ground Truth Label
title_zh: 使用单一地面实况标签对小骨进行自我监督注册和分割
abstract: AI-assisted surgeries have drawn the attention of the medical image research community due to their real-world impact on improving surgery success rates. For image-guided surgeries, such as Cochlear Implants (CIs), accurate object segmentation can provide useful information for surgeons before an operation. Recently published image segmentation methods that leverage machine learning usually rely on a large number of manually predefined ground truth labels. However, it is a laborious and time-consuming task to prepare the dataset. This paper presents a novel technique using a self-supervised 3D-UNet that produces a dense deformation field between an atlas and a target image that can be used for atlas-based segmentation of the ossicles. Our results show that our method outperforms traditional image segmentation methods and generates a more accurate boundary around the ossicles based on Dice similarity coefficient and point-to-point error comparison. The mean Dice coefficient is improved by 8.51% with our proposed method.
summary: AI-assisted surgeries have drawn the attention of the medical image research community due to their real-world impact on improving surgery success rates. For image-guided surgeries, such as Cochlear Implants (CIs), accurate object segmentation can provide useful information for surgeons before an operation. Recently published image segmentation methods that leverage machine learning usually rely on a large number of manually predefined ground truth labels. However, it is a laborious and time-consuming task to prepare the dataset. This paper presents a novel technique using a self-supervised 3D-UNet that produces a dense deformation field between an atlas and a target image that can be used for atlas-based segmentation of the ossicles. Our results show that our method outperforms traditional image segmentation methods and generates a more accurate boundary around the ossicles based on Dice similarity coefficient and point-to-point error comparison. The mean Dice coefficient is improved by 8.51% with our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 人工智能辅助手术因其对提高手术成功率的现实影响而引起了医学图像研究界的关注。对于图像引导手术，例如人工耳蜗植入 (CI)，准确的对象分割可以在手术前为外科医生提供有用的信息。最近发布的利用机器学习的图像分割方法通常依赖于大量手动预定义的地面真实标签。然而，准备数据集是一项费力且耗时的任务。本文提出了一种使用自监督 3D-UNet 的新技术，该技术在图集和目标图像之间产生密集变形场，可用于基于图集的小骨分割。我们的结果表明，我们的方法优于传统的图像分割方法，并基于 Dice 相似系数和点对点误差比较生成更准确的小骨周围边界。使用我们提出的方法，平均 Dice 系数提高了 8.51%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单个真实标签的自监督3D-UNet方法，用于镫骨等微小骨骼结构的精准分割与配准。
AI.motivation: 传统医学图像分割方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而标注微小骨骼结构（如镫骨）耗时且成本高，亟需减少标注依赖同时提升分割精度。
AI.method: 设计自监督3D-UNet网络，通过生成参考图与目标图像间的密集形变场实现基于图谱的分割，仅需单个真实标签即可完成训练。
AI.result: 在Dice相似系数和点对点误差指标上优于传统方法，平均Dice系数提升8.51%，显著改善了镫骨边界分割精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少标注依赖的同时实现了更精确的微小骨骼分割，为术前影像分析提供了有效工具，具有临床应用潜力。

method: 设计自监督3D-UNet网络，通过生成参考图与目标图像间的密集形变场实现基于图谱的分割，仅需单个真实标签即可完成训练。
result: 在Dice相似系数和点对点误差指标上优于传统方法，平均Dice系数提升8.51%，显著改善了镫骨边界分割精度。
conclusion: 该方法在减少标注依赖的同时实现了更精确的微小骨骼分割，为术前影像分析提供了有效工具，具有临床应用潜力。
search_text: Self-supervised Registration and Segmentation of the Ossicles with A Single Ground Truth Label 使用单一地面实况标签对小骨进行自我监督注册和分割 AI-assisted surgeries have drawn the attention of the medical image research community due to their real-world impact on improving surgery success rates. For image-guided surgeries, such as Cochlear Implants (CIs), accurate object segmentation can provide useful information for surgeons before an operation. Recently published image segmentation methods that leverage machine learning usually rely on a large number of manually predefined ground truth labels. However, it is a laborious and time-consuming task to prepare the dataset. This paper presents a novel technique using a self-supervised 3D-UNet that produces a dense deformation field between an atlas and a target image that can be used for atlas-based segmentation of the ossicles. Our results show that our method outperforms traditional image segmentation methods and generates a more accurate boundary around the ossicles based on Dice similarity coefficient and point-to-point error comparison. The mean Dice coefficient is improved by 8.51% with our proposed method. 人工智能辅助手术因其对提高手术成功率的现实影响而引起了医学图像研究界的关注。对于图像引导手术，例如人工耳蜗植入 (CI)，准确的对象分割可以在手术前为外科医生提供有用的信息。最近发布的利用机器学习的图像分割方法通常依赖于大量手动预定义的地面真实标签。然而，准备数据集是一项费力且耗时的任务。本文提出了一种使用自监督 3D-UNet 的新技术，该技术在图集和目标图像之间产生密集变形场，可用于基于图集的小骨分割。我们的结果表明，我们的方法优于传统的图像分割方法，并基于 Dice 相似系数和点对点误差比较生成更准确的小骨周围边界。使用我们提出的方法，平均 Dice 系数提高了 8.51%。 本文提出了一种基于单个真实标签的自监督3D-UNet方法，用于镫骨等微小骨骼结构的精准分割与配准。 Yike Zhang,Jack Noble eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Bahare Fatemi,Quentin Duval,Rohit Girdhar,Michal Drozdzal,Adriana Romero-Soriano
title: Learning to Substitute Ingredients in Recipes
title_zh: 学习替代食谱中的成分
abstract: Recipe personalization through ingredient substitution has the potential to help people meet their dietary needs and preferences, avoid potential allergens, and ease culinary exploration in everyone's kitchen. To address ingredient substitution, we build a benchmark, composed of a dataset of substitution pairs with standardized splits, evaluation metrics, and baselines. We further introduce Graph-based Ingredient Substitution Module (GISMo), a novel model that leverages the context of a recipe as well as generic ingredient relational information encoded within a graph to rank plausible substitutions. We show through comprehensive experimental validation that GISMo surpasses the best performing baseline by a large margin in terms of mean reciprocal rank. Finally, we highlight the benefits of GISMo by integrating it in an improved image-to-recipe generation pipeline, enabling recipe personalization through user intervention. Quantitative and qualitative results show the efficacy of our proposed system, paving the road towards truly personalized cooking and tasting experiences.
summary: Recipe personalization through ingredient substitution has the potential to help people meet their dietary needs and preferences, avoid potential allergens, and ease culinary exploration in everyone's kitchen. To address ingredient substitution, we build a benchmark, composed of a dataset of substitution pairs with standardized splits, evaluation metrics, and baselines. We further introduce Graph-based Ingredient Substitution Module (GISMo), a novel model that leverages the context of a recipe as well as generic ingredient relational information encoded within a graph to rank plausible substitutions. We show through comprehensive experimental validation that GISMo surpasses the best performing baseline by a large margin in terms of mean reciprocal rank. Finally, we highlight the benefits of GISMo by integrating it in an improved image-to-recipe generation pipeline, enabling recipe personalization through user intervention. Quantitative and qualitative results show the efficacy of our proposed system, paving the road towards truly personalized cooking and tasting experiences.
abstract_zh: 通过成分替代实现食谱个性化有可能帮助人们满足他们的饮食需求和偏好，避免潜在的过敏原，并简化每个人厨房的烹饪探索。为了解决成分替代问题，我们建立了一个基准，由具有标准化分割、评估指标和基线的替代对数据集组成。我们进一步介绍了基于图的成分替代模块（GISMo），这是一种新颖的模型，它利用菜谱的上下文以及图形中编码的通用成分关系信息来对合理的替代进行排名。我们通过全面的实验验证表明，GISMo 在平均倒数排名方面大幅超过了最佳性能基线。最后，我们强调 GISMo 的优势，将其集成到改进的图像到菜谱生成管道中，通过用户干预实现菜谱个性化。定量和定性结果显示了我们提出的系统的功效，为真正个性化的烹饪和品尝体验铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建基准数据集和提出基于图的食材替换模块（GISMo），解决食谱中食材替换问题以实现个性化饮食需求。
AI.motivation: 食材替换可帮助用户满足饮食偏好、避免过敏原并提升烹饪体验，但现有方法缺乏系统性研究和有效模型支持。
AI.method: 构建包含替换对的标准化数据集，设计评估指标与基线模型；提出GISMo模型，结合食谱上下文与图结构中的食材关系进行替换排序。
AI.result: GISMo在平均倒数排名指标上显著优于基线模型，且集成到图像生成流程后，定量与定性结果均验证了系统有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实现真正个性化的烹饪与品鉴体验提供了可行的技术路径。

authors_text: Zhendong Chu,Hongning Wang
title: Meta-Reinforcement Learning via Exploratory Task Clustering
title_zh: 通过探索性任务聚类的元强化学习
abstract: Meta-reinforcement learning (meta-RL) aims to quickly solve new tasks by leveraging knowledge from prior tasks. However, previous studies often assume a single mode homogeneous task distribution, ignoring possible structured heterogeneity among tasks. Leveraging such structures can better facilitate knowledge sharing among related tasks and thus improve sample efficiency. In this paper, we explore the structured heterogeneity among tasks via clustering to improve meta-RL. We develop a dedicated exploratory policy to discover task structures via divide-and-conquer. The knowledge of the identified clusters helps to narrow the search space of task-specific information, leading to more sample efficient policy adaptation. Experiments on various MuJoCo tasks showed the proposed method can unravel cluster structures effectively in both rewards and state dynamics, proving strong advantages against a set of state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Meta-reinforcement learning (meta-RL) aims to quickly solve new tasks by leveraging knowledge from prior tasks. However, previous studies often assume a single mode homogeneous task distribution, ignoring possible structured heterogeneity among tasks. Leveraging such structures can better facilitate knowledge sharing among related tasks and thus improve sample efficiency. In this paper, we explore the structured heterogeneity among tasks via clustering to improve meta-RL. We develop a dedicated exploratory policy to discover task structures via divide-and-conquer. The knowledge of the identified clusters helps to narrow the search space of task-specific information, leading to more sample efficient policy adaptation. Experiments on various MuJoCo tasks showed the proposed method can unravel cluster structures effectively in both rewards and state dynamics, proving strong advantages against a set of state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 元强化学习（meta-RL）旨在通过利用先前任务的知识来快速解决新任务。然而，以前的研究经常假设单一模式同质任务分布，忽略了任务之间可能的结构异质性。利用这种结构可以更好地促进相关任务之间的知识共享，从而提高样本效率。在本文中，我们通过聚类探索任务之间的结构化异质性以改进元强化学习。我们制定了专门的探索性政策，通过分而治之的方式发现任务结构。所识别的集群的知识有助于缩小特定任务信息的搜索空间，从而实现更有效的策略适应样本。对各种 MuJoCo 任务的实验表明，所提出的方法可以在奖励和状态动态方面有效地阐明集群结构，证明相对于一组最先进的基线具有强大的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于探索性任务聚类的元强化学习方法，通过挖掘任务间的结构化异质性提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统元强化学习假设任务分布同质化，忽视了任务间潜在的结构差异，导致知识共享效率低下。
AI.method: 开发探索性策略通过分治法发现任务聚类结构，利用聚类知识缩小任务特定信息搜索空间。
AI.result: 在MuJoCo任务中有效揭示奖励和状态动态的聚类结构，显著优于现有先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结构化任务聚类能有效提升元强化学习的知识迁移效率和样本利用率。

authors_text: Sudip Mittal,Jingdao Chen
title: AI Security Threats against Pervasive Robotic Systems: A Course for Next Generation Cybersecurity Workforce
title_zh: 针对普遍机器人系统的人工智能安全威胁：下一代网络安全劳动力课程
abstract: Robotics, automation, and related Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems have become pervasive bringing in concerns related to security, safety, accuracy, and trust. With growing dependency on physical robots that work in close proximity to humans, the security of these systems is becoming increasingly important to prevent cyber-attacks that could lead to privacy invasion, critical operations sabotage, and bodily harm. The current shortfall of professionals who can defend such systems demands development and integration of such a curriculum. This course description includes details about seven self-contained and adaptive modules on "AI security threats against pervasive robotic systems". Topics include: 1) Introduction, examples of attacks, and motivation; 2) - Robotic AI attack surfaces and penetration testing; 3) - Attack patterns and security strategies for input sensors; 4) - Training attacks and associated security strategies; 5) - Inference attacks and associated security strategies; 6) - Actuator attacks and associated security strategies; and 7) - Ethics of AI, robotics, and cybersecurity.
summary: Robotics, automation, and related Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems have become pervasive bringing in concerns related to security, safety, accuracy, and trust. With growing dependency on physical robots that work in close proximity to humans, the security of these systems is becoming increasingly important to prevent cyber-attacks that could lead to privacy invasion, critical operations sabotage, and bodily harm. The current shortfall of professionals who can defend such systems demands development and integration of such a curriculum. This course description includes details about seven self-contained and adaptive modules on "AI security threats against pervasive robotic systems". Topics include: 1) Introduction, examples of attacks, and motivation; 2) - Robotic AI attack surfaces and penetration testing; 3) - Attack patterns and security strategies for input sensors; 4) - Training attacks and associated security strategies; 5) - Inference attacks and associated security strategies; 6) - Actuator attacks and associated security strategies; and 7) - Ethics of AI, robotics, and cybersecurity.
abstract_zh: 机器人、自动化和相关人工智能 (AI) 系统已变得普遍，带来了与安全性、准确性和信任相关的担忧。随着人们越来越依赖于与人类近距离工作的物理机器人，这些系统的安全性对于防止可能导致隐私侵犯、关键操作破坏和人身伤害的网络攻击变得越来越重要。目前缺乏能够捍卫此类系统的专业人员，因此需要开发和整合此类课程。本课程描述包括有关“针对普遍机器人系统的人工智能安全威胁”的七个独立自适应模块的详细信息。主题包括： 1) 简介、攻击示例和动机； 2) - 机器人人工智能攻击面和渗透测试； 3) - 输入传感器的攻击模式和安全策略； 4) - 训练攻击和相关的安全策略； 5) - 推理攻击和相关的安全策略； 6) - 执行器攻击和相关安全策略； 7) - 人工智能、机器人和网络安全的道德规范。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一门针对下一代网络安全人才的课程，旨在应对无处不在的机器人系统中的AI安全威胁。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人和AI系统在生活中的普及，其安全威胁日益严重，但目前缺乏能够防御这些系统的专业人才，亟需开发相关课程填补这一空白。
AI.method: 通过构建七个独立且适应性强的课程模块，涵盖攻击案例分析、攻击面测试、传感器与执行器安全策略、训练与推理攻击防御及伦理问题等内容，形成系统化教学框架。
AI.result: 开发出包含七个模块的课程体系，为教育机构提供针对机器人AI安全威胁的系统性教学方案，助力培养专业网络安全人才。
AI.conclusion: 该课程有效应对机器人系统安全挑战，通过模块化教学提升下一代网络安全人员的技术能力，从而增强系统安全性与可靠性。

search_text: AI Security Threats against Pervasive Robotic Systems: A Course for Next Generation Cybersecurity Workforce 针对普遍机器人系统的人工智能安全威胁：下一代网络安全劳动力课程 Robotics, automation, and related Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems have become pervasive bringing in concerns related to security, safety, accuracy, and trust. With growing dependency on physical robots that work in close proximity to humans, the security of these systems is becoming increasingly important to prevent cyber-attacks that could lead to privacy invasion, critical operations sabotage, and bodily harm. The current shortfall of professionals who can defend such systems demands development and integration of such a curriculum. This course description includes details about seven self-contained and adaptive modules on "AI security threats against pervasive robotic systems". Topics include: 1) Introduction, examples of attacks, and motivation; 2) - Robotic AI attack surfaces and penetration testing; 3) - Attack patterns and security strategies for input sensors; 4) - Training attacks and associated security strategies; 5) - Inference attacks and associated security strategies; 6) - Actuator attacks and associated security strategies; and 7) - Ethics of AI, robotics, and cybersecurity. 机器人、自动化和相关人工智能 (AI) 系统已变得普遍，带来了与安全性、准确性和信任相关的担忧。随着人们越来越依赖于与人类近距离工作的物理机器人，这些系统的安全性对于防止可能导致隐私侵犯、关键操作破坏和人身伤害的网络攻击变得越来越重要。目前缺乏能够捍卫此类系统的专业人员，因此需要开发和整合此类课程。本课程描述包括有关“针对普遍机器人系统的人工智能安全威胁”的七个独立自适应模块的详细信息。主题包括： 1) 简介、攻击示例和动机； 2) - 机器人人工智能攻击面和渗透测试； 3) - 输入传感器的攻击模式和安全策略； 4) - 训练攻击和相关的安全策略； 5) - 推理攻击和相关的安全策略； 6) - 执行器攻击和相关安全策略； 7) - 人工智能、机器人和网络安全的道德规范。 本文设计了一门针对下一代网络安全人才的课程，旨在应对无处不在的机器人系统中的AI安全威胁。 Sudip Mittal,Jingdao Chen cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Kazuki Irie,Róbert Csordás,Jürgen Schmidhuber
title: Self-Organising Neural Discrete Representation Learning à la Kohonen
title_zh: Kohonen 的自组织神经离散表示学习
comment: Two first authors. Accepted to ICANN 2024. The Version of Record of this contribution is published by Springer. An earlier version was presented at ICML 2023 Workshop on Sampling and Optimization in Discrete Space (SODS)
comments: Two first authors. Accepted to ICANN 2024. The Version of Record of this contribution is published by Springer. An earlier version was presented at ICML 2023 Workshop on Sampling and Optimization in Discrete Space (SODS)
abstract: Unsupervised learning of discrete representations in neural networks (NNs) from continuous ones is essential for many modern applications. Vector Quantisation (VQ) has become popular for this, in particular in the context of generative models, such as Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs), where the exponential moving average-based VQ (EMA-VQ) algorithm is often used. Here, we study an alternative VQ algorithm based on Kohonen's learning rule for the Self-Organising Map (KSOM; 1982). EMA-VQ is a special case of KSOM. KSOM is known to offer two potential benefits: empirically, it converges faster than EMA-VQ, and KSOM-generated discrete representations form a topological structure on the grid whose nodes are the discrete symbols, resulting in an artificial version of the brain's topographic map. We revisit these properties by using KSOM in VQ-VAEs for image processing. In our experiments, the speed-up compared to well-configured EMA-VQ is only observable at the beginning of training, but KSOM is generally much more robust, e.g., w.r.t. the choice of initialisation schemes.
summary: Unsupervised learning of discrete representations in neural networks (NNs) from continuous ones is essential for many modern applications. Vector Quantisation (VQ) has become popular for this, in particular in the context of generative models, such as Variational Auto-Encoders (VAEs), where the exponential moving average-based VQ (EMA-VQ) algorithm is often used. Here, we study an alternative VQ algorithm based on Kohonen's learning rule for the Self-Organising Map (KSOM; 1982). EMA-VQ is a special case of KSOM. KSOM is known to offer two potential benefits: empirically, it converges faster than EMA-VQ, and KSOM-generated discrete representations form a topological structure on the grid whose nodes are the discrete symbols, resulting in an artificial version of the brain's topographic map. We revisit these properties by using KSOM in VQ-VAEs for image processing. In our experiments, the speed-up compared to well-configured EMA-VQ is only observable at the beginning of training, but KSOM is generally much more robust, e.g., w.r.t. the choice of initialisation schemes.
abstract_zh: 从连续神经网络（NN）中离散表示的无监督学习对于许多现代应用来说至关重要。矢量量化（VQ）因此变得流行，特别是在生成模型的背景下，例如变分自动编码器（VAE），其中经常使用基于指数移动平均的 VQ（EMA-VQ）算法。在这里，我们研究了一种基于 Kohonen 自组织映射学习规则的替代 VQ 算法（KSOM；1982）。 EMA-VQ 是 KSOM 的特例。众所周知，KSOM 具有两个潜在的好处：从经验上看，它比 EMA-VQ 收敛得更快，并且 KSOM 生成的离散表示在网格上形成拓扑结构，其节点是离散符号，从而产生大脑地形图的人工版本。我们通过在 VQ-VAE 中使用 KSOM 进行图像处理来重新审视这些属性。在我们的实验中，与配置良好的 EMA-VQ 相比，仅在训练开始时才能观察到加速，但 KSOM 通常更加稳健，例如，w.r.t.初始化方案的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于Kohonen自组织映射（KSOM）的矢量量化（VQ）算法在变分自编码器（VAE）中的应用，以替代常用的EMA-VQ方法。
AI.motivation: 矢量量化在生成模型中至关重要，但EMA-VQ存在收敛速度和初始化敏感性问题。KSOM因其拓扑结构和潜在的收敛优势被提出作为替代方案。
AI.method: 将KSOM学习规则引入VQ-VAE框架，通过实验对比KSOM与EMA-VQ在图像处理任务中的性能差异，分析其收敛速度和鲁棒性。
AI.result: KSOM在训练初期收敛速度较快，但整体鲁棒性优于EMA-VQ，尤其对初始化方案的选择不敏感。
AI.conclusion: KSOM为VQ-VAE提供了更稳定的离散表示学习方法，尽管初始速度优势有限，但其鲁棒性使其成为值得推广的替代方案。

Here, we study an alternative VQ algorithm based on Kohonen's learning rule for the Self-Organising Map (KSOM; 1982). EMA-VQ is a special case of KSOM. We revisit these properties by using KSOM in VQ-VAEs for image processing. authors_text: Brandon Trabucco,Kyle Doherty,Max Gurinas,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: Effective Data Augmentation With Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型进行有效的数据增强
comment: Update to ICLR 2024 manuscript (https://openreview.net/forum?id=ZWzUA9zeAg), add leafy spurge citations
comments: Update to ICLR 2024 manuscript (https://openreview.net/forum?id=ZWzUA9zeAg), add leafy spurge citations
abstract: Data augmentation is one of the most prevalent tools in deep learning, underpinning many recent advances, including those from classification, generative models, and representation learning. The standard approach to data augmentation combines simple transformations like rotations and flips to generate new images from existing ones. However, these new images lack diversity along key semantic axes present in the data. Current augmentations cannot alter the high-level semantic attributes, such as animal species present in a scene, to enhance the diversity of data. We address the lack of diversity in data augmentation with image-to-image transformations parameterized by pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models. Our method edits images to change their semantics using an off-the-shelf diffusion model, and generalizes to novel visual concepts from a few labelled examples. We evaluate our approach on few-shot image classification tasks, and on a real-world weed recognition task, and observe an improvement in accuracy in tested domains.
summary: Data augmentation is one of the most prevalent tools in deep learning, underpinning many recent advances, including those from classification, generative models, and representation learning. The standard approach to data augmentation combines simple transformations like rotations and flips to generate new images from existing ones. However, these new images lack diversity along key semantic axes present in the data. Current augmentations cannot alter the high-level semantic attributes, such as animal species present in a scene, to enhance the diversity of data. We address the lack of diversity in data augmentation with image-to-image transformations parameterized by pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models. Our method edits images to change their semantics using an off-the-shelf diffusion model, and generalizes to novel visual concepts from a few labelled examples. We evaluate our approach on few-shot image classification tasks, and on a real-world weed recognition task, and observe an improvement in accuracy in tested domains.
abstract_zh: 数据增强是深度学习中最流行的工具之一，支撑着许多最新进展，包括分类、生成模型和表示学习方面的进展。数据增强的标准方法结合了旋转和翻转等简单变换，以从现有图像生成新图像。然而，这些新图像缺乏数据中关键语义轴的多样性。当前的增强功能无法改变高级语义属性（例如场景中存在的动物物种）以增强数据的多样性。我们通过预先训练的文本到图像扩散模型参数化的图像到图像转换来解决数据增强缺乏多样性的问题。我们的方法使用现成的扩散模型编辑图像以改变其语义，并从一些标记的示例中推广到新颖的视觉概念。我们在少样本图像分类任务和现实世界杂草识别任务上评估我们的方法，并观察到测试领域准确性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用预训练文本到图像扩散模型进行参数化图像转换，以增强数据多样性并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法无法改变图像高层语义属性（如物体类别），导致生成数据语义多样性不足，限制了模型性能提升。
AI.method: 通过预训练扩散模型实现图像语义编辑，利用少量标注样本生成符合新语义的图像，扩展视觉概念表示。
AI.result: 在少样本图像分类和实际杂草识别任务中，该方法均取得准确率提升的实验结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于扩散模型的数据增强方法能有效扩展数据语义多样性，为少样本学习和实际应用提供新思路。
