We address the lack of diversity in data augmentation with image-to-image transformations parameterized by pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models. Our method edits images to change their semantics using an off-the-shelf diffusion model, and generalizes to novel visual concepts from a few labelled examples. We evaluate our approach on few-shot image classification tasks, and on a real-world weed recognition task, and observe an improvement in accuracy in tested domains. 数据增强是深度学习中最流行的工具之一，支撑着许多最新进展，包括分类、生成模型和表示学习方面的进展。数据增强的标准方法结合了旋转和翻转等简单变换，以从现有图像生成新图像。然而，这些新图像缺乏数据中关键语义轴的多样性。当前的增强功能无法改变高级语义属性（例如场景中存在的动物物种）以增强数据的多样性。我们通过预先训练的文本到图像扩散模型参数化的图像到图像转换来解决数据增强缺乏多样性的问题。我们的方法使用现成的扩散模型编辑图像以改变其语义，并从一些标记的示例中推广到新颖的视觉概念。我们在少样本图像分类任务和现实世界杂草识别任务上评估我们的方法，并观察到测试领域准确性的提高。 本文提出利用预训练文本到图像扩散模型进行参数化图像转换，以增强数据多样性并提升模型性能。 Brandon Trabucco,Kyle Doherty,Max Gurinas,Ruslan Salakhutdinov cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Zitao Liu,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Boyu Gao,Weiqi Luo,Jian Weng
title: Enhancing Deep Knowledge Tracing with Auxiliary Tasks
title_zh: 通过辅助任务增强深度知识追踪
comment: Accepted at WWW'23: The 2023 ACM Web Conference, 2023
comments: Accepted at WWW'23: The 2023 ACM Web Conference, 2023
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) is the problem of predicting students' future performance based on their historical interactions with intelligent tutoring systems. Recent studies have applied multiple types of deep neural networks to solve the KT problem. However, there are two important factors in real-world educational data that are not well represented. First, most existing works augment input representations with the co-occurrence matrix of questions and knowledge components\footnote{\label{ft:kc}A KC is a generalization of everyday terms like concept, principle, fact, or skill.} (KCs) but fail to explicitly integrate such intrinsic relations into the final response prediction task. Second, the individualized historical performance of students has not been well captured. In this paper, we proposed \emph{AT-DKT} to improve the prediction performance of the original deep knowledge tracing model with two auxiliary learning tasks, i.e., \emph{question tagging (QT) prediction task} and \emph{individualized prior knowledge (IK) prediction task}. Specifically, the QT task helps learn better question representations by predicting whether questions contain specific KCs. The IK task captures students' global historical performance by progressively predicting student-level prior knowledge that is hidden in students' historical learning interactions. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three real-world educational datasets and compare the proposed approach to both deep sequential KT models and non-sequential models. Experimental results show that \emph{AT-DKT} outperforms all sequential models with more than 0.9\% improvements of AUC for all datasets, and is almost the second best compared to non-sequential models. Furthermore, we conduct both ablation studies and quantitative analysis to show the effectiveness of auxiliary tasks and the superior prediction outcomes of \emph{AT-DKT}.
summary: Knowledge tracing (KT) is the problem of predicting students' future performance based on their historical interactions with intelligent tutoring systems. Recent studies have applied multiple types of deep neural networks to solve the KT problem. However, there are two important factors in real-world educational data that are not well represented. First, most existing works augment input representations with the co-occurrence matrix of questions and knowledge components\footnote{\label{ft:kc}A KC is a generalization of everyday terms like concept, principle, fact, or skill.} (KCs) but fail to explicitly integrate such intrinsic relations into the final response prediction task. Second, the individualized historical performance of students has not been well captured. In this paper, we proposed \emph{AT-DKT} to improve the prediction performance of the original deep knowledge tracing model with two auxiliary learning tasks, i.e., \emph{question tagging (QT) prediction task} and \emph{individualized prior knowledge (IK) prediction task}. Specifically, the QT task helps learn better question representations by predicting whether questions contain specific KCs. The IK task captures students' global historical performance by progressively predicting student-level prior knowledge that is hidden in students' historical learning interactions. We conduct comprehensive experiments on three real-world educational datasets and compare the proposed approach to both deep sequential KT models and non-sequential models. Experimental results show that \emph{AT-DKT} outperforms all sequential models with more than 0.9\% improvements of AUC for all datasets, and is almost the second best compared to non-sequential models. Furthermore, we conduct both ablation studies and quantitative analysis to show the effectiveness of auxiliary tasks and the superior prediction outcomes of \emph{AT-DKT}.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是根据学生与智能辅导系统的历史交互来预测学生未来表现的问题。最近的研究应用了多种类型的深度神经网络来解决 KT 问题。然而，现实世界的教育数据中有两个重要因素没有得到很好的体现。首先，大多数现有的工作通过问题和知识组件的共现矩阵来增强输入表示\footnote{\label{ft:kc}KC是概念、原则、事实或技能等日常术语的概括。}（KC），但未能明确地将这种内在关系整合到最终的响应预测任务中。其次，学生的个性化历史表现没有得到很好的捕捉。在本文中，我们提出了\emph{AT-DKT}来提高原始深度知识追踪模型的预测性能，它具有两个辅助学习任务，即\emph{问题标记（QT）预测任务}和\emph{个性化先验知识（IK）预测任务}。具体来说，QT 任务通过预测问题是否包含特定的 KC 来帮助学习更好的问题表示。 IK 任务通过逐步预测隐藏在学生历史学习交互中的学生水平先验知识来捕获学生的全局历史表现。我们对三个现实世界的教育数据集进行了全面的实验，并将所提出的方法与深度序列 KT 模型和非序列模型进行了比较。实验结果表明，\emph{AT-DKT} 优于所有序列模型，所有数据集的 AUC 提高超过 0.9\%，与非序列模型相比几乎是第二好的。此外，我们还进行了消融研究和定量分析，以显示辅助任务的有效性和 \emph{AT-DKT} 的优越预测结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AT-DKT模型，通过引入两个辅助任务（问题标签预测和个性化先验知识预测）来增强深度知识追踪（KT）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有KT模型未能有效整合问题与知识概念（KCs）的内在关系，且未充分捕捉学生的个性化历史表现，导致预测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计AT-DKT模型，包含两个辅助任务：1) 问题标签预测任务（QT）通过预测问题包含的KCs优化问题表示；2) 个性化先验知识预测任务（IK）通过分析学生历史学习记录捕捉其全局表现。
AI.result: 在三个真实教育数据集上，AT-DKT相比所有序列模型AUC提升超0.9%，且接近非序列模型的最优性能；消融实验验证了辅助任务的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 辅助任务能有效解决KT中的关键问题，提升模型对知识概念关联和学生个性化表现的建模能力，从而显著优化预测效果。

authors_text: Khashayar Rohanimanesh,Jake Metzger,William Richards,Aviv Tamar
title: Online Tool Selection with Learned Grasp Prediction Models
title_zh: 使用学习的抓取预测模型进行在线工具选择
comment: 14 pages (including the cover page), 5 Figures, Technical Report, OSARO Inc
comments: 14 pages (including the cover page), 5 Figures, Technical Report, OSARO Inc
abstract: Deep learning-based grasp prediction models have become an industry standard for robotic bin-picking systems. To maximize pick success, production environments are often equipped with several end-effector tools that can be swapped on-the-fly, based on the target object. Tool-change, however, takes time. Choosing the order of grasps to perform, and corresponding tool-change actions, can improve system throughput; this is the topic of our work. The main challenge in planning tool change is uncertainty - we typically cannot see objects in the bin that are currently occluded. Inspired by queuing and admission control problems, we model the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), where the goal is to maximize expected throughput, and we pursue an approximate solution based on model predictive control, where at each time step we plan based only on the currently visible objects. Special to our method is the idea of void zones, which are geometrical boundaries in which an unknown object will be present, and therefore cannot be accounted for during planning. Our planning problem can be solved using integer linear programming (ILP). However, we find that an approximate solution based on sparse tree search yields near optimal performance at a fraction of the time. Another question that we explore is how to measure the performance of tool-change planning: we find that throughput alone can fail to capture delicate and smooth behavior, and propose a principled alternative. Finally, we demonstrate our algorithms on both synthetic and real world bin picking tasks.
summary: Deep learning-based grasp prediction models have become an industry standard for robotic bin-picking systems. To maximize pick success, production environments are often equipped with several end-effector tools that can be swapped on-the-fly, based on the target object. Tool-change, however, takes time. Choosing the order of grasps to perform, and corresponding tool-change actions, can improve system throughput; this is the topic of our work. The main challenge in planning tool change is uncertainty - we typically cannot see objects in the bin that are currently occluded. Inspired by queuing and admission control problems, we model the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), where the goal is to maximize expected throughput, and we pursue an approximate solution based on model predictive control, where at each time step we plan based only on the currently visible objects. Special to our method is the idea of void zones, which are geometrical boundaries in which an unknown object will be present, and therefore cannot be accounted for during planning. Our planning problem can be solved using integer linear programming (ILP). However, we find that an approximate solution based on sparse tree search yields near optimal performance at a fraction of the time. Another question that we explore is how to measure the performance of tool-change planning: we find that throughput alone can fail to capture delicate and smooth behavior, and propose a principled alternative. Finally, we demonstrate our algorithms on both synthetic and real world bin picking tasks.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习的抓取预测模型已成为机器人垃圾箱拣选系统的行业标准。为了最大限度地提高拾取成功率，生产环境通常配备多个末端执行器工具，可以根据目标对象即时交换。然而，更换工具需要时间。选择要执行的抓取顺序以及相应的换刀操作可以提高系统吞吐量；这是我们工作的主题。规划工具变更的主要挑战是不确定性 - 我们通常看不到垃圾箱中当前被遮挡的物体。受排队和准入控制问题的启发，我们将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其目标是最大化预期吞吐量，并且我们追求基于模型预测控制的近似解决方案，其中在每个时间步骤我们仅基于当前可见的对象进行规划。我们的方法的特殊之处在于空隙区域的概念，空隙区域是其中存在未知物体的几何边界，因此在规划过程中无法考虑。我们的规划问题可以使用整数线性规划（ILP）来解决。然而，我们发现基于稀疏树搜索的近似解决方案在一小部分时间内产生接近最佳的性能。我们探索的另一个问题是如何衡量换刀计划的性能：我们发现仅靠吞吐量可能无法捕捉微妙而平稳的行为，并提出了一个有原则的替代方案。最后，我们在合成和现实世界的垃圾箱拣选任务中展示了我们的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在机器人分拣系统中如何通过学习抓取预测模型和工具选择策略，优化工具更换顺序以提高系统吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 工具更换耗时且生产环境中存在遮挡物，传统方法难以平衡吞吐量与不确定性，需优化抓取顺序和工具切换策略。
AI.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），结合模型预测控制（MPC）和稀疏树搜索，引入‘空置区域’概念处理遮挡不确定性，并提出基于整数线性规划（ILP）的近似解法。
AI.result: 算法在合成与真实分拣任务中均表现优异，稀疏树搜索效率远超ILP；提出的新性能评估指标能更全面反映系统行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合MPC与空置区域建模，提出高效工具切换策略，验证了新评估指标在复杂场景下的有效性，为分拣系统优化提供新思路。

method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），结合模型预测控制（MPC）和稀疏树搜索，引入‘空置区域’概念处理遮挡不确定性，并提出基于整数线性规划（ILP）的近似解法。
result: 算法在合成与真实分拣任务中均表现优异，稀疏树搜索效率远超ILP；提出的新性能评估指标能更全面反映系统行为。
conclusion: 通过结合MPC与空置区域建模，提出高效工具切换策略，验证了新评估指标在复杂场景下的有效性，为分拣系统优化提供新思路。
search_text: Online Tool Selection with Learned Grasp Prediction Models 使用学习的抓取预测模型进行在线工具选择 Deep learning-based grasp prediction models have become an industry standard for robotic bin-picking systems. To maximize pick success, production environments are often equipped with several end-effector tools that can be swapped on-the-fly, based on the target object. Tool-change, however, takes time. Choosing the order of grasps to perform, and corresponding tool-change actions, can improve system throughput; this is the topic of our work. The main challenge in planning tool change is uncertainty - we typically cannot see objects in the bin that are currently occluded. Inspired by queuing and admission control problems, we model the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP), where the goal is to maximize expected throughput, and we pursue an approximate solution based on model predictive control, where at each time step we plan based only on the currently visible objects. Special to our method is the idea of void zones, which are geometrical boundaries in which an unknown object will be present, and therefore cannot be accounted for during planning. Our planning problem can be solved using integer linear programming (ILP). However, we find that an approximate solution based on sparse tree search yields near optimal performance at a fraction of the time. Another question that we explore is how to measure the performance of tool-change planning: we find that throughput alone can fail to capture delicate and smooth behavior, and propose a principled alternative. Finally, we demonstrate our algorithms on both synthetic and real world bin picking tasks. 基于深度学习的抓取预测模型已成为机器人垃圾箱拣选系统的行业标准。为了最大限度地提高拾取成功率，生产环境通常配备多个末端执行器工具，可以根据目标对象即时交换。然而，更换工具需要时间。选择要执行的抓取顺序以及相应的换刀操作可以提高系统吞吐量；这是我们工作的主题。规划工具变更的主要挑战是不确定性 - 我们通常看不到垃圾箱中当前被遮挡的物体。受排队和准入控制问题的启发，我们将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），其目标是最大化预期吞吐量，并且我们追求基于模型预测控制的近似解决方案，其中在每个时间步骤我们仅基于当前可见的对象进行规划。我们的方法的特殊之处在于空隙区域的概念，空隙区域是其中存在未知物体的几何边界，因此在规划过程中无法考虑。我们的规划问题可以使用整数线性规划（ILP）来解决。然而，我们发现基于稀疏树搜索的近似解决方案在一小部分时间内产生接近最佳的性能。我们探索的另一个问题是如何衡量换刀计划的性能：我们发现仅靠吞吐量可能无法捕捉微妙而平稳的行为，并提出了一个有原则的替代方案。最后，我们在合成和现实世界的垃圾箱拣选任务中展示了我们的算法。 本文研究了在机器人分拣系统中如何通过学习抓取预测模型和工具选择策略，优化工具更换顺序以提高系统吞吐量。 Khashayar Rohanimanesh,Jake Metzger,William Richards,Aviv Tamar cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Donghao Ying,Yuhao Ding,Alec Koppel,Javad Lavaei
title: Scalable Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with General Utilities
title_zh: 具有通用实用程序的可扩展多代理强化学习
comment: Supplementary material for the contribution to American Control Conference 2023 under the same title
comments: Supplementary material for the contribution to American Control Conference 2023 under the same title
abstract: We study the scalable multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with general utilities, defined as nonlinear functions of the team's long-term state-action occupancy measure. The objective is to find a localized policy that maximizes the average of the team's local utility functions without the full observability of each agent in the team. By exploiting the spatial correlation decay property of the network structure, we propose a scalable distributed policy gradient algorithm with shadow reward and localized policy that consists of three steps: (1) shadow reward estimation, (2) truncated shadow Q-function estimation, and (3) truncated policy gradient estimation and policy update. Our algorithm converges, with high probability, to $ε$-stationarity with $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ samples up to some approximation error that decreases exponentially in the communication radius. This is the first result in the literature on multi-agent RL with general utilities that does not require the full observability.
summary: We study the scalable multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) with general utilities, defined as nonlinear functions of the team's long-term state-action occupancy measure. The objective is to find a localized policy that maximizes the average of the team's local utility functions without the full observability of each agent in the team. By exploiting the spatial correlation decay property of the network structure, we propose a scalable distributed policy gradient algorithm with shadow reward and localized policy that consists of three steps: (1) shadow reward estimation, (2) truncated shadow Q-function estimation, and (3) truncated policy gradient estimation and policy update. Our algorithm converges, with high probability, to $ε$-stationarity with $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ samples up to some approximation error that decreases exponentially in the communication radius. This is the first result in the literature on multi-agent RL with general utilities that does not require the full observability.
abstract_zh: 我们研究具有通用效用的可扩展多智能体强化学习（MARL），定义为团队长期状态动作占用度量的非线性函数。目标是找到一种本地化策略，在无需团队中每个智能体完全可观察的情况下，最大化团队本地效用函数的平均值。通过利用网络结构的空间相关性衰减特性，我们提出了一种具有影子奖励和局部策略的可扩展分布式策略梯度算法，该算法由三个步骤组成：（1）影子奖励估计，（2）截断影子Q函数估计，（3）截断策略梯度估计和策略更新。我们的算法以高概率收敛到 $ε$-平稳性，$\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(ε^{-2})$ 样本达到一些近似误差，该误差在通信半径中呈指数下降。这是关于多智能体强化学习文献中第一个结果，具有不需要完全可观察性的通用实用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无需完全可观测性的可扩展多智能体强化学习（MARL）问题，提出了一种基于影子奖励和局部策略的分布式算法。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL方法通常依赖于完全可观测性或线性效用函数，难以处理大规模网络中的非线性通用效用函数问题。
AI.method: 利用网络结构的空间相关性衰减特性，设计包含影子奖励估计、截断影子Q函数估计和截断策略梯度更新的三步分布式算法。
AI.result: 算法以高概率收敛到ε-平稳点，样本复杂度为O(ε⁻²)，近似误差随通信半径指数级衰减。
AI.conclusion: 首次在无需完全可观测性的前提下实现通用效用函数的可扩展MARL，为大规模多智能体系统提供了理论保证。

authors_text: Angeliki Giannou,Shashank Rajput,Dimitris Papailiopoulos
title: The Expressive Power of Tuning Only the Normalization Layers
title_zh: 仅调整标准化层的表现力
abstract: Feature normalization transforms such as Batch and Layer-Normalization have become indispensable ingredients of state-of-the-art deep neural networks. Recent studies on fine-tuning large pretrained models indicate that just tuning the parameters of these affine transforms can achieve high accuracy for downstream tasks. These findings open the questions about the expressive power of tuning the normalization layers of frozen networks. In this work, we take the first step towards this question and show that for random ReLU networks, fine-tuning only its normalization layers can reconstruct any target network that is $O(\sqrt{\text{width}})$ times smaller. We show that this holds even for randomly sparsified networks, under sufficient overparameterization, in agreement with prior empirical work.
summary: Feature normalization transforms such as Batch and Layer-Normalization have become indispensable ingredients of state-of-the-art deep neural networks. Recent studies on fine-tuning large pretrained models indicate that just tuning the parameters of these affine transforms can achieve high accuracy for downstream tasks. These findings open the questions about the expressive power of tuning the normalization layers of frozen networks. In this work, we take the first step towards this question and show that for random ReLU networks, fine-tuning only its normalization layers can reconstruct any target network that is $O(\sqrt{\text{width}})$ times smaller. We show that this holds even for randomly sparsified networks, under sufficient overparameterization, in agreement with prior empirical work.
abstract_zh: 批处理和层归一化等特征归一化变换已成为最先进的深度神经网络不可或缺的组成部分。最近对大型预训练模型进行微调的研究表明，仅调整这些仿射变换的参数就可以实现下游任务的高精度。这些发现提出了关于调整冻结网络标准化层的表达能力的问题。在这项工作中，我们朝着这个问题迈出了第一步，并表明对于随机 ReLU 网络，仅微调其归一化层可以重建任何 $O(\sqrt{\text{width}})$ 倍小的目标网络。我们证明，即使对于随机稀疏网络，在足够的过度参数化下，这也成立，与之前的经验工作一致。

AI.tldr: 本文研究仅调整归一化层参数时的模型表达能力，证明其可重建更小的目标网络。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明调整归一化层参数可提升下游任务性能，但其理论表达能力尚未明确，需探索其潜力。
AI.method: 通过理论分析随机ReLU网络，研究仅调整归一化层参数对网络表达能力的影响，并验证稀疏化网络下的有效性。
AI.result: 证明仅调整归一化层可重建目标网络的O(√width)倍压缩版本，且适用于随机稀疏化网络。
AI.conclusion: 归一化层参数调整具有强大表达能力，为模型压缩和高效微调提供理论支持。

authors_text: Jinsun Liu,Challen Enninful Adu,Lucas Lymburner,Vishrut Kaushik,Lena Trang,Ram Vasudevan
title: RADIUS: Risk-Aware, Real-Time, Reachability-Based Motion Planning
title_zh: RADIUS：风险感知、实时、基于可达性的运动规划
abstract: Deterministic methods for motion planning guarantee safety amidst uncertainty in obstacle locations by trying to restrict the robot from operating in any possible location that an obstacle could be in. Unfortunately, this can result in overly conservative behavior. Chance-constrained optimization can be applied to improve the performance of motion planning algorithms by allowing for a user-specified amount of bounded constraint violation. However, state-of-the-art methods rely either on moment-based inequalities, which can be overly conservative, or make it difficult to satisfy assumptions about the class of probability distributions used to model uncertainty. To address these challenges, this work proposes a real-time, risk-aware reachability-based motion planning framework called RADIUS. The method first generates a reachable set of parameterized trajectories for the robot offline. At run time, RADIUS computes a closed-form over-approximation of the risk of a collision with an obstacle. This is done without restricting the probability distribution used to model uncertainty to a simple class (e.g., Gaussian). Then, RADIUS performs real-time optimization to construct a trajectory that can be followed by the robot in a manner that is certified to have a risk of collision that is less than or equal to a user-specified threshold. The proposed algorithm is compared to several state-of-the-art chance-constrained and deterministic methods in simulation, and is shown to consistently outperform them in a variety of driving scenarios. A demonstration of the proposed framework on hardware is also provided.
summary: Deterministic methods for motion planning guarantee safety amidst uncertainty in obstacle locations by trying to restrict the robot from operating in any possible location that an obstacle could be in. Unfortunately, this can result in overly conservative behavior. Chance-constrained optimization can be applied to improve the performance of motion planning algorithms by allowing for a user-specified amount of bounded constraint violation. However, state-of-the-art methods rely either on moment-based inequalities, which can be overly conservative, or make it difficult to satisfy assumptions about the class of probability distributions used to model uncertainty. To address these challenges, this work proposes a real-time, risk-aware reachability-based motion planning framework called RADIUS. The method first generates a reachable set of parameterized trajectories for the robot offline. At run time, RADIUS computes a closed-form over-approximation of the risk of a collision with an obstacle. This is done without restricting the probability distribution used to model uncertainty to a simple class (e.g., Gaussian). Then, RADIUS performs real-time optimization to construct a trajectory that can be followed by the robot in a manner that is certified to have a risk of collision that is less than or equal to a user-specified threshold. The proposed algorithm is compared to several state-of-the-art chance-constrained and deterministic methods in simulation, and is shown to consistently outperform them in a variety of driving scenarios. A demonstration of the proposed framework on hardware is also provided.
abstract_zh: 运动规划的确定性方法通过尝试限制机器人在任何可能存在障碍物的位置进行操作，在障碍物位置不确定的情况下保证安全。不幸的是，这可能会导致过于保守的行为。通过允许用户指定数量的有界约束违规，可以应用机会约束优化来提高运动规划算法的性能。然而，最先进的方法要么依赖于基于矩的不等式，这可能过于保守，要么难以满足用于建模不确定性的概率分布类别的假设。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作提出了一种实时的、具有风险意识的基于可达性的运动规划框架，称为 RADIUS。该方法首先为机器人离线生成一组可到达的参数化轨迹。在运行时，RADIUS 计算与障碍物碰撞风险的封闭式过近似。这是在不限制用于对简单类（例如高斯）建模不确定性的概率分布的情况下完成的。然后，RADIUS 执行实时优化，以构建机器人可以遵循的轨迹，该轨迹经认证具有小于或等于用户指定阈值的碰撞风险。所提出的算法在模拟中与几种最先进的机会约束和确定性方法进行了比较，并被证明在各种驾驶场景中始终优于它们。还提供了所提出的硬件框架的演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种实时风险感知的可达性运动规划框架RADIUS，解决不确定环境下机器人运动规划中的碰撞风险问题。
AI.motivation: 现有确定性方法因过度保守影响性能，机会约束优化方法受限于概率分布假设或保守性，难以灵活处理实际场景中的不确定性。
AI.method: 离线生成参数化轨迹可达集，实时计算碰撞风险闭式上界（无需限制概率分布类型），并通过实时优化生成满足用户风险阈值的轨迹。
AI.result: 仿真中优于多种先进机会约束和确定性方法，多种驾驶场景表现更优，并成功在硬件平台上验证框架有效性。
AI.conclusion: RADIUS通过风险感知的可达性分析，在保证安全的同时提升运动规划效率，为实际应用提供灵活可靠的解决方案。

search_text: RADIUS: Risk-Aware, Real-Time, Reachability-Based Motion Planning RADIUS：风险感知、实时、基于可达性的运动规划 Deterministic methods for motion planning guarantee safety amidst uncertainty in obstacle locations by trying to restrict the robot from operating in any possible location that an obstacle could be in. Unfortunately, this can result in overly conservative behavior. Chance-constrained optimization can be applied to improve the performance of motion planning algorithms by allowing for a user-specified amount of bounded constraint violation. However, state-of-the-art methods rely either on moment-based inequalities, which can be overly conservative, or make it difficult to satisfy assumptions about the class of probability distributions used to model uncertainty. To address these challenges, this work proposes a real-time, risk-aware reachability-based motion planning framework called RADIUS. The method first generates a reachable set of parameterized trajectories for the robot offline. At run time, RADIUS computes a closed-form over-approximation of the risk of a collision with an obstacle. This is done without restricting the probability distribution used to model uncertainty to a simple class (e.g., Gaussian). Then, RADIUS performs real-time optimization to construct a trajectory that can be followed by the robot in a manner that is certified to have a risk of collision that is less than or equal to a user-specified threshold. The proposed algorithm is compared to several state-of-the-art chance-constrained and deterministic methods in simulation, and is shown to consistently outperform them in a variety of driving scenarios. A demonstration of the proposed framework on hardware is also provided. 运动规划的确定性方法通过尝试限制机器人在任何可能存在障碍物的位置进行操作，在障碍物位置不确定的情况下保证安全。不幸的是，这可能会导致过于保守的行为。通过允许用户指定数量的有界约束违规，可以应用机会约束优化来提高运动规划算法的性能。然而，最先进的方法要么依赖于基于矩的不等式，这可能过于保守，要么难以满足用于建模不确定性的概率分布类别的假设。为了应对这些挑战，这项工作提出了一种实时的、具有风险意识的基于可达性的运动规划框架，称为 RADIUS。该方法首先为机器人离线生成一组可到达的参数化轨迹。在运行时，RADIUS 计算与障碍物碰撞风险的封闭式过近似。这是在不限制用于对简单类（例如高斯）建模不确定性的概率分布的情况下完成的。然后，RADIUS 执行实时优化，以构建机器人可以遵循的轨迹，该轨迹经认证具有小于或等于用户指定阈值的碰撞风险。所提出的算法在模拟中与几种最先进的机会约束和确定性方法进行了比较，并被证明在各种驾驶场景中始终优于它们。还提供了所提出的硬件框架的演示。 本文提出一种实时风险感知的可达性运动规划框架RADIUS，解决不确定环境下机器人运动规划中的碰撞风险问题。 Jinsun Liu,Challen Enninful Adu,Lucas Lymburner,Vishrut Kaushik,Lena Trang,Ram Vasudevan cs.RO

authors_text: Dmitriy Rivkin,Gregory Dudek,Nikhil Kakodkar,David Meger,Oliver Limoyo,Xue Liu,Francois Hogan
title: ANSEL Photobot: A Robot Event Photographer with Semantic Intelligence
title_zh: ANSEL Photobot：具有语义智能的机器人活动摄影师
abstract: Our work examines the way in which large language models can be used for robotic planning and sampling, specifically the context of automated photographic documentation. Specifically, we illustrate how to produce a photo-taking robot with an exceptional level of semantic awareness by leveraging recent advances in general purpose language (LM) and vision-language (VLM) models. Given a high-level description of an event we use an LM to generate a natural-language list of photo descriptions that one would expect a photographer to capture at the event. We then use a VLM to identify the best matches to these descriptions in the robot's video stream. The photo portfolios generated by our method are consistently rated as more appropriate to the event by human evaluators than those generated by existing methods.
summary: Our work examines the way in which large language models can be used for robotic planning and sampling, specifically the context of automated photographic documentation. Specifically, we illustrate how to produce a photo-taking robot with an exceptional level of semantic awareness by leveraging recent advances in general purpose language (LM) and vision-language (VLM) models. Given a high-level description of an event we use an LM to generate a natural-language list of photo descriptions that one would expect a photographer to capture at the event. We then use a VLM to identify the best matches to these descriptions in the robot's video stream. The photo portfolios generated by our method are consistently rated as more appropriate to the event by human evaluators than those generated by existing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们的工作研究了大型语言模型用于机器人规划和采样的方式，特别是自动摄影文档的背景。具体来说，我们说明了如何利用通用语言（LM）和视觉语言（VLM）模型的最新进展来生产具有卓越语义意识水平的拍照机器人。给定一个事件的高级描述，我们使用 LM 生成一个自然语言的照片描述列表，人们希望摄影师在该事件中捕捉到这些照片描述。然后，我们使用 VLM 来识别与机器人视频流中的这些描述的最佳匹配。由我们的方法生成的照片组合始终被人类评估者评为比现有方法生成的照片组合更适合该事件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ANSEL Photobot系统，通过结合大语言模型和视觉语言模型，实现具有语义智能的机器人事件摄影。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化摄影方法生成的照片与事件主题关联度不足，需提升机器人对场景语义的理解能力以生成更贴合主题的照片集。
AI.method: 使用语言模型根据事件描述生成目标照片的自然语言清单，再通过视觉语言模型在机器人视频流中匹配最佳视觉内容进行拍摄。
AI.result: 人类评估显示，该方法生成的照片集在语义相关性和场景适配性方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合语言模型与视觉模型的语义感知框架，可有效提升机器人摄影的场景理解能力与内容相关性。

authors_text: Samuele Cornell,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Yoshiki Masuyama,Shinji Watanabe,Manuel Pariente,Nobutaka Ono
title: Multi-Channel Target Speaker Extraction with Refinement: The WavLab Submission to the Second Clarity Enhancement Challenge
title_zh: 细化多通道目标说话人提取：WavLab 提交的第二届清晰度增强挑战赛
abstract: This paper describes our submission to the Second Clarity Enhancement Challenge (CEC2), which consists of target speech enhancement for hearing-aid (HA) devices in noisy-reverberant environments with multiple interferers such as music and competing speakers. Our approach builds upon the powerful iterative neural/beamforming enhancement (iNeuBe) framework introduced in our recent work, and this paper extends it for target speaker extraction. We therefore name the proposed approach as iNeuBe-X, where the X stands for extraction. To address the challenges encountered in the CEC2 setting, we introduce four major novelties: (1) we extend the state-of-the-art TF-GridNet model, originally designed for monaural speaker separation, for multi-channel, causal speech enhancement, and large improvements are observed by replacing the TCNDenseNet used in iNeuBe with this new architecture; (2) we leverage a recent dual window size approach with future-frame prediction to ensure that iNueBe-X satisfies the 5 ms constraint on algorithmic latency required by CEC2; (3) we introduce a novel speaker-conditioning branch for TF-GridNet to achieve target speaker extraction; (4) we propose a fine-tuning step, where we compute an additional loss with respect to the target speaker signal compensated with the listener audiogram. Without using external data, on the official development set our best model reaches a hearing-aid speech perception index (HASPI) score of 0.942 and a scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio improvement (SI-SDRi) of 18.8 dB. These results are promising given the fact that the CEC2 data is extremely challenging (e.g., on the development set the mixture SI-SDR is -12.3 dB). A demo of our submitted system is available at WAVLab CEC2 demo.
summary: This paper describes our submission to the Second Clarity Enhancement Challenge (CEC2), which consists of target speech enhancement for hearing-aid (HA) devices in noisy-reverberant environments with multiple interferers such as music and competing speakers. Our approach builds upon the powerful iterative neural/beamforming enhancement (iNeuBe) framework introduced in our recent work, and this paper extends it for target speaker extraction. We therefore name the proposed approach as iNeuBe-X, where the X stands for extraction. To address the challenges encountered in the CEC2 setting, we introduce four major novelties: (1) we extend the state-of-the-art TF-GridNet model, originally designed for monaural speaker separation, for multi-channel, causal speech enhancement, and large improvements are observed by replacing the TCNDenseNet used in iNeuBe with this new architecture; (2) we leverage a recent dual window size approach with future-frame prediction to ensure that iNueBe-X satisfies the 5 ms constraint on algorithmic latency required by CEC2; (3) we introduce a novel speaker-conditioning branch for TF-GridNet to achieve target speaker extraction; (4) we propose a fine-tuning step, where we compute an additional loss with respect to the target speaker signal compensated with the listener audiogram. Without using external data, on the official development set our best model reaches a hearing-aid speech perception index (HASPI) score of 0.942 and a scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio improvement (SI-SDRi) of 18.8 dB. These results are promising given the fact that the CEC2 data is extremely challenging (e.g., on the development set the mixture SI-SDR is -12.3 dB). A demo of our submitted system is available at WAVLab CEC2 demo.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们向第二届清晰度增强挑战 (CEC2) 提交的内容，其中包括在具有音乐和竞争扬声器等多种干扰物的噪声混响环境中助听 (HA) 设备的目标语音增强。我们的方法建立在我们最近的工作中引入的强大的迭代神经/波束形成增强（iNeuBe）框架的基础上，本文将其扩展用于目标说话人提取。因此，我们将所提出的方法命名为 iNeuBe-X，其中 X 代表提取。为了解决 CEC2 设置中遇到的挑战，我们引入了四个主要创新点：（1）我们扩展了最先进的 TF-GridNet 模型，该模型最初是为单声道说话者分离而设计​​的，用于多通道、因果语音增强，并且通过用这种新架构替换 iNeuBe 中使用的 TCNDenseNet，观察到了巨大的改进； (2) 我们利用最新的双窗口大小方法和未来帧预测来确保 iNueBe-X 满足 CEC2 所需的算法延迟 5 毫秒的限制； (3)我们为TF-GridNet引入了一种新颖的说话人调节分支来实现目标说话人提取； (4)我们提出了一个微调步骤，其中我们计算相对于目标说话者信号的额外损失，并用听者听力图进行补偿。在不使用外部数据的情况下，在官方开发集上，我们的最佳模型达到了 0.942 的助听器语音感知指数 (HASPI) 分数和 18.8 dB 的尺度不变信号失真比改进 (SI-SDRi)。鉴于 CEC2 数据极具挑战性（例如，在开发集上，混合 SI-SDR 为 -12.3 dB），这些结果很有希望。我们提交的系统的演示可在 WAVLab CEC2 demo 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多通道目标说话人提取方法iNeuBe-X，用于增强助听设备在嘈杂混响环境中的语音清晰度。
AI.motivation: 针对助听设备在多干扰源（如音乐和竞争说话人）的嘈杂环境中语音增强的挑战，改进现有框架以提升目标说话人提取效果。
AI.method: 基于iNeuBe框架，提出四点创新：1) 扩展TF-GridNet模型用于多通道因果语音增强；2) 采用双窗口大小方法满足5ms延迟约束；3) 引入说话人条件分支实现目标提取；4) 基于听者听力图的微调步骤。
AI.result: 在官方开发集上，模型达到HASPI 0.942和SI-SDRi 18.8dB，优于混合语音SI-SDR -12.3dB的挑战性数据集。
AI.conclusion: iNeuBe-X在无需外部数据情况下展现了优异性能，为助听设备的语音增强提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Multi-Channel Target Speaker Extraction with Refinement: The WavLab Submission to the Second Clarity Enhancement Challenge 细化多通道目标说话人提取：WavLab 提交的第二届清晰度增强挑战赛 This paper describes our submission to the Second Clarity Enhancement Challenge (CEC2), which consists of target speech enhancement for hearing-aid (HA) devices in noisy-reverberant environments with multiple interferers such as music and competing speakers. Our approach builds upon the powerful iterative neural/beamforming enhancement (iNeuBe) framework introduced in our recent work, and this paper extends it for target speaker extraction. We therefore name the proposed approach as iNeuBe-X, where the X stands for extraction. To address the challenges encountered in the CEC2 setting, we introduce four major novelties: (1) we extend the state-of-the-art TF-GridNet model, originally designed for monaural speaker separation, for multi-channel, causal speech enhancement, and large improvements are observed by replacing the TCNDenseNet used in iNeuBe with this new architecture; (2) we leverage a recent dual window size approach with future-frame prediction to ensure that iNueBe-X satisfies the 5 ms constraint on algorithmic latency required by CEC2; (3) we introduce a novel speaker-conditioning branch for TF-GridNet to achieve target speaker extraction; (4) we propose a fine-tuning step, where we compute an additional loss with respect to the target speaker signal compensated with the listener audiogram. Without using external data, on the official development set our best model reaches a hearing-aid speech perception index (HASPI) score of 0.942 and a scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio improvement (SI-SDRi) of 18.8 dB. These results are promising given the fact that the CEC2 data is extremely challenging (e.g., on the development set the mixture SI-SDR is -12.3 dB). A demo of our submitted system is available at WAVLab CEC2 demo. 本文介绍了我们向第二届清晰度增强挑战 (CEC2) 提交的内容，其中包括在具有音乐和竞争扬声器等多种干扰物的噪声混响环境中助听 (HA) 设备的目标语音增强。我们的方法建立在我们最近的工作中引入的强大的迭代神经/波束形成增强（iNeuBe）框架的基础上，本文将其扩展用于目标说话人提取。因此，我们将所提出的方法命名为 iNeuBe-X，其中 X 代表提取。为了解决 CEC2 设置中遇到的挑战，我们引入了四个主要创新点：（1）我们扩展了最先进的 TF-GridNet 模型，该模型最初是为单声道说话者分离而设计​​的，用于多通道、因果语音增强，并且通过用这种新架构替换 iNeuBe 中使用的 TCNDenseNet，观察到了巨大的改进； (2) 我们利用最新的双窗口大小方法和未来帧预测来确保 iNueBe-X 满足 CEC2 所需的算法延迟 5 毫秒的限制； (3)我们为TF-GridNet引入了一种新颖的说话人调节分支来实现目标说话人提取； (4)我们提出了一个微调步骤，其中我们计算相对于目标说话者信号的额外损失，并用听者听力图进行补偿。在不使用外部数据的情况下，在官方开发集上，我们的最佳模型达到了 0.942 的助听器语音感知指数 (HASPI) 分数和 18.8 dB 的尺度不变信号失真比改进 (SI-SDRi)。鉴于 CEC2 数据极具挑战性（例如，在开发集上，混合 SI-SDR 为 -12.3 dB），这些结果很有希望。我们提交的系统的演示可在 WAVLab CEC2 demo 中找到。 本文提出了一种多通道目标说话人提取方法iNeuBe-X，用于增强助听设备在嘈杂混响环境中的语音清晰度。 Samuele Cornell,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Yoshiki Masuyama,Shinji Watanabe,Manuel Pariente,Nobutaka Ono eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Fuxiao Liu,Yaser Yacoob,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: COVID-VTS: Fact Extraction and Verification on Short Video Platforms
title_zh: COVID-VTS：短视频平台上的事实提取和验证
abstract: We introduce a new benchmark, COVID-VTS, for fact-checking multi-modal information involving short-duration videos with COVID19- focused information from both the real world and machine generation. We propose, TwtrDetective, an effective model incorporating cross-media consistency checking to detect token-level malicious tampering in different modalities, and generate explanations. Due to the scarcity of training data, we also develop an efficient and scalable approach to automatically generate misleading video posts by event manipulation or adversarial matching. We investigate several state-of-the-art models and demonstrate the superiority of TwtrDetective.
summary: We introduce a new benchmark, COVID-VTS, for fact-checking multi-modal information involving short-duration videos with COVID19- focused information from both the real world and machine generation. We propose, TwtrDetective, an effective model incorporating cross-media consistency checking to detect token-level malicious tampering in different modalities, and generate explanations. Due to the scarcity of training data, we also develop an efficient and scalable approach to automatically generate misleading video posts by event manipulation or adversarial matching. We investigate several state-of-the-art models and demonstrate the superiority of TwtrDetective.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个新的基准 COVID-VTS，用于对涉及短视频的多模式信息进行事实检查，其中包含来自现实世界和机器生成的以 COVID19 为重点的信息。我们提出了 TwtrDetective，这是一种结合跨媒体一致性检查的有效模型，可以检测不同模式下的令牌级恶意篡改，并生成解释。由于训练数据的稀缺，我们还开发了一种高效且可扩展的方法，通过事件操纵或对抗性匹配自动生成误导性视频帖子。我们研究了几种最先进的模型并证明了 TwtrDetective 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为COVID-VTS的多模态事实核查基准数据集，并设计TwtrDetective模型用于检测短视频平台中与新冠疫情相关的虚假信息。
AI.motivation: 短视频平台传播的新冠相关信息存在大量虚假内容，需开发有效工具进行事实核查以遏制谣言扩散。
AI.method: 构建包含真实与机器生成视频的COVID-VTS数据集；提出TwtrDetective模型，通过跨模态一致性检验检测篡改内容并生成解释；开发数据增强方法应对训练数据稀缺问题。
AI.result: 实验表明TwtrDetective在事实核查任务中优于现有先进模型，能有效识别多模态视频中的恶意篡改行为。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为短视频虚假信息检测提供了新基准和有效方法，对提升公共卫生事件中的信息可信度具有实际意义。

authors_text: William Paul,Philip Mathew,Fady Alajaji,Philippe Burlina
title: Evaluating Trade-offs in Computer Vision Between Attribute Privacy, Fairness and Utility
title_zh: 评估计算机视觉中属性隐私、公平性和实用性之间的权衡
abstract: This paper investigates to what degree and magnitude tradeoffs exist between utility, fairness and attribute privacy in computer vision. Regarding privacy, we look at this important problem specifically in the context of attribute inference attacks, a less addressed form of privacy. To create a variety of models with different preferences, we use adversarial methods to intervene on attributes relating to fairness and privacy. We see that that certain tradeoffs exist between fairness and utility, privacy and utility, and between privacy and fairness. The results also show that those tradeoffs and interactions are more complex and nonlinear between the three goals than intuition would suggest.
summary: This paper investigates to what degree and magnitude tradeoffs exist between utility, fairness and attribute privacy in computer vision. Regarding privacy, we look at this important problem specifically in the context of attribute inference attacks, a less addressed form of privacy. To create a variety of models with different preferences, we use adversarial methods to intervene on attributes relating to fairness and privacy. We see that that certain tradeoffs exist between fairness and utility, privacy and utility, and between privacy and fairness. The results also show that those tradeoffs and interactions are more complex and nonlinear between the three goals than intuition would suggest.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了计算机视觉中的效用、公平性和属性隐私之间存在何种程度和程度的权衡。关于隐私，我们特别在属性推断攻击的背景下研究这个重要问题，这是一种较少被解决的隐私形式。为了创建具有不同偏好的各种模型，我们使用对抗性方法来干预与公平和隐私相关的属性。我们看到，公平与效用、隐私与效用、隐私与公平之间存在一定的权衡。结果还表明，这三个目标之间的权衡和相互作用比直觉所暗示的更加复杂和非线性。

AI.tldr: 评估计算机视觉中属性隐私、公平性与效用之间的权衡关系，特别是在属性推断攻击情境下。
AI.motivation: 现有研究较少关注属性推断攻击下的隐私问题，且三者间的权衡关系复杂，需系统分析。
AI.method: 通过对抗性方法干预与公平性和隐私相关的属性，构建具有不同偏好的模型，以分析三者间的权衡。
AI.result: 发现公平性与效用、隐私与效用及隐私与公平之间存在权衡，且三者交互关系比预期更复杂和非线性。
AI.conclusion: 三者权衡关系复杂，需在模型设计中综合考虑隐私、公平与效用的平衡，而非单独优化某一目标。

authors_text: Catarina G. Fidalgo,Maurício Sousa,Daniel Mendes,Rafael Kuffner dos Anjos,Daniel Medeiros,Karan Singh,Joaquim Jorge
title: MAGIC: Manipulating Avatars and Gestures to Improve Remote Collaboration
title_zh: MAGIC：操纵头像和手势以改善远程协作
abstract: Remote collaborative work has become pervasive in many settings, from engineering to medical professions. Users are immersed in virtual environments and communicate through life-sized avatars that enable face-to-face collaboration. Within this context, users often collaboratively view and interact with virtual 3D models, for example, to assist in designing new devices such as customized prosthetics, vehicles, or buildings. However, discussing shared 3D content face-to-face has various challenges, such as ambiguities, occlusions, and different viewpoints that all decrease mutual awareness, leading to decreased task performance and increased errors. To address this challenge, we introduce MAGIC, a novel approach for understanding pointing gestures in a face-to-face shared 3D space, improving mutual understanding and awareness. Our approach distorts the remote userś gestures to correctly reflect them in the local userś reference space when face-to-face. We introduce a novel metric called pointing agreement to measure what two users perceive in common when using pointing gestures in a shared 3D space. Results from a user study suggest that MAGIC significantly improves pointing agreement in face-to-face collaboration settings, improving co-presence and awareness of interactions performed in the shared space. We believe that MAGIC improves remote collaboration by enabling simpler communication mechanisms and better mutual awareness.
summary: Remote collaborative work has become pervasive in many settings, from engineering to medical professions. Users are immersed in virtual environments and communicate through life-sized avatars that enable face-to-face collaboration. Within this context, users often collaboratively view and interact with virtual 3D models, for example, to assist in designing new devices such as customized prosthetics, vehicles, or buildings. However, discussing shared 3D content face-to-face has various challenges, such as ambiguities, occlusions, and different viewpoints that all decrease mutual awareness, leading to decreased task performance and increased errors. To address this challenge, we introduce MAGIC, a novel approach for understanding pointing gestures in a face-to-face shared 3D space, improving mutual understanding and awareness. Our approach distorts the remote userś gestures to correctly reflect them in the local userś reference space when face-to-face. We introduce a novel metric called pointing agreement to measure what two users perceive in common when using pointing gestures in a shared 3D space. Results from a user study suggest that MAGIC significantly improves pointing agreement in face-to-face collaboration settings, improving co-presence and awareness of interactions performed in the shared space. We believe that MAGIC improves remote collaboration by enabling simpler communication mechanisms and better mutual awareness.
abstract_zh: 远程协作工作在从工程到医疗行业的许多环境中已经变得普遍。用户沉浸在虚拟环境中，并通过真人大小的化身进行交流，从而实现面对面的协作。在此背景下，用户经常协作查看虚拟 3D 模型并与之交互，例如，以协助设计新设备，例如定制假肢、车辆或建筑物。然而，面对面讨论共享 3D 内容会面临各种挑战，例如歧义、遮挡和不同观点，这些都会降低相互意识，导致任务绩效下降和错误增加。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 MAGIC，这是一种在面对面共享 3D 空间中理解指向手势的新颖方法，从而提高相互理解和意识。我们的方法扭曲远程用户的手势，以在面对面时将其正确反映在本地用户的参考空间中。我们引入了一种称为指向一致性的新颖指标，用于衡量两个用户在共享 3D 空间中使用指向手势时的共同感知。用户研究结果表明，MAGIC 显着提高了面对面协作环境中的指向一致性，提高了共享空间中交互的共存性和意识。我们相信 MAGIC 通过实现更简单的通信机制和更好的相互意识来改善远程协作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAGIC方法，通过调整远程用户的动作和手势来提升面对面的远程协作效果。
AI.motivation: 远程协作中，用户通过虚拟化身进行面对面交流时，存在视角差异、遮挡和歧义等问题，导致协作效率下降和错误增加。
AI.method: MAGIC通过扭曲远程用户的手势，使其在本地用户的参考空间中准确呈现，并引入‘指向一致性’指标衡量共享3D空间中用户的共同感知。
AI.result: 用户研究显示，MAGIC显著提升了面对面协作中的指向一致性，增强了共在感和交互意识。
AI.conclusion: MAGIC通过简化沟通机制和提升互惠意识，有效改善了远程协作的体验和效果。

authors_text: Tomoya Yamaguchi,Kohei Arai,Tomoaki Niiyama,Atsushi Uchida,Satoshi Sunada
title: Ultrafast single-channel machine vision based on neuro-inspired photonic computing
title_zh: 基于神经启发光子计算的超快单通道机器视觉
abstract: High-speed machine vision is increasing its importance in both scientific and technological applications. Neuro-inspired photonic computing is a promising approach to speed-up machine vision processing with ultralow latency. However, the processing rate is fundamentally limited by the low frame rate of image sensors, typically operating at tens of hertz. Here, we propose an image-sensor-free machine vision framework, which optically processes real-world visual information with only a single input channel, based on a random temporal encoding technique. This approach allows for compressive acquisitions of visual information with a single channel at gigahertz rates, outperforming conventional approaches, and enables its direct photonic processing using a photonic reservoir computer in a time domain. We experimentally demonstrate that the proposed approach is capable of high-speed image recognition and anomaly detection, and furthermore, it can be used for high-speed imaging. The proposed approach is multipurpose and can be extended for a wide range of applications, including tracking, controlling, and capturing sub-nanosecond phenomena.
summary: High-speed machine vision is increasing its importance in both scientific and technological applications. Neuro-inspired photonic computing is a promising approach to speed-up machine vision processing with ultralow latency. However, the processing rate is fundamentally limited by the low frame rate of image sensors, typically operating at tens of hertz. Here, we propose an image-sensor-free machine vision framework, which optically processes real-world visual information with only a single input channel, based on a random temporal encoding technique. This approach allows for compressive acquisitions of visual information with a single channel at gigahertz rates, outperforming conventional approaches, and enables its direct photonic processing using a photonic reservoir computer in a time domain. We experimentally demonstrate that the proposed approach is capable of high-speed image recognition and anomaly detection, and furthermore, it can be used for high-speed imaging. The proposed approach is multipurpose and can be extended for a wide range of applications, including tracking, controlling, and capturing sub-nanosecond phenomena.
abstract_zh: 高速机器视觉在科学和技术应用中的重要性日益增加。受神经启发的光子计算是一种很有前途的方法，可以以超低延迟加速机器视觉处理。然而，处理速率从根本上受到图像传感器低帧速率的限制，通常在数十赫兹下运行。在这里，我们提出了一种无图像传感器的机器视觉框架，该框架基于随机时间编码技术，仅使用单个输入通道对现实世界的视觉信息进行光学处理。这种方法允许使用单通道以千兆赫兹的速率压缩采集视觉信息，其性能优于传统方法，并且能够在时域中使用光子存储计算机进行直接光子处理。我们通过实验证明，所提出的方法能够进行高速图像识别和异常检测，此外，它还可以用于高速成像。所提出的方法是多用途的，可以扩展到广泛的应用，包括跟踪、控制和捕获亚纳秒现象。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需图像传感器的单通道机器视觉框架，利用随机时间编码和光子计算实现超高速视觉信息处理。
AI.motivation: 传统图像传感器帧率低（仅几十赫兹），难以满足高速机器视觉需求，需突破硬件限制以实现更高处理速度。
AI.method: 采用随机时间编码技术对视觉信息进行单通道压缩采集，结合时域光子储备计算机直接进行光子处理。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在GHz速率下的图像识别、异常检测及高速成像能力，可扩展至亚纳秒级现象捕捉等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过单通道光子计算突破传统传感器瓶颈，为高速视觉处理提供了多功能且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Sean McGregor,Jesse Hostetler
title: Data-Centric Governance
title_zh: 以数据为中心的治理
abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) governance is the body of standards and practices used to ensure that AI systems are deployed responsibly. Current AI governance approaches consist mainly of manual review and documentation processes. While such reviews are necessary for many systems, they are not sufficient to systematically address all potential harms, as they do not operationalize governance requirements for system engineering, behavior, and outcomes in a way that facilitates rigorous and reproducible evaluation. Modern AI systems are data-centric: they act on data, produce data, and are built through data engineering. The assurance of governance requirements must also be carried out in terms of data. This work explores the systematization of governance requirements via datasets and algorithmic evaluations. When applied throughout the product lifecycle, data-centric governance decreases time to deployment, increases solution quality, decreases deployment risks, and places the system in a continuous state of assured compliance with governance requirements.
summary: Artificial intelligence (AI) governance is the body of standards and practices used to ensure that AI systems are deployed responsibly. Current AI governance approaches consist mainly of manual review and documentation processes. While such reviews are necessary for many systems, they are not sufficient to systematically address all potential harms, as they do not operationalize governance requirements for system engineering, behavior, and outcomes in a way that facilitates rigorous and reproducible evaluation. Modern AI systems are data-centric: they act on data, produce data, and are built through data engineering. The assurance of governance requirements must also be carried out in terms of data. This work explores the systematization of governance requirements via datasets and algorithmic evaluations. When applied throughout the product lifecycle, data-centric governance decreases time to deployment, increases solution quality, decreases deployment risks, and places the system in a continuous state of assured compliance with governance requirements.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 治理是用于确保负责任地部署人工智能系统的标准和实践的主体。当前的人工智能治理方法主要包括人工审查和文档流程。虽然此类审查对于许多系统来说是必要的，但它们不足以系统地解决所有潜在危害，因为它们没有以促进严格和可重复评估的方式实施系统工程、行为和结果的治理要求。现代人工智能系统以数据为中心：它们作用于数据，产生数据，并通过数据工程构建。治理要求的保证也必须从数据方面进行。这项工作通过数据集和算法评估探索治理要求的系统化。当应用于整个产品生命周期时，以数据为中心的治理可以缩短部署时间，提高解决方案质量，降低部署风险，并使系统处于确保符合治理要求的持续状态。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以数据为中心的AI治理框架，通过数据集和算法评估系统化治理需求，以确保AI系统的负责任部署。
AI.motivation: 当前AI治理方法依赖人工审查和文档流程，难以系统应对所有潜在风险，而现代AI系统本质上是数据驱动的，需从数据层面保障治理要求。
AI.method: 通过构建数据集和算法评估体系，在产品全生命周期中系统化实施治理要求。
AI.result: 缩短部署时间、提升解决方案质量、降低部署风险，并实现持续合规。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动的治理方法能有效提升AI系统可靠性，为负责任的AI部署提供可操作路径。

motivation: 当前AI治理方法依赖人工审查和文档流程，难以系统应对所有潜在风险，而现代AI系统本质上是数据驱动的，需从数据层面保障治理要求。
method: 通过构建数据集和算法评估体系，在产品全生命周期中系统化实施治理要求。
result: 缩短部署时间、提升解决方案质量、降低部署风险，并实现持续合规。
conclusion: 数据驱动的治理方法能有效提升AI系统可靠性，为负责任的AI部署提供可操作路径。
search_text: Data-Centric Governance 以数据为中心的治理 Artificial intelligence (AI) governance is the body of standards and practices used to ensure that AI systems are deployed responsibly. Current AI governance approaches consist mainly of manual review and documentation processes. While such reviews are necessary for many systems, they are not sufficient to systematically address all potential harms, as they do not operationalize governance requirements for system engineering, behavior, and outcomes in a way that facilitates rigorous and reproducible evaluation. Modern AI systems are data-centric: they act on data, produce data, and are built through data engineering. The assurance of governance requirements must also be carried out in terms of data. This work explores the systematization of governance requirements via datasets and algorithmic evaluations. When applied throughout the product lifecycle, data-centric governance decreases time to deployment, increases solution quality, decreases deployment risks, and places the system in a continuous state of assured compliance with governance requirements. 人工智能 (AI) 治理是用于确保负责任地部署人工智能系统的标准和实践的主体。当前的人工智能治理方法主要包括人工审查和文档流程。虽然此类审查对于许多系统来说是必要的，但它们不足以系统地解决所有潜在危害，因为它们没有以促进严格和可重复评估的方式实施系统工程、行为和结果的治理要求。现代人工智能系统以数据为中心：它们作用于数据，产生数据，并通过数据工程构建。治理要求的保证也必须从数据方面进行。这项工作通过数据集和算法评估探索治理要求的系统化。当应用于整个产品生命周期时，以数据为中心的治理可以缩短部署时间，提高解决方案质量，降低部署风险，并使系统处于确保符合治理要求的持续状态。 本文提出了一种以数据为中心的AI治理框架，通过数据集和算法评估系统化治理需求，以确保AI系统的负责任部署。 Sean McGregor,Jesse Hostetler cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Aadyot Bhatnagar,Huan Wang,Caiming Xiong,Yu Bai
title: Improved Online Conformal Prediction via Strongly Adaptive Online Learning
title_zh: 通过强自适应在线学习改进在线共形预测
abstract: We study the problem of uncertainty quantification via prediction sets, in an online setting where the data distribution may vary arbitrarily over time. Recent work develops online conformal prediction techniques that leverage regret minimization algorithms from the online learning literature to learn prediction sets with approximately valid coverage and small regret. However, standard regret minimization could be insufficient for handling changing environments, where performance guarantees may be desired not only over the full time horizon but also in all (sub-)intervals of time. We develop new online conformal prediction methods that minimize the strongly adaptive regret, which measures the worst-case regret over all intervals of a fixed length. We prove that our methods achieve near-optimal strongly adaptive regret for all interval lengths simultaneously, and approximately valid coverage. Experiments show that our methods consistently obtain better coverage and smaller prediction sets than existing methods on real-world tasks, such as time series forecasting and image classification under distribution shift.
summary: We study the problem of uncertainty quantification via prediction sets, in an online setting where the data distribution may vary arbitrarily over time. Recent work develops online conformal prediction techniques that leverage regret minimization algorithms from the online learning literature to learn prediction sets with approximately valid coverage and small regret. However, standard regret minimization could be insufficient for handling changing environments, where performance guarantees may be desired not only over the full time horizon but also in all (sub-)intervals of time. We develop new online conformal prediction methods that minimize the strongly adaptive regret, which measures the worst-case regret over all intervals of a fixed length. We prove that our methods achieve near-optimal strongly adaptive regret for all interval lengths simultaneously, and approximately valid coverage. Experiments show that our methods consistently obtain better coverage and smaller prediction sets than existing methods on real-world tasks, such as time series forecasting and image classification under distribution shift.
abstract_zh: 我们在数据分布可能随时间任意变化的在线环境中通过预测集研究不确定性量化问题。最近的工作开发了在线共形预测技术，利用在线学习文献中的遗憾最小化算法来学习具有近似有效覆盖和小遗憾的预测集。然而，标准遗憾最小化可能不足以应对不断变化的环境，其中不仅需要在整个时间范围内而且还需要在所有（子）时间间隔内提供性能保证。我们开发了新的在线共形预测方法，可以最大限度地减少强自适应遗憾，该遗憾可以测量固定长度的所有间隔内最坏情况的遗憾。我们证明我们的方法同时实现了所有间隔长度的近乎最佳的强自适应遗憾，并且近似有效的覆盖范围。实验表明，与现实世界任务（例如分布偏移下的时间序列预测和图像分类）的现有方法相比，我们的方法始终获得更好的覆盖范围和更小的预测集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的在线一致性预测方法，通过强自适应在线学习处理数据分布随时间变化的场景，以实现更准确的不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有在线一致性预测方法在处理动态环境时，难以在所有时间子区间内保证性能，需更适应变化的算法以提升覆盖性与预测集精度。
AI.method: 开发基于强自适应遗憾最小化的新在线一致性预测框架，通过近似有效覆盖保证，在任意固定长度的时间区间内实现最优遗憾控制。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在时间序列预测和分布偏移的图像分类任务中，相比现有方法能提供更优的覆盖性与更小的预测集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的强自适应方法在理论分析与实际应用中均表现优异，为动态环境下的不确定性量化提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Alexander Shypula,Aman Madaan,Yimeng Zeng,Uri Alon,Jacob Gardner,Milad Hashemi,Graham Neubig,Parthasarathy Ranganathan,Osbert Bastani,Amir Yazdanbakhsh
title: Learning Performance-Improving Code Edits
title_zh: 学习提高性能的代码编辑
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2024 (Spotlight). Project website: https://pie4perf.com/
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2024 (Spotlight). Project website: https://pie4perf.com/
abstract: With the decline of Moore's law, optimizing program performance has become a major focus of software research. However, high-level optimizations such as API and algorithm changes remain elusive due to the difficulty of understanding the semantics of code. Simultaneously, pretrained large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities at solving a wide range of programming tasks. To that end, we introduce a framework for adapting LLMs to high-level program optimization. First, we curate a dataset of performance-improving edits made by human programmers of over 77,000 competitive C++ programming submission pairs, accompanied by extensive unit tests. A major challenge is the significant variability of measuring performance on commodity hardware, which can lead to spurious "improvements." To isolate and reliably evaluate the impact of program optimizations, we design an environment based on the gem5 full system simulator, the de facto simulator used in academia and industry. Next, we propose a broad range of adaptation strategies for code optimization; for prompting, these include retrieval-based few-shot prompting and chain-of-thought, and for finetuning, these include performance-conditioned generation and synthetic data augmentation based on self-play. A combination of these techniques achieves a mean speedup of 6.86 with eight generations, higher than average optimizations from individual programmers (3.66). Using our model's fastest generations, we set a new upper limit on the fastest speedup possible for our dataset at 9.64 compared to using the fastest human submissions available (9.56).
summary: With the decline of Moore's law, optimizing program performance has become a major focus of software research. However, high-level optimizations such as API and algorithm changes remain elusive due to the difficulty of understanding the semantics of code. Simultaneously, pretrained large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities at solving a wide range of programming tasks. To that end, we introduce a framework for adapting LLMs to high-level program optimization. First, we curate a dataset of performance-improving edits made by human programmers of over 77,000 competitive C++ programming submission pairs, accompanied by extensive unit tests. A major challenge is the significant variability of measuring performance on commodity hardware, which can lead to spurious "improvements." To isolate and reliably evaluate the impact of program optimizations, we design an environment based on the gem5 full system simulator, the de facto simulator used in academia and industry. Next, we propose a broad range of adaptation strategies for code optimization; for prompting, these include retrieval-based few-shot prompting and chain-of-thought, and for finetuning, these include performance-conditioned generation and synthetic data augmentation based on self-play. A combination of these techniques achieves a mean speedup of 6.86 with eight generations, higher than average optimizations from individual programmers (3.66). Using our model's fastest generations, we set a new upper limit on the fastest speedup possible for our dataset at 9.64 compared to using the fastest human submissions available (9.56).
abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的衰落，优化程序性能已成为软件研究的一大焦点。然而，由于难以理解代码语义，API 和算法更改等高级优化仍然难以实现。同时，预训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 在解决各种编程任务方面表现出了强大的能力。为此，我们引入了一个使法学硕士适应高级程序优化的框架。首先，我们整理了由人类程序员对超过 77,000 个竞争性 C++ 编程提交对进行的性能改进编辑的数据集，并附有广泛的单元测试。一个主要挑战是测量商用硬件性能的显着变化，这可能导致虚假的“改进”。为了隔离并可靠地评估程序优化的影响，我们设计了一个基于 gem5 全系统模拟器的环境，这是学术界和工业界使用的事实上的模拟器。接下来，我们提出了广泛的代码优化适应策略；对于提示，这些包括基于检索的小样本提示和思维链；对于微调，这些包括性能条件生成和基于自我游戏的合成数据增强。这些技术的组合在八代中实现了 6.86 的平均加速比，高于单个程序员的平均优化 (3.66)。与使用最快的人类提交数据 (9.56) 相比，我们使用模型最快的生成速度，将数据集的最快加速比设置为 9.64。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于学习并生成能提升程序性能的高层代码优化编辑。
AI.motivation: 摩尔定律的失效使程序性能优化成为研究重点，但高层优化（如算法调整）因代码语义复杂而难以实现，而LLM在编程任务中表现出色，需将其适配至性能优化领域。
AI.method: 构建包含77,000+ C++竞赛提交对的性能优化数据集，结合gem5模拟器消除硬件性能波动干扰；采用检索增强提示、链式思维、性能条件生成及自博弈数据增强等策略优化LLM。
AI.result: 模型八次生成平均加速6.86倍（超人类程序员平均3.66倍），最快生成达9.64倍（超越人类最快提交的9.56倍）。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过多技术融合显著提升LLM的代码优化能力，为自动化程序性能优化提供了新方向。

Using our model's fastest generations, we set a new upper limit on the fastest speedup possible for our dataset at 9.64 compared to using the fastest human submissions available (9.56). 随着摩尔定律的衰落，优化程序性能已成为软件研究的一大焦点。然而，由于难以理解代码语义，API 和算法更改等高级优化仍然难以实现。同时，预训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 在解决各种编程任务方面表现出了强大的能力。为此，我们引入了一个使法学硕士适应高级程序优化的框架。首先，我们整理了由人类程序员对超过 77,000 个竞争性 C++ 编程提交对进行的性能改进编辑的数据集，并附有广泛的单元测试。一个主要挑战是测量商用硬件性能的显着变化，这可能导致虚假的“改进”。为了隔离并可靠地评估程序优化的影响，我们设计了一个基于 gem5 全系统模拟器的环境，这是学术界和工业界使用的事实上的模拟器。接下来，我们提出了广泛的代码优化适应策略；对于提示，这些包括基于检索的小样本提示和思维链；对于微调，这些包括性能条件生成和基于自我游戏的合成数据增强。这些技术的组合在八代中实现了 6.86 的平均加速比，高于单个程序员的平均优化 (3.66)。与使用最快的人类提交数据 (9.56) 相比，我们使用模型最快的生成速度，将数据集的最快加速比设置为 9.64。 本文提出一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于学习并生成能提升程序性能的高层代码优化编辑。 Alexander Shypula,Aman Madaan,Yimeng Zeng,Uri Alon,Jacob Gardner,Milad Hashemi,Graham Neubig,Parthasarathy Ranganathan,Osbert Bastani,Amir Yazdanbakhsh cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.PF

authors_text: Keito Kudo,Yoichi Aoki,Tatsuki Kuribayashi,Ana Brassard,Masashi Yoshikawa,Keisuke Sakaguchi,Kentaro Inui
title: Do Deep Neural Networks Capture Compositionality in Arithmetic Reasoning?
title_zh: 深度神经网络能否捕捉算术推理中的组合性？
abstract: Compositionality is a pivotal property of symbolic reasoning. However, how well recent neural models capture compositionality remains underexplored in the symbolic reasoning tasks. This study empirically addresses this question by systematically examining recently published pre-trained seq2seq models with a carefully controlled dataset of multi-hop arithmetic symbolic reasoning. We introduce a skill tree on compositionality in arithmetic symbolic reasoning that defines the hierarchical levels of complexity along with three compositionality dimensions: systematicity, productivity, and substitutivity. Our experiments revealed that among the three types of composition, the models struggled most with systematicity, performing poorly even with relatively simple compositions. That difficulty was not resolved even after training the models with intermediate reasoning steps.
summary: Compositionality is a pivotal property of symbolic reasoning. However, how well recent neural models capture compositionality remains underexplored in the symbolic reasoning tasks. This study empirically addresses this question by systematically examining recently published pre-trained seq2seq models with a carefully controlled dataset of multi-hop arithmetic symbolic reasoning. We introduce a skill tree on compositionality in arithmetic symbolic reasoning that defines the hierarchical levels of complexity along with three compositionality dimensions: systematicity, productivity, and substitutivity. Our experiments revealed that among the three types of composition, the models struggled most with systematicity, performing poorly even with relatively simple compositions. That difficulty was not resolved even after training the models with intermediate reasoning steps.
abstract_zh: 组合性是符号推理的关键属性。然而，在符号推理任务中，最近的神经模型如何很好地捕捉组合性仍然没有得到充分探索。本研究通过系统地检查最近发布的预训练 seq2seq 模型以及精心控制的多跳算术符号推理数据集，从经验上解决了这个问题。我们引入了算术符号推理中组合性的技能树，它定义了复杂性的层次结构以及三个组合性维度：系统性、生产力和替代性。我们的实验表明，在三种类型的构图中，模型在系统性方面表现最差，即使对于相对简单的构图也表现不佳。即使在使用中间推理步骤训练模型后，这个困难也没有得到解决。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨深度神经网络在算术推理任务中是否能捕捉组合性特性。
AI.motivation: 组合性是符号推理的核心属性，但现有神经模型在组合性方面的表现尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过构建多跳算术推理数据集，引入包含系统性、生产性、替代性的组合性技能树，系统评估预训练seq2seq模型。
AI.result: 模型在系统性组合任务上表现最差，即使加入中间推理步骤也未能显著改善。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型难以处理需要系统性组合的算术推理任务，需进一步探索模型架构或训练方法。

authors_text: Hshmat Sahak,Daniel Watson,Chitwan Saharia,David Fleet
title: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models for Robust Image Super-Resolution in the Wild
title_zh: 用于野外鲁棒图像超分辨率的去噪扩散概率模型
abstract: Diffusion models have shown promising results on single-image super-resolution and other image- to-image translation tasks. Despite this success, they have not outperformed state-of-the-art GAN models on the more challenging blind super-resolution task, where the input images are out of distribution, with unknown degradations. This paper introduces SR3+, a diffusion-based model for blind super-resolution, establishing a new state-of-the-art. To this end, we advocate self-supervised training with a combination of composite, parameterized degradations for self-supervised training, and noise-conditioing augmentation during training and testing. With these innovations, a large-scale convolutional architecture, and large-scale datasets, SR3+ greatly outperforms SR3. It outperforms Real-ESRGAN when trained on the same data, with a DRealSR FID score of 36.82 vs. 37.22, which further improves to FID of 32.37 with larger models, and further still with larger training sets.
summary: Diffusion models have shown promising results on single-image super-resolution and other image- to-image translation tasks. Despite this success, they have not outperformed state-of-the-art GAN models on the more challenging blind super-resolution task, where the input images are out of distribution, with unknown degradations. This paper introduces SR3+, a diffusion-based model for blind super-resolution, establishing a new state-of-the-art. To this end, we advocate self-supervised training with a combination of composite, parameterized degradations for self-supervised training, and noise-conditioing augmentation during training and testing. With these innovations, a large-scale convolutional architecture, and large-scale datasets, SR3+ greatly outperforms SR3. It outperforms Real-ESRGAN when trained on the same data, with a DRealSR FID score of 36.82 vs. 37.22, which further improves to FID of 32.37 with larger models, and further still with larger training sets.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在单图像超分辨率和其他图像到图像转换任务上显示出了有希望的结果。尽管取得了如此成功，但在更具挑战性的盲超分辨率任务上，它们的表现并没有优于最先进的 GAN 模型，其中输入图像不分布，且退化未知。本文介绍了 SR3+，一种基于扩散的盲超分辨率模型，建立了一种新的最先进技术。为此，我们提倡将自监督训练的复合参数化降级与训练和测试期间的噪声调节增强相结合进行自监督训练。凭借这些创新、大规模卷积架构和大规模数据集，SR3+ 大大优于 SR3。当使用相同的数据进行训练时，它的性能优于 Real-ESRGAN，DRealSR FID 得分为 36.82 比 37.22，对于更大的模型和更大的训练集，FID 进一步提高到 32.37。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SR3+扩散模型，解决野外复杂场景下的盲图像超分辨率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在盲超分辨率任务中表现逊于GAN，需提升模型鲁棒性以应对未知退化和分布外数据。
AI.method: 采用自监督训练结合复合参数化退化，引入噪声条件增强，并使用大规模卷积架构与数据集进行训练。
AI.result: SR3+在相同数据下FID得分32.37优于Real-ESRGAN的37.22，大模型与数据集进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: SR3+在盲超分辨率任务中达到新SOTA，验证了扩散模型结合自监督与噪声增强方法的有效性。

authors_text: Aodong Li,Chen Qiu,Marius Kloft,Padhraic Smyth,Maja Rudolph,Stephan Mandt
title: Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection via Batch Normalization
title_zh: 通过批量归一化进行零样本异常检测
abstract: Anomaly detection (AD) plays a crucial role in many safety-critical application domains. The challenge of adapting an anomaly detector to drift in the normal data distribution, especially when no training data is available for the "new normal," has led to the development of zero-shot AD techniques. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method called Adaptive Centered Representations (ACR) for zero-shot batch-level AD. Our approach trains off-the-shelf deep anomaly detectors (such as deep SVDD) to adapt to a set of inter-related training data distributions in combination with batch normalization, enabling automatic zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks. This simple recipe, batch normalization plus meta-training, is a highly effective and versatile tool. Our theoretical results guarantee the zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks; our empirical results demonstrate the first zero-shot AD results for tabular data and outperform existing methods in zero-shot anomaly detection and segmentation on image data from specialized domains. Code is at https://github.com/aodongli/zero-shot-ad-via-batch-norm
summary: Anomaly detection (AD) plays a crucial role in many safety-critical application domains. The challenge of adapting an anomaly detector to drift in the normal data distribution, especially when no training data is available for the "new normal," has led to the development of zero-shot AD techniques. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method called Adaptive Centered Representations (ACR) for zero-shot batch-level AD. Our approach trains off-the-shelf deep anomaly detectors (such as deep SVDD) to adapt to a set of inter-related training data distributions in combination with batch normalization, enabling automatic zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks. This simple recipe, batch normalization plus meta-training, is a highly effective and versatile tool. Our theoretical results guarantee the zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks; our empirical results demonstrate the first zero-shot AD results for tabular data and outperform existing methods in zero-shot anomaly detection and segmentation on image data from specialized domains. Code is at https://github.com/aodongli/zero-shot-ad-via-batch-norm
abstract_zh: 异常检测 (AD) 在许多安全关键应用领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。使异常检测器适应正态数据分布中的漂移的挑战，特别是当没有可用于“新常态”的训练数据时，导致了零样本 AD 技术的发展。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为自适应中心表示（ACR），用于零样本批量级AD。我们的方法训练现成的深度异常检测器（例如深度 SVDD），以适应一组相互关联的训练数据分布并结合批量归一化，从而实现对未见过的 AD 任务的自动零样本泛化。这个简单的方法，即批量归一化加上元训练，是一种高效且多功能的工具。我们的理论结果保证了对未见过的 AD 任务的零样本泛化；我们的实证结果证明了表格数据的第一个零样本 AD 结果，并且在来自专业领域的图像数据的零样本异常检测和分割方面优于现有方法。代码位于 https://github.com/aodongli/zero-shot-ad-via-batch-norm

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于批量归一化的零样本异常检测方法ACR，通过元训练使模型适应未见过的正常数据分布。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法在正常数据分布漂移时需重新训练，而零样本场景下缺乏新正常数据的训练样本，亟需无需额外标注的自适应方法。
AI.method: 结合批量归一化与元训练，训练通用深度异常检测器（如Deep SVDD）以适应相关分布，通过自适应中心化表示实现跨域零样本泛化。
AI.result: 理论保证零样本泛化能力，在表格数据首次实现零样本检测，图像领域分割任务优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 批量归一化加元训练的简单框架有效解决了零样本异常检测难题，为跨域自适应提供了通用解决方案。

search_text: Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection via Batch Normalization 通过批量归一化进行零样本异常检测 Anomaly detection (AD) plays a crucial role in many safety-critical application domains. The challenge of adapting an anomaly detector to drift in the normal data distribution, especially when no training data is available for the "new normal," has led to the development of zero-shot AD techniques. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method called Adaptive Centered Representations (ACR) for zero-shot batch-level AD. Our approach trains off-the-shelf deep anomaly detectors (such as deep SVDD) to adapt to a set of inter-related training data distributions in combination with batch normalization, enabling automatic zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks. This simple recipe, batch normalization plus meta-training, is a highly effective and versatile tool. Our theoretical results guarantee the zero-shot generalization for unseen AD tasks; our empirical results demonstrate the first zero-shot AD results for tabular data and outperform existing methods in zero-shot anomaly detection and segmentation on image data from specialized domains. Code is at https://github.com/aodongli/zero-shot-ad-via-batch-norm 异常检测 (AD) 在许多安全关键应用领域中发挥着至关重要的作用。使异常检测器适应正态数据分布中的漂移的挑战，特别是当没有可用于“新常态”的训练数据时，导致了零样本 AD 技术的发展。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为自适应中心表示（ACR），用于零样本批量级AD。我们的方法训练现成的深度异常检测器（例如深度 SVDD），以适应一组相互关联的训练数据分布并结合批量归一化，从而实现对未见过的 AD 任务的自动零样本泛化。这个简单的方法，即批量归一化加上元训练，是一种高效且多功能的工具。我们的理论结果保证了对未见过的 AD 任务的零样本泛化；我们的实证结果证明了表格数据的第一个零样本 AD 结果，并且在来自专业领域的图像数据的零样本异常检测和分割方面优于现有方法。代码位于 https://github.com/aodongli/zero-shot-ad-via-batch-norm 本文提出一种基于批量归一化的零样本异常检测方法ACR，通过元训练使模型适应未见过的正常数据分布。 Aodong Li,Chen Qiu,Marius Kloft,Padhraic Smyth,Maja Rudolph,Stephan Mandt cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Trevine Oorloff,Yaser Yacoob
title: One-Shot Face Video Re-enactment using Hybrid Latent Spaces of StyleGAN2
title_zh: 使用 StyleGAN2 的混合潜在空间进行一次性人脸视频重演
comment: The project page is located at https://trevineoorloff.github.io/FaceVideoReenactment_HybridLatents.io/
comments: The project page is located at https://trevineoorloff.github.io/FaceVideoReenactment_HybridLatents.io/
abstract: While recent research has progressively overcome the low-resolution constraint of one-shot face video re-enactment with the help of StyleGAN's high-fidelity portrait generation, these approaches rely on at least one of the following: explicit 2D/3D priors, optical flow based warping as motion descriptors, off-the-shelf encoders, etc., which constrain their performance (e.g., inconsistent predictions, inability to capture fine facial details and accessories, poor generalization, artifacts). We propose an end-to-end framework for simultaneously supporting face attribute edits, facial motions and deformations, and facial identity control for video generation. It employs a hybrid latent-space that encodes a given frame into a pair of latents: Identity latent, $\mathcal{W}_{ID}$, and Facial deformation latent, $\mathcal{S}_F$, that respectively reside in the $W+$ and $SS$ spaces of StyleGAN2. Thereby, incorporating the impressive editability-distortion trade-off of $W+$ and the high disentanglement properties of $SS$. These hybrid latents employ the StyleGAN2 generator to achieve high-fidelity face video re-enactment at $1024^2$. Furthermore, the model supports the generation of realistic re-enactment videos with other latent-based semantic edits (e.g., beard, age, make-up, etc.). Qualitative and quantitative analyses performed against state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach.
summary: While recent research has progressively overcome the low-resolution constraint of one-shot face video re-enactment with the help of StyleGAN's high-fidelity portrait generation, these approaches rely on at least one of the following: explicit 2D/3D priors, optical flow based warping as motion descriptors, off-the-shelf encoders, etc., which constrain their performance (e.g., inconsistent predictions, inability to capture fine facial details and accessories, poor generalization, artifacts). We propose an end-to-end framework for simultaneously supporting face attribute edits, facial motions and deformations, and facial identity control for video generation. It employs a hybrid latent-space that encodes a given frame into a pair of latents: Identity latent, $\mathcal{W}_{ID}$, and Facial deformation latent, $\mathcal{S}_F$, that respectively reside in the $W+$ and $SS$ spaces of StyleGAN2. Thereby, incorporating the impressive editability-distortion trade-off of $W+$ and the high disentanglement properties of $SS$. These hybrid latents employ the StyleGAN2 generator to achieve high-fidelity face video re-enactment at $1024^2$. Furthermore, the model supports the generation of realistic re-enactment videos with other latent-based semantic edits (e.g., beard, age, make-up, etc.). Qualitative and quantitative analyses performed against state-of-the-art methods demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的研究在 StyleGAN 的高保真肖像生成的帮助下逐渐克服了一次性面部视频重演的低分辨率限制，但这些方法至少依赖于以下之一：明确的 2D/3D 先验、基于光流的变形作为运动描述符、现成的编码器等，这些限制了它们的性能（例如，预测不一致、无法捕获精细的面部细节和配件、泛化能力差、伪影）。我们提出了一个端到端框架，用于同时支持面部属性编辑、面部运动和变形以及视频生成的面部身份控制。它采用混合潜在空间，将给定帧编码为一对潜在变量：身份潜在变量 $\mathcal{W}_{ID}$ 和面部变形潜在变量 $\mathcal{S}_F$，它们分别驻留在 StyleGAN2 的 $W+$ 和 $SS$ 空间中。因此，结合了 $W+$ 令人印象深刻的可编辑性-失真权衡和 $SS$ 的高度解缠结属性。这些混合潜在模型采用 StyleGAN2 生成器以 1024^2 美元的价格实现高保真面部视频重演。此外，该模型支持使用其他基于潜在的语义编辑（例如胡须、年龄、化妆等）生成逼真的重演视频。针对最先进的方法进行的定性和定量分析证明了所提出方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于StyleGAN2混合潜在空间的一次性人脸视频重演框架，能够同时控制面部属性、运动变形和身份信息，生成高保真度的1024²分辨率视频。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式先验或光流等技术，存在预测不一致、细节丢失、泛化性差等问题，难以实现高质量且灵活的人脸视频重演。
AI.method: 构建混合潜在空间，将输入帧编码为身份潜在向量（W_ID，来自StyleGAN2的W+空间）和面部变形潜在向量（S_F，来自SS空间），结合W+的编辑-失真权衡与SS的高解耦特性，通过StyleGAN2生成器实现视频重演。
AI.result: 在定性和定量实验中优于现有方法，可生成包含胡须、年龄、妆容等语义编辑的高保真重演视频，支持1024²分辨率。
AI.conclusion: 混合潜在空间框架有效解决了传统方法的局限性，在面部细节保留、运动控制和语义编辑灵活性方面具有显著优势。

authors_text: Quchen Fu,Zhongwei Teng,Marco Georgaklis,Jules White,Douglas C. Schmidt
title: NL2CMD: An Updated Workflow for Natural Language to Bash Commands Translation
title_zh: NL2CMD：自然语言到 Bash 命令翻译的更新工作流程
comment: ef:Journal of Machine Learning Theory, Applications and Practice 2023
comments: ef:Journal of Machine Learning Theory, Applications and Practice 2023
abstract: Translating natural language into Bash Commands is an emerging research field that has gained attention in recent years. Most efforts have focused on producing more accurate translation models. To the best of our knowledge, only two datasets are available, with one based on the other. Both datasets involve scraping through known data sources (through platforms like stack overflow, crowdsourcing, etc.) and hiring experts to validate and correct either the English text or Bash Commands. This paper provides two contributions to research on synthesizing Bash Commands from scratch. First, we describe a state-of-the-art translation model used to generate Bash Commands from the corresponding English text. Second, we introduce a new NL2CMD dataset that is automatically generated, involves minimal human intervention, and is over six times larger than prior datasets. Since the generation pipeline does not rely on existing Bash Commands, the distribution and types of commands can be custom adjusted. We evaluate the performance of ChatGPT on this task and discuss the potential of using it as a data generator. Our empirical results show how the scale and diversity of our dataset can offer unique opportunities for semantic parsing researchers.
summary: Translating natural language into Bash Commands is an emerging research field that has gained attention in recent years. Most efforts have focused on producing more accurate translation models. To the best of our knowledge, only two datasets are available, with one based on the other. Both datasets involve scraping through known data sources (through platforms like stack overflow, crowdsourcing, etc.) and hiring experts to validate and correct either the English text or Bash Commands. This paper provides two contributions to research on synthesizing Bash Commands from scratch. First, we describe a state-of-the-art translation model used to generate Bash Commands from the corresponding English text. Second, we introduce a new NL2CMD dataset that is automatically generated, involves minimal human intervention, and is over six times larger than prior datasets. Since the generation pipeline does not rely on existing Bash Commands, the distribution and types of commands can be custom adjusted. We evaluate the performance of ChatGPT on this task and discuss the potential of using it as a data generator. Our empirical results show how the scale and diversity of our dataset can offer unique opportunities for semantic parsing researchers.
abstract_zh: 将自然语言翻译成 Bash 命令是近年来受到关注的一个新兴研究领域。大多数努力都集中在生成更准确的翻译模型上。据我们所知，只有两个数据集可用，一个基于另一个。这两个数据集都涉及抓取已知数据源（通过堆栈溢出、众包等平台）并聘请专家来验证和纠正英文文本或 Bash 命令。本文为从头开始合成 Bash 命令的研究提供了两个贡献。首先，我们描述了一种最先进的翻译模型，用于从相应的英文文本生成 Bash 命令。其次，我们引入了一个新的 NL2CMD 数据集，该数据集是自动生成的，涉及最少的人工干预，并且比之前的数据集大六倍以上。由于生成管道不依赖于现有的 Bash 命令，因此可以自定义调整命令的分布和类型。我们评估 ChatGPT 在此任务上的性能，并讨论将其用作数据生成器的潜力。我们的实证结果表明，我们数据集的规模和多样性如何为语义解析研究人员提供独特的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NL2CMD数据集及翻译模型，实现自然语言到Bash命令的自动化生成。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集依赖人工收集和专家验证，存在规模小、成本高、可扩展性差等问题。
AI.method: 基于先进翻译模型生成Bash命令，构建自动生成的NL2CMD数据集（规模为现有数据集6倍），并评估ChatGPT的生成能力。
AI.result: 实验表明数据集的规模和多样性为语义解析研究提供了新机会，验证了自动化生成方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新数据集和流程可推动自然语言到命令翻译研究，未来可探索大语言模型在数据生成中的应用。
