This paper provides two contributions to research on synthesizing Bash Commands from scratch. First, we describe a state-of-the-art translation model used to generate Bash Commands from the corresponding English text. Second, we introduce a new NL2CMD dataset that is automatically generated, involves minimal human intervention, and is over six times larger than prior datasets. Since the generation pipeline does not rely on existing Bash Commands, the distribution and types of commands can be custom adjusted. We evaluate the performance of ChatGPT on this task and discuss the potential of using it as a data generator. Our empirical results show how the scale and diversity of our dataset can offer unique opportunities for semantic parsing researchers. 将自然语言翻译成 Bash 命令是近年来受到关注的一个新兴研究领域。大多数努力都集中在生成更准确的翻译模型上。据我们所知，只有两个数据集可用，一个基于另一个。这两个数据集都涉及抓取已知数据源（通过堆栈溢出、众包等平台）并聘请专家来验证和纠正英文文本或 Bash 命令。本文为从头开始合成 Bash 命令的研究提供了两个贡献。首先，我们描述了一种最先进的翻译模型，用于从相应的英文文本生成 Bash 命令。其次，我们引入了一个新的 NL2CMD 数据集，该数据集是自动生成的，涉及最少的人工干预，并且比之前的数据集大六倍以上。由于生成管道不依赖于现有的 Bash 命令，因此可以自定义调整命令的分布和类型。我们评估 ChatGPT 在此任务上的性能，并讨论将其用作数据生成器的潜力。我们的实证结果表明，我们数据集的规模和多样性如何为语义解析研究人员提供独特的机会。 本文提出NL2CMD数据集及翻译模型，实现自然语言到Bash命令的自动化生成。 Quchen Fu,Zhongwei Teng,Marco Georgaklis,Jules White,Douglas C. Schmidt cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.PF

authors_text: Aodong Li,Chen Qiu,Marius Kloft,Padhraic Smyth,Stephan Mandt,Maja Rudolph
title: Deep Anomaly Detection under Labeling Budget Constraints
title_zh: 标签预算约束下的深度异常检测
abstract: Selecting informative data points for expert feedback can significantly improve the performance of anomaly detection (AD) in various contexts, such as medical diagnostics or fraud detection. In this paper, we determine a set of theoretical conditions under which anomaly scores generalize from labeled queries to unlabeled data. Motivated by these results, we propose a data labeling strategy with optimal data coverage under labeling budget constraints. In addition, we propose a new learning framework for semi-supervised AD. Extensive experiments on image, tabular, and video data sets show that our approach results in state-of-the-art semi-supervised AD performance under labeling budget constraints.
summary: Selecting informative data points for expert feedback can significantly improve the performance of anomaly detection (AD) in various contexts, such as medical diagnostics or fraud detection. In this paper, we determine a set of theoretical conditions under which anomaly scores generalize from labeled queries to unlabeled data. Motivated by these results, we propose a data labeling strategy with optimal data coverage under labeling budget constraints. In addition, we propose a new learning framework for semi-supervised AD. Extensive experiments on image, tabular, and video data sets show that our approach results in state-of-the-art semi-supervised AD performance under labeling budget constraints.
abstract_zh: 选择信息丰富的数据点进行专家反馈可以显着提高各种情况下的异常检测 (AD) 性能，例如医疗诊断或欺诈检测。在本文中，我们确定了一组理论条件，在这些条件下，异常分数从标记查询推广到未标记数据。受这些结果的启发，我们提出了一种在标签预算约束下具有最佳数据覆盖率的数据标签策略。此外，我们提出了一种新的半监督 AD 学习框架。对图像、表格和视频数据集的大量实验表明，我们的方法在标签预算限制下实现了最先进的半监督 AD 性能。

AI.tldr: 在标签预算有限的情况下，提出一种深度异常检测方法，通过优化数据选择策略提升半监督学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法在标签预算有限时效率低下，需优化数据选择策略以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出理论条件确保异常分数泛化，设计最优数据覆盖策略及半监督学习框架，结合有标签和无标签数据训练模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在图像、表格和视频数据集上达到最先进的半监督异常检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论分析和策略优化，在标签预算受限下有效提升半监督异常检测性能，验证了方法的广泛适用性。

authors_text: Yucheng Xu,Mohammadreza Kasaei,Hamidreza Kasaei,Zhibin Li
title: Instance-wise Grasp Synthesis for Robotic Grasping
title_zh: 用于机器人抓取的实例抓取合成
abstract: Generating high-quality instance-wise grasp configurations provides critical information of how to grasp specific objects in a multi-object environment and is of high importance for robot manipulation tasks. This work proposed a novel \textbf{S}ingle-\textbf{S}tage \textbf{G}rasp (SSG) synthesis network, which performs high-quality instance-wise grasp synthesis in a single stage: instance mask and grasp configurations are generated for each object simultaneously. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art on robotic grasp prediction based on the OCID-Grasp dataset, and performs competitively on the JACQUARD dataset. The benchmarking results showed significant improvements compared to the baseline on the accuracy of generated grasp configurations. The performance of the proposed method has been validated through both extensive simulations and real robot experiments for three tasks including single object pick-and-place, grasp synthesis in cluttered environments and table cleaning task.
summary: Generating high-quality instance-wise grasp configurations provides critical information of how to grasp specific objects in a multi-object environment and is of high importance for robot manipulation tasks. This work proposed a novel \textbf{S}ingle-\textbf{S}tage \textbf{G}rasp (SSG) synthesis network, which performs high-quality instance-wise grasp synthesis in a single stage: instance mask and grasp configurations are generated for each object simultaneously. Our method outperforms state-of-the-art on robotic grasp prediction based on the OCID-Grasp dataset, and performs competitively on the JACQUARD dataset. The benchmarking results showed significant improvements compared to the baseline on the accuracy of generated grasp configurations. The performance of the proposed method has been validated through both extensive simulations and real robot experiments for three tasks including single object pick-and-place, grasp synthesis in cluttered environments and table cleaning task.
abstract_zh: 生成高质量的实例抓取配置提供了如何在多对象环境中抓取特定对象的关键信息，对于机器人操作任务非常重要。这项工作提出了一种新颖的 \textbf{S}ingle-\textbf{S}tage \textbf{G}rasp (SSG) 合成网络，该网络在单个阶段中执行高质量的实例抓取合成：同时为每个对象生成实例掩码和抓取配置。我们的方法在基于 OCID-Grasp 数据集的机器人抓取预测方面优于最先进的方法，并且在 JACQUARD 数据集上具有竞争力。基准测试结果显示，与生成的抓取配置的准确性相比，基准测试结果显着提高。该方法的性能已经通过广泛的模拟和真实的机器人实验得到了验证，涉及三个任务，包括单个物体拾取和放置、杂乱环境中的抓取合成和桌子清洁任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种单阶段抓取合成网络（SSG），用于在多物体环境中为每个物体生成高质量的实例级抓取配置。
AI.motivation: 生成高质量的实例级抓取配置对机器人操作任务至关重要，但现有方法在准确性和效率上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计了一种单阶段网络（SSG），同时生成物体实例掩码和抓取配置，无需多阶段处理。
AI.result: 在OCID-Grasp数据集上优于现有方法，在JACQUARD数据集上表现竞争力，并通过仿真和真实机器人实验验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: SSG方法在抓取配置准确性及多任务场景中表现优异，为机器人抓取提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Konrad Anand,Mark Jerrum
title: Perfect Sampling of $q$-Spin Systems on $\mathbb Z^2$ via Weak Spatial Mixing
title_zh: 通过弱空间混合在 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上对 $q$-自旋系统进行完美采样
abstract: We present a perfect marginal sampler of the unique Gibbs measure of a spin system on $\mathbb Z^2$. The algorithm is an adaptation of a previous `lazy depth-first' approach by the authors, but relaxes the requirement of strong spatial mixing to weak. It exploits a classical result in statistical physics relating weak spatial mixing on $\mathbb Z^2$ to strong spatial mixing on squares. When the spin system exhibits weak spatial mixing, the run-time of our sampler is linear in the size of sample. Applications of note are the ferromagnetic Potts model at supercritical temperatures, and the ferromagnetic Ising model with consistent non-zero external field at any non-zero temperature.
summary: We present a perfect marginal sampler of the unique Gibbs measure of a spin system on $\mathbb Z^2$. The algorithm is an adaptation of a previous `lazy depth-first' approach by the authors, but relaxes the requirement of strong spatial mixing to weak. It exploits a classical result in statistical physics relating weak spatial mixing on $\mathbb Z^2$ to strong spatial mixing on squares. When the spin system exhibits weak spatial mixing, the run-time of our sampler is linear in the size of sample. Applications of note are the ferromagnetic Potts model at supercritical temperatures, and the ferromagnetic Ising model with consistent non-zero external field at any non-zero temperature.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上自旋系统的独特吉布斯测度的完美边际采样器。该算法是对作者之前的“惰性深度优先”方法的改编，但将强空间混合的要求放宽为弱空间混合。它利用了统计物理学中的经典结果，将 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上的弱空间混合与正方形上的强空间混合相关联。当自旋系统表现出弱空间混合时，采样器的运行时间与样本大小成线性关系。值得注意的应用是超临界温度下的铁磁 Potts 模型，以及任何非零温度下具有一致非零外场的铁磁 Ising 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于弱空间混合条件的完美边缘采样算法，用于二维整数晶格上的自旋系统吉布斯测度采样。
AI.motivation: 传统完美采样方法依赖强空间混合条件，而本文通过弱空间混合条件扩展了算法适用范围，特别是在超临界温度和非零外部场条件下。
AI.method: 改进了作者先前的'懒惰深度优先'算法，利用统计物理中弱空间混合与方形强空间混合的等价性，实现线性时间复杂度的采样。
AI.result: 当自旋系统满足弱空间混合时，算法运行时间与样本规模呈线性关系，成功应用于铁磁Potts模型和带非零外部场的Ising模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过弱空间混合条件的理论转化，实现了更广泛自旋系统的高效完美采样，为统计物理模型的数值模拟提供了新方法。

search_text: Perfect Sampling of $q$-Spin Systems on $\mathbb Z^2$ via Weak Spatial Mixing 通过弱空间混合在 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上对 $q$-自旋系统进行完美采样 We present a perfect marginal sampler of the unique Gibbs measure of a spin system on $\mathbb Z^2$. The algorithm is an adaptation of a previous `lazy depth-first' approach by the authors, but relaxes the requirement of strong spatial mixing to weak. It exploits a classical result in statistical physics relating weak spatial mixing on $\mathbb Z^2$ to strong spatial mixing on squares. When the spin system exhibits weak spatial mixing, the run-time of our sampler is linear in the size of sample. Applications of note are the ferromagnetic Potts model at supercritical temperatures, and the ferromagnetic Ising model with consistent non-zero external field at any non-zero temperature. 我们提出了 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上自旋系统的独特吉布斯测度的完美边际采样器。该算法是对作者之前的“惰性深度优先”方法的改编，但将强空间混合的要求放宽为弱空间混合。它利用了统计物理学中的经典结果，将 $\mathbb Z^2$ 上的弱空间混合与正方形上的强空间混合相关联。当自旋系统表现出弱空间混合时，采样器的运行时间与样本大小成线性关系。值得注意的应用是超临界温度下的铁磁 Potts 模型，以及任何非零温度下具有一致非零外场的铁磁 Ising 模型。 本文提出了一种基于弱空间混合条件的完美边缘采样算法，用于二维整数晶格上的自旋系统吉布斯测度采样。 Konrad Anand,Mark Jerrum cs.DS,cs.DM,math.PR

authors_text: Yuanhui Huang,Wenzhao Zheng,Yunpeng Zhang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu
title: Tri-Perspective View for Vision-Based 3D Semantic Occupancy Prediction
title_zh: 基于视觉的 3D 语义占用预测的三视角视图
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/wzzheng/TPVFormer
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/wzzheng/TPVFormer
abstract: Modern methods for vision-centric autonomous driving perception widely adopt the bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation to describe a 3D scene. Despite its better efficiency than voxel representation, it has difficulty describing the fine-grained 3D structure of a scene with a single plane. To address this, we propose a tri-perspective view (TPV) representation which accompanies BEV with two additional perpendicular planes. We model each point in the 3D space by summing its projected features on the three planes. To lift image features to the 3D TPV space, we further propose a transformer-based TPV encoder (TPVFormer) to obtain the TPV features effectively. We employ the attention mechanism to aggregate the image features corresponding to each query in each TPV plane. Experiments show that our model trained with sparse supervision effectively predicts the semantic occupancy for all voxels. We demonstrate for the first time that using only camera inputs can achieve comparable performance with LiDAR-based methods on the LiDAR segmentation task on nuScenes. Code: https://github.com/wzzheng/TPVFormer.
summary: Modern methods for vision-centric autonomous driving perception widely adopt the bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation to describe a 3D scene. Despite its better efficiency than voxel representation, it has difficulty describing the fine-grained 3D structure of a scene with a single plane. To address this, we propose a tri-perspective view (TPV) representation which accompanies BEV with two additional perpendicular planes. We model each point in the 3D space by summing its projected features on the three planes. To lift image features to the 3D TPV space, we further propose a transformer-based TPV encoder (TPVFormer) to obtain the TPV features effectively. We employ the attention mechanism to aggregate the image features corresponding to each query in each TPV plane. Experiments show that our model trained with sparse supervision effectively predicts the semantic occupancy for all voxels. We demonstrate for the first time that using only camera inputs can achieve comparable performance with LiDAR-based methods on the LiDAR segmentation task on nuScenes. Code: https://github.com/wzzheng/TPVFormer.
abstract_zh: 以视觉为中心的自动驾驶感知的现代方法广泛采用鸟瞰图（BEV）表示来描述 3D 场景。尽管它比体素表示效率更高，但它很难用单个平面描述场景的细粒度 3D 结构。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种三透视图（TPV）表示法，它与 BEV 一起提供了两个额外的垂直平面。我们通过将三个平面上的投影特征相加来对 3D 空间中的每个点进行建模。为了将图像特征提升到3D TPV空间，我们进一步提出了一种基于变压器的TPV编码器（TPVFormer）以有效地获得TPV特征。我们采用注意力机制来聚合每个 TPV 平面中每个查询对应的图像特征。实验表明，我们用稀疏监督训练的模型可以有效地预测所有体素的语义占用率。我们首次证明，在 nuScenes 上的 LiDAR 分割任务中，仅使用相机输入就可以实现与基于 LiDAR 的方法相当的性能。代码：https://github.com/wzzheng/TPVFormer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉的三视角表示方法（TPV），用于3D语义占用预测，通过结合鸟瞰图与两个垂直平面提升场景描述精度。
AI.motivation: 传统鸟瞰图（BEV）表示虽效率高，但难以准确描述场景的细粒度3D结构，需改进表示方式以提升预测精度。
AI.method: 设计三视角（TPV）表示，融合BEV与两个垂直平面；提出TPVFormer编码器，利用Transformer机制聚合三平面投影特征，实现稀疏监督下的3D语义占用预测。
AI.result: 模型在稀疏监督下有效预测所有体素语义占用，仅使用相机输入在nuScenes数据集的LiDAR分割任务中达到与LiDAR基线相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: TPV表示与TPVFormer方法验证了纯视觉方案在3D语义占用预测中的有效性，为自动驾驶感知提供了新思路。

Despite its better efficiency than voxel representation, it has difficulty describing the fine-grained 3D structure of a scene with a single plane. To address this, we propose a tri-perspective view (TPV) representation which accompanies BEV with two additional perpendicular planes. We model each point in the 3D space by summing its projected features on the three planes. To lift image features to the 3D TPV space, we further propose a transformer-based TPV encoder (TPVFormer) to obtain the TPV features effectively. We employ the attention mechanism to aggregate the image features corresponding to each query in each TPV plane. Experiments show that our model trained with sparse supervision effectively predicts the semantic occupancy for all voxels. We demonstrate for the first time that using only camera inputs can achieve comparable performance with LiDAR-based methods on the LiDAR segmentation task on nuScenes. authors_text: Mayank Goswami
title: AI pipeline for accurate retinal layer segmentation using OCT 3D images
title_zh: 使用 OCT 3D 图像进行精确视网膜层分割的 AI 管道
abstract: Image data set from a multi-spectral animal imaging system is used to address two issues: (a) registering the oscillation in optical coherence tomography (OCT) images due to mouse eye movement and (b) suppressing the shadow region under the thick vessels/structures. Several classical and AI-based algorithms in combination are tested for each task to see their compatibility with data from the combined animal imaging system. Hybridization of AI with optical flow followed by Homography transformation is shown to be working (correlation value>0.7) for registration. Resnet50 backbone is shown to be working better than the famous U-net model for shadow region detection with a loss value of 0.9. A simple-to-implement analytical equation is shown to be working for brightness manipulation with a 1% increment in mean pixel values and a 77% decrease in the number of zeros. The proposed equation allows formulating a constraint optimization problem using a controlling factor α for minimization of number of zeros, standard deviation of pixel value and maximizing the mean pixel value. For Layer segmentation, the standard U-net model is used. The AI-Pipeline consists of CNN, Optical flow, RCNN, pixel manipulation model, and U-net models in sequence. The thickness estimation process has a 6% error as compared to manual annotated standard data.
summary: Image data set from a multi-spectral animal imaging system is used to address two issues: (a) registering the oscillation in optical coherence tomography (OCT) images due to mouse eye movement and (b) suppressing the shadow region under the thick vessels/structures. Several classical and AI-based algorithms in combination are tested for each task to see their compatibility with data from the combined animal imaging system. Hybridization of AI with optical flow followed by Homography transformation is shown to be working (correlation value>0.7) for registration. Resnet50 backbone is shown to be working better than the famous U-net model for shadow region detection with a loss value of 0.9. A simple-to-implement analytical equation is shown to be working for brightness manipulation with a 1% increment in mean pixel values and a 77% decrease in the number of zeros. The proposed equation allows formulating a constraint optimization problem using a controlling factor α for minimization of number of zeros, standard deviation of pixel value and maximizing the mean pixel value. For Layer segmentation, the standard U-net model is used. The AI-Pipeline consists of CNN, Optical flow, RCNN, pixel manipulation model, and U-net models in sequence. The thickness estimation process has a 6% error as compared to manual annotated standard data.
abstract_zh: 来自多光谱动物成像系统的图像数据集用于解决两个问题：（a）记录由于小鼠眼球运动导致的光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像中的振荡；（b）抑制厚血管/结构下的阴影区域。针对每项任务测试了几种经典算法和基于人工智能的算法的组合，以了解它们与组合动物成像系统的数据的兼容性。人工智能与光流的混合以及单应性变换被证明对于配准是有效的（相关值>0.7）。结果表明，Resnet50 主干网在阴影区域检测方面比著名的 U-net 模型效果更好，损失值为 0.9。一个易于实现的解析方程被证明可用于亮度操纵，平均像素值增加 1%，零数量减少 77%。所提出的方程允许使用控制因子α来制定约束优化问题，以最小化零的数量、像素值的标准偏差以及最大化平均像素值。对于层分割，使用标准 U-net 模型。 AI-Pipeline依次由CNN、光流、RCNN、像素操作模型和U-net模型组成。与手动注释的标准数据相比，厚度估计过程存在 6% 的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种AI管道，用于使用OCT 3D图像进行精确的视网膜层分割。
AI.motivation: 本文旨在解决由于小鼠眼球运动引起的OCT图像振荡以及厚血管/结构下的阴影区域问题，以提高视网膜层分割的准确性。
AI.method: 结合经典和AI算法，采用AI与光流法结合后进行单应性变换进行图像配准，并使用ResNet50骨干网络进行阴影区域检测。同时，使用一个简单的分析方程进行亮度调整，并采用U-net模型进行层分割。
AI.result: 图像配准的关联值大于0.7，阴影区域检测的损失值为0.9，亮度调整使像素值均值增加1%，零像素数量减少77%。厚度估计误差为6%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的AI管道在视网膜层分割任务中表现出较高的准确性，为动物成像系统中的OCT图像处理提供了有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Nadir Ould-Khessal,Scott Fazackerley,Ramon Lawrence
title: An Efficient B-tree Implementation for Memory-Constrained Embedded Systems
title_zh: 内存受限嵌入式系统的高效 B 树实现
comment: Published in the 19th International Conference on Embedded Systems, Cyber-physical Systems, and Applications (ESCS'21). Code is available at https://github.com/ubco-db
comments: Published in the 19th International Conference on Embedded Systems, Cyber-physical Systems, and Applications (ESCS'21). Code is available at https://github.com/ubco-db
abstract: Embedded devices collect and process significant amounts of data in a variety of applications including environmental monitoring, industrial automation and control, and other Internet of Things (IoT) applications. Storing data efficiently is critically important, especially when the device must perform local processing on the data. The most widely used data structure for high performance query and insert is the B-tree. However, existing implementations consume too much memory for small embedded devices and often rely on operating system support. This work presents an extremely memory efficient implementation of B-trees for embedded devices that functions on the smallest devices and does not require an operating system. Experimental results demonstrate that the B-tree implementation can run on devices with as little as 4 KB of RAM while efficiently processing thousands of records.

Storing data efficiently is critically important, especially when the device must perform local processing on the data. The most widely used data structure for high performance query and insert is the B-tree. However, existing implementations consume too much memory for small embedded devices and often rely on operating system support. This work presents an extremely memory efficient implementation of B-trees for embedded devices that functions on the smallest devices and does not require an operating system. Experimental results demonstrate that the B-tree implementation can run on devices with as little as 4 KB of RAM while efficiently processing thousands of records.
abstract_zh: 嵌入式设备在各种应用中收集和处理大量数据，包括环境监测、工业自动化和控制以及其他物联网 (IoT) 应用。高效存储数据至关重要，尤其是当设备必须对数据执行本地处理时。用于高性能查询和插入的最广泛使用的数据结构是B树。然而，现有的实现对于小型嵌入式设备来说消耗了太多的内存，并且通常依赖于操作系统的支持。这项工作为嵌入式设备提供了一种极其内存高效的 B 树实现，可以在最小的设备上运行并且不需要操作系统。实验结果表明，B 树实现可以在 RAM 小至 4 KB 的设备上运行，同时有效处理数千条记录。

AI.motivation: 现有B树实现内存消耗大且依赖操作系统支持，难以满足资源受限嵌入式设备的需求。
AI.method: 设计了一种无需操作系统支持的极低内存消耗B树实现方案，优化数据存储与操作机制。
AI.result: 实验表明该实现可在仅4KB RAM的设备上高效处理数千条记录。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为内存受限嵌入式系统提供了可行的高效数据存储解决方案。

authors_text: Muhammad Anwaar Khalid,Kanwal Zulfiqar,Ulfat Bashir,Areeba Shaheen,Rida Iqbal,Zarnab Rizwan,Ghina Rizwan,Muhammad Moazam Fraz
title: 'Aariz: A Benchmark Dataset for Automatic Cephalometric Landmark Detection and CVM Stage Classification
title_zh: 'Aariz：自动头影测量地标检测和 CVM 阶段分类的基准数据集
abstract: The accurate identification and precise localization of cephalometric landmarks enable the classification and quantification of anatomical abnormalities. The traditional way of marking cephalometric landmarks on lateral cephalograms is a monotonous and time-consuming job. Endeavours to develop automated landmark detection systems have persistently been made, however, they are inadequate for orthodontic applications due to unavailability of a reliable dataset. We proposed a new state-of-the-art dataset to facilitate the development of robust AI solutions for quantitative morphometric analysis. The dataset includes 1000 lateral cephalometric radiographs (LCRs) obtained from 7 different radiographic imaging devices with varying resolutions, making it the most diverse and comprehensive cephalometric dataset to date. The clinical experts of our team meticulously annotated each radiograph with 29 cephalometric landmarks, including the most significant soft tissue landmarks ever marked in any publicly available dataset. Additionally, our experts also labelled the cervical vertebral maturation (CVM) stage of the patient in a radiograph, making this dataset the first standard resource for CVM classification. We believe that this dataset will be instrumental in the development of reliable automated landmark detection frameworks for use in orthodontics and beyond.
summary: The accurate identification and precise localization of cephalometric landmarks enable the classification and quantification of anatomical abnormalities. The traditional way of marking cephalometric landmarks on lateral cephalograms is a monotonous and time-consuming job. Endeavours to develop automated landmark detection systems have persistently been made, however, they are inadequate for orthodontic applications due to unavailability of a reliable dataset. We proposed a new state-of-the-art dataset to facilitate the development of robust AI solutions for quantitative morphometric analysis. The dataset includes 1000 lateral cephalometric radiographs (LCRs) obtained from 7 different radiographic imaging devices with varying resolutions, making it the most diverse and comprehensive cephalometric dataset to date. The clinical experts of our team meticulously annotated each radiograph with 29 cephalometric landmarks, including the most significant soft tissue landmarks ever marked in any publicly available dataset. Additionally, our experts also labelled the cervical vertebral maturation (CVM) stage of the patient in a radiograph, making this dataset the first standard resource for CVM classification. We believe that this dataset will be instrumental in the development of reliable automated landmark detection frameworks for use in orthodontics and beyond.
abstract_zh: 头影测量标志的准确识别和精确定位能够对解剖异常进行分类和量化。在头颅侧位片上标记头影测量标志的传统方法是一项单调且耗时的工作。人们一直在努力开发自动标志检测系统，但是由于缺乏可靠的数据集，它们不足以用于正畸应用。我们提出了一个新的最先进的数据集，以促进开发用于定量形态分析的强大的人工智能解决方案。该数据集包括从 7 种具有不同分辨率的不同放射线成像设备获得的 1000 张侧位头影测量 X 光照片 (LCR)，使其成为迄今为止最多样化、最全面的头影测量数据集。我们团队的临床专家用 29 个头影测量标志精心注释了每张 X 光片，其中包括任何公开数据集中标记的最重要的软组织标志。此外，我们的专家还在 X 光照片中标记了患者的颈椎成熟 (CVM) 阶段，使该数据集成为 CVM 分类的第一个标准资源。我们相信，该数据集将有助于开发用于正畸及其他领域的可靠的自动标志检测框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Aariz的基准数据集，用于自动颅侧位标志点检测和CVM阶段分类。
AI.motivation: 传统颅侧位标志点标记方法耗时且缺乏可靠的标准化数据集，阻碍了正畸领域自动化AI解决方案的发展。
AI.method: 收集来自7种不同分辨率放射设备的1000张侧位颅片，由临床专家标注29个颅侧位标志点及CVM阶段信息。
AI.result: 构建了目前最多样化且全面的颅侧位数据集，包含历史上公开数据集中最多的软组织标志点标注，并首次提供CVM阶段标准标注。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集将为正畸领域及更广泛的定量形态学分析提供可靠的自动化框架开发基础。

authors_text: Benedikt Kreis,Rohit Menon,Bharath Kumar Adinarayan,Jorge de Heuvel,Maren Bennewitz
title: Reactive Correction of Object Placement Errors for Robotic Arrangement Tasks
title_zh: 机器人布置任务的对象放置错误的反应性纠正
abstract: When arranging objects with robotic arms, the quality of the end result strongly depends on the achievable placement accuracy. However, even the most advanced robotic systems are prone to positioning errors that can occur at different steps of the manipulation process. Ignoring such errors can lead to the partial or complete failure of the arrangement. In this paper, we present a novel approach to autonomously detect and correct misplaced objects by pushing them with a robotic arm. We thoroughly tested our approach both in simulation and on real hardware using a Robotiq two-finger gripper mounted on a UR5 robotic arm. In our evaluation, we demonstrate the successful compensation for different errors injected during the manipulation of regular shaped objects. Consequently, we achieve a highly reliable object placement accuracy in the millimeter range.
summary: When arranging objects with robotic arms, the quality of the end result strongly depends on the achievable placement accuracy. However, even the most advanced robotic systems are prone to positioning errors that can occur at different steps of the manipulation process. Ignoring such errors can lead to the partial or complete failure of the arrangement. In this paper, we present a novel approach to autonomously detect and correct misplaced objects by pushing them with a robotic arm. We thoroughly tested our approach both in simulation and on real hardware using a Robotiq two-finger gripper mounted on a UR5 robotic arm. In our evaluation, we demonstrate the successful compensation for different errors injected during the manipulation of regular shaped objects. Consequently, we achieve a highly reliable object placement accuracy in the millimeter range.
abstract_zh: 当使用机械臂排列物体时，最终结果的质量很大程度上取决于可实现的放置精度。然而，即使是最先进的机器人系统也容易在操作过程的不同步骤中出现定位错误。忽略此类错误可能会导致装置部分或完全失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过用机械臂推动物体来自动检测和纠正放错位置的物体的新颖方法。我们使用安装在 UR5 机械臂上的 Robotiq 两指夹持器在模拟和真实硬件上彻底测试了我们的方法。在我们的评估中，我们展示了对规则形状物体操作过程中注入的不同误差的成功补偿。因此，我们实现了毫米范围内高度可靠的物体放置精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过机械臂自主检测并推动校正物体放置误差的新方法，提升机器人排列任务的精度。
AI.motivation: 机器人排列任务中定位误差会导致任务失败，现有系统缺乏自主校正能力，需开发可靠误差补偿方案。
AI.method: 设计基于推动操作的实时校正算法，结合仿真与实物实验（UR5机械臂+Robotiq夹具）验证误差补偿效果。
AI.result: 成功补偿多种人为注入的定位误差，实现毫米级放置精度，验证方法在模拟与真实环境中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升机器人排列可靠性，为复杂场景下的自主误差校正提供可行解决方案。

We thoroughly tested our approach both in simulation and on real hardware using a Robotiq two-finger gripper mounted on a UR5 robotic arm. Consequently, we achieve a highly reliable object placement accuracy in the millimeter range. 当使用机械臂排列物体时，最终结果的质量很大程度上取决于可实现的放置精度。然而，即使是最先进的机器人系统也容易在操作过程的不同步骤中出现定位错误。忽略此类错误可能会导致装置部分或完全失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过用机械臂推动物体来自动检测和纠正放错位置的物体的新颖方法。我们使用安装在 UR5 机械臂上的 Robotiq 两指夹持器在模拟和真实硬件上彻底测试了我们的方法。在我们的评估中，我们展示了对规则形状物体操作过程中注入的不同误差的成功补偿。因此，我们实现了毫米范围内高度可靠的物体放置精度。 本文提出一种通过机械臂自主检测并推动校正物体放置误差的新方法，提升机器人排列任务的精度。 Benedikt Kreis,Rohit Menon,Bharath Kumar Adinarayan,Jorge de Heuvel,Maren Bennewitz cs.RO

authors_text: Leon Würsching,Florentin Putz,Steffen Haesler,Matthias Hollick
title: FIDO2 the Rescue? Platform vs. Roaming Authentication on Smartphones
title_zh: FIDO2 是救援？智能手机上的平台与漫游身份验证
comment: 16 pages, 6 figures, the dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7572697 and the source code is available at https://github.com/seemoo-lab/fido2-the-smartphone
comments: 16 pages, 6 figures, the dataset is available at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.7572697 and the source code is available at https://github.com/seemoo-lab/fido2-the-smartphone
abstract: Modern smartphones support FIDO2 passwordless authentication using either external security keys or internal biometric authentication, but it is unclear whether users appreciate and accept these new forms of web authentication for their own accounts. We present the first lab study (N=87) comparing platform and roaming authentication on smartphones, determining the practical strengths and weaknesses of FIDO2 as perceived by users in a mobile scenario. Most participants were willing to adopt passwordless authentication during our in-person user study, but closer analysis shows that participants prioritize usability, security, and availability differently depending on the account type. We identify remaining adoption barriers that prevent FIDO2 from succeeding password authentication, such as missing support for contemporary usage patterns, including account delegation and usage on multiple clients.
summary: Modern smartphones support FIDO2 passwordless authentication using either external security keys or internal biometric authentication, but it is unclear whether users appreciate and accept these new forms of web authentication for their own accounts. We present the first lab study (N=87) comparing platform and roaming authentication on smartphones, determining the practical strengths and weaknesses of FIDO2 as perceived by users in a mobile scenario. Most participants were willing to adopt passwordless authentication during our in-person user study, but closer analysis shows that participants prioritize usability, security, and availability differently depending on the account type. We identify remaining adoption barriers that prevent FIDO2 from succeeding password authentication, such as missing support for contemporary usage patterns, including account delegation and usage on multiple clients.
abstract_zh: 现代智能手机支持使用外部安全密钥或内部生物识别身份验证的 FIDO2 无密码身份验证，但尚不清楚用户是否欣赏并接受这些新形式的网络身份验证方式用于自己的帐户。我们提出了第一个实验室研究 (N=87)，比较智能手机上的平台和漫游身份验证，确定用户在移动场景中感知的 FIDO2 的实际优势和劣势。在我们的面对面用户研究中，大多数参与者愿意采用无密码身份验证，但更仔细的分析表明，参与者根据帐户类型不同地优先考虑可用性、安全性和可用性。我们确定了阻止 FIDO2 成功进行密码身份验证的剩余采用障碍，例如缺少对当代使用模式的支持，包括帐户委托和在多个客户端上的使用。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究智能手机上FIDO2无密码认证的用户接受度，比较平台认证与漫游认证的优劣。
AI.motivation: FIDO2作为新兴的无密码认证技术，其用户接受度和实际应用场景效果尚不明确，需探讨其在不同账户类型下的可行性。
AI.method: 采用实验室实验方法（N=87），对比分析用户在智能手机平台上对FIDO2认证与传统密码认证的使用体验和偏好。
AI.result: 多数用户倾向采用无密码认证，但不同账户类型下对可用性、安全性和多设备支持的需求存在显著差异，FIDO2在部分场景下仍存在适配障碍。
AI.conclusion: FIDO2具备替代传统密码的潜力，但需优化对多客户端使用和账户委托等现代场景的支持以提升用户接受度。

authors_text: Paolo Pellizzoni,Andrea Pietracaprina,Geppino Pucci
title: Fully dynamic clustering and diversity maximization in doubling metrics
title_zh: 倍增指标中的完全动态聚类和多样性最大化
comment: ef:WADS 2023. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14079. Springer, Cham
comments: ef:WADS 2023. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 14079. Springer, Cham
abstract: We present approximation algorithms for some variants of center-based clustering and related problems in the fully dynamic setting, where the pointset evolves through an arbitrary sequence of insertions and deletions. Specifically, we target the following problems: $k$-center (with and without outliers), matroid-center, and diversity maximization. All algorithms employ a coreset-based strategy and rely on the use of the cover tree data structure, which we crucially augment to maintain, at any time, some additional information enabling the efficient extraction of the solution for the specific problem. For all of the aforementioned problems our algorithms yield $(α+\varepsilon)$-approximations, where $α$ is the best known approximation attainable in polynomial time in the standard off-line setting (except for $k$-center with $z$ outliers where $α= 2$ but we get a $(3+\varepsilon)$-approximation) and $\varepsilon>0$ is a user-provided accuracy parameter. The analysis of the algorithms is performed in terms of the doubling dimension of the underlying metric. Remarkably, and unlike previous works, the data structure and the running times of the insertion and deletion procedures do not depend in any way on the accuracy parameter $\varepsilon$ and, for the two $k$-center variants, on the parameter $k$. For spaces of bounded doubling dimension, the running times are dramatically smaller than those that would be required to compute solutions on the entire pointset from scratch. To the best of our knowledge, ours are the first solutions for the matroid-center and diversity maximization problems in the fully dynamic setting.

Specifically, we target the following problems: $k$-center (with and without outliers), matroid-center, and diversity maximization. All algorithms employ a coreset-based strategy and rely on the use of the cover tree data structure, which we crucially augment to maintain, at any time, some additional information enabling the efficient extraction of the solution for the specific problem. For all of the aforementioned problems our algorithms yield $(α+\varepsilon)$-approximations, where $α$ is the best known approximation attainable in polynomial time in the standard off-line setting (except for $k$-center with $z$ outliers where $α= 2$ but we get a $(3+\varepsilon)$-approximation) and $\varepsilon>0$ is a user-provided accuracy parameter. The analysis of the algorithms is performed in terms of the doubling dimension of the underlying metric. Remarkably, and unlike previous works, the data structure and the running times of the insertion and deletion procedures do not depend in any way on the accuracy parameter $\varepsilon$ and, for the two $k$-center variants, on the parameter $k$. For spaces of bounded doubling dimension, the running times are dramatically smaller than those that would be required to compute solutions on the entire pointset from scratch. To the best of our knowledge, ours are the first solutions for the matroid-center and diversity maximization problems in the fully dynamic setting.
abstract_zh: 我们为基于中心的聚类的一些变体和完全动态设置中的相关问题提出了近似算法，其中点集通过任意序列的插入和删除而演化。具体来说，我们针对以下问题：$k$-center（有或没有异常值）、拟阵中心和多样性最大化。所有算法都采用基于核心集的策略，并依赖于覆盖树数据结构的使用，我们对其进行了至关重要的扩充，以随时维护一些附加信息，从而能够有效提取特定问题的解决方案。对于所有上述问题，我们的算法产生 $(α+\varepsilon)$ 近似值，其中 $α$ 是标准离线设置中多项式时间内可达到的最著名的近似值（$k$-center 和 $z$ 异常值除外，其中 $α= 2$，但我们得到 $(3+\varepsilon)$ 近似值），$\varepsilon>0$ 是用户提供的精度参数。算法的分析是根据基础指标的加倍维度进行的。值得注意的是，与以前的工作不同，插入和删除过程的数据结构和运行时间不以任何方式依赖于精度参数 $\varepsilon$，并且对于两个 $k$-center 变体，不依赖于参数 $k$。对于有界双维空间，运行时间比从头开始计算整个点集的解所需的时间要少得多。据我们所知，我们的解决方案是全动态环境中拟阵中心和多样性最大化问题的第一个解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核心集和覆盖树数据结构的动态聚类算法，用于解决在倍增度量空间中的动态k中心、马特罗伊德中心和多样性最大化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法难以高效处理动态变化的数据集，且现有研究缺乏对马特罗伊德中心和多样性最大化问题的动态解决方案。
AI.method: 利用核心集策略结合增强的覆盖树数据结构，维护动态点集的近似解。算法复杂度与倍增维度相关，且独立于精度参数ε和k。
AI.result: 实现了(α+ε)-近似算法（k中心带异常值为(3+ε)），在倍增维度受限空间中显著优于静态算法，首次提出动态马特罗伊德中心和多样性最大化方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为动态聚类问题提供了理论保证的高效解决方案，尤其适用于低倍增维度场景，并填补了动态马特罗伊德中心和多样性最大化研究的空白。

authors_text: Abhiroop Bhattacharjee,Abhishek Moitra,Priyadarshini Panda
title: XploreNAS: Explore Adversarially Robust & Hardware-efficient Neural Architectures for Non-ideal Xbars
title_zh: XploreNAS：探索非理想 Xbar 的对抗性鲁棒且硬件高效的神经架构
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Embedded Computing Systems in April 2023
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Embedded Computing Systems in April 2023
abstract: Compute In-Memory platforms such as memristive crossbars are gaining focus as they facilitate acceleration of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) with high area and compute-efficiencies. However, the intrinsic non-idealities associated with the analog nature of computing in crossbars limits the performance of the deployed DNNs. Furthermore, DNNs are shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks leading to severe security threats in their large-scale deployment. Thus, finding adversarially robust DNN architectures for non-ideal crossbars is critical to the safe and secure deployment of DNNs on the edge. This work proposes a two-phase algorithm-hardware co-optimization approach called XploreNAS that searches for hardware-efficient & adversarially robust neural architectures for non-ideal crossbar platforms. We use the one-shot Neural Architecture Search (NAS) approach to train a large Supernet with crossbar-awareness and sample adversarially robust Subnets therefrom, maintaining competitive hardware-efficiency. Our experiments on crossbars with benchmark datasets (SVHN, CIFAR10 & CIFAR100) show upto ~8-16% improvement in the adversarial robustness of the searched Subnets against a baseline ResNet-18 model subjected to crossbar-aware adversarial training. We benchmark our robust Subnets for Energy-Delay-Area-Products (EDAPs) using the Neurosim tool and find that with additional hardware-efficiency driven optimizations, the Subnets attain ~1.5-1.6x lower EDAPs than ResNet-18 baseline.
summary: Compute In-Memory platforms such as memristive crossbars are gaining focus as they facilitate acceleration of Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) with high area and compute-efficiencies. However, the intrinsic non-idealities associated with the analog nature of computing in crossbars limits the performance of the deployed DNNs. Furthermore, DNNs are shown to be vulnerable to adversarial attacks leading to severe security threats in their large-scale deployment. Thus, finding adversarially robust DNN architectures for non-ideal crossbars is critical to the safe and secure deployment of DNNs on the edge. This work proposes a two-phase algorithm-hardware co-optimization approach called XploreNAS that searches for hardware-efficient & adversarially robust neural architectures for non-ideal crossbar platforms. We use the one-shot Neural Architecture Search (NAS) approach to train a large Supernet with crossbar-awareness and sample adversarially robust Subnets therefrom, maintaining competitive hardware-efficiency. Our experiments on crossbars with benchmark datasets (SVHN, CIFAR10 & CIFAR100) show upto ~8-16% improvement in the adversarial robustness of the searched Subnets against a baseline ResNet-18 model subjected to crossbar-aware adversarial training. We benchmark our robust Subnets for Energy-Delay-Area-Products (EDAPs) using the Neurosim tool and find that with additional hardware-efficiency driven optimizations, the Subnets attain ~1.5-1.6x lower EDAPs than ResNet-18 baseline.
abstract_zh: 忆阻交叉开关等内存计算平台越来越受到关注，因为它们有助于加速具有高面积和计算效率的深度神经网络 (DNN)。然而，与交叉开关中计算的模拟性质相关的内在非理想性限制了所部署的 DNN 的性能。此外，DNN 很容易受到对抗性攻击，导致其大规模部署中出现严重的安全威胁。因此，为非理想交叉开关找到具有对抗性的稳健 DNN 架构对于在边缘安全部署 DNN 至关重要。这项工作提出了一种称为 XploreNAS 的两阶段算法-硬件协同优化方法，该方法为非理想交叉平台搜索硬件高效且对抗鲁棒的神经架构。我们使用一次性神经架构搜索（NAS）方法来训练具有交叉感知的大型超级网，并从中采样具有对抗性的鲁棒子网，从而保持有竞争力的硬件效率。我们使用基准数据集（SVHN、CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100）对交叉开关进行的实验表明，与经过交叉开关感知对抗训练的基线 ResNet-18 模型相比，搜索子网的对抗鲁棒性提高了约 8-16%。我们使用 Neurosim 工具对强大的能量延迟区域产品 (EDAP) 子网进行基准测试，发现通过额外的硬件效率驱动优化，子网的 EDAP 比 ResNet-18 基线低约 1.5-1.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出XploreNAS算法，旨在为非理想交叉bar平台搜索兼具对抗鲁棒性与硬件效率的神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器交叉bar平台虽能高效加速DNN，但其非理想特性与DNN对对抗攻击的脆弱性限制了实际部署安全性，需同时优化架构鲁棒性与硬件效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段协同优化方法：基于one-shot NAS训练跨bar感知的超网络，并从中采样对抗鲁棒子网络；结合硬件效率优化降低能延积（EDAP）。
AI.result: 在SVHN/CIFAR数据集上，所搜架构对抗鲁棒性提升8-16%，EDAP较ResNet-18基线降低1.5-1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: XploreNAS通过算法-硬件协同设计，在保证对抗安全性的前提下显著提升交叉bar平台的能效表现，为边缘部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Marcel Hallgarten,Martin Stoll,Andreas Zell
title: From Prediction to Planning With Goal Conditioned Lane Graph Traversals
title_zh: 从预测到规划目标条件车道图遍历
abstract: The field of motion prediction for automated driving has seen tremendous progress recently, bearing ever-more mighty neural network architectures. Leveraging these powerful models bears great potential for the closely related planning task. In this letter we propose a novel goal-conditioning method and show its potential to transform a state-of-the-art prediction model into a goal-directed planner. Our key insight is that conditioning prediction on a navigation goal at the behaviour level outperforms other widely adopted methods, with the additional benefit of increased model interpretability. We train our model on a large open-source dataset and show promising performance in a comprehensive benchmark.
summary: The field of motion prediction for automated driving has seen tremendous progress recently, bearing ever-more mighty neural network architectures. Leveraging these powerful models bears great potential for the closely related planning task. In this letter we propose a novel goal-conditioning method and show its potential to transform a state-of-the-art prediction model into a goal-directed planner. Our key insight is that conditioning prediction on a navigation goal at the behaviour level outperforms other widely adopted methods, with the additional benefit of increased model interpretability. We train our model on a large open-source dataset and show promising performance in a comprehensive benchmark.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶运动预测领域最近取得了巨大进展，神经网络架构变得越来越强大。利用这些强大的模型对于密切相关的规划任务具有巨大的潜力。在这封信中，我们提出了一种新颖的目标调节方法，并展示了其将最先进的预测模型转变为目标导向规划器的潜力。我们的主要见解是，在行为层面上对导航目标的条件预测优于其他广泛采用的方法，并具有增加模型可解释性的额外好处。我们在大型开源数据集上训练我们的模型，并在综合基准测试中显示出良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于目标条件化的车道图遍历方法，将先进的运动预测模型转化为目标导向的自动驾驶规划器。
AI.motivation: 尽管运动预测模型取得显著进展，但如何有效利用这些模型实现可解释的规划任务仍是挑战，现有方法在目标引导性和模型可解释性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 通过在行为层面将预测模型与导航目标进行条件化关联，构建车道图遍历框架，利用开放数据集训练并验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 在综合基准测试中展现出优于传统方法的规划性能，同时提升了模型决策过程的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 目标条件化方法能有效将预测模型转化为规划系统，在保持性能优势的同时增强模型可解释性，为自动驾驶提供新思路。

authors_text: Md Zubair Ibne Alam,Shehnaz Islam,Enamul Hoque
title: SeeChart: Enabling Accessible Visualizations Through Interactive Natural Language Interface For People with Visual Impairments
title_zh: SeeChart：通过交互式自然语言界面为视力障碍人士提供可访问的可视化
abstract: Web-based data visualizations have become very popular for exploring data and communicating insights. Newspapers, journals, and reports regularly publish visualizations to tell compelling stories with data. Unfortunately, most visualizations are inaccessible to readers with visual impairments. For many charts on the web, there are no accompanying alternative (alt) texts, and even if such texts exist they do not adequately describe important insights from charts. To address the problem, we first interviewed 15 blind users to understand their challenges and requirements for reading data visualizations. Based on the insights from these interviews, we developed SeeChart, an interactive tool that automatically deconstructs charts from web pages and then converts them to accessible visualizations for blind people by enabling them to hear the chart summary as well as to interact through data points using the keyboard. Our evaluation with 14 blind participants suggests the efficacy of SeeChart in understanding key insights from charts and fulfilling their information needs while reducing their required time and cognitive burden.
summary: Web-based data visualizations have become very popular for exploring data and communicating insights. Newspapers, journals, and reports regularly publish visualizations to tell compelling stories with data. Unfortunately, most visualizations are inaccessible to readers with visual impairments. For many charts on the web, there are no accompanying alternative (alt) texts, and even if such texts exist they do not adequately describe important insights from charts. To address the problem, we first interviewed 15 blind users to understand their challenges and requirements for reading data visualizations. Based on the insights from these interviews, we developed SeeChart, an interactive tool that automatically deconstructs charts from web pages and then converts them to accessible visualizations for blind people by enabling them to hear the chart summary as well as to interact through data points using the keyboard. Our evaluation with 14 blind participants suggests the efficacy of SeeChart in understanding key insights from charts and fulfilling their information needs while reducing their required time and cognitive burden.
abstract_zh: 基于网络的数据可视化在探索数据和交流见解方面变得非常流行。报纸、期刊和报告定期发布可视化效果，用数据讲述引人入胜的故事。不幸的是，大多数可视化对于有视觉障碍的读者来说是无法理解的。对于网络上的许多图表来说，没有随附的替代 (alt) 文本，即使存在此类文本，它们也无法充分描述图表中的重要见解。为了解决这个问题，我们首先采访了 15 位盲人用户，了解他们在阅读数据可视化方面面临的挑战和需求。根据这些采访的见解，我们开发了 SeeChart，这是一种交互式工具，可以自动解构网页中的图表，然后通过使盲人能够听到图表摘要并使用键盘通过数据点进行交互，将其转换为可供盲人使用的可视化效果。我们对 14 名盲人参与者进行的评估表明，SeeChart 在理解图表中的关键见解和满足他们的信息需求方面的功效，同时减少了他们所需的时间和认知负担。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SeeChart工具，通过交互式自然语言界面帮助视障人士访问网络数据可视化内容。
AI.motivation: 网络数据可视化缺乏有效的替代文本描述，导致视障用户无法获取图表关键信息，亟需开发无障碍访问方案。
AI.method: 基于15名视障用户的访谈需求，开发SeeChart工具自动解析网页图表并生成语音摘要，支持键盘交互探索数据点。
AI.result: 14名视障参与者测试表明，SeeChart显著提升信息理解效率，减少认知负担与操作时间。
AI.conclusion: SeeChart通过语音交互与数据点探索功能，有效解决了视障用户访问数据可视化的核心痛点。

ai_content.conclusion: SeeChart通过语音交互与数据点探索功能，有效解决了视障用户访问数据可视化的核心痛点。

search_text: SeeChart: Enabling Accessible Visualizations Through Interactive Natural Language Interface For People with Visual Impairments SeeChart：通过交互式自然语言界面为视力障碍人士提供可访问的可视化 Web-based data visualizations have become very popular for exploring data and communicating insights. Newspapers, journals, and reports regularly publish visualizations to tell compelling stories with data. Unfortunately, most visualizations are inaccessible to readers with visual impairments. For many charts on the web, there are no accompanying alternative (alt) texts, and even if such texts exist they do not adequately describe important insights from charts. To address the problem, we first interviewed 15 blind users to understand their challenges and requirements for reading data visualizations. Based on the insights from these interviews, we developed SeeChart, an interactive tool that automatically deconstructs charts from web pages and then converts them to accessible visualizations for blind people by enabling them to hear the chart summary as well as to interact through data points using the keyboard. Our evaluation with 14 blind participants suggests the efficacy of SeeChart in understanding key insights from charts and fulfilling their information needs while reducing their required time and cognitive burden. 基于网络的数据可视化在探索数据和交流见解方面变得非常流行。报纸、期刊和报告定期发布可视化效果，用数据讲述引人入胜的故事。不幸的是，大多数可视化对于有视觉障碍的读者来说是无法理解的。对于网络上的许多图表来说，没有随附的替代 (alt) 文本，即使存在此类文本，它们也无法充分描述图表中的重要见解。为了解决这个问题，我们首先采访了 15 位盲人用户，了解他们在阅读数据可视化方面面临的挑战和需求。根据这些采访的见解，我们开发了 SeeChart，这是一种交互式工具，可以自动解构网页中的图表，然后通过使盲人能够听到图表摘要并使用键盘通过数据点进行交互，将其转换为可供盲人使用的可视化效果。我们对 14 名盲人参与者进行的评估表明，SeeChart 在理解图表中的关键见解和满足他们的信息需求方面的功效，同时减少了他们所需的时间和认知负担。 本文提出SeeChart工具，通过交互式自然语言界面帮助视障人士访问网络数据可视化内容。 Md Zubair Ibne Alam,Shehnaz Islam,Enamul Hoque cs.HC

authors_text: Wenyan Yang,Joni Pajarinen,Dinging Cai,Joni Kämäräinen
title: Prioritized offline Goal-swapping Experience Replay
title_zh: 优先离线目标交换体验重播
abstract: In goal-conditioned offline reinforcement learning, an agent learns from previously collected data to go to an arbitrary goal. Since the offline data only contains a finite number of trajectories, a main challenge is how to generate more data. Goal-swapping generates additional data by switching trajectory goals but while doing so produces a large number of invalid trajectories. To address this issue, we propose prioritized goal-swapping experience replay (PGSER). PGSER uses a pre-trained Q function to assign higher priority weights to goal swapped transitions that allow reaching the goal. In experiments, PGSER significantly improves over baselines in a wide range of benchmark tasks, including challenging previously unsuccessful dexterous in-hand manipulation tasks.
summary: In goal-conditioned offline reinforcement learning, an agent learns from previously collected data to go to an arbitrary goal. Since the offline data only contains a finite number of trajectories, a main challenge is how to generate more data. Goal-swapping generates additional data by switching trajectory goals but while doing so produces a large number of invalid trajectories. To address this issue, we propose prioritized goal-swapping experience replay (PGSER). PGSER uses a pre-trained Q function to assign higher priority weights to goal swapped transitions that allow reaching the goal. In experiments, PGSER significantly improves over baselines in a wide range of benchmark tasks, including challenging previously unsuccessful dexterous in-hand manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在目标条件离线强化学习中，代理从之前收集的数据中学习以达到任意目标。由于离线数据仅包含有限数量的轨迹，因此主要挑战是如何生成更多数据。目标交换通过切换轨迹目标来生成额外的数据，但这样做会产生大量无效轨迹。为了解决这个问题，我们提出优先目标交换体验重播（PGSER）。 PGSER 使用预训练的 Q 函数为目标交换转换分配更高的优先级权重，以实现目标。在实验中，PGSER 在各种基准任务中显着提高了基线，包括挑战以前不成功的灵巧手动操作任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优先级目标交换经验回放（PGSER）方法，用于解决目标条件下的离线强化学习中数据生成效率与质量的问题。
AI.motivation: 离线数据有限导致传统目标交换方法生成大量无效轨迹，影响学习效果，需筛选有效数据以提升性能。
AI.method: 利用预训练Q函数为能达成目标的目标交换转换分配更高优先级权重，筛选有效数据进行经验回放。
AI.result: 在多个基准任务中显著优于基线方法，尤其在之前失败的灵巧手部操作任务中取得成功。
AI.conclusion: PGSER通过优先级筛选有效数据，有效解决了离线强化学习中数据生成的挑战，提升了任务成功率。

authors_text: Wei-Wei Du,Hong-Wei Wu,Wei-Yao Wang,Wen-Chih Peng
title: Team Triple-Check at Factify 2: Parameter-Efficient Large Foundation Models with Feature Representations for Multi-Modal Fact Verification
title_zh: Factify 2 团队进行三次检查：参数高效的大型基础模型，具有用于多模态事实验证的特征表示
abstract: Multi-modal fact verification has become an important but challenging issue on social media due to the mismatch between the text and images in the misinformation of news content, which has been addressed by considering cross-modalities to identify the veracity of the news in recent years. In this paper, we propose the Pre-CoFactv2 framework with new parameter-efficient foundation models for modeling fine-grained text and input embeddings with lightening parameters, multi-modal multi-type fusion for not only capturing relations for the same and different modalities but also for different types (i.e., claim and document), and feature representations for explicitly providing metadata for each sample. In addition, we introduce a unified ensemble method to boost model performance by adjusting the importance of each trained model with not only the weights but also the powers. Extensive experiments show that Pre-CoFactv2 outperforms Pre-CoFact by a large margin and achieved new state-of-the-art results at the Factify challenge at AAAI 2023. We further illustrate model variations to verify the relative contributions of different components. Our team won the first prize (F1-score: 81.82%) and we made our code publicly available at https://github.com/wwweiwei/Pre-CoFactv2-AAAI-2023.
summary: Multi-modal fact verification has become an important but challenging issue on social media due to the mismatch between the text and images in the misinformation of news content, which has been addressed by considering cross-modalities to identify the veracity of the news in recent years. In this paper, we propose the Pre-CoFactv2 framework with new parameter-efficient foundation models for modeling fine-grained text and input embeddings with lightening parameters, multi-modal multi-type fusion for not only capturing relations for the same and different modalities but also for different types (i.e., claim and document), and feature representations for explicitly providing metadata for each sample. In addition, we introduce a unified ensemble method to boost model performance by adjusting the importance of each trained model with not only the weights but also the powers. Extensive experiments show that Pre-CoFactv2 outperforms Pre-CoFact by a large margin and achieved new state-of-the-art results at the Factify challenge at AAAI 2023. We further illustrate model variations to verify the relative contributions of different components. Our team won the first prize (F1-score: 81.82%) and we made our code publicly available at https://github.com/wwweiwei/Pre-CoFactv2-AAAI-2023.
abstract_zh: 由于新闻内容错误信息中的文字和图像不匹配，多模态事实验证已成为社交媒体上一个重要但具有挑战性的问题，近年来通过考虑跨模态来识别新闻的真实性来解决这一问题。在本文中，我们提出了 Pre-CoFactv2 框架，该框架具有新的参数高效基础模型，用于对细粒度文本和输入嵌入进行简化参数建模，多模态多类型融合不仅可以捕获相同和不同模态的关系，还可以捕获不同类型（即声明和文档）的关系，以及用于显式提供每个样本元数据的特征表示。此外，我们引入了一种统一的集成方法，通过调整每个训练模型的重要性，不仅使用权重，还使用功率来提高模型性能。大量实验表明，Pre-CoFactv2 大幅优于 Pre-CoFact，并在 AAAI 2023 的 Factify 挑战赛中取得了新的最先进结果。我们进一步说明了模型变化，以验证不同组件的相对贡献。我们的团队获得了一等奖（F1 得分：81.82%），我们在 https://github.com/wwweiwei/Pre-CoFactv2-AAAI-2023 上公开了我们的代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Pre-CoFactv2框架，通过参数高效的多模态融合模型解决社交媒体中图文信息不匹配的虚假新闻验证问题。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体上虚假新闻的图文内容存在语义不匹配，传统方法难以高效捕捉跨模态关联且参数冗余。
AI.method: 设计轻量级参数高效基础模型，结合细粒度文本与输入嵌入、多模态多类型融合技术，并引入统一集成方法动态调整模型权重与幂次。
AI.result: 在Factify挑战赛中以F1-score 81.82%获得第一名，显著优于原有Pre-CoFact模型并刷新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 参数高效多模态框架与动态集成方法有效提升了虚假新闻验证性能，代码已开源促进后续研究。

ai_content.conclusion: 参数高效多模态框架与动态集成方法有效提升了虚假新闻验证性能，代码已开源促进后续研究。

authors_text: Fan Huang,Haewoon Kwak,Jisun An
title: Is ChatGPT better than Human Annotators? Potential and Limitations of ChatGPT in Explaining Implicit Hate Speech
title_zh: ChatGPT 比人类注释者更好吗？ ChatGPT 在解释隐性仇恨言论方面的潜力和局限性
comment: Accepted by The Web Conference Companion, 2023
comments: Accepted by The Web Conference Companion, 2023
abstract: Recent studies have alarmed that many online hate speeches are implicit. With its subtle nature, the explainability of the detection of such hateful speech has been a challenging problem. In this work, we examine whether ChatGPT can be used for providing natural language explanations (NLEs) for implicit hateful speech detection. We design our prompt to elicit concise ChatGPT-generated NLEs and conduct user studies to evaluate their qualities by comparison with human-written NLEs. We discuss the potential and limitations of ChatGPT in the context of implicit hateful speech research.
summary: Recent studies have alarmed that many online hate speeches are implicit. With its subtle nature, the explainability of the detection of such hateful speech has been a challenging problem. In this work, we examine whether ChatGPT can be used for providing natural language explanations (NLEs) for implicit hateful speech detection. We design our prompt to elicit concise ChatGPT-generated NLEs and conduct user studies to evaluate their qualities by comparison with human-written NLEs. We discuss the potential and limitations of ChatGPT in the context of implicit hateful speech research.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究警告说，许多在线仇恨言论都是隐性的。由于其微妙的性质，检测此类仇恨言论的可解释性一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了 ChatGPT 是否可用于为隐式仇恨语音检测提供自然语言解释 (NLE)。我们设计提示来引出简洁的 ChatGPT 生成的 NLE，并进行用户研究，通过与人类编写的 NLE 进行比较来评估其质量。我们在隐性仇恨言论研究的背景下讨论 ChatGPT 的潜力和局限性。

AI.tldr: 评估ChatGPT在生成隐性仇恨言论自然语言解释（NLEs）方面的潜力与局限性，并与人类注释者进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 隐性仇恨言论因表达隐晦而难以检测，其可解释性检测存在挑战，需探索自动化工具如ChatGPT的辅助能力。
AI.method: 设计特定提示词引导ChatGPT生成简洁NLEs，通过用户研究对比ChatGPT与人类生成的NLEs质量。
AI.result: ChatGPT能生成合理解释但存在准确性不足等问题，用户研究显示其效果接近人类但仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: ChatGPT在隐性仇恨言论解释中展现潜力，但需结合人类判断以克服其局限性。

search_text: Is ChatGPT better than Human Annotators? Potential and Limitations of ChatGPT in Explaining Implicit Hate Speech ChatGPT 比人类注释者更好吗？ ChatGPT 在解释隐性仇恨言论方面的潜力和局限性 Recent studies have alarmed that many online hate speeches are implicit. With its subtle nature, the explainability of the detection of such hateful speech has been a challenging problem. In this work, we examine whether ChatGPT can be used for providing natural language explanations (NLEs) for implicit hateful speech detection. We design our prompt to elicit concise ChatGPT-generated NLEs and conduct user studies to evaluate their qualities by comparison with human-written NLEs. We discuss the potential and limitations of ChatGPT in the context of implicit hateful speech research. 最近的研究警告说，许多在线仇恨言论都是隐性的。由于其微妙的性质，检测此类仇恨言论的可解释性一直是一个具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，我们研究了 ChatGPT 是否可用于为隐式仇恨语音检测提供自然语言解释 (NLE)。我们设计提示来引出简洁的 ChatGPT 生成的 NLE，并进行用户研究，通过与人类编写的 NLE 进行比较来评估其质量。我们在隐性仇恨言论研究的背景下讨论 ChatGPT 的潜力和局限性。 评估ChatGPT在生成隐性仇恨言论自然语言解释（NLEs）方面的潜力与局限性，并与人类注释者进行对比分析。 Fan Huang,Haewoon Kwak,Jisun An cs.CL,cs.HC

authors_text: Ali Al-Kaswan,Maliheh Izadi,Arie van Deursen
title: Targeted Attack on GPT-Neo for the SATML Language Model Data Extraction Challenge
title_zh: 针对 SATML 语言模型数据提取挑战的 GPT-Neo 定向攻击
abstract: Previous work has shown that Large Language Models are susceptible to so-called data extraction attacks. This allows an attacker to extract a sample that was contained in the training data, which has massive privacy implications. The construction of data extraction attacks is challenging, current attacks are quite inefficient, and there exists a significant gap in the extraction capabilities of untargeted attacks and memorization. Thus, targeted attacks are proposed, which identify if a given sample from the training data, is extractable from a model. In this work, we apply a targeted data extraction attack to the SATML2023 Language Model Training Data Extraction Challenge. We apply a two-step approach. In the first step, we maximise the recall of the model and are able to extract the suffix for 69% of the samples. In the second step, we use a classifier-based Membership Inference Attack on the generations. Our AutoSklearn classifier achieves a precision of 0.841. The full approach reaches a score of 0.405 recall at a 10% false positive rate, which is an improvement of 34% over the baseline of 0.301.
summary: Previous work has shown that Large Language Models are susceptible to so-called data extraction attacks. This allows an attacker to extract a sample that was contained in the training data, which has massive privacy implications. The construction of data extraction attacks is challenging, current attacks are quite inefficient, and there exists a significant gap in the extraction capabilities of untargeted attacks and memorization. Thus, targeted attacks are proposed, which identify if a given sample from the training data, is extractable from a model. In this work, we apply a targeted data extraction attack to the SATML2023 Language Model Training Data Extraction Challenge. We apply a two-step approach. In the first step, we maximise the recall of the model and are able to extract the suffix for 69% of the samples. In the second step, we use a classifier-based Membership Inference Attack on the generations. Our AutoSklearn classifier achieves a precision of 0.841. The full approach reaches a score of 0.405 recall at a 10% false positive rate, which is an improvement of 34% over the baseline of 0.301.
abstract_zh: 先前的工作表明，大型语言模型容易受到所谓的数据提取攻击。这允许攻击者提取训练数据中包含的样本，这具有巨大的隐私影响。数据提取攻击的构造具有挑战性，现有的攻击效率相当低，并且非针对性攻击的提取能力和记忆能力存在显着差距。因此，提出了有针对性的攻击，该攻击识别训练数据中的给定样本是否可以从模型中提取。在这项工作中，我们将有针对性的数据提取攻击应用于 SATML2023 语言模型训练数据提取挑战赛。我们采用两步法。第一步，我们最大化模型的召回率，并能够提取 69% 的样本的后缀。在第二步中，我们对各代使用基于分类器的成员推理攻击。我们的 AutoSklearn 分类器的精度达到 0.841。完整方法以 10% 的误报率达到 0.405 的召回率，比 0.301 的基线提高了 34%。

AI.tldr: 本文针对SATML2023语言模型训练数据提取挑战，提出一种定向数据提取攻击方法，通过两步策略提升模型训练数据的提取效率。
AI.motivation: 现有数据提取攻击效率低下且存在未定向攻击与模型记忆能力的差距，需设计更高效的定向攻击方法以识别训练数据中的可提取样本，解决隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 采用两步法：第一步通过最大化召回率提取69%样本的后缀；第二步利用AutoSklearn分类器进行成员推理攻击，最终在10%假阳性率下实现0.405召回率。
AI.result: 方法在SATML2023挑战中达到0.405召回率（10%假阳性率），较基线提升34%，分类器精确度达0.841。
AI.conclusion: 定向攻击显著提升数据提取效率，揭示了大型语言模型的隐私风险，未来需加强防御机制以应对此类攻击。

authors_text: Zhichao Lu,Chuntao Ding,Felix Juefei-Xu,Vishnu Naresh Boddeti,Shangguang Wang,Yun Yang
title: TFormer: A Transmission-Friendly ViT Model for IoT Devices
title_zh: TFormer：适用于物联网设备的传输友好的 ViT 模型
comment: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
comments: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems
abstract: Deploying high-performance vision transformer (ViT) models on ubiquitous Internet of Things (IoT) devices to provide high-quality vision services will revolutionize the way we live, work, and interact with the world. Due to the contradiction between the limited resources of IoT devices and resource-intensive ViT models, the use of cloud servers to assist ViT model training has become mainstream. However, due to the larger number of parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs) of the existing ViT models, the model parameters transmitted by cloud servers are large and difficult to run on resource-constrained IoT devices. To this end, this paper proposes a transmission-friendly ViT model, TFormer, for deployment on resource-constrained IoT devices with the assistance of a cloud server. The high performance and small number of model parameters and FLOPs of TFormer are attributed to the proposed hybrid layer and the proposed partially connected feed-forward network (PCS-FFN). The hybrid layer consists of nonlearnable modules and a pointwise convolution, which can obtain multitype and multiscale features with only a few parameters and FLOPs to improve the TFormer performance. The PCS-FFN adopts group convolution to reduce the number of parameters. The key idea of this paper is to propose TFormer with few model parameters and FLOPs to facilitate applications running on resource-constrained IoT devices to benefit from the high performance of the ViT models. Experimental results on the ImageNet-1K, MS COCO, and ADE20K datasets for image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. Specifically, TFormer-S achieves 5% higher accuracy on ImageNet-1K than ResNet18 with 1.4$\times$ fewer parameters and FLOPs.
summary: Deploying high-performance vision transformer (ViT) models on ubiquitous Internet of Things (IoT) devices to provide high-quality vision services will revolutionize the way we live, work, and interact with the world. Due to the contradiction between the limited resources of IoT devices and resource-intensive ViT models, the use of cloud servers to assist ViT model training has become mainstream. However, due to the larger number of parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs) of the existing ViT models, the model parameters transmitted by cloud servers are large and difficult to run on resource-constrained IoT devices. To this end, this paper proposes a transmission-friendly ViT model, TFormer, for deployment on resource-constrained IoT devices with the assistance of a cloud server. The high performance and small number of model parameters and FLOPs of TFormer are attributed to the proposed hybrid layer and the proposed partially connected feed-forward network (PCS-FFN). The hybrid layer consists of nonlearnable modules and a pointwise convolution, which can obtain multitype and multiscale features with only a few parameters and FLOPs to improve the TFormer performance. The PCS-FFN adopts group convolution to reduce the number of parameters. The key idea of this paper is to propose TFormer with few model parameters and FLOPs to facilitate applications running on resource-constrained IoT devices to benefit from the high performance of the ViT models. Experimental results on the ImageNet-1K, MS COCO, and ADE20K datasets for image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. Specifically, TFormer-S achieves 5% higher accuracy on ImageNet-1K than ResNet18 with 1.4$\times$ fewer parameters and FLOPs.
abstract_zh: 在无处不在的物联网 (IoT) 设备上部署高性能视觉转换器 (ViT) 模型以提供高质量的视觉服务将彻底改变我们的生活、工作和与世界互动的方式。由于物联网设备资源有限与资源密集型ViT模型之间的矛盾，利用云服务器辅助ViT模型训练已成为主流。然而，由于现有ViT模型的参数数量和浮点运算（FLOP）较多，云服务器传输的模型参数很大，难以在资源受限的物联网设备上运行。为此，本文提出了一种传输友好的ViT模型TFormer，用于在云服务器的帮助下部署在资源受限的物联网设备上。 TFormer 的高性能、少量模型参数和 FLOPs 归功于所提出的混合层和所提出的部分连接前馈网络（PCS-FFN）。混合层由不可学习模块和逐点卷积组成，只需少量参数和 FLOP 即可获得多类型和多尺度特征，从而提高 TFormer 性能。 PCS-FFN采用组卷积来减少参数数量。本文的核心思想是提出具有很少模型参数和 FLOP 的 TFormer，以促进在资源受限的 IoT 设备上运行的应用程序从 ViT 模型的高性能中受益。在 ImageNet-1K、MS COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上用于图像分类、对象检测和语义分割任务的实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于其他最先进的模型。具体来说，TFormer-S 在 ImageNet-1K 上的准确率比 ResNet18 高 5%，参数和 FLOP 减少 1.4$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于物联网设备的轻量级视觉Transformer模型TFormer，通过减少参数量和计算量解决资源受限设备部署ViT模型的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT模型参数量和计算量大，难以在资源受限的物联网设备上运行，依赖云端计算导致传输开销大，亟需开发适合边缘设备的轻量化ViT模型。
AI.method: 设计混合层（含非可学习模块和点卷积）获取多尺度特征，提出部分连接前馈网络（PCS-FFN）通过组卷积降低参数量，整体减少模型规模并保持性能。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K、MS COCO和ADE20K数据集上，TFormer-S相比ResNet18参数量和计算量减少1.4倍，图像分类准确率提升5%。
AI.conclusion: TFormer通过结构创新有效降低了ViT模型的资源需求，在保持高性能的同时实现了在物联网设备上的高效部署。

search_text: TFormer: A Transmission-Friendly ViT Model for IoT Devices TFormer：适用于物联网设备的传输友好的 ViT 模型 Deploying high-performance vision transformer (ViT) models on ubiquitous Internet of Things (IoT) devices to provide high-quality vision services will revolutionize the way we live, work, and interact with the world. Due to the contradiction between the limited resources of IoT devices and resource-intensive ViT models, the use of cloud servers to assist ViT model training has become mainstream. However, due to the larger number of parameters and floating-point operations (FLOPs) of the existing ViT models, the model parameters transmitted by cloud servers are large and difficult to run on resource-constrained IoT devices. To this end, this paper proposes a transmission-friendly ViT model, TFormer, for deployment on resource-constrained IoT devices with the assistance of a cloud server. The high performance and small number of model parameters and FLOPs of TFormer are attributed to the proposed hybrid layer and the proposed partially connected feed-forward network (PCS-FFN). The hybrid layer consists of nonlearnable modules and a pointwise convolution, which can obtain multitype and multiscale features with only a few parameters and FLOPs to improve the TFormer performance. The PCS-FFN adopts group convolution to reduce the number of parameters. The key idea of this paper is to propose TFormer with few model parameters and FLOPs to facilitate applications running on resource-constrained IoT devices to benefit from the high performance of the ViT models. Experimental results on the ImageNet-1K, MS COCO, and ADE20K datasets for image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation tasks demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms other state-of-the-art models. Specifically, TFormer-S achieves 5% higher accuracy on ImageNet-1K than ResNet18 with 1.4$\times$ fewer parameters and FLOPs. 在无处不在的物联网 (IoT) 设备上部署高性能视觉转换器 (ViT) 模型以提供高质量的视觉服务将彻底改变我们的生活、工作和与世界互动的方式。由于物联网设备资源有限与资源密集型ViT模型之间的矛盾，利用云服务器辅助ViT模型训练已成为主流。然而，由于现有ViT模型的参数数量和浮点运算（FLOP）较多，云服务器传输的模型参数很大，难以在资源受限的物联网设备上运行。为此，本文提出了一种传输友好的ViT模型TFormer，用于在云服务器的帮助下部署在资源受限的物联网设备上。 TFormer 的高性能、少量模型参数和 FLOPs 归功于所提出的混合层和所提出的部分连接前馈网络（PCS-FFN）。混合层由不可学习模块和逐点卷积组成，只需少量参数和 FLOP 即可获得多类型和多尺度特征，从而提高 TFormer 性能。 PCS-FFN采用组卷积来减少参数数量。本文的核心思想是提出具有很少模型参数和 FLOP 的 TFormer，以促进在资源受限的 IoT 设备上运行的应用程序从 ViT 模型的高性能中受益。在 ImageNet-1K、MS COCO 和 ADE20K 数据集上用于图像分类、对象检测和语义分割任务的实验结果表明，所提出的模型优于其他最先进的模型。具体来说，TFormer-S 在 ImageNet-1K 上的准确率比 ResNet18 高 5%，参数和 FLOP 减少 1.4$\times$。 本文提出一种适用于物联网设备的轻量级视觉Transformer模型TFormer，通过减少参数量和计算量解决资源受限设备部署ViT模型的挑战。 Zhichao Lu,Chuntao Ding,Felix Juefei-Xu,Vishnu Naresh Boddeti,Shangguang Wang,Yun Yang cs.CV,cs.DC,cs.LG

authors_text: Alessandro Gambetti,Qiwei Han
title: Combat AI With AI: Counteract Machine-Generated Fake Restaurant Reviews on Social Media
title_zh: 用人工智能对抗人工智能：抵制社交媒体上机器生成的虚假餐厅评论
comment: Preprint version of the Paper submitted to KDD2023. 13 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables
comments: Preprint version of the Paper submitted to KDD2023. 13 pages, 5 figures, 6 tables
abstract: Recent advances in generative models such as GPT may be used to fabricate indistinguishable fake customer reviews at a much lower cost, thus posing challenges for social media platforms to detect these machine-generated fake reviews. We propose to leverage the high-quality elite restaurant reviews verified by Yelp to generate fake reviews from the OpenAI GPT review creator and ultimately fine-tune a GPT output detector to predict fake reviews that significantly outperform existing solutions. We further apply the model to predict non-elite reviews and identify the patterns across several dimensions, such as review, user and restaurant characteristics, and writing style. We show that social media platforms are continuously challenged by machine-generated fake reviews, although they may implement detection systems to filter out suspicious reviews.
summary: Recent advances in generative models such as GPT may be used to fabricate indistinguishable fake customer reviews at a much lower cost, thus posing challenges for social media platforms to detect these machine-generated fake reviews. We propose to leverage the high-quality elite restaurant reviews verified by Yelp to generate fake reviews from the OpenAI GPT review creator and ultimately fine-tune a GPT output detector to predict fake reviews that significantly outperform existing solutions. We further apply the model to predict non-elite reviews and identify the patterns across several dimensions, such as review, user and restaurant characteristics, and writing style. We show that social media platforms are continuously challenged by machine-generated fake reviews, although they may implement detection systems to filter out suspicious reviews.
abstract_zh: GPT 等生成模型的最新进展可用于以低得多的成本制造难以区分的虚假客户评论，从而给社交媒体平台检测这些机器生成的虚假评论带来挑战。我们建议利用 Yelp 验证的高质量精英餐厅评论来生成来自 OpenAI GPT 评论创建者的虚假评论，并最终微调 GPT 输出检测器以预测明显优于现有解决方案的虚假评论。我们进一步应用该模型来预测非精英评论，并识别多个维度的模式，例如评论、用户和餐厅特征以及写作风格。我们表明，社交媒体平台不断受到机器生成的虚假评论的挑战，尽管它们可能会实施检测系统来过滤掉可疑评论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用高质量真实餐厅评论训练生成模型，进而优化检测器以识别社交媒体上的机器生成假评论。
AI.motivation: 生成模型（如GPT）可低成本制造难以识别的假评论，现有检测方法效果有限，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: 基于Yelp精英评论训练GPT生成假数据，微调检测模型并分析评论、用户及餐厅特征等多维度模式。
AI.result: 检测模型性能显著优于现有方案，成功识别出假评论在写作风格及多维度特征上的差异模式。
AI.conclusion: 尽管平台可部署检测系统，但机器生成假评论的挑战持续存在，需动态优化对抗策略。

authors_text: Tohida Rehman,Debarshi Kumar Sanyal,Samiran Chattopadhyay,Plaban Kumar Bhowmick,Partha Pratim Das
title: Generation of Highlights from Research Papers Using Pointer-Generator Networks and SciBERT Embeddings
title_zh: 使用指针生成器网络和 SciBERT 嵌入生成研究论文的摘要
abstract: Nowadays many research articles are prefaced with research highlights to summarize the main findings of the paper. Highlights not only help researchers precisely and quickly identify the contributions of a paper, they also enhance the discoverability of the article via search engines. We aim to automatically construct research highlights given certain segments of a research paper. We use a pointer-generator network with coverage mechanism and a contextual embedding layer at the input that encodes the input tokens into SciBERT embeddings. We test our model on a benchmark dataset, CSPubSum, and also present MixSub, a new multi-disciplinary corpus of papers for automatic research highlight generation. For both CSPubSum and MixSub, we have observed that the proposed model achieves the best performance compared to related variants and other models proposed in the literature. On the CSPubSum dataset, our model achieves the best performance when the input is only the abstract of a paper as opposed to other segments of the paper. It produces ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 38.26, 14.26 and 35.51, respectively, METEOR score of 32.62, and BERTScore F1 of 86.65 which outperform all other baselines. On the new MixSub dataset, where only the abstract is the input, our proposed model (when trained on the whole training corpus without distinguishing between the subject categories) achieves ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 31.78, 9.76 and 29.3, respectively, METEOR score of 24.00, and BERTScore F1 of 85.25.
summary: Nowadays many research articles are prefaced with research highlights to summarize the main findings of the paper. Highlights not only help researchers precisely and quickly identify the contributions of a paper, they also enhance the discoverability of the article via search engines. We aim to automatically construct research highlights given certain segments of a research paper. We use a pointer-generator network with coverage mechanism and a contextual embedding layer at the input that encodes the input tokens into SciBERT embeddings. We test our model on a benchmark dataset, CSPubSum, and also present MixSub, a new multi-disciplinary corpus of papers for automatic research highlight generation. For both CSPubSum and MixSub, we have observed that the proposed model achieves the best performance compared to related variants and other models proposed in the literature. On the CSPubSum dataset, our model achieves the best performance when the input is only the abstract of a paper as opposed to other segments of the paper. It produces ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 38.26, 14.26 and 35.51, respectively, METEOR score of 32.62, and BERTScore F1 of 86.65 which outperform all other baselines. On the new MixSub dataset, where only the abstract is the input, our proposed model (when trained on the whole training corpus without distinguishing between the subject categories) achieves ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 31.78, 9.76 and 29.3, respectively, METEOR score of 24.00, and BERTScore F1 of 85.25.
abstract_zh: 如今，许多研究文章都以研究亮点作为序言，以总结论文的主要发现。亮点不仅可以帮助研究人员准确、快速地识别论文的贡献，还可以提高文章通过搜索引擎的可发现性。我们的目标是根据研究论文的某些部分自动构建研究亮点。我们在输入端使用具有覆盖机制的指针生成器网络和上下文嵌入层，将输入标记编码为 SciBERT 嵌入。我们在基准数据集 CSPubSum 上测试了我们的模型，并且还推出了 MixSub，这是一个用于自动研究亮点生成的新的多学科论文语料库。对于 CSPubSum 和 MixSub，我们观察到与相关变体和文献中提出的其他模型相比，所提出的模型实现了最佳性能。在 CSPubSum 数据集上，当输入只是论文的摘要而不是论文的其他部分时，我们的模型可以获得最佳性能。它产生的 ROUGE-1、ROUGE-2 和 ROUGE-L F1 分数分别为 38.26、14.26 和 35.51，METEOR 分数为 32.62，BERTScore F1 为 86.65，优于所有其他基线。在新的 MixSub 数据集上，只有摘要作为输入，我们提出的模型（在整个训练语料库上进行训练而不区分主题类别时）实现了 ROUGE-1、ROUGE-2 和 ROUGE-L F1 分数分别为 31.78、9.76 和 29.3，METEOR 分数为 24.00，BERTScore F1 为 85.25。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于指针生成网络和SciBERT嵌入的研究论文摘要生成方法，旨在自动生成研究论文的亮点内容。
AI.motivation: 研究论文的亮点摘要能帮助研究人员快速识别论文贡献并提升搜索引擎可见性，但人工编写效率低且成本高，因此需要自动化方法。
AI.method: 采用带有覆盖机制的指针生成网络，结合SciBERT嵌入层对输入文本进行编码，并在CSPubSum数据集和新构建的MixSub多学科语料库上进行验证。
AI.result: 在CSPubSum数据集上，模型在仅输入摘要时取得最佳性能，ROUGE-1/ROUGE-2/ROUGE-L F1分数分别为38.26/14.26/35.51，BERTScore达86.65；在MixSub上表现同样优于其他基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型在自动亮点生成任务中表现最优，证明了指针生成网络结合SciBERT嵌入的有效性，且使用摘要作为输入比其他文本片段更优。

search_text: Generation of Highlights from Research Papers Using Pointer-Generator Networks and SciBERT Embeddings 使用指针生成器网络和 SciBERT 嵌入生成研究论文的摘要 Nowadays many research articles are prefaced with research highlights to summarize the main findings of the paper. Highlights not only help researchers precisely and quickly identify the contributions of a paper, they also enhance the discoverability of the article via search engines. We aim to automatically construct research highlights given certain segments of a research paper. We use a pointer-generator network with coverage mechanism and a contextual embedding layer at the input that encodes the input tokens into SciBERT embeddings. We test our model on a benchmark dataset, CSPubSum, and also present MixSub, a new multi-disciplinary corpus of papers for automatic research highlight generation. For both CSPubSum and MixSub, we have observed that the proposed model achieves the best performance compared to related variants and other models proposed in the literature. On the CSPubSum dataset, our model achieves the best performance when the input is only the abstract of a paper as opposed to other segments of the paper. It produces ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 38.26, 14.26 and 35.51, respectively, METEOR score of 32.62, and BERTScore F1 of 86.65 which outperform all other baselines. On the new MixSub dataset, where only the abstract is the input, our proposed model (when trained on the whole training corpus without distinguishing between the subject categories) achieves ROUGE-1, ROUGE-2 and ROUGE-L F1-scores of 31.78, 9.76 and 29.3, respectively, METEOR score of 24.00, and BERTScore F1 of 85.25. 如今，许多研究文章都以研究亮点作为序言，以总结论文的主要发现。亮点不仅可以帮助研究人员准确、快速地识别论文的贡献，还可以提高文章通过搜索引擎的可发现性。我们的目标是根据研究论文的某些部分自动构建研究亮点。我们在输入端使用具有覆盖机制的指针生成器网络和上下文嵌入层，将输入标记编码为 SciBERT 嵌入。我们在基准数据集 CSPubSum 上测试了我们的模型，并且还推出了 MixSub，这是一个用于自动研究亮点生成的新的多学科论文语料库。对于 CSPubSum 和 MixSub，我们观察到与相关变体和文献中提出的其他模型相比，所提出的模型实现了最佳性能。在 CSPubSum 数据集上，当输入只是论文的摘要而不是论文的其他部分时，我们的模型可以获得最佳性能。它产生的 ROUGE-1、ROUGE-2 和 ROUGE-L F1 分数分别为 38.26、14.26 和 35.51，METEOR 分数为 32.62，BERTScore F1 为 86.65，优于所有其他基线。在新的 MixSub 数据集上，只有摘要作为输入，我们提出的模型（在整个训练语料库上进行训练而不区分主题类别时）实现了 ROUGE-1、ROUGE-2 和 ROUGE-L F1 分数分别为 31.78、9.76 和 29.3，METEOR 分数为 24.00，BERTScore F1 为 85.25。 本文提出了一种基于指针生成网络和SciBERT嵌入的研究论文摘要生成方法，旨在自动生成研究论文的亮点内容。 Tohida Rehman,Debarshi Kumar Sanyal,Samiran Chattopadhyay,Plaban Kumar Bhowmick,Partha Pratim Das cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Guangyi Xiao,Xinlong Liu,Hao Chen,Jingzhi Guo,Zhiguo Gong
title: AIDA: Legal Judgment Predictions for Non-Professional Fact Descriptions via Partial-and-Imbalanced Domain Adaptation
title_zh: AIDA：通过部分和不平衡领域适应对非专业事实描述进行法律判断预测
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of legal domain adaptation problem from an imbalanced source domain to a partial target domain. The task aims to improve legal judgment predictions for non-professional fact descriptions. We formulate this task as a partial-and-imbalanced domain adaptation problem. Though deep domain adaptation has achieved cutting-edge performance in many unsupervised domain adaptation tasks. However, due to the negative transfer of samples in non-shared classes, it is hard for current domain adaptation model to solve the partial-and-imbalanced transfer problem. In this work, we explore large-scale non-shared but related classes data in the source domain with a hierarchy weighting adaptation to tackle this limitation. We propose to embed a novel pArtial Imbalanced Domain Adaptation technique (AIDA) in the deep learning model, which can jointly borrow sibling knowledge from non-shared classes to shared classes in the source domain and further transfer the shared classes knowledge from the source domain to the target domain. Experimental results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of legal domain adaptation problem from an imbalanced source domain to a partial target domain. The task aims to improve legal judgment predictions for non-professional fact descriptions. We formulate this task as a partial-and-imbalanced domain adaptation problem. Though deep domain adaptation has achieved cutting-edge performance in many unsupervised domain adaptation tasks. However, due to the negative transfer of samples in non-shared classes, it is hard for current domain adaptation model to solve the partial-and-imbalanced transfer problem. In this work, we explore large-scale non-shared but related classes data in the source domain with a hierarchy weighting adaptation to tackle this limitation. We propose to embed a novel pArtial Imbalanced Domain Adaptation technique (AIDA) in the deep learning model, which can jointly borrow sibling knowledge from non-shared classes to shared classes in the source domain and further transfer the shared classes knowledge from the source domain to the target domain. Experimental results show that our model outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究从不平衡源域到部分目标域的法律域适应问题。该任务旨在改进非专业事实描述的法律判断预测。我们将此任务表述为部分不平衡的域适应问题。尽管深度域适应在许多无监督域适应任务中取得了前沿的性能。然而，由于非共享类中样本的负迁移，当前的域适应模型很难解决部分和不平衡的迁移问题。在这项工作中，我们通过层次权重适应来探索源域中的大规模非共享但相关的类数据，以解决此限制。我们建议在深度学习模型中嵌入一种新颖的部分不平衡域适应技术（AIDA），该技术可以联合从源域中的非共享类到共享类借用兄弟知识，并进一步将共享类知识从源域转移到目标域。实验结果表明，我们的模型优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AIDA方法，通过部分和不平衡领域自适应技术，提升非专业人士事实描述的法律判决预测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应模型因非共享类别的负迁移问题，难以有效处理从不平衡源领域到部分目标领域的法律判决预测任务。
AI.method: 设计层次加权适应机制，利用源域中非共享但相关类别的兄弟知识辅助共享类别学习，并通过AIDA技术实现跨领域知识迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明该模型在法律判决预测任务上优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: AIDA通过有效整合非共享类别的知识，成功解决了部分和不平衡领域适应问题，提升了非专业事实描述的法律预测准确性。
