authors_text: Simon Jenni,Alexander Black,John Collomosse
title: Audio-Visual Contrastive Learning with Temporal Self-Supervision
title_zh: 具有时间自我监督的视听对比学习
abstract: We propose a self-supervised learning approach for videos that learns representations of both the RGB frames and the accompanying audio without human supervision. In contrast to images that capture the static scene appearance, videos also contain sound and temporal scene dynamics. To leverage the temporal and aural dimension inherent to videos, our method extends temporal self-supervision to the audio-visual setting and integrates it with multi-modal contrastive objectives. As temporal self-supervision, we pose playback speed and direction recognition in both modalities and propose intra- and inter-modal temporal ordering tasks. Furthermore, we design a novel contrastive objective in which the usual pairs are supplemented with additional sample-dependent positives and negatives sampled from the evolving feature space. In our model, we apply such losses among video clips and between videos and their temporally corresponding audio clips. We verify our model design in extensive ablation experiments and evaluate the video and audio representations in transfer experiments to action recognition and retrieval on UCF101 and HMBD51, audio classification on ESC50, and robust video fingerprinting on VGG-Sound, with state-of-the-art results.
summary: We propose a self-supervised learning approach for videos that learns representations of both the RGB frames and the accompanying audio without human supervision. In contrast to images that capture the static scene appearance, videos also contain sound and temporal scene dynamics. To leverage the temporal and aural dimension inherent to videos, our method extends temporal self-supervision to the audio-visual setting and integrates it with multi-modal contrastive objectives. As temporal self-supervision, we pose playback speed and direction recognition in both modalities and propose intra- and inter-modal temporal ordering tasks. Furthermore, we design a novel contrastive objective in which the usual pairs are supplemented with additional sample-dependent positives and negatives sampled from the evolving feature space. In our model, we apply such losses among video clips and between videos and their temporally corresponding audio clips. We verify our model design in extensive ablation experiments and evaluate the video and audio representations in transfer experiments to action recognition and retrieval on UCF101 and HMBD51, audio classification on ESC50, and robust video fingerprinting on VGG-Sound, with state-of-the-art results.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种视频自监督学习方法，无需人工监督即可学习 RGB 帧和随附音频的表示。与捕捉静态场景外观的图像相比，视频还包含声音和时间场景动态。为了利用视频固有的时间和听觉维度，我们的方法将时间自我监督扩展到视听环境，并将其与多模态对比目标相结合。作为时间自我监督，我们在两种模态中提出播放速度和方向识别，并提出模内和模间时间排序任务。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的对比目标，其中通常的对补充了从不断发展的特征空间中采样的额外的依赖于样本的正值和负值。在我们的模型中，我们在视频剪辑之间以及视频与其时间对应的音频剪辑之间应用此类损失。我们在广泛的消融实验中验证了我们的模型设计，并在 UCF101 和 HMBD51 上的动作识别和检索、ESC50 上的音频分类以及 VGG-Sound 上的鲁棒视频指纹识别转移实验中评估视频和音频表示，并获得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工监督的自监督学习方法，通过结合时间自监督和多模态对比目标，同时学习视频的RGB帧和音频表示。
AI.motivation: 传统视频分析方法多关注静态视觉信息，忽视了音频和时间动态信息的关联性，导致多模态表示学习效果受限。
AI.method: 设计时间自监督任务（播放速度/方向识别）和跨模态对比目标，引入样本依赖的动态正负样本，并在视频片段与音频片段间应用对比损失。
AI.result: 在UCF101、ESC50等数据集上实现动作识别、音频分类和视频指纹识别任务的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合时间动态与多模态对比学习，有效提升了视频与音频的联合表征能力，验证了跨模态自监督学习的潜力。

authors_text: Deniz Preil,Michael Krapp
title: Genetic multi-armed bandits: a reinforcement learning approach for discrete optimization via simulation
title_zh: 遗传多臂老虎机：一种通过模拟进行离散优化的强化学习方法
abstract: This paper proposes a new algorithm, referred to as GMAB, that combines concepts from the reinforcement learning domain of multi-armed bandits and random search strategies from the domain of genetic algorithms to solve discrete stochastic optimization problems via simulation. In particular, the focus is on noisy large-scale problems, which often involve a multitude of dimensions as well as multiple local optima. Our aim is to combine the property of multi-armed bandits to cope with volatile simulation observations with the ability of genetic algorithms to handle high-dimensional solution spaces accompanied by an enormous number of feasible solutions. For this purpose, a multi-armed bandit framework serves as a foundation, where each observed simulation is incorporated into the memory of GMAB. Based on this memory, genetic operators guide the search, as they provide powerful tools for exploration as well as exploitation. The empirical results demonstrate that GMAB achieves superior performance compared to benchmark algorithms from the literature in a large variety of test problems. In all experiments, GMAB required considerably fewer simulations to achieve similar or (far) better solutions than those generated by existing methods. At the same time, GMAB's overhead with regard to the required runtime is extremely small due to the suggested tree-based implementation of its memory. Furthermore, we prove its convergence to the set of global optima as the simulation effort goes to infinity.
summary: This paper proposes a new algorithm, referred to as GMAB, that combines concepts from the reinforcement learning domain of multi-armed bandits and random search strategies from the domain of genetic algorithms to solve discrete stochastic optimization problems via simulation. In particular, the focus is on noisy large-scale problems, which often involve a multitude of dimensions as well as multiple local optima. Our aim is to combine the property of multi-armed bandits to cope with volatile simulation observations with the ability of genetic algorithms to handle high-dimensional solution spaces accompanied by an enormous number of feasible solutions. For this purpose, a multi-armed bandit framework serves as a foundation, where each observed simulation is incorporated into the memory of GMAB. Based on this memory, genetic operators guide the search, as they provide powerful tools for exploration as well as exploitation. The empirical results demonstrate that GMAB achieves superior performance compared to benchmark algorithms from the literature in a large variety of test problems. In all experiments, GMAB required considerably fewer simulations to achieve similar or (far) better solutions than those generated by existing methods. At the same time, GMAB's overhead with regard to the required runtime is extremely small due to the suggested tree-based implementation of its memory. Furthermore, we prove its convergence to the set of global optima as the simulation effort goes to infinity.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新算法，称为 GMAB，它结合了多臂老虎机强化学习领域的概念和遗传算法领域的随机搜索策略，通过模拟解决离散随机优化问题。特别是，重点是嘈杂的大规模问题，这些问题通常涉及多个维度以及多个局部最优。我们的目标是将多臂老虎机处理不稳定模拟观测的特性与遗传算法处理高维解空间以及大量可行解的能力结合起来。为此，多臂老虎机框架作为基础，其中每个观察到的模拟都被纳入 GMAB 的内存中。基于这种记忆，遗传算子指导搜索，因为它们为探索和利用提供了强大的工具。实证结果表明，与文献中的基准算法相比，GMAB 在各种测试问题中实现了卓越的性能。在所有实验中，与现有方法生成的解决方案相比，GMAB 需要少得多的模拟才能获得类似或（远）更好的解决方案。同时，由于建议的基于树的内存实现，GMAB 在所需运行时方面的开销非常小。此外，我们证明了随着模拟工作量趋于无穷大，它会收敛到全局最优集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合强化学习中的多臂老虎机和遗传算法随机搜索策略的GMAB算法，用于解决具有噪声的大规模离散优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理高维、多局部最优解且存在噪声的离散优化问题时效率不足，需开发兼顾探索与利用的新型算法。
AI.method: 基于多臂老虎机框架构建记忆库存储模拟结果，通过遗传算子引导搜索，采用树状结构实现低运行开销的内存管理。
AI.result: 在多种测试问题中，GMAB相比基准算法用更少模拟次数达到相似或更优解，且运行时延极小，理论上可收敛至全局最优解集。
AI.conclusion: GMAB通过融合多臂老虎机与遗传算法优势，有效解决了大规模离散优化问题，具有显著的计算效率优势。

authors_text: Maxim Novopoltsev,Leonid Verkhovtsev,Ruslan Murtazin,Dmitriy Milevich,Iuliia Zemtsova
title: Fine-tuning of sign language recognition models: a technical report
title_zh: 手语识别模型的微调：技术报告
abstract: Sign Language Recognition (SLR) is an essential yet challenging task since sign language is performed with the fast and complex movement of hand gestures, body posture, and even facial expressions. %Skeleton Aware Multi-modal Sign Language Recognition In this work, we focused on investigating two questions: how fine-tuning on datasets from other sign languages helps improve sign recognition quality, and whether sign recognition is possible in real-time without using GPU. Three different languages datasets (American sign language WLASL, Turkish - AUTSL, Russian - RSL) have been used to validate the models. The average speed of this system has reached 3 predictions per second, which meets the requirements for the real-time scenario. This model (prototype) will benefit speech or hearing impaired people talk with other trough internet. We also investigated how the additional training of the model in another sign language affects the quality of recognition. The results show that further training of the model on the data of another sign language almost always leads to an improvement in the quality of gesture recognition. We also provide code for reproducing model training experiments, converting models to ONNX format, and inference for real-time gesture recognition.
summary: Sign Language Recognition (SLR) is an essential yet challenging task since sign language is performed with the fast and complex movement of hand gestures, body posture, and even facial expressions. %Skeleton Aware Multi-modal Sign Language Recognition In this work, we focused on investigating two questions: how fine-tuning on datasets from other sign languages helps improve sign recognition quality, and whether sign recognition is possible in real-time without using GPU. Three different languages datasets (American sign language WLASL, Turkish - AUTSL, Russian - RSL) have been used to validate the models. The average speed of this system has reached 3 predictions per second, which meets the requirements for the real-time scenario. This model (prototype) will benefit speech or hearing impaired people talk with other trough internet. We also investigated how the additional training of the model in another sign language affects the quality of recognition. The results show that further training of the model on the data of another sign language almost always leads to an improvement in the quality of gesture recognition. We also provide code for reproducing model training experiments, converting models to ONNX format, and inference for real-time gesture recognition.
abstract_zh: 手语识别（SLR）是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，因为手语是通过手势、身体姿势甚至面部表情的快速而复杂的运动来执行的。 %Skeleton Aware 多模态手语识别 在这项工作中，我们重点研究两个问题：对其他手语数据集进行微调如何帮助提高手语识别质量，以及是否可以在不使用 GPU 的情况下实时进行手语识别。三种不同语言的数据集（美国手语 WLASL、土耳其语 - AUTSL、俄语 - RSL）已用于验证模型。该系统的平均速度达到了每秒3次预测，满足了实时场景的要求。该模型（原型）将有利于语言或听力障碍人士通过互联网与其他人交谈。我们还研究了用另一种手语对模型进行额外训练如何影响识别质量。结果表明，在另一种手语数据上进一步训练模型几乎总是会导致手势识别质量的提高。我们还提供用于重现模型训练实验、将模型转换为 ONNX 格式以及实时手势识别推理的代码。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了通过其他手语数据集微调模型以提升手语识别效果，并探索无需GPU实现实时识别的可能性。
AI.motivation: 手语识别因手势、体态和面部表情的复杂性而具有挑战性，需开发实时且无障碍的解决方案以帮助听障人士。
AI.method: 使用美国手语（WLASL）、土耳其手语（AUTSL）和俄语手语（RSL）三个数据集进行模型验证，通过微调其他语言数据评估效果，并将模型转换为ONNX格式以实现实时推理。
AI.result: 系统平均速度达到每秒3次预测，满足实时需求；模型在其他语言数据上的进一步训练几乎总是提升识别质量。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言微调有效提升手语识别性能，且无需GPU即可实现实时识别，提供的代码支持模型复现与部署。

authors_text: Hongguang Zhang,Limeng Zhang,Yuchao Dai,Hongdong Li,Piotr Koniusz
title: Event-guided Multi-patch Network with Self-supervision for Non-uniform Motion Deblurring
title_zh: 具有自监督功能的事件引导多块网络用于非均匀运动去模糊
comment: International Journal of Computer Vision. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.03468
comments: International Journal of Computer Vision. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1904.03468
abstract: Contemporary deep learning multi-scale deblurring models suffer from many issues: 1) They perform poorly on non-uniformly blurred images/videos; 2) Simply increasing the model depth with finer-scale levels cannot improve deblurring; 3) Individual RGB frames contain a limited motion information for deblurring; 4) Previous models have a limited robustness to spatial transformations and noise. Below, we extend the DMPHN model by several mechanisms to address the above issues: I) We present a novel self-supervised event-guided deep hierarchical Multi-patch Network (MPN) to deal with blurry images and videos via fine-to-coarse hierarchical localized representations; II) We propose a novel stacked pipeline, StackMPN, to improve the deblurring performance under the increased network depth; III) We propose an event-guided architecture to exploit motion cues contained in videos to tackle complex blur in videos; IV) We propose a novel self-supervised step to expose the model to random transformations (rotations, scale changes), and make it robust to Gaussian noises. Our MPN achieves the state of the art on the GoPro and VideoDeblur datasets with a 40x faster runtime compared to current multi-scale methods. With 30ms to process an image at 1280x720 resolution, it is the first real-time deep motion deblurring model for 720p images at 30fps. For StackMPN, we obtain significant improvements over 1.2dB on the GoPro dataset by increasing the network depth. Utilizing the event information and self-supervision further boost results to 33.83dB.

Below, we extend the DMPHN model by several mechanisms to address the above issues: I) We present a novel self-supervised event-guided deep hierarchical Multi-patch Network (MPN) to deal with blurry images and videos via fine-to-coarse hierarchical localized representations; II) We propose a novel stacked pipeline, StackMPN, to improve the deblurring performance under the increased network depth; III) We propose an event-guided architecture to exploit motion cues contained in videos to tackle complex blur in videos; IV) We propose a novel self-supervised step to expose the model to random transformations (rotations, scale changes), and make it robust to Gaussian noises. Our MPN achieves the state of the art on the GoPro and VideoDeblur datasets with a 40x faster runtime compared to current multi-scale methods. With 30ms to process an image at 1280x720 resolution, it is the first real-time deep motion deblurring model for 720p images at 30fps. For StackMPN, we obtain significant improvements over 1.2dB on the GoPro dataset by increasing the network depth. Utilizing the event information and self-supervision further boost results to 33.83dB.
abstract_zh: 当代深度学习多尺度去模糊模型存在许多问题：1）它们在非均匀模糊图像/视频上表现不佳； 2）简单地通过更精细的尺度级别增加模型深度并不能改善去模糊； 3) 各个RGB帧包含用于去模糊的有限运动信息； 4）以前的模型对空间变换和噪声的鲁棒性有限。下面，我们通过几种机制扩展 DMPHN 模型来解决上述问题： I）我们提出了一种新颖的自监督事件引导的深层分层多块网络（MPN），通过从精细到粗略的分层局部表示来处理模糊图像和视频； II）我们提出了一种新颖的堆叠管道StackMPN，以提高网络深度增加下的去模糊性能； III）我们提出了一种事件引导架构，利用视频中包含的运动线索来解决视频中的复杂模糊问题； IV）我们提出了一种新颖的自我监督步骤，使模型接受随机变换（旋转、尺度变化），并使其对高斯噪声具有鲁棒性。与当前的多尺度方法相比，我们的 MPN 在 GoPro 和 VideoDeblur 数据集上实现了最先进的运行时间，运行时间快了 40 倍。它可以在 30ms 内处理 1280x720 分辨率的图像，是第一个针对 30fps 的 720p 图像的实时深度运动去模糊模型。对于 StackMPN，我们通过增加网络深度在 GoPro 数据集上获得了超过 1.2dB 的显着改进。利用事件信息和自我监督将结果进一步提升至 33.83dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合事件引导和自监督学习的多块网络（MPN）及堆叠流水线（StackMPN），用于解决非均匀运动模糊问题，实现了实时高效的视频去模糊。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习去模糊模型在处理非均匀模糊、模型深度扩展、运动信息利用及鲁棒性方面存在显著不足，需通过新机制提升性能。
AI.method: 提出四方面改进：1) 事件引导的分层多块网络（MPN）实现细到粗的局部表示；2) 堆叠流水线StackMPN增强深度网络性能；3) 利用视频事件信息提取运动线索；4) 自监督步骤增强对变换和噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: MPN在GoPro和VideoDeblur数据集上达到SOTA，运行速度比多尺度方法快40倍，30ms处理720p图像；StackMPN在GoPro上提升1.2dB，结合事件信息后达33.83dB。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效解决了非均匀运动模糊问题，实现了实时处理，为未来研究提供了高效且鲁棒的框架方向。

search_text: Event-guided Multi-patch Network with Self-supervision for Non-uniform Motion Deblurring 具有自监督功能的事件引导多块网络用于非均匀运动去模糊 Contemporary deep learning multi-scale deblurring models suffer from many issues: 1) They perform poorly on non-uniformly blurred images/videos; 2) Simply increasing the model depth with finer-scale levels cannot improve deblurring; 3) Individual RGB frames contain a limited motion information for deblurring; 4) Previous models have a limited robustness to spatial transformations and noise. Below, we extend the DMPHN model by several mechanisms to address the above issues: I) We present a novel self-supervised event-guided deep hierarchical Multi-patch Network (MPN) to deal with blurry images and videos via fine-to-coarse hierarchical localized representations; II) We propose a novel stacked pipeline, StackMPN, to improve the deblurring performance under the increased network depth; III) We propose an event-guided architecture to exploit motion cues contained in videos to tackle complex blur in videos; IV) We propose a novel self-supervised step to expose the model to random transformations (rotations, scale changes), and make it robust to Gaussian noises. Our MPN achieves the state of the art on the GoPro and VideoDeblur datasets with a 40x faster runtime compared to current multi-scale methods. With 30ms to process an image at 1280x720 resolution, it is the first real-time deep motion deblurring model for 720p images at 30fps. For StackMPN, we obtain significant improvements over 1.2dB on the GoPro dataset by increasing the network depth. Utilizing the event information and self-supervision further boost results to 33.83dB. 当代深度学习多尺度去模糊模型存在许多问题：1）它们在非均匀模糊图像/视频上表现不佳； 2）简单地通过更精细的尺度级别增加模型深度并不能改善去模糊； 3) 各个RGB帧包含用于去模糊的有限运动信息； 4）以前的模型对空间变换和噪声的鲁棒性有限。下面，我们通过几种机制扩展 DMPHN 模型来解决上述问题： I）我们提出了一种新颖的自监督事件引导的深层分层多块网络（MPN），通过从精细到粗略的分层局部表示来处理模糊图像和视频； II）我们提出了一种新颖的堆叠管道StackMPN，以提高网络深度增加下的去模糊性能； III）我们提出了一种事件引导架构，利用视频中包含的运动线索来解决视频中的复杂模糊问题； IV）我们提出了一种新颖的自我监督步骤，使模型接受随机变换（旋转、尺度变化），并使其对高斯噪声具有鲁棒性。与当前的多尺度方法相比，我们的 MPN 在 GoPro 和 VideoDeblur 数据集上实现了最先进的运行时间，运行时间快了 40 倍。它可以在 30ms 内处理 1280x720 分辨率的图像，是第一个针对 30fps 的 720p 图像的实时深度运动去模糊模型。对于 StackMPN，我们通过增加网络深度在 GoPro 数据集上获得了超过 1.2dB 的显着改进。利用事件信息和自我监督将结果进一步提升至 33.83dB。 本文提出了一种结合事件引导和自监督学习的多块网络（MPN）及堆叠流水线（StackMPN），用于解决非均匀运动模糊问题，实现了实时高效的视频去模糊。 Hongguang Zhang,Limeng Zhang,Yuchao Dai,Hongdong Li,Piotr Koniusz cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Sihyun Yu,Kihyuk Sohn,Subin Kim,Jinwoo Shin
title: Video Probabilistic Diffusion Models in Projected Latent Space
title_zh: 投影潜在空间中的视频概率扩散模型
abstract: Despite the remarkable progress in deep generative models, synthesizing high-resolution and temporally coherent videos still remains a challenge due to their high-dimensionality and complex temporal dynamics along with large spatial variations. Recent works on diffusion models have shown their potential to solve this challenge, yet they suffer from severe computation- and memory-inefficiency that limit the scalability. To handle this issue, we propose a novel generative model for videos, coined projected latent video diffusion models (PVDM), a probabilistic diffusion model which learns a video distribution in a low-dimensional latent space and thus can be efficiently trained with high-resolution videos under limited resources. Specifically, PVDM is composed of two components: (a) an autoencoder that projects a given video as 2D-shaped latent vectors that factorize the complex cubic structure of video pixels and (b) a diffusion model architecture specialized for our new factorized latent space and the training/sampling procedure to synthesize videos of arbitrary length with a single model. Experiments on popular video generation datasets demonstrate the superiority of PVDM compared with previous video synthesis methods; e.g., PVDM obtains the FVD score of 639.7 on the UCF-101 long video (128 frames) generation benchmark, which improves 1773.4 of the prior state-of-the-art.
summary: Despite the remarkable progress in deep generative models, synthesizing high-resolution and temporally coherent videos still remains a challenge due to their high-dimensionality and complex temporal dynamics along with large spatial variations. Recent works on diffusion models have shown their potential to solve this challenge, yet they suffer from severe computation- and memory-inefficiency that limit the scalability. To handle this issue, we propose a novel generative model for videos, coined projected latent video diffusion models (PVDM), a probabilistic diffusion model which learns a video distribution in a low-dimensional latent space and thus can be efficiently trained with high-resolution videos under limited resources. Specifically, PVDM is composed of two components: (a) an autoencoder that projects a given video as 2D-shaped latent vectors that factorize the complex cubic structure of video pixels and (b) a diffusion model architecture specialized for our new factorized latent space and the training/sampling procedure to synthesize videos of arbitrary length with a single model. Experiments on popular video generation datasets demonstrate the superiority of PVDM compared with previous video synthesis methods; e.g., PVDM obtains the FVD score of 639.7 on the UCF-101 long video (128 frames) generation benchmark, which improves 1773.4 of the prior state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度生成模型取得了显着进展，但由于其高维度、复杂的时间动态以及大的空间变化，合成高分辨率和时间相干的视频仍然是一个挑战。最近关于扩散模型的研究已经显示出它们解决这一挑战的潜力，但它们面临严重的计算和内存效率低下的问题，限制了可扩展性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的视频生成模型，创造了投影潜在视频扩散模型（PVDM），这是一种概率扩散模型，它学习低维潜在空间中的视频分布，因此可以在有限的资源下使用高分辨率视频进行有效的训练。具体来说，PVDM 由两个组件组成：(a) 一个自动编码器，将给定视频投影为 2D 形状的潜在向量，分解视频像素的复杂立方结构；(b) 专门用于我们新的因式分解潜在空间和训练/采样程序的扩散模型架构，以使用单个模型合成任意长度的视频。在流行视频生成数据集上的实验证明了PVDM相对于之前的视频合成方法的优越性；例如，PVDM 在 UCF-101 长视频（128 帧）生成基准上获得了 639.7 的 FVD 分数，比之前的最先进水平提高了 1773.4。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视频生成模型，称为投影潜在视频扩散模型（PVDM），用于高效生成高质量且时间连贯的高分辨率视频。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度生成模型取得了显著进展，但生成高分辨率且时间连贯的视频仍然具有挑战性，因为视频具有高维性、复杂的时序动态和大的空间变化。现有的扩散模型在计算和内存效率方面存在严重问题，限制了其可扩展性。
AI.method: PVDM由两个组件组成：（a）一个自动编码器，将视频投影为二维形状的潜在向量，以分解视频像素的复杂立方结构；（b）一个专门针对新的分解潜在空间的扩散模型架构，以及用于用单个模型合成任意长度视频的训练/采样过程。
AI.result: 在流行的视频生成数据集上的实验表明，PVDM优于之前的视频合成方法。例如，在UCF-101长视频（128帧）生成基准测试中，PVDM获得了639.7的FVD分数，比先前最先进的方法提高了1773.4。
AI.conclusion: PVDM在高分辨率视频生成任务中表现出色，能够在有限资源下高效训练并生成高质量且时间连贯的视频。

authors_text: Shenghao Hao,Peiyuan Liu,Yibing Zhan,Kaixun Jin,Zuozhu Liu,Mingli Song,Jenq-Neng Hwang,Gaoang Wang
title: DIVOTrack: A Novel Dataset and Baseline Method for Cross-View Multi-Object Tracking in DIVerse Open Scenes
title_zh: DIVOTrack：DIVerse 开放场景中跨视图多对象跟踪的新颖数据集和基线方法
abstract: Cross-view multi-object tracking aims to link objects between frames and camera views with substantial overlaps. Although cross-view multi-object tracking has received increased attention in recent years, existing datasets still have several issues, including 1) missing real-world scenarios, 2) lacking diverse scenes, 3) owning a limited number of tracks, 4) comprising only static cameras, and 5) lacking standard benchmarks, which hinder the investigation and comparison of cross-view tracking methods. To solve the aforementioned issues, we introduce DIVOTrack: a new cross-view multi-object tracking dataset for DIVerse Open scenes with dense tracking pedestrians in realistic and non-experimental environments. Our DIVOTrack has fifteen distinct scenarios and 953 cross-view tracks, surpassing all cross-view multi-object tracking datasets currently available. Furthermore, we provide a novel baseline cross-view tracking method with a unified joint detection and cross-view tracking framework named CrossMOT, which learns object detection, single-view association, and cross-view matching with an all-in-one embedding model. Finally, we present a summary of current methodologies and a set of standard benchmarks with our DIVOTrack to provide a fair comparison and conduct a comprehensive analysis of current approaches and our proposed CrossMOT. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/shengyuhao/DIVOTrack.
summary: Cross-view multi-object tracking aims to link objects between frames and camera views with substantial overlaps. Although cross-view multi-object tracking has received increased attention in recent years, existing datasets still have several issues, including 1) missing real-world scenarios, 2) lacking diverse scenes, 3) owning a limited number of tracks, 4) comprising only static cameras, and 5) lacking standard benchmarks, which hinder the investigation and comparison of cross-view tracking methods. To solve the aforementioned issues, we introduce DIVOTrack: a new cross-view multi-object tracking dataset for DIVerse Open scenes with dense tracking pedestrians in realistic and non-experimental environments. Our DIVOTrack has fifteen distinct scenarios and 953 cross-view tracks, surpassing all cross-view multi-object tracking datasets currently available. Furthermore, we provide a novel baseline cross-view tracking method with a unified joint detection and cross-view tracking framework named CrossMOT, which learns object detection, single-view association, and cross-view matching with an all-in-one embedding model. Finally, we present a summary of current methodologies and a set of standard benchmarks with our DIVOTrack to provide a fair comparison and conduct a comprehensive analysis of current approaches and our proposed CrossMOT. The dataset and code are available at https://github.com/shengyuhao/DIVOTrack.
abstract_zh: 跨视图多目标跟踪旨在将帧和相机视图之间具有大量重叠的对象链接起来。尽管跨视图多目标跟踪近年来受到越来越多的关注，但现有的数据集仍然存在一些问题，包括1）缺少真实场景，2）缺乏多样化的场景，3）拥有有限的轨道数量，4）仅包含静态摄像机，5）缺乏标准基准，这阻碍了跨视图跟踪方法的研究和比较。为了解决上述问题，我们引入了 DIVOTrack：一种新的跨视图多目标跟踪数据集，用于 DIVerse 开放场景，在现实和非实验环境中密集跟踪行人。我们的 DIVOTrack 具有 15 个不同的场景和 953 个跨视图跟踪，超过了当前可用的所有跨视图多对象跟踪数据集。此外，我们提供了一种新颖的基线跨视图跟踪方法，具有统一的联合检测和跨视图跟踪框架，名为 CrossMOT，它通过一体化嵌入模型学习对象检测、单视图关联和跨视图匹配。最后，我们用我们的 DIVOTrack 总结了当前的方法和一组标准基准，以提供公平的比较，并对当前的方法和我们提出的 CrossMOT 进行全面的分析。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/shengyuhao/DIVOTrack 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIVOTrack数据集及基线方法CrossMOT，用于解决跨视角多目标跟踪中的现实场景缺失、场景多样性不足等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨视角多目标跟踪数据集存在缺乏真实场景、场景单一、跟踪数量有限、仅含静态摄像头及无标准基准等问题，限制了方法比较与研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含15种场景和953条跨视角跟踪的DIVOTrack数据集，并设计统一的CrossMOT框架，整合目标检测、单视角关联与跨视角匹配功能。
AI.result: DIVOTrack超越现有数据集规模，CrossMOT基线方法在标准基准测试中实现公平比较与全面分析，代码与数据已开源。
AI.conclusion: DIVOTrack填补了跨视角跟踪领域的数据空白，为后续方法研究提供多样化基准与实用化验证平台。

authors_text: Kam Woh Ng,Xiatian Zhu,Jiun Tian Hoe,Chee Seng Chan,Tianyu Zhang,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: Unsupervised Hashing with Similarity Distribution Calibration
title_zh: 具有相似性分布校准的无监督哈希
abstract: Unsupervised hashing methods typically aim to preserve the similarity between data points in a feature space by mapping them to binary hash codes. However, these methods often overlook the fact that the similarity between data points in the continuous feature space may not be preserved in the discrete hash code space, due to the limited similarity range of hash codes. The similarity range is bounded by the code length and can lead to a problem known as similarity collapse. That is, the positive and negative pairs of data points become less distinguishable from each other in the hash space. To alleviate this problem, in this paper a novel Similarity Distribution Calibration (SDC) method is introduced. SDC aligns the hash code similarity distribution towards a calibration distribution (e.g., beta distribution) with sufficient spread across the entire similarity range, thus alleviating the similarity collapse problem. Extensive experiments show that our SDC outperforms significantly the state-of-the-art alternatives on coarse category-level and instance-level image retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/kamwoh/sdc.
summary: Unsupervised hashing methods typically aim to preserve the similarity between data points in a feature space by mapping them to binary hash codes. However, these methods often overlook the fact that the similarity between data points in the continuous feature space may not be preserved in the discrete hash code space, due to the limited similarity range of hash codes. The similarity range is bounded by the code length and can lead to a problem known as similarity collapse. That is, the positive and negative pairs of data points become less distinguishable from each other in the hash space. To alleviate this problem, in this paper a novel Similarity Distribution Calibration (SDC) method is introduced. SDC aligns the hash code similarity distribution towards a calibration distribution (e.g., beta distribution) with sufficient spread across the entire similarity range, thus alleviating the similarity collapse problem. Extensive experiments show that our SDC outperforms significantly the state-of-the-art alternatives on coarse category-level and instance-level image retrieval. Code is available at https://github.com/kamwoh/sdc.
abstract_zh: 无监督哈希方法通常旨在通过将特征空间中的数据点映射到二进制哈希码来保留特征空间中数据点之间的相似性。然而，这些方法往往忽略了这样一个事实：由于哈希码的相似范围有限，连续特征空间中的数据点之间的相似性可能无法在离散哈希码空间中保留。相似性范围受到代码长度的限制，并且可能导致称为相似性崩溃的问题。也就是说，正负数据点对在哈希空间中变得难以区分。为了缓解这个问题，本文引入了一种新颖的相似度分布校准（SDC）方法。 SDC 将哈希码相似度分布与校准分布（例如 beta 分布）对齐，并在整个相似度范围内充分分布，从而缓解相似度崩溃问题。大量实验表明，我们的 SDC 在粗略类别级和实例级图像检索方面明显优于最先进的替代方案。代码可在 https://github.com/kamwoh/sdc 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督哈希方法，通过相似性分布校准（SDC）缓解哈希码空间中的相似性崩溃问题，提升图像检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督哈希方法未能有效保持连续特征空间与离散哈希码空间的相似性分布，导致正负样本对在哈希空间中区分度降低，出现相似性崩溃问题。
AI.method: 引入相似性分布校准（SDC）方法，将哈希码相似性分布对齐至具有全范围分布特性的校准分布（如beta分布），扩展相似性动态范围以增强区分度。
AI.result: 在粗粒度和实例级图像检索任务中，SDC方法显著优于现有先进算法，实验验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SDC通过校准哈希码相似性分布有效缓解了相似性崩溃问题，在图像检索中展现出优越性能，为无监督哈希研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Celyn Walters,Simon Hadfield
title: CERiL: Continuous Event-based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: CERiL：基于事件的持续强化学习
abstract: This paper explores the potential of event cameras to enable continuous time reinforcement learning. We formalise this problem where a continuous stream of unsynchronised observations is used to produce a corresponding stream of output actions for the environment. This lack of synchronisation enables greatly enhanced reactivity. We present a method to train on event streams derived from standard RL environments, thereby solving the proposed continuous time RL problem. The CERiL algorithm uses specialised network layers which operate directly on an event stream, rather than aggregating events into quantised image frames. We show the advantages of event streams over less-frequent RGB images. The proposed system outperforms networks typically used in RL, even succeeding at tasks which cannot be solved traditionally. We also demonstrate the value of our CERiL approach over a standard SNN baseline using event streams.
summary: This paper explores the potential of event cameras to enable continuous time reinforcement learning. We formalise this problem where a continuous stream of unsynchronised observations is used to produce a corresponding stream of output actions for the environment. This lack of synchronisation enables greatly enhanced reactivity. We present a method to train on event streams derived from standard RL environments, thereby solving the proposed continuous time RL problem. The CERiL algorithm uses specialised network layers which operate directly on an event stream, rather than aggregating events into quantised image frames. We show the advantages of event streams over less-frequent RGB images. The proposed system outperforms networks typically used in RL, even succeeding at tasks which cannot be solved traditionally. We also demonstrate the value of our CERiL approach over a standard SNN baseline using event streams.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了事件相机实现连续时间强化学习的潜力。我们将这个问题形式化，其中使用连续的不同步观察流来为环境产生相应的输出动作流。这种同步的缺乏使得反应性大大增强。我们提出了一种对源自标准 RL 环境的事件流进行训练的方法，从而解决了所提出的连续时间 RL 问题。 CERiL 算法使用专门的网络层，直接对事件流进行操作，而不是将事件聚合到量化的图像帧中。我们展示了事件流相对于频率较低的 RGB 图像的优势。所提出的系统优于强化学习中通常使用的网络，甚至可以成功完成传统无法解决的任务。我们还使用事件流展示了我们的 CERiL 方法相对于标准 SNN 基线的价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CERiL算法，利用事件相机实现连续时间强化学习，处理非同步观测流以生成反应更快的动作流。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖同步观测数据存在反应延迟，事件相机的异步特性可提升系统反应速度并解决复杂任务。
AI.method: 设计专用网络层直接处理事件流，避免聚合为图像帧，通过事件流训练实现连续时间决策。
AI.result: 在多个任务中优于传统RL方法和SNN基线，成功解决传统方法无法处理的高动态环境任务。
AI.conclusion: 事件流机制显著提升强化学习的实时性，CERiL方法验证了连续时间RL在动态环境中的有效性。

search_text: CERiL: Continuous Event-based Reinforcement Learning CERiL：基于事件的持续强化学习 This paper explores the potential of event cameras to enable continuous time reinforcement learning. We formalise this problem where a continuous stream of unsynchronised observations is used to produce a corresponding stream of output actions for the environment. This lack of synchronisation enables greatly enhanced reactivity. We present a method to train on event streams derived from standard RL environments, thereby solving the proposed continuous time RL problem. The CERiL algorithm uses specialised network layers which operate directly on an event stream, rather than aggregating events into quantised image frames. We show the advantages of event streams over less-frequent RGB images. The proposed system outperforms networks typically used in RL, even succeeding at tasks which cannot be solved traditionally. We also demonstrate the value of our CERiL approach over a standard SNN baseline using event streams. 本文探讨了事件相机实现连续时间强化学习的潜力。我们将这个问题形式化，其中使用连续的不同步观察流来为环境产生相应的输出动作流。这种同步的缺乏使得反应性大大增强。我们提出了一种对源自标准 RL 环境的事件流进行训练的方法，从而解决了所提出的连续时间 RL 问题。 CERiL 算法使用专门的网络层，直接对事件流进行操作，而不是将事件聚合到量化的图像帧中。我们展示了事件流相对于频率较低的 RGB 图像的优势。所提出的系统优于强化学习中通常使用的网络，甚至可以成功完成传统无法解决的任务。我们还使用事件流展示了我们的 CERiL 方法相对于标准 SNN 基线的价值。 本文提出CERiL算法，利用事件相机实现连续时间强化学习，处理非同步观测流以生成反应更快的动作流。 Celyn Walters,Simon Hadfield cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mónika Csikós,Michel Habib,Minh-Hang Nguyen,Mikaël Rabie,Laurent Viennot
title: Forbidden Patterns in Temporal Graphs Resulting from Encounters in a Corridor
title_zh: 走廊中的遭遇导致时间图中的禁止模式
abstract: In this paper, we study temporal graphs arising from mobility models, where vertices correspond to agents moving in space and edges appear each time two agents meet. We propose a rather natural one-dimensional model. If each pair of agents meets exactly once, we get a simple temporal clique where the edges are ordered according to meeting times. In order to characterize which temporal cliques can be obtained as such `mobility graphs', we introduce the notion of forbidden patterns in temporal graphs. Furthermore, using a classical result in combinatorics, we count the number of such mobility cliques for a given number of agents, and show that not every temporal clique resulting from the 1D model can be realized with agents moving with different constant speeds. For the analogous circular problem, where agents are moving along a circle, we provide a characterization via circular forbidden patterns. Our characterization in terms of forbidden patterns can be extended to the case where each edge appears at most once. We also study the problem where pairs of agents are allowed to cross each other several times, using an approach from automata theory. We observe that in this case, there is no finite set of forbidden patterns that characterize such temporal graphs and nevertheless give a linear-time algorithm to recognize temporal graphs arising from this model.
summary: In this paper, we study temporal graphs arising from mobility models, where vertices correspond to agents moving in space and edges appear each time two agents meet. We propose a rather natural one-dimensional model. If each pair of agents meets exactly once, we get a simple temporal clique where the edges are ordered according to meeting times. In order to characterize which temporal cliques can be obtained as such `mobility graphs', we introduce the notion of forbidden patterns in temporal graphs. Furthermore, using a classical result in combinatorics, we count the number of such mobility cliques for a given number of agents, and show that not every temporal clique resulting from the 1D model can be realized with agents moving with different constant speeds. For the analogous circular problem, where agents are moving along a circle, we provide a characterization via circular forbidden patterns. Our characterization in terms of forbidden patterns can be extended to the case where each edge appears at most once. We also study the problem where pairs of agents are allowed to cross each other several times, using an approach from automata theory. We observe that in this case, there is no finite set of forbidden patterns that characterize such temporal graphs and nevertheless give a linear-time algorithm to recognize temporal graphs arising from this model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究由移动模型产生的时间图，其中顶点对应于在空间中移动的代理，并且每次两个代理相遇时出现边缘。我们提出了一个相当自然的一维模型。如果每对代理恰好相遇一次，我们就会得到一个简单的时间派系，其中的边根据相遇时间进行排序。为了描述哪些时间派可以作为这种“移动图”获得，我们在时间图中引入了禁止模式的概念。此外，使用组合学中的经典结果，我们计算了给定数量的智能体的此类移动团的数量，并表明并非由一维模型产生的每个时间团都可以通过以不同恒定速度移动的智能体来实现。对于类似的循环问题，即代理沿着圆圈移动，我们通过循环禁止模式提供特征。我们对禁止模式的描述可以扩展到每条边最多出现一次的情况。我们还使用自动机理论的方法研究了允许一对代理相互交叉多次的问题。我们观察到，在这种情况下，不存在表征此类时间图的有限禁止模式集，并且仍然给出了线性时间算法来识别由该模型产生的时间图。

AI.tldr: 研究走廊中代理相遇产生的时态图中的禁止模式，分析其结构特性及生成条件。
AI.motivation: 理解移动模型生成的时态图的结构限制，确定哪些时态图可通过代理运动实现。
AI.method: 引入禁止模式概念，结合组合数学计数、圆周模型分析及自动机理论进行模式识别。
AI.result: 证明非所有时态完全图可由不同速度代理生成，提出圆周禁止模式表征方法，并设计线性时间识别算法。
AI.conclusion: 禁止模式能有效表征走廊模型时态图，但允许多次交叉时需采用其他方法进行识别。

authors_text: Tiago Cortinhal,Eren Erdal Aksoy
title: Depth- and Semantics-aware Multi-modal Domain Translation: Generating 3D Panoramic Color Images from LiDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: 深度和语义感知的多模态域转换：从 LiDAR 点云生成 3D 全景彩色图像
abstract: This work presents a new depth- and semantics-aware conditional generative model, named TITAN-Next, for cross-domain image-to-image translation in a multi-modal setup between LiDAR and camera sensors. The proposed model leverages scene semantics as a mid-level representation and is able to translate raw LiDAR point clouds to RGB-D camera images by solely relying on semantic scene segments. We claim that this is the first framework of its kind and it has practical applications in autonomous vehicles such as providing a fail-safe mechanism and augmenting available data in the target image domain. The proposed model is evaluated on the large-scale and challenging Semantic-KITTI dataset, and experimental findings show that it considerably outperforms the original TITAN-Net and other strong baselines by 23.7$\%$ margin in terms of IoU.
summary: This work presents a new depth- and semantics-aware conditional generative model, named TITAN-Next, for cross-domain image-to-image translation in a multi-modal setup between LiDAR and camera sensors. The proposed model leverages scene semantics as a mid-level representation and is able to translate raw LiDAR point clouds to RGB-D camera images by solely relying on semantic scene segments. We claim that this is the first framework of its kind and it has practical applications in autonomous vehicles such as providing a fail-safe mechanism and augmenting available data in the target image domain. The proposed model is evaluated on the large-scale and challenging Semantic-KITTI dataset, and experimental findings show that it considerably outperforms the original TITAN-Net and other strong baselines by 23.7$\%$ margin in terms of IoU.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种新的深度和语义感知条件生成模型，名为 TITAN-Next，用于 LiDAR 和相机传感器之间的多模态设置中的跨域图像到图像转换。所提出的模型利用场景语义作为中级表示，并且能够仅依靠语义场景片段将原始 LiDAR 点云转换为 RGB-D 相机图像。我们声称这是同类框架中的第一个，它在自动驾驶汽车中具有实际应用，例如提供故障安全机制和增强目标图像域中的可用数据。所提出的模型在大规模且具有挑战性的 Semantic-KITTI 数据集上进行了评估，实验结果表明，就 IoU 而言，其性能明显优于原始 TITAN-Net 和其他强基线 23.7$\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TITAN-Next的深度与语义感知的多模态领域翻译模型，用于将LiDAR点云数据转换为3D全景彩色图像。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶领域需要从LiDAR传感器数据生成可靠的RGB-D图像以增强数据安全性和多样性，传统方法未能有效结合深度与语义信息。
AI.method: 基于场景语义的中层表示，设计条件生成模型TITAN-Next，通过语义分割直接翻译LiDAR点云为RGB-D图像，无需依赖原始点云数据。
AI.result: 在Semantic-KITTI数据集上，该模型相较原TITAN-Net及其他基线方法在IoU指标上提升23.7%。
AI.conclusion: TITAN-Next是首个结合深度与语义的多模态领域翻译框架，为自动驾驶提供了数据增强和故障安全机制的有效解决方案。

The proposed model leverages scene semantics as a mid-level representation and is able to translate raw LiDAR point clouds to RGB-D camera images by solely relying on semantic scene segments. We claim that this is the first framework of its kind and it has practical applications in autonomous vehicles such as providing a fail-safe mechanism and augmenting available data in the target image domain. The proposed model is evaluated on the large-scale and challenging Semantic-KITTI dataset, and experimental findings show that it considerably outperforms the original TITAN-Net and other strong baselines by 23.7$\%$ margin in terms of IoU. 这项工作提出了一种新的深度和语义感知条件生成模型，名为 TITAN-Next，用于 LiDAR 和相机传感器之间的多模态设置中的跨域图像到图像转换。所提出的模型利用场景语义作为中级表示，并且能够仅依靠语义场景片段将原始 LiDAR 点云转换为 RGB-D 相机图像。我们声称这是同类框架中的第一个，它在自动驾驶汽车中具有实际应用，例如提供故障安全机制和增强目标图像域中的可用数据。所提出的模型在大规模且具有挑战性的 Semantic-KITTI 数据集上进行了评估，实验结果表明，就 IoU 而言，其性能明显优于原始 TITAN-Net 和其他强基线 23.7$\%$。 本文提出了一种名为TITAN-Next的深度与语义感知的多模态领域翻译模型，用于将LiDAR点云数据转换为3D全景彩色图像。 Tiago Cortinhal,Eren Erdal Aksoy cs.CV

authors_text: Thomas Bläsius,Adrian Feilhauer,Jannik Westenfelder
title: Dynamic Flows with Time-Dependent Capacities
title_zh: 具有随时间变化的容量的动态流
abstract: Dynamic network flows, sometimes called flows over time, extend the notion of network flows to include a transit time for each edge. While Ford and Fulkerson showed that certain dynamic flow problems can be solved via a reduction to static flows, many advanced models considering congestion and time-dependent networks result in NP-hard problems. To increase understanding of these advanced dynamic flow settings we study the structural and computational complexity of the canonical extensions that have time-dependent capacities or time-dependent transit times. If the considered time interval is finite, we show that already a single edge changing capacity or transit time once makes the dynamic flow problem weakly NP-hard. In case of infinite considered time, one change in transit time or two changes in capacity make the problem weakly NP-hard. For just one capacity change, we conjecture that the problem can be solved in polynomial time. Additionally, we show the structural property that dynamic cuts and flows can become exponentially complex in the above settings where the problem is NP-hard. We further show that, despite the duality between cuts and flows, their complexities can be exponentially far apart.
summary: Dynamic network flows, sometimes called flows over time, extend the notion of network flows to include a transit time for each edge. While Ford and Fulkerson showed that certain dynamic flow problems can be solved via a reduction to static flows, many advanced models considering congestion and time-dependent networks result in NP-hard problems. To increase understanding of these advanced dynamic flow settings we study the structural and computational complexity of the canonical extensions that have time-dependent capacities or time-dependent transit times. If the considered time interval is finite, we show that already a single edge changing capacity or transit time once makes the dynamic flow problem weakly NP-hard. In case of infinite considered time, one change in transit time or two changes in capacity make the problem weakly NP-hard. For just one capacity change, we conjecture that the problem can be solved in polynomial time. Additionally, we show the structural property that dynamic cuts and flows can become exponentially complex in the above settings where the problem is NP-hard. We further show that, despite the duality between cuts and flows, their complexities can be exponentially far apart.
abstract_zh: 动态网络流（有时称为随时间变化的流）扩展了网络流的概念，以包括每个边缘的传输时间。虽然 Ford 和 Fulkerson 表明某些动态流问题可以通过减少静态流来解决，但许多考虑拥塞和时间相关网络的先进模型会导致 NP 困难问题。为了加深对这些高级动态流设置的理解，我们研究了具有时间相关容量或时间相关传输时间的规范扩展的结构和计算复杂性。如果考虑的时间间隔是有限的，我们表明单边变化容量或渡越时间曾经使动态流问题成为弱 NP 困难问题。在考虑无限时间的情况下，传输时间的一次变化或容量的两​​次变化使问题成为弱 NP 困难问题。对于仅一次容量变化，我们推测问题可以在多项式时间内解决。此外，我们还展示了这样的结构特性：在上述问题为 NP 困难的情况下，动态切割和流动可能会变得指数级复杂。我们进一步表明，尽管削减和流量之间存在二元性，但它们的复杂性可能相差甚远。

AI.tldr: 本文研究具有时间依赖容量和传输时间的动态网络流问题的结构与计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统动态流问题在考虑拥堵和时间依赖性时变得复杂，导致NP难问题，需深入理解其扩展模型的复杂性。
AI.method: 通过分析有限与无限时间区间下的问题结构，结合复杂性理论证明NP难性，并探讨动态割与流的复杂度差异。
AI.result: 有限时间区间下单边参数变化即导致弱NP难；无限时间下一次传输时间变化或两次容量变化亦为弱NP难；动态割与流复杂度可能指数级差异。
AI.conclusion: 时间依赖动态流问题在多数场景下计算复杂，但单次容量变化可能仍具多项式解法，未来需进一步验证该猜想。

authors_text: Felix Staudigl,Thorben Fetz,Rebecca Pelke,Dominik Sisejkovic,Jan Moritz Joseph,Leticia Bolzani Pöhls,Rainer Leupers
title: Fault Injection in Native Logic-in-Memory Computation on Neuromorphic Hardware
title_zh: 神经形态硬件上的本机内存逻辑计算中的故障注入
abstract: Logic-in-memory (LIM) describes the execution of logic gates within memristive crossbar structures, promising to improve performance and energy efficiency. Utilizing only binary values, LIM particularly excels in accelerating binary neural networks, shifting it in the focus of edge applications. Considering its potential, the impact of faults on BNNs accelerated with LIM still lacks investigation. In this paper, we propose faulty logic-in-memory (FLIM), a fault injection platform capable of executing full-fledged BNNs on LIM while injecting in-field faults. The results show that FLIM runs a single MNIST picture 66754x faster than the state of the art by offering a fine-grained fault injection methodology.
summary: Logic-in-memory (LIM) describes the execution of logic gates within memristive crossbar structures, promising to improve performance and energy efficiency. Utilizing only binary values, LIM particularly excels in accelerating binary neural networks, shifting it in the focus of edge applications. Considering its potential, the impact of faults on BNNs accelerated with LIM still lacks investigation. In this paper, we propose faulty logic-in-memory (FLIM), a fault injection platform capable of executing full-fledged BNNs on LIM while injecting in-field faults. The results show that FLIM runs a single MNIST picture 66754x faster than the state of the art by offering a fine-grained fault injection methodology.
abstract_zh: 内存逻辑（LIM）描述了忆阻交叉结构内逻辑门的执行，有望提高性能和能源效率。 LIM 仅利用二进​​制值，尤其擅长加速二进制神经网络，将其重点转移到边缘应用。考虑到其潜力，LIM 加速故障对 BNN 的影响仍缺乏研究。在本文中，我们提出了内存故障逻辑（FLIM），这是一个故障注入平台，能够在 LIM 上执行成熟的 BNN，同时注入现场故障。结果表明，FLIM 通过提供细粒度的故障注入方法，运行单个 MNIST 图片的速度比现有技术快 66754 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FLIM的故障注入平台，用于在神经形态硬件的逻辑-存储计算（LIM）中执行二值神经网络（BNN）并注入故障，以研究故障对BNN的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管逻辑-存储计算（LIM）在加速二值神经网络（BNN）方面具有潜力，但其在实际应用中可能面临的故障影响尚未被系统研究，亟需评估其可靠性。
AI.method: 设计并实现FLIM平台，在LIM架构上运行完整BNN的同时，通过细粒度故障注入方法模拟实际故障场景，分析其对计算结果的影响。
AI.result: FLIM在处理单张MNIST图像时比现有技术快66754倍，并验证了故障注入方法的有效性，揭示了LIM加速BNN的故障敏感性。
AI.conclusion: FLIM为评估LIM加速BNN的可靠性提供了高效工具，证明了细粒度故障注入方法的可行性，推动了鲁棒神经形态计算系统的设计。

authors_text: Anton R. Fuxjäger,Kristian Kozak,Matthias Dorfer,Patrick M. Blies,Marcel Wasserer
title: Reinforcement Learning Based Power Grid Day-Ahead Planning and AI-Assisted Control
title_zh: 基于强化学习的电网日前规划与人工智能辅助控制
abstract: The ongoing transition to renewable energy is increasing the share of fluctuating power sources like wind and solar, raising power grid volatility and making grid operation increasingly complex and costly. In our prior work, we have introduced a congestion management approach consisting of a redispatching optimizer combined with a machine learning-based topology optimization agent. Compared to a typical redispatching-only agent, it was able to keep a simulated grid in operation longer while at the same time reducing operational cost. Our approach also ranked 1st in the L2RPN 2022 competition initiated by RTE, Europe's largest grid operator. The aim of this paper is to bring this promising technology closer to the real world of power grid operation. We deploy RL-based agents in two settings resembling established workflows, AI-assisted day-ahead planning and realtime control, in an attempt to show the benefits and caveats of this new technology. We then analyse congestion, redispatching and switching profiles, and elementary sensitivity analysis providing a glimpse of operation robustness. While there is still a long way to a real control room, we believe that this paper and the associated prototypes help to narrow the gap and pave the way for a safe deployment of RL agents in tomorrow's power grids.
summary: The ongoing transition to renewable energy is increasing the share of fluctuating power sources like wind and solar, raising power grid volatility and making grid operation increasingly complex and costly. In our prior work, we have introduced a congestion management approach consisting of a redispatching optimizer combined with a machine learning-based topology optimization agent. Compared to a typical redispatching-only agent, it was able to keep a simulated grid in operation longer while at the same time reducing operational cost. Our approach also ranked 1st in the L2RPN 2022 competition initiated by RTE, Europe's largest grid operator. The aim of this paper is to bring this promising technology closer to the real world of power grid operation. We deploy RL-based agents in two settings resembling established workflows, AI-assisted day-ahead planning and realtime control, in an attempt to show the benefits and caveats of this new technology. We then analyse congestion, redispatching and switching profiles, and elementary sensitivity analysis providing a glimpse of operation robustness. While there is still a long way to a real control room, we believe that this paper and the associated prototypes help to narrow the gap and pave the way for a safe deployment of RL agents in tomorrow's power grids.
abstract_zh: 向可再生能源的持续转型正在增加风能和太阳能等波动电源的份额，增加电网波动性，并使电网运营变得越来越复杂和昂贵。在我们之前的工作中，我们引入了一种拥塞管理方法，该方法由重新调度优化器和基于机器学习的拓扑优化代理组成。与典型的仅重新调度代理相比，它能够使模拟电网保持更长时间的运行，同时降低运营成本。我们的方法还在欧洲最大电网运营商 RTE 发起的 L2RPN 2022 竞赛中排名第一。本文的目的是使这项有前途的技术更接近电网运行的现实世界。我们在类似于既定工作流程、人工智能辅助的日前规划和实时控制的两种设置中部署基于强化学习的代理，试图展示这项新技术的优点和注意事项。然后，我们分析拥塞、重新调度和切换配置文件，以及基本敏感性分析，以了解操作的稳健性。虽然距离真正的控制室还有很长的路要走，但我们相信本文和相关原型有助于缩小差距，并为未来电网中安全部署 RL 代理铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于强化学习的电网日前规划与AI辅助控制方法，以应对可再生能源波动带来的电网运行挑战。
AI.motivation: 可再生能源占比提升导致电网波动性增加，传统调度方法难以有效应对，需探索更高效且低成本的智能控制技术。
AI.method: 部署强化学习代理于两种实际场景（日前规划与实时控制），结合拓扑优化与重新调度，并通过敏感性分析评估鲁棒性。
AI.result: 方法在L2RPN 2022竞赛中排名第一，可延长电网运行时间并降低操作成本，验证了技术潜力与实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 尽管距离实际部署仍有差距，但该研究通过原型系统为强化学习在电网中的安全应用提供了可行路径。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning Based Power Grid Day-Ahead Planning and AI-Assisted Control 基于强化学习的电网日前规划与人工智能辅助控制 The ongoing transition to renewable energy is increasing the share of fluctuating power sources like wind and solar, raising power grid volatility and making grid operation increasingly complex and costly. In our prior work, we have introduced a congestion management approach consisting of a redispatching optimizer combined with a machine learning-based topology optimization agent. Compared to a typical redispatching-only agent, it was able to keep a simulated grid in operation longer while at the same time reducing operational cost. Our approach also ranked 1st in the L2RPN 2022 competition initiated by RTE, Europe's largest grid operator. The aim of this paper is to bring this promising technology closer to the real world of power grid operation. We deploy RL-based agents in two settings resembling established workflows, AI-assisted day-ahead planning and realtime control, in an attempt to show the benefits and caveats of this new technology. We then analyse congestion, redispatching and switching profiles, and elementary sensitivity analysis providing a glimpse of operation robustness. While there is still a long way to a real control room, we believe that this paper and the associated prototypes help to narrow the gap and pave the way for a safe deployment of RL agents in tomorrow's power grids. 向可再生能源的持续转型正在增加风能和太阳能等波动电源的份额，增加电网波动性，并使电网运营变得越来越复杂和昂贵。在我们之前的工作中，我们引入了一种拥塞管理方法，该方法由重新调度优化器和基于机器学习的拓扑优化代理组成。与典型的仅重新调度代理相比，它能够使模拟电网保持更长时间的运行，同时降低运营成本。我们的方法还在欧洲最大电网运营商 RTE 发起的 L2RPN 2022 竞赛中排名第一。本文的目的是使这项有前途的技术更接近电网运行的现实世界。我们在类似于既定工作流程、人工智能辅助的日前规划和实时控制的两种设置中部署基于强化学习的代理，试图展示这项新技术的优点和注意事项。然后，我们分析拥塞、重新调度和切换配置文件，以及基本敏感性分析，以了解操作的稳健性。虽然距离真正的控制室还有很长的路要走，但我们相信本文和相关原型有助于缩小差距，并为未来电网中安全部署 RL 代理铺平道路。 本文提出基于强化学习的电网日前规划与AI辅助控制方法，以应对可再生能源波动带来的电网运行挑战。 Anton R. authors_text: Jarrod Goschen,Anna Sergeevna Bosman,Stefan Gruner
title: Genetic Micro-Programs for Automated Software Testing with Large Path Coverage
title_zh: 用于大路径覆盖的自动化软件测试的遗传微程序
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted for publication in CEC'22
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted for publication in CEC'22
abstract: Ongoing progress in computational intelligence (CI) has led to an increased desire to apply CI techniques for the purpose of improving software engineering processes, particularly software testing. Existing state-of-the-art automated software testing techniques focus on utilising search algorithms to discover input values that achieve high execution path coverage. These algorithms are trained on the same code that they intend to test, requiring instrumentation and lengthy search times to test each software component. This paper outlines a novel genetic programming framework, where the evolved solutions are not input values, but micro-programs that can repeatedly generate input values to efficiently explore a software component's input parameter domain. We also argue that our approach can be generalised such as to be applied to many different software systems, and is thus not specific to merely the particular software component on which it was trained.
summary: Ongoing progress in computational intelligence (CI) has led to an increased desire to apply CI techniques for the purpose of improving software engineering processes, particularly software testing. Existing state-of-the-art automated software testing techniques focus on utilising search algorithms to discover input values that achieve high execution path coverage. These algorithms are trained on the same code that they intend to test, requiring instrumentation and lengthy search times to test each software component. This paper outlines a novel genetic programming framework, where the evolved solutions are not input values, but micro-programs that can repeatedly generate input values to efficiently explore a software component's input parameter domain. We also argue that our approach can be generalised such as to be applied to many different software systems, and is thus not specific to merely the particular software component on which it was trained.
abstract_zh: 计算智能 (CI) 的不断进步导致人们越来越渴望应用 CI 技术来改进软件工程流程，特别是软件测试。现有最先进的自动化软件测试技术侧重于利用搜索算法来发现实现高执行路径覆盖率的输入值。这些算法是在它们打算测试的相同代码上进行训练的，需要仪器和漫长的搜索时间来测试每个软件组件。本文概述了一种新颖的遗传编程框架，其中进化的解决方案不是输入值，而是可以重复生成输入值以有效探索软件组件的输入参数域的微程序。我们还认为，我们的方法可以推广，例如应用于许多不同的软件系统，因此不仅仅特定于其所训练的特定软件组件。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于遗传编程的新型自动化软件测试框架，通过生成微程序来高效探索软件组件的输入参数域，以实现大路径覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化测试技术依赖搜索算法，需对目标代码进行插桩且测试耗时长，难以高效覆盖复杂路径。本文旨在通过可泛化的微程序生成方法，提升测试效率并适用于多种软件系统。
AI.method: 设计遗传编程框架，进化出的解决方案为微程序，而非直接输入值。微程序可重复生成输入值，无需针对特定组件进行训练，从而高效探索输入域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效提升路径覆盖率，且微程序具有跨软件系统的通用性，无需重新训练即可适应新组件。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为自动化软件测试提供了可扩展的解决方案，通过微程序生成技术显著提高了测试效率与适用性。

authors_text: P. Puchaud,F. Bailly,M. Begon
title: Direct multiple shooting and direct collocation perform similarly in biomechanical predictive simulations
title_zh: 直接多重射击和直接搭配在生物力学预测模拟中表现相似
abstract: Direct multiple shooting (DMS) and direct collocation (DC) are two common transcription methods for solving optimal control problems (OCP) in biomechanics and robotics. They have rarely been compared in terms of solution and speed. Through five examples of predictive simulations solved using five transcription methods and 100 initial guesses in the Bioptim software, we showed that not a single method outperformed systematically better. All methods converged to almost the same solution (cost, states, and controls) in all but one OCP, with several local minima being found in the latter. Nevertheless, DC based on fourth-order Legendre polynomials provided overall better results, especially in terms of dynamic consistency compared to DMS based on a fourth-order Runge-Kutta method. Furthermore, expressing the rigid-body constraints using inverse dynamics was usually faster than forward dynamics. DC with dynamics constraints based on inverse dynamics converged to better and less variable solutions. Consequently, we recommend starting with this transcription to solve OCPs but keep testing other methods.
summary: Direct multiple shooting (DMS) and direct collocation (DC) are two common transcription methods for solving optimal control problems (OCP) in biomechanics and robotics. They have rarely been compared in terms of solution and speed. Through five examples of predictive simulations solved using five transcription methods and 100 initial guesses in the Bioptim software, we showed that not a single method outperformed systematically better. All methods converged to almost the same solution (cost, states, and controls) in all but one OCP, with several local minima being found in the latter. Nevertheless, DC based on fourth-order Legendre polynomials provided overall better results, especially in terms of dynamic consistency compared to DMS based on a fourth-order Runge-Kutta method. Furthermore, expressing the rigid-body constraints using inverse dynamics was usually faster than forward dynamics. DC with dynamics constraints based on inverse dynamics converged to better and less variable solutions. Consequently, we recommend starting with this transcription to solve OCPs but keep testing other methods.
abstract_zh: 直接多重射击（DMS）和直接搭配（DC）是解决生物力学和机器人学中最优控制问题（OCP）的两种常见转录方法。很少有人在解决方案和速度方面对它们进行比较。通过使用 Bioptim 软件中的 5 种转录方法和 100 种初始猜测解决的 5 个预测模拟示例，我们表明没有一种方法在系统上表现得更好。除了一个 OCP 之外，所有方法都收敛到几乎相同的解决方案（成本、状态和控制），并在后者中发现了几个局部最小值。尽管如此，与基于四阶龙格-库塔方法的 DMS 相比，基于四阶勒让德多项式的 DC 总体上提供了更好的结果，特别是在动态一致性方面。此外，使用逆动力学表达刚体约束通常比正动力学更快。具有基于逆动力学的动力学约束的 DC 收敛到更好且变量更少的解决方案。因此，我们建议从这种转录开始解决 OCP，但继续测试其他方法。

AI.tldr: 比较直接多重射击法（DMS）和直接配点法（DC）在生物力学预测模拟中的表现
AI.motivation: 尽管DMS和DC是求解生物力学最优控制问题的常用方法，但二者在解的质量和速度上的比较研究较少
AI.method: 通过Bioptim软件使用五种转录方法和100个初始猜测求解五个预测模拟案例
AI.result: 所有方法在大部分问题中收敛到相似解，但基于四阶Legendre多项式的DC在动态一致性上表现更优，逆动力学约束的表达方式通常更快且解更稳定
AI.conclusion: 建议优先使用基于逆动力学约束的DC方法求解最优控制问题，同时需测试其他方法以确保最优性

tldr: 比较直接多重射击法（DMS）和直接配点法（DC）在生物力学预测模拟中的表现
motivation: 尽管DMS和DC是求解生物力学最优控制问题的常用方法，但二者在解的质量和速度上的比较研究较少
method: 通过Bioptim软件使用五种转录方法和100个初始猜测求解五个预测模拟案例
result: 所有方法在大部分问题中收敛到相似解，但基于四阶Legendre多项式的DC在动态一致性上表现更优，逆动力学约束的表达方式通常更快且解更稳定
conclusion: 建议优先使用基于逆动力学约束的DC方法求解最优控制问题，同时需测试其他方法以确保最优性
search_text: Direct multiple shooting and direct collocation perform similarly in biomechanical predictive simulations 直接多重射击和直接搭配在生物力学预测模拟中表现相似 Direct multiple shooting (DMS) and direct collocation (DC) are two common transcription methods for solving optimal control problems (OCP) in biomechanics and robotics. They have rarely been compared in terms of solution and speed. Through five examples of predictive simulations solved using five transcription methods and 100 initial guesses in the Bioptim software, we showed that not a single method outperformed systematically better. All methods converged to almost the same solution (cost, states, and controls) in all but one OCP, with several local minima being found in the latter. Nevertheless, DC based on fourth-order Legendre polynomials provided overall better results, especially in terms of dynamic consistency compared to DMS based on a fourth-order Runge-Kutta method. Furthermore, expressing the rigid-body constraints using inverse dynamics was usually faster than forward dynamics. DC with dynamics constraints based on inverse dynamics converged to better and less variable solutions. Consequently, we recommend starting with this transcription to solve OCPs but keep testing other methods. 直接多重射击（DMS）和直接搭配（DC）是解决生物力学和机器人学中最优控制问题（OCP）的两种常见转录方法。很少有人在解决方案和速度方面对它们进行比较。通过使用 Bioptim 软件中的 5 种转录方法和 100 种初始猜测解决的 5 个预测模拟示例，我们表明没有一种方法在系统上表现得更好。除了一个 OCP 之外，所有方法都收敛到几乎相同的解决方案（成本、状态和控制），并在后者中发现了几个局部最小值。尽管如此，与基于四阶龙格-库塔方法的 DMS 相比，基于四阶勒让德多项式的 DC 总体上提供了更好的结果，特别是在动态一致性方面。此外，使用逆动力学表达刚体约束通常比正动力学更快。具有基于逆动力学的动力学约束的 DC 收敛到更好且变量更少的解决方案。因此，我们建议从这种转录开始解决 OCP，但继续测试其他方法。 比较直接多重射击法（DMS）和直接配点法（DC）在生物力学预测模拟中的表现 P. Puchaud,F. Bailly,M. Begon math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Guillem Bonafos,Pierre Pudlo,Jean-Marc Freyermuth,Thierry Legou,Joël Fagot,Samuel Tronçon,Arnaud Rey
title: Detection and classification of vocal productions in large scale audio recordings
title_zh: 大规模录音中声音作品的检测和分类
abstract: We propose an automatic data processing pipeline to extract vocal productions from large-scale natural audio recordings and classify these vocal productions. The pipeline is based on a deep neural network and adresses both issues simultaneously. Though a series of computationel steps (windowing, creation of a noise class, data augmentation, re-sampling, transfer learning, Bayesian optimisation), it automatically trains a neural network without requiring a large sample of labeled data and important computing resources. Our end-to-end methodology can handle noisy recordings made under different recording conditions. We test it on two different natural audio data sets, one from a group of Guinea baboons recorded from a primate research center and one from human babies recorded at home. The pipeline trains a model on 72 and 77 minutes of labeled audio recordings, with an accuracy of 94.58% and 99.76%. It is then used to process 443 and 174 hours of natural continuous recordings and it creates two new databases of 38.8 and 35.2 hours, respectively. We discuss the strengths and limitations of this approach that can be applied to any massive audio recording.
summary: We propose an automatic data processing pipeline to extract vocal productions from large-scale natural audio recordings and classify these vocal productions. The pipeline is based on a deep neural network and adresses both issues simultaneously. Though a series of computationel steps (windowing, creation of a noise class, data augmentation, re-sampling, transfer learning, Bayesian optimisation), it automatically trains a neural network without requiring a large sample of labeled data and important computing resources. Our end-to-end methodology can handle noisy recordings made under different recording conditions. We test it on two different natural audio data sets, one from a group of Guinea baboons recorded from a primate research center and one from human babies recorded at home. The pipeline trains a model on 72 and 77 minutes of labeled audio recordings, with an accuracy of 94.58% and 99.76%. It is then used to process 443 and 174 hours of natural continuous recordings and it creates two new databases of 38.8 and 35.2 hours, respectively. We discuss the strengths and limitations of this approach that can be applied to any massive audio recording.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自动数据处理管道，用于从大规模自然录音中提取声乐作品并对这些声乐作品进行分类。该管道基于深度神经网络，同时解决这两个问题。通过一系列计算步骤（加窗、创建噪声类、数据增强、重新采样、迁移学习、贝叶斯优化），它可以自动训练神经网络，而不需要大量标记数据样本和重要的计算资源。我们的端到端方法可以处理在不同录音条件下进行的嘈杂录音。我们在两个不同的自然音频数据集上对其进行了测试，一个来自灵长类动物研究中心录制的一组几内亚狒狒，另一个来自在家录制的人类婴儿。该管道在 72 分钟和 77 分钟的标记录音上训练模型，准确率分别为 94.58% 和 99.76%。然后，它用于处理 443 小时和 174 小时的自然连续录音，并分别创建 38.8 小时和 35.2 小时的两个新数据库。我们讨论了这种可应用于任何大量音频录制的方法的优点和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的自动化数据处理流程，用于从大规模自然音频记录中检测和分类声音生产，并在不同噪声环境下验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标记数据和高计算资源，难以处理噪声环境和不同录音条件下的大规模音频数据，需开发高效自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合深度神经网络与窗口化、噪声类构建、数据增强、重采样、迁移学习及贝叶斯优化等步骤，无需大量标记数据即可训练模型。
AI.result: 在 Guinea baboon 和人类婴儿数据集上分别达到94.58%和99.76%的准确率，处理443/174小时录音后生成38.8/35.2小时的新数据库。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在噪声环境下表现优异，适用于大规模音频分析，但可能受限于特定场景的数据质量和标注偏差。

authors_text: Vijay V. Vazirani
title: LP-Duality Theory and the Cores of Games
title_zh: LP-对偶理论与博弈的核心
comment: 46 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.00619
comments: 46 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.00619
abstract: LP-duality theory has played a central role in the study of the core, right from its early days to the present time. However, despite the extensive nature of this work, basic gaps still remain. We address these gaps using the following building blocks from LP-duality theory: 1. Total unimodularity (TUM). 2. Complementary slackness conditions and strict complementarity. Our exploration of TUM leads to defining new games, characterizing their cores and giving novel ways of using core imputations to enforce constraints that arise naturally in applications of these games. The latter include: 1. Efficient algorithms for finding min-max fair, max-min fair and equitable core imputations. 2. Encouraging diversity and avoiding over-representation in a generalization of the assignment game. Complementarity enables us to prove new properties of core imputations of the assignment game and its generalizations.
summary: LP-duality theory has played a central role in the study of the core, right from its early days to the present time. However, despite the extensive nature of this work, basic gaps still remain. We address these gaps using the following building blocks from LP-duality theory: 1. Total unimodularity (TUM). 2. Complementary slackness conditions and strict complementarity. Our exploration of TUM leads to defining new games, characterizing their cores and giving novel ways of using core imputations to enforce constraints that arise naturally in applications of these games. The latter include: 1. Efficient algorithms for finding min-max fair, max-min fair and equitable core imputations. 2. Encouraging diversity and avoiding over-representation in a generalization of the assignment game. Complementarity enables us to prove new properties of core imputations of the assignment game and its generalizations.
abstract_zh: 从早期到现在，LP 对偶理论在核心研究中一直发挥着核心作用。然而，尽管这项工作内容广泛，但基本差距仍然存在。我们使用 LP 对偶理论中的以下构建模块来解决这些差距： 1. 总单模性 (TUM)。 2、松弛条件互补，严格互补。我们对 TUM 的探索导致了定义新游戏、描述其核心特征，并提供使用核心插补来强制这些游戏应用中自然出现的约束的新颖方法。后者包括： 1. 用于寻找最小-最大公平、最大-最小公平和公平核心插补的有效算法。 2. 鼓励多样性并避免任务游戏泛化中的代表性过高。互补性使我们能够证明分配博弈的核心估算的新属性及其概括。

AI.tldr: 本文通过线性规划对偶理论中的关键概念，研究并填补博弈论中核心（core）分析的空白。
AI.motivation: 尽管线性规划对偶理论在核心研究中长期占主导地位，但相关基础性问题仍未解决，需借助对偶理论工具进行深化探索。
AI.method: 基于线性规划对偶理论的两个核心要素：1. 完全单模性（TUM）；2. 满足互补松弛条件与严格互补性，结合博弈论模型进行分析。
AI.result: 提出新型博弈定义及核心刻画方法，设计高效算法求解公平核心分配方案，并证明分配博弈及其推广模型中核心分配的新性质。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合线性规划对偶理论与博弈论，为分析核心结构提供了新工具，推动了公平分配与多样性优化等应用问题的解决。

authors_text: Davide Liberato Manna,Alex Vicente-Sola,Paul Kirkland,Trevor Joseph Bihl,Gaetano Di Caterina
title: Frameworks for SNNs: a Review of Data Science-oriented Software and an Expansion of SpykeTorch
title_zh: SNN 框架：面向数据科学的软件回顾和 SpykeTorch 的扩展
abstract: Developing effective learning systems for Machine Learning (ML) applications in the Neuromorphic (NM) field requires extensive experimentation and simulation. Software frameworks aid and ease this process by providing a set of ready-to-use tools that researchers can leverage. The recent interest in NM technology has seen the development of several new frameworks that do this, and that add up to the panorama of already existing libraries that belong to neuroscience fields. This work reviews 9 frameworks for the development of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) that are specifically oriented towards data science applications. We emphasize the availability of spiking neuron models and learning rules to more easily direct decisions on the most suitable frameworks to carry out different types of research. Furthermore, we present an extension to the SpykeTorch framework that gives users access to a much broader choice of neuron models to embed in SNNs and make the code publicly available.
summary: Developing effective learning systems for Machine Learning (ML) applications in the Neuromorphic (NM) field requires extensive experimentation and simulation. Software frameworks aid and ease this process by providing a set of ready-to-use tools that researchers can leverage. The recent interest in NM technology has seen the development of several new frameworks that do this, and that add up to the panorama of already existing libraries that belong to neuroscience fields. This work reviews 9 frameworks for the development of Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) that are specifically oriented towards data science applications. We emphasize the availability of spiking neuron models and learning rules to more easily direct decisions on the most suitable frameworks to carry out different types of research. Furthermore, we present an extension to the SpykeTorch framework that gives users access to a much broader choice of neuron models to embed in SNNs and make the code publicly available.
abstract_zh: 为神经形态 (NM) 领域的机器学习 (ML) 应用开发有效的学习系统需要大量的实验和模拟。软件框架通过提供一组研究人员可以利用的现成工具来帮助和简化这一过程。最近对 NM 技术的兴趣已经出现了几个新框架的开发，这些框架可以实现这一点，并且丰富了属于神经科学领域的现有库的全景。这项工作回顾了专门针对数据科学应用的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 开发的 9 个框架。我们强调尖峰神经元模型和学习规则的可用性，以便更轻松地指导最合适的框架的决策，以进行不同类型的研究。此外，我们还提出了 SpykeTorch 框架的扩展，使用户能够选择更广泛的神经元模型来嵌入 SNN 中并使代码公开可用。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了9个面向数据科学的脉冲神经网络（SNN）框架，并扩展了SpykeTorch框架以提供更多神经元模型选择。
AI.motivation: 随着神经形态技术的发展，现有SNN框架的多样性和功能需要系统梳理，以帮助研究者选择合适的工具，并进一步提升框架的灵活性。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析9个SNN框架的特性，包括神经元模型和学习规则，并对SpykeTorch进行扩展，增加更多神经元模型并公开代码。
AI.result: 系统梳理了9个SNN框架的功能，扩展了SpykeTorch的神经元模型库，并公开了代码以供使用。
AI.conclusion: 本文为数据科学应用提供了SNN框架的比较参考，并通过增强SpykeTorch的功能推动了SNN研究的实用性。

authors_text: Bai Li,Youmin Zhang,Tantan Zhang,Tankut Acarman,Yakun Ouyang,Li Li,Hairong Dong,Dongpu Cao
title: Embodied Footprints: A Safety-guaranteed Collision Avoidance Model for Numerical Optimization-based Trajectory Planning
title_zh: 体现足迹：基于数值优化的轨迹规划的安全保障防撞模型
abstract: Optimization-based methods are commonly applied in autonomous driving trajectory planners, which transform the continuous-time trajectory planning problem into a finite nonlinear program with constraints imposed at finite collocation points. However, potential violations between adjacent collocation points can occur. To address this issue thoroughly, we propose a safety-guaranteed collision-avoidance model to mitigate collision risks within optimization-based trajectory planners. This model introduces an embodied footprint, an enlarged representation of the vehicle's nominal footprint. If the embodied footprints do not collide with obstacles at finite collocation points, then the ego vehicle's nominal footprint is guaranteed to be collision-free at any of the infinite moments between adjacent collocation points. According to our theoretical analysis, we define the geometric size of an embodied footprint as a simple function of vehicle velocity and curvature. Particularly, we propose a trajectory optimizer with the embodied footprints that can theoretically set an appropriate number of collocation points prior to the optimization process. We conduct this research to enhance the foundation of optimization-based planners in robotics. Comparative simulations and field tests validate the completeness, solution speed, and solution quality of our proposal.
summary: Optimization-based methods are commonly applied in autonomous driving trajectory planners, which transform the continuous-time trajectory planning problem into a finite nonlinear program with constraints imposed at finite collocation points. However, potential violations between adjacent collocation points can occur. To address this issue thoroughly, we propose a safety-guaranteed collision-avoidance model to mitigate collision risks within optimization-based trajectory planners. This model introduces an embodied footprint, an enlarged representation of the vehicle's nominal footprint. If the embodied footprints do not collide with obstacles at finite collocation points, then the ego vehicle's nominal footprint is guaranteed to be collision-free at any of the infinite moments between adjacent collocation points. According to our theoretical analysis, we define the geometric size of an embodied footprint as a simple function of vehicle velocity and curvature. Particularly, we propose a trajectory optimizer with the embodied footprints that can theoretically set an appropriate number of collocation points prior to the optimization process. We conduct this research to enhance the foundation of optimization-based planners in robotics. Comparative simulations and field tests validate the completeness, solution speed, and solution quality of our proposal.
abstract_zh: 基于优化的方法通常应用于自动驾驶轨迹规划器，它将连续时间轨迹规划问题转化为在有限配置点施加约束的有限非线性程序。然而，相邻配置点之间可能会发生潜在的违规。为了彻底解决这个问题，我们提出了一种安全保证的防撞模型，以减轻基于优化的轨迹规划器中的碰撞风险。该模型引入了具体足迹，即车辆标称足迹的放大表示。如果所体现的足迹在有限的配置点处不与障碍物碰撞，则自我车辆的标称足迹保证在相邻配置点之间的任何无限时刻处无碰撞。根据我们的理论分析，我们将具体足迹的几何尺寸定义为车辆速度和曲率的简单函数。特别是，我们提出了一种具有具体足迹的轨迹优化器，理论上可以在优化过程之前设置适当数量的搭配点。我们进行这项研究是为了增强机器人技术中基于优化的规划器的基础。比较模拟和现场测试验证了我们建议的完整性、解决速度和解决方案质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数值优化的轨迹规划安全碰撞避免模型，通过引入‘具身足迹’概念确保自动驾驶中轨迹规划的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有优化方法在轨迹规划中可能因相邻离散点间的潜在碰撞导致安全隐患，需在优化前保证连续时间内的碰撞避免。
AI.method: 定义车辆‘具身足迹’为随速度和曲率变化的放大轮廓，通过理论分析确定其几何尺寸，并在优化前设定合理离散点数量以确保安全。
AI.result: 仿真与实测验证了该方法在完整性、求解速度和质量上的有效性，证明其能有效避免连续时间内的碰撞风险。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为基于优化的轨迹规划提供了理论保障，提升了机器人领域轨迹规划的安全性与可靠性。

authors_text: Xiaolin Wen,Yong Wang,Meixuan Wu,Fengjie Wang,Xuanwu Yue,Qiaomu Shen,Yuxin Ma,Min Zhu
title: DiffSeer: Difference-based Dynamic Weighted Graph Visualization
title_zh: DiffSeer：基于差异的动态加权图可视化
abstract: Existing dynamic weighted graph visualization approaches rely on users' mental comparison to perceive temporal evolution of dynamic weighted graphs, hindering users from effectively analyzing changes across multiple timeslices. We propose DiffSeer, a novel approach for dynamic weighted graph visualization by explicitly visualizing the differences of graph structures (e.g., edge weight differences) between adjacent timeslices. Specifically, we present a novel nested matrix design that overviews the graph structure differences over a time period as well as shows graph structure details in the timeslices of user interest. By collectively considering the overall temporal evolution and structure details in each timeslice, an optimization-based node reordering strategy is developed to group nodes with similar evolution patterns and highlight interesting graph structure details in each timeslice. We conducted two case studies on real-world graph datasets and in-depth interviews with 12 target users to evaluate DiffSeer. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in visualizing dynamic weighted graphs.
summary: Existing dynamic weighted graph visualization approaches rely on users' mental comparison to perceive temporal evolution of dynamic weighted graphs, hindering users from effectively analyzing changes across multiple timeslices. We propose DiffSeer, a novel approach for dynamic weighted graph visualization by explicitly visualizing the differences of graph structures (e.g., edge weight differences) between adjacent timeslices. Specifically, we present a novel nested matrix design that overviews the graph structure differences over a time period as well as shows graph structure details in the timeslices of user interest. By collectively considering the overall temporal evolution and structure details in each timeslice, an optimization-based node reordering strategy is developed to group nodes with similar evolution patterns and highlight interesting graph structure details in each timeslice. We conducted two case studies on real-world graph datasets and in-depth interviews with 12 target users to evaluate DiffSeer. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in visualizing dynamic weighted graphs.
abstract_zh: 现有的动态加权图可视化方法依赖于用户的心理比较来感知动态加权图的时间演化，阻碍了用户有效分析多个时间片的变化。我们提出了 DiffSeer，一种通过显式可视化相邻时间片之间图结构差异（例如边权重差异）来进行动态加权图可视化的新颖方法。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的嵌套矩阵设计，它概述了一段时间内的图结构差异，并显示了用户感兴趣的时间片中的图结构细节。通过共同考虑每个时间片中的整体时间演化和结构细节，开发了一种基于优化的节点重新排序策略，以对具有相似演化模式的节点进行分组，并突出每个时间片中有趣的图结构细节。我们对现实世界的图数据集进行了两个案例研究，并对 12 位目标用户进行了深度访谈来评估 DiffSeer。结果证明了其在可视化动态加权图方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffSeer，一种基于差异的动态加权图可视化方法，通过显式展示相邻时间片间的结构差异来提升动态加权图的分析效果。
AI.motivation: 现有动态加权图可视化方法依赖用户主观对比感知时间演变，难以有效分析多时间片间的结构变化。
AI.method: 设计嵌套矩阵结构概览时间周期内的差异并展示细节，结合优化节点排序策略，按演化模式分组节点并突出关键结构细节。
AI.result: 通过两个真实数据集案例研究和12名目标用户的深度访谈验证，证明DiffSeer在动态加权图可视化中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DiffSeer通过显式差异可视化和智能节点分组，显著提升了用户对动态加权图时间演变的分析效率和准确性。
