search_text: DiffSeer: Difference-based Dynamic Weighted Graph Visualization DiffSeer：基于差异的动态加权图可视化 Existing dynamic weighted graph visualization approaches rely on users' mental comparison to perceive temporal evolution of dynamic weighted graphs, hindering users from effectively analyzing changes across multiple timeslices. We propose DiffSeer, a novel approach for dynamic weighted graph visualization by explicitly visualizing the differences of graph structures (e.g., edge weight differences) between adjacent timeslices. Specifically, we present a novel nested matrix design that overviews the graph structure differences over a time period as well as shows graph structure details in the timeslices of user interest. By collectively considering the overall temporal evolution and structure details in each timeslice, an optimization-based node reordering strategy is developed to group nodes with similar evolution patterns and highlight interesting graph structure details in each timeslice. We conducted two case studies on real-world graph datasets and in-depth interviews with 12 target users to evaluate DiffSeer. The results demonstrate its effectiveness in visualizing dynamic weighted graphs. 现有的动态加权图可视化方法依赖于用户的心理比较来感知动态加权图的时间演化，阻碍了用户有效分析多个时间片的变化。我们提出了 DiffSeer，一种通过显式可视化相邻时间片之间图结构差异（例如边权重差异）来进行动态加权图可视化的新颖方法。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的嵌套矩阵设计，它概述了一段时间内的图结构差异，并显示了用户感兴趣的时间片中的图结构细节。通过共同考虑每个时间片中的整体时间演化和结构细节，开发了一种基于优化的节点重新排序策略，以对具有相似演化模式的节点进行分组，并突出每个时间片中有趣的图结构细节。我们对现实世界的图数据集进行了两个案例研究，并对 12 位目标用户进行了深度访谈来评估 DiffSeer。结果证明了其在可视化动态加权图方面的有效性。 本文提出DiffSeer，一种基于差异的动态加权图可视化方法，通过显式展示相邻时间片间的结构差异来提升动态加权图的分析效果。 Xiaolin Wen,Yong Wang,Meixuan Wu,Fengjie Wang,Xuanwu Yue,Qiaomu Shen,Yuxin Ma,Min Zhu cs.HC

authors_text: Mouxiao Huang,Yu Qiao
title: Uncertainty-Estimation with Normalized Logits for Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: 用于分布外检测的归一化 Logits 的不确定性估计
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is critical for preventing deep learning models from making incorrect predictions to ensure the safety of artificial intelligence systems. Especially in safety-critical applications such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving, the cost of incorrect decisions is usually unbearable. However, neural networks often suffer from the overconfidence issue, making high confidence for OOD data which are never seen during training process and may be irrelevant to training data, namely in-distribution (ID) data. Determining the reliability of the prediction is still a difficult and challenging task. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-Estimation with Normalized Logits (UE-NL), a robust learning method for OOD detection, which has three main benefits. (1) Neural networks with UE-NL treat every ID sample equally by predicting the uncertainty score of input data and the uncertainty is added into softmax function to adjust the learning strength of easy and hard samples during training phase, making the model learn robustly and accurately. (2) UE-NL enforces a constant vector norm on the logits to decouple the effect of the increasing output norm from optimization process, which causes the overconfidence issue to some extent. (3) UE-NL provides a new metric, the magnitude of uncertainty score, to detect OOD data. Experiments demonstrate that UE-NL achieves top performance on common OOD benchmarks and is more robust to noisy ID data that may be misjudged as OOD data by other methods.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is critical for preventing deep learning models from making incorrect predictions to ensure the safety of artificial intelligence systems. Especially in safety-critical applications such as medical diagnosis and autonomous driving, the cost of incorrect decisions is usually unbearable. However, neural networks often suffer from the overconfidence issue, making high confidence for OOD data which are never seen during training process and may be irrelevant to training data, namely in-distribution (ID) data. Determining the reliability of the prediction is still a difficult and challenging task. In this work, we propose Uncertainty-Estimation with Normalized Logits (UE-NL), a robust learning method for OOD detection, which has three main benefits. (1) Neural networks with UE-NL treat every ID sample equally by predicting the uncertainty score of input data and the uncertainty is added into softmax function to adjust the learning strength of easy and hard samples during training phase, making the model learn robustly and accurately. (2) UE-NL enforces a constant vector norm on the logits to decouple the effect of the increasing output norm from optimization process, which causes the overconfidence issue to some extent. (3) UE-NL provides a new metric, the magnitude of uncertainty score, to detect OOD data. Experiments demonstrate that UE-NL achieves top performance on common OOD benchmarks and is more robust to noisy ID data that may be misjudged as OOD data by other methods.
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）检测对于防止深度学习模型做出错误预测以确保人工智能系统的安全至关重要。尤其是在医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中，错误决策的成本通常是难以承受的。然而，神经网络经常遇到过度自信的问题，对训练过程中从未见过的、可能与训练数据无关的 OOD 数据（即分布内（ID）数据）产生很高的置信度。确定预测的可靠性仍然是一项困难且具有挑战性的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了归一化 Logits 的不确定性估计（UE-NL），这是一种用于 OOD 检测的鲁棒学习方法，它具有三个主要优点。 (1)采用UE-NL的神经网络通过预测输入数据的不确定性得分来平等对待每个ID样本，并将不确定性添加到softmax函数中以在训练阶段调整易样本和难样本的学习强度，使模型学习鲁棒且准确。 （2）UE-NL对logits强制使用恒定向量范数，以将输出范数增加的影响与优化过程解耦，这在一定程度上导致了过度自信问题。 (3) UE-NL提供了一种新的度量，即不确定性得分的大小，来检测OOD数据。实验表明，UE-NL 在常见的 OOD 基准上实现了顶级性能，并且对于可能被其他方法误判为 OOD 数据的噪声 ID 数据具有更强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归一化对数的不确定性估计方法（UE-NL），用于改进深度学习模型的分布外检测能力。
AI.motivation: 神经网络在面对训练过程中未见过的分布外（OOD）数据时容易产生过度自信的错误预测，这在医疗诊断和自动驾驶等安全关键领域可能带来严重后果。
AI.method: UE-NL通过三个机制实现：1）在softmax函数中引入不确定性分数调整样本学习强度；2）对对数向量施加恒定范数约束；3）以不确定性分数幅值作为OOD检测指标。
AI.result: 实验表明UE-NL在常见OOD基准测试中表现优异，且对可能被其他方法误判的噪声内分布（ID）数据更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: UE-NL通过不确定性估计和归一化机制有效解决了神经网络的过度自信问题，为安全关键场景的OOD检测提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Zhilin Lu,Xudong Zhang,Rui Zeng,Jintao Wang
title: Deep Learning for Hybrid Beamforming with Finite Feedback in GSM Aided mmWave MIMO Systems
title_zh: GSM 辅助毫米波 MIMO 系统中具有有限反馈的混合波束形成深度学习
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice
comments: 4 pages, 4 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice
abstract: Hybrid beamforming is widely recognized as an important technique for millimeter wave (mmWave) multiple input multiple output (MIMO) systems. Generalized spatial modulation (GSM) is further introduced to improve the spectrum efficiency. However, most of the existing works on beamforming assume the perfect channel state information (CSI), which is unrealistic in practical systems. In this paper, joint optimization of downlink pilot training, channel estimation, CSI feedback, and hybrid beamforming is considered in GSM aided frequency division duplexing (FDD) mmWave MIMO systems. With the help of deep learning, the GSM hybrid beamformers are designed via unsupervised learning in an end-to-end way. Experiments show that the proposed multi-resolution network named GsmEFBNet can reach a better achievable rate with fewer feedback bits compared with the conventional algorithm.
summary: Hybrid beamforming is widely recognized as an important technique for millimeter wave (mmWave) multiple input multiple output (MIMO) systems. Generalized spatial modulation (GSM) is further introduced to improve the spectrum efficiency. However, most of the existing works on beamforming assume the perfect channel state information (CSI), which is unrealistic in practical systems. In this paper, joint optimization of downlink pilot training, channel estimation, CSI feedback, and hybrid beamforming is considered in GSM aided frequency division duplexing (FDD) mmWave MIMO systems. With the help of deep learning, the GSM hybrid beamformers are designed via unsupervised learning in an end-to-end way. Experiments show that the proposed multi-resolution network named GsmEFBNet can reach a better achievable rate with fewer feedback bits compared with the conventional algorithm.
abstract_zh: 混合波束成形被广泛认为是毫米波 (mmWave) 多输入多输出 (MIMO) 系统的一项重要技术。进一步引入广义空间调制（GSM）来提高频谱效率。然而，大多数现有的波束成形工作都假设完美的信道状态信息（CSI），这在实际系统中是不现实的。本文考虑了 GSM 辅助频分双工 (FDD) 毫米波 MIMO 系统中下行导频训练、信道估计、CSI 反馈和混合波束成形的联合优化。借助深度学习，GSM 混合波束形成器通过端到端的无监督学习进行设计。实验表明，与传统算法相比，所提出的名为 GsmEFBNet 的多分辨率网络可以用更少的反馈比特达到更好的可实现速率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的混合波束成形方法，用于有限反馈的GSM辅助毫米波MIMO系统，以提高频谱效率。
AI.motivation: 现有波束成形研究多假设完美信道状态信息（CSI），但实际系统中反馈信息有限，需解决有限反馈下的高效波束成形问题。
AI.method: 通过深度学习联合优化下行导频训练、信道估计、CSI反馈和混合波束成形，提出多分辨率网络GsmEFBNet，采用无监督学习实现端到端设计。
AI.result: 实验表明，GsmEFBNet在较少反馈比特下实现了比传统算法更高的可实现速率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了有限反馈场景下的波束成形问题，为实际毫米波MIMO系统提供了高效解决方案。

Generalized spatial modulation (GSM) is further introduced to improve the spectrum efficiency. However, most of the existing works on beamforming assume the perfect channel state information (CSI), which is unrealistic in practical systems. In this paper, joint optimization of downlink pilot training, channel estimation, CSI feedback, and hybrid beamforming is considered in GSM aided frequency division duplexing (FDD) mmWave MIMO systems. With the help of deep learning, the GSM hybrid beamformers are designed via unsupervised learning in an end-to-end way. Experiments show that the proposed multi-resolution network named GsmEFBNet can reach a better achievable rate with fewer feedback bits compared with the conventional algorithm. 混合波束成形被广泛认为是毫米波 (mmWave) 多输入多输出 (MIMO) 系统的一项重要技术。进一步引入广义空间调制（GSM）来提高频谱效率。然而，大多数现有的波束成形工作都假设完美的信道状态信息（CSI），这在实际系统中是不现实的。本文考虑了 GSM 辅助频分双工 (FDD) 毫米波 MIMO 系统中下行导频训练、信道估计、CSI 反馈和混合波束成形的联合优化。借助深度学习，GSM 混合波束形成器通过端到端的无监督学习进行设计。实验表明，与传统算法相比，所提出的名为 GsmEFBNet 的多分辨率网络可以用更少的反馈比特达到更好的可实现速率。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的混合波束成形方法，用于有限反馈的GSM辅助毫米波MIMO系统，以提高频谱效率。 Zhilin Lu,Xudong Zhang,Rui Zeng,Jintao Wang cs.IT,cs.AI,eess.SP

authors_text: Kishore Surendra,Achim Schilling,Paul Stoewer,Andreas Maier,Patrick Krauss
title: Word class representations spontaneously emerge in a deep neural network trained on next word prediction
title_zh: 词类表示自发地出现在接受下一个词预测训练的深度神经网络中
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.06755
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2301.06755
abstract: How do humans learn language, and can the first language be learned at all? These fundamental questions are still hotly debated. In contemporary linguistics, there are two major schools of thought that give completely opposite answers. According to Chomsky's theory of universal grammar, language cannot be learned because children are not exposed to sufficient data in their linguistic environment. In contrast, usage-based models of language assume a profound relationship between language structure and language use. In particular, contextual mental processing and mental representations are assumed to have the cognitive capacity to capture the complexity of actual language use at all levels. The prime example is syntax, i.e., the rules by which words are assembled into larger units such as sentences. Typically, syntactic rules are expressed as sequences of word classes. However, it remains unclear whether word classes are innate, as implied by universal grammar, or whether they emerge during language acquisition, as suggested by usage-based approaches. Here, we address this issue from a machine learning and natural language processing perspective. In particular, we trained an artificial deep neural network on predicting the next word, provided sequences of consecutive words as input. Subsequently, we analyzed the emerging activation patterns in the hidden layers of the neural network. Strikingly, we find that the internal representations of nine-word input sequences cluster according to the word class of the tenth word to be predicted as output, even though the neural network did not receive any explicit information about syntactic rules or word classes during training. This surprising result suggests, that also in the human brain, abstract representational categories such as word classes may naturally emerge as a consequence of predictive coding and processing during language acquisition.

In contemporary linguistics, there are two major schools of thought that give completely opposite answers. According to Chomsky's theory of universal grammar, language cannot be learned because children are not exposed to sufficient data in their linguistic environment. In contrast, usage-based models of language assume a profound relationship between language structure and language use. In particular, contextual mental processing and mental representations are assumed to have the cognitive capacity to capture the complexity of actual language use at all levels. The prime example is syntax, i.e., the rules by which words are assembled into larger units such as sentences. Typically, syntactic rules are expressed as sequences of word classes. However, it remains unclear whether word classes are innate, as implied by universal grammar, or whether they emerge during language acquisition, as suggested by usage-based approaches. Here, we address this issue from a machine learning and natural language processing perspective. In particular, we trained an artificial deep neural network on predicting the next word, provided sequences of consecutive words as input. Subsequently, we analyzed the emerging activation patterns in the hidden layers of the neural network. Strikingly, we find that the internal representations of nine-word input sequences cluster according to the word class of the tenth word to be predicted as output, even though the neural network did not receive any explicit information about syntactic rules or word classes during training. This surprising result suggests, that also in the human brain, abstract representational categories such as word classes may naturally emerge as a consequence of predictive coding and processing during language acquisition.
abstract_zh: 人类如何学习语言？第一语言是否可以学习？这些基本问题仍然存在激烈争论。在当代语言学中，有两大学派给出了完全相反的答案。根据乔姆斯基的普遍语法理论，儿童无法学习语言是因为儿童在语言环境中没有接触到足够的数据。相比之下，基于使用的语言模型假设语言结构和语言使用之间存在深刻的关系。特别是，情境心理处理和心理表征被认为具有捕捉各个级别实际语言使用的复杂性的认知能力。主要的例子是语法，即将单词组装成更大的单元（例如句子）的规则。通常，句法规则表示为词类序列。然而，目前尚不清楚词类是否是天生的（如通用语法所暗示的），或者它们是否是在语言习得过程中出现的（如基于使用的方法所暗示的）。在这里，我们从机器学习和自然语言处理的角度来解决这个问题。特别是，我们训练了一个人工深度神经网络来预测下一个单词，并提供连续单词序列作为输入。随后，我们分析了神经网络隐藏层中出现的激活模式。引人注目的是，我们发现九个单词输入序列的内部表示根据要预测为输出的第十个单词的词类进行聚类，即使神经网络在训练期间没有接收到有关句法规则或词类的任何显式信息。这一令人惊讶的结果表明，在人脑中，诸如词类之类的抽象表征类别也可能作为语言习得过程中预测编码和处理的结果而自然出现。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过训练深度神经网络进行下文预测，研究词性分类是否能在无显式语法信息的情况下自发形成。
AI.motivation: 探讨人类语言学习中词性分类是先天存在还是后天习得，并通过机器学习模型模拟语言习得过程以验证两种语言学理论。
AI.method: 使用深度神经网络对连续词序列进行下文预测训练，分析隐藏层激活模式是否能根据预测目标词的词性形成聚类。
AI.result: 神经网络隐藏层在未接收任何句法或词性信息的情况下，其内部表征根据预测目标词的词性自然形成聚类。
AI.conclusion: 预测编码机制可能使抽象表征如词性分类在语言习得过程中自发产生，支持基于使用语言学的观点。

authors_text: Dong Yang,Mingle Liu,Muyong Cao
title: Fast and Blind Speech Copy-Move Detection and Localization in Noise
title_zh: 噪声中的快速盲语音复制移动检测和定位
abstract: Copy-move forgery on speech (CMF), coupled with post-processing techniques, presents a great challenge to the forensic detection and localization of tampered areas. Most of the existing CMF detection approaches necessitate pre-segmentation of speech to facilitate similarity calculations among these segments. However, these approaches usually suffer from the problems of uncontrollable computational complexity and sensitivity to the presence of a word that is read multiple times within a speech recording. To address these issues, we propose a local feature tensors-based CMF detection algorithm that can transform duplicate detection and localization problems into a special tensor-matching procedure, accompanied by complete theoretical analysis as support. Through extensive experimentation, we have demonstrated that our method exhibits computational efficiency and robustness against post-processing techniques. Notably, it can effectively and blindly detect tampered segments, even those as short as a fractional second. These advantages highlight the promising potential of our approach for practical applications.
summary: Copy-move forgery on speech (CMF), coupled with post-processing techniques, presents a great challenge to the forensic detection and localization of tampered areas. Most of the existing CMF detection approaches necessitate pre-segmentation of speech to facilitate similarity calculations among these segments. However, these approaches usually suffer from the problems of uncontrollable computational complexity and sensitivity to the presence of a word that is read multiple times within a speech recording. To address these issues, we propose a local feature tensors-based CMF detection algorithm that can transform duplicate detection and localization problems into a special tensor-matching procedure, accompanied by complete theoretical analysis as support. Through extensive experimentation, we have demonstrated that our method exhibits computational efficiency and robustness against post-processing techniques. Notably, it can effectively and blindly detect tampered segments, even those as short as a fractional second. These advantages highlight the promising potential of our approach for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 语音复制移动伪造（CMF）与后处理技术相结合，对篡改区域的取证检测和定位提出了巨大的挑战。大多数现有的 CMF 检测方法都需要对语音进行预分割，以促进这些片段之间的相似性计算。然而，这些方法通常面临计算复杂性不可控以及对语音记录中多次读取的单词的存在敏感的问题。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于局部特征张量的 CMF 检测算法，可以将重复检测和定位问题转化为特殊的张量匹配过程，并有完整的理论分析作为支持。通过广泛的实验，我们证明了我们的方法对后处理技术表现出计算效率和鲁棒性。值得注意的是，它可以有效地、盲目地检测被篡改的片段，甚至是短至零点几秒的片段。这些优势凸显了我们的方法在实际应用中的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在噪声环境下快速且无需预分割的语音复制-移动篡改检测与定位方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语音复制-移动伪造检测方法依赖预分割，存在计算复杂度不可控及对重复语音敏感的问题。
AI.method: 基于局部特征张量构建特殊张量匹配机制，并提供完整理论分析支持。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法计算高效，对后处理技术具有鲁棒性，可检测短至分数秒的篡改片段。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在实际应用中展现出处理语音篡改检测的显著潜力。

authors_text: Weicheng Zhang,Hao Cheng,Fatema T. Johora,Monika Sester
title: ForceFormer: Exploring Social Force and Transformer for Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction
title_zh: ForceFormer：探索行人轨迹预测的社会力和 Transformer
abstract: Predicting trajectories of pedestrians based on goal information in highly interactive scenes is a crucial step toward Intelligent Transportation Systems and Autonomous Driving. The challenges of this task come from two key sources: (1) complex social interactions in high pedestrian density scenarios and (2) limited utilization of goal information to effectively associate with past motion information. To address these difficulties, we integrate social forces into a Transformer-based stochastic generative model backbone and propose a new goal-based trajectory predictor called ForceFormer. Differentiating from most prior works that simply use the destination position as an input feature, we leverage the driving force from the destination to efficiently simulate the guidance of a target on a pedestrian. Additionally, repulsive forces are used as another input feature to describe the avoidance action among neighboring pedestrians. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves on-par performance measured by distance errors with the state-of-the-art models but evidently decreases collisions, especially in dense pedestrian scenarios on widely used pedestrian datasets.
summary: Predicting trajectories of pedestrians based on goal information in highly interactive scenes is a crucial step toward Intelligent Transportation Systems and Autonomous Driving. The challenges of this task come from two key sources: (1) complex social interactions in high pedestrian density scenarios and (2) limited utilization of goal information to effectively associate with past motion information. To address these difficulties, we integrate social forces into a Transformer-based stochastic generative model backbone and propose a new goal-based trajectory predictor called ForceFormer. Differentiating from most prior works that simply use the destination position as an input feature, we leverage the driving force from the destination to efficiently simulate the guidance of a target on a pedestrian. Additionally, repulsive forces are used as another input feature to describe the avoidance action among neighboring pedestrians. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves on-par performance measured by distance errors with the state-of-the-art models but evidently decreases collisions, especially in dense pedestrian scenarios on widely used pedestrian datasets.
abstract_zh: 在高度交互的场景中根据目标信息预测行人的轨迹是迈向智能交通系统和自动驾驶的关键一步。这项任务的挑战来自两个关键来源：（1）行人密度高的场景中复杂的社交互动；（2）目标信息的利用有限，无法有效地与过去的运动信息相关联。为了解决这些困难，我们将社会力量整合到基于 Transformer 的随机生成模型主干中，并提出了一种新的基于目标的轨迹预测器，称为 ForceFormer。与大多数简单地使用目的地位置作为输入特征的先前工作不同，我们利用目的地的驱动力来有效地模拟目标对行人的引导。此外，排斥力被用作另一个输入特征来描述相邻行人之间的回避动作。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法实现了与最先进模型的距离误差衡量的同等性能，但明显减少了碰撞，特别是在广泛使用的行人数据集上的密集行人场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合社会力模型与Transformer架构的行人轨迹预测方法ForceFormer，通过有效利用目标信息和社交交互力提升预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高密度场景中难以准确建模复杂社交交互，且未能充分挖掘目标信息对行人运动的引导作用，导致预测结果碰撞风险较高。
AI.method: 将社会力理论融入Transformer生成模型，以目标驱动力作为关键输入特征模拟行人目标导向行为，同时引入排斥力表征邻近行人避让交互。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上达到与最先进模型相当的距离误差指标，同时显著降低密集场景下的碰撞率，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: ForceFormer通过物理社会力与深度学习的有机结合，在保持预测精度的同时有效提升了行人轨迹预测的安全性，为复杂场景下的自动驾驶提供了新思路。

search_text: ForceFormer: Exploring Social Force and Transformer for Pedestrian Trajectory Prediction ForceFormer：探索行人轨迹预测的社会力和 Transformer Predicting trajectories of pedestrians based on goal information in highly interactive scenes is a crucial step toward Intelligent Transportation Systems and Autonomous Driving. The challenges of this task come from two key sources: (1) complex social interactions in high pedestrian density scenarios and (2) limited utilization of goal information to effectively associate with past motion information. To address these difficulties, we integrate social forces into a Transformer-based stochastic generative model backbone and propose a new goal-based trajectory predictor called ForceFormer. Differentiating from most prior works that simply use the destination position as an input feature, we leverage the driving force from the destination to efficiently simulate the guidance of a target on a pedestrian. Additionally, repulsive forces are used as another input feature to describe the avoidance action among neighboring pedestrians. Extensive experiments show that our proposed method achieves on-par performance measured by distance errors with the state-of-the-art models but evidently decreases collisions, especially in dense pedestrian scenarios on widely used pedestrian datasets. 在高度交互的场景中根据目标信息预测行人的轨迹是迈向智能交通系统和自动驾驶的关键一步。这项任务的挑战来自两个关键来源：（1）行人密度高的场景中复杂的社交互动；（2）目标信息的利用有限，无法有效地与过去的运动信息相关联。为了解决这些困难，我们将社会力量整合到基于 Transformer 的随机生成模型主干中，并提出了一种新的基于目标的轨迹预测器，称为 ForceFormer。与大多数简单地使用目的地位置作为输入特征的先前工作不同，我们利用目的地的驱动力来有效地模拟目标对行人的引导。此外，排斥力被用作另一个输入特征来描述相邻行人之间的回避动作。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法实现了与最先进模型的距离误差衡量的同等性能，但明显减少了碰撞，特别是在广泛使用的行人数据集上的密集行人场景中。 本文提出一种结合社会力模型与Transformer架构的行人轨迹预测方法ForceFormer，通过有效利用目标信息和社交交互力提升预测准确性。 Weicheng Zhang,Hao Cheng,Fatema T. Johora,Monika Sester cs.CV,cs.MA,cs.RO

authors_text: Weihang Dai,Xiaomeng Li,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Semi-Supervised Deep Regression with Uncertainty Consistency and Variational Model Ensembling via Bayesian Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过贝叶斯神经网络进行具有不确定性一致性和变分模型集成的半监督深度回归
abstract: Deep regression is an important problem with numerous applications. These range from computer vision tasks such as age estimation from photographs, to medical tasks such as ejection fraction estimation from echocardiograms for disease tracking. Semi-supervised approaches for deep regression are notably under-explored compared to classification and segmentation tasks, however. Unlike classification tasks, which rely on thresholding functions for generating class pseudo-labels, regression tasks use real number target predictions directly as pseudo-labels, making them more sensitive to prediction quality. In this work, we propose a novel approach to semi-supervised regression, namely Uncertainty-Consistent Variational Model Ensembling (UCVME), which improves training by generating high-quality pseudo-labels and uncertainty estimates for heteroscedastic regression. Given that aleatoric uncertainty is only dependent on input data by definition and should be equal for the same inputs, we present a novel uncertainty consistency loss for co-trained models. Our consistency loss significantly improves uncertainty estimates and allows higher quality pseudo-labels to be assigned greater importance under heteroscedastic regression. Furthermore, we introduce a novel variational model ensembling approach to reduce prediction noise and generate more robust pseudo-labels. We analytically show our method generates higher quality targets for unlabeled data and further improves training. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives on different tasks and can be competitive with supervised methods that use full labels. Our code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/UCVME.
summary: Deep regression is an important problem with numerous applications. These range from computer vision tasks such as age estimation from photographs, to medical tasks such as ejection fraction estimation from echocardiograms for disease tracking. Semi-supervised approaches for deep regression are notably under-explored compared to classification and segmentation tasks, however. Unlike classification tasks, which rely on thresholding functions for generating class pseudo-labels, regression tasks use real number target predictions directly as pseudo-labels, making them more sensitive to prediction quality. In this work, we propose a novel approach to semi-supervised regression, namely Uncertainty-Consistent Variational Model Ensembling (UCVME), which improves training by generating high-quality pseudo-labels and uncertainty estimates for heteroscedastic regression. Given that aleatoric uncertainty is only dependent on input data by definition and should be equal for the same inputs, we present a novel uncertainty consistency loss for co-trained models. Our consistency loss significantly improves uncertainty estimates and allows higher quality pseudo-labels to be assigned greater importance under heteroscedastic regression. Furthermore, we introduce a novel variational model ensembling approach to reduce prediction noise and generate more robust pseudo-labels. We analytically show our method generates higher quality targets for unlabeled data and further improves training. Experiments show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives on different tasks and can be competitive with supervised methods that use full labels. Our code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/UCVME.
abstract_zh: 深度回归是众多应用中的一个重要问题。这些范围从计算机视觉任务（例如根据照片估计年龄）到医疗任务（例如根据超声心动图估计射血分数以进行疾病跟踪）。然而，与分类和分割任务相比，深度回归的半监督方法尚未得到充分探索。与依赖阈值函数生成类伪标签的分类任务不同，回归任务直接使用实数目标预测作为伪标签，使得它们对预测质量更加敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种半监督回归的新方法，即不确定性一致变分模型集成（UCVME），它通过为异方差回归生成高质量的伪标签和不确定性估计来改进训练。鉴于任意不确定性仅依赖于定义上的输入数据，并且对于相同的输入应该是相等的，我们为协同训练模型提出了一种新颖的不确定性一致性损失。我们的一致性损失显着改善了不确定性估计，并允许在异方差回归下为更高质量的伪标签分配更大的重要性。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的变分模型集成方法来减少预测噪声并生成更稳健的伪标签。我们分析表明，我们的方法可以为未标记的数据生成更高质量的目标，并进一步改进训练。实验表明，我们的方法在不同任务上优于最先进的替代方法，并且可以与使用完整标签的监督方法竞争。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/xmed-lab/UCVME 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半监督深度回归方法，通过不确定性一致性与变分模型集成来提升回归任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 与分类任务相比，半监督回归方法研究较少，且回归任务的伪标签对预测质量更敏感，需改进不确定性估计与伪标签生成。
AI.method: 提出不确定性一致性变分模型集成（UCVME）方法，包含不确定性一致性损失函数与变分模型集成策略，以提高伪标签质量并降低预测噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个任务上优于现有半监督方法，且性能可与使用完整标签的监督方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: 通过不确定性一致性与模型集成，本文方法有效提升了半监督回归的伪标签质量与模型鲁棒性。

authors_text: Bowen Xu,Mingtao Chen,Wenlong Guan,Lulu Hu
title: Efficient Teacher: Semi-Supervised Object Detection for YOLOv5
title_zh: 高效老师：YOLOv5 的半监督目标检测
abstract: Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) has been successful in improving the performance of both R-CNN series and anchor-free detectors. However, one-stage anchor-based detectors lack the structure to generate high-quality or flexible pseudo labels, leading to serious inconsistency problems in SSOD. In this paper, we propose the Efficient Teacher framework for scalable and effective one-stage anchor-based SSOD training, consisting of Dense Detector, Pseudo Label Assigner, and Epoch Adaptor. Dense Detector is a baseline model that extends RetinaNet with dense sampling techniques inspired by YOLOv5. The Efficient Teacher framework introduces a novel pseudo label assignment mechanism, named Pseudo Label Assigner, which makes more refined use of pseudo labels from Dense Detector. Epoch Adaptor is a method that enables a stable and efficient end-to-end semi-supervised training schedule for Dense Detector. The Pseudo Label Assigner prevents the occurrence of bias caused by a large number of low-quality pseudo labels that may interfere with the Dense Detector during the student-teacher mutual learning mechanism, and the Epoch Adaptor utilizes domain and distribution adaptation to allow Dense Detector to learn globally distributed consistent features, making the training independent of the proportion of labeled data. Our experiments show that the Efficient Teacher framework achieves state-of-the-art results on VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional using fewer FLOPs than previous methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to apply Semi-Supervised Object Detection to YOLOv5.Code is available: https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/efficientteacher
summary: Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) has been successful in improving the performance of both R-CNN series and anchor-free detectors. However, one-stage anchor-based detectors lack the structure to generate high-quality or flexible pseudo labels, leading to serious inconsistency problems in SSOD. In this paper, we propose the Efficient Teacher framework for scalable and effective one-stage anchor-based SSOD training, consisting of Dense Detector, Pseudo Label Assigner, and Epoch Adaptor. Dense Detector is a baseline model that extends RetinaNet with dense sampling techniques inspired by YOLOv5. The Efficient Teacher framework introduces a novel pseudo label assignment mechanism, named Pseudo Label Assigner, which makes more refined use of pseudo labels from Dense Detector. Epoch Adaptor is a method that enables a stable and efficient end-to-end semi-supervised training schedule for Dense Detector. The Pseudo Label Assigner prevents the occurrence of bias caused by a large number of low-quality pseudo labels that may interfere with the Dense Detector during the student-teacher mutual learning mechanism, and the Epoch Adaptor utilizes domain and distribution adaptation to allow Dense Detector to learn globally distributed consistent features, making the training independent of the proportion of labeled data. Our experiments show that the Efficient Teacher framework achieves state-of-the-art results on VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional using fewer FLOPs than previous methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to apply Semi-Supervised Object Detection to YOLOv5.Code is available: https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/efficientteacher
abstract_zh: 半监督目标检测 (SSOD) 已成功提高 R-CNN 系列和无锚检测器的性能。然而，单级基于锚的检测器缺乏生成高质量或灵活的伪标签的结构，导致 SSOD 中出现严重的不一致问题。在本文中，我们提出了高效教师框架，用于可扩展且有效的一阶段基于锚的 SSOD 训练，由密集检测器、伪标签分配器和纪元适配器组成。 Dense Detector 是一个基线模型，它通过受 YOLOv5 启发的密集采样技术扩展了 RetinaNet。 Efficient Teacher框架引入了一种新颖的伪标签分配机制，称为伪标签分配器，它可以更精细地使用来自密集检测器的伪标签。 Epoch Adapter 是一种为密集检测器提供稳定高效的端到端半监督训练计划的方法。伪标签分配器防止在师生互学机制中出现大量低质量伪标签可能干扰 Dense Detector 的偏差的出现，Epoch Adapter 利用域和分布自适应让 Dense Detector 学习全局分布的一致特征，使训练与标记数据的比例无关。我们的实验表明，高效教师框架使用比以前的方法更少的失败次数在 VOC、COCO 标准和 COCO 附加方面取得了最先进的结果。据我们所知，这是将半监督目标检测应用于 YOLOv5 的首次尝试。代码如下：https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/efficientteacher

AI.tldr: 本文提出Efficient Teacher框架，将半监督目标检测应用于YOLOv5，解决其伪标签不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在基于锚点的一阶段检测器（如YOLOv5）中因伪标签质量差导致性能不一致，缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 框架包含三个模块：基于RetinaNet改进的Dense Detector、过滤低质量伪标签的Pseudo Label Assigner，以及通过领域自适应调整训练阶段的Epoch Adaptor。
AI.result: 在VOC、COCO-standard和COCO-additional数据集上达到SOTA性能，且计算量（FLOPs）低于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Efficient Teacher通过优化伪标签机制和训练策略，首次实现YOLOv5的高效半监督目标检测，为一阶段检测器提供新思路。

search_text: Efficient Teacher: Semi-Supervised Object Detection for YOLOv5 高效老师：YOLOv5 的半监督目标检测 Semi-Supervised Object Detection (SSOD) has been successful in improving the performance of both R-CNN series and anchor-free detectors. However, one-stage anchor-based detectors lack the structure to generate high-quality or flexible pseudo labels, leading to serious inconsistency problems in SSOD. In this paper, we propose the Efficient Teacher framework for scalable and effective one-stage anchor-based SSOD training, consisting of Dense Detector, Pseudo Label Assigner, and Epoch Adaptor. Dense Detector is a baseline model that extends RetinaNet with dense sampling techniques inspired by YOLOv5. The Efficient Teacher framework introduces a novel pseudo label assignment mechanism, named Pseudo Label Assigner, which makes more refined use of pseudo labels from Dense Detector. Epoch Adaptor is a method that enables a stable and efficient end-to-end semi-supervised training schedule for Dense Detector. The Pseudo Label Assigner prevents the occurrence of bias caused by a large number of low-quality pseudo labels that may interfere with the Dense Detector during the student-teacher mutual learning mechanism, and the Epoch Adaptor utilizes domain and distribution adaptation to allow Dense Detector to learn globally distributed consistent features, making the training independent of the proportion of labeled data. Our experiments show that the Efficient Teacher framework achieves state-of-the-art results on VOC, COCO-standard, and COCO-additional using fewer FLOPs than previous methods. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first attempt to apply Semi-Supervised Object Detection to YOLOv5.Code is available: https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/efficientteacher 半监督目标检测 (SSOD) 已成功提高 R-CNN 系列和无锚检测器的性能。然而，单级基于锚的检测器缺乏生成高质量或灵活的伪标签的结构，导致 SSOD 中出现严重的不一致问题。在本文中，我们提出了高效教师框架，用于可扩展且有效的一阶段基于锚的 SSOD 训练，由密集检测器、伪标签分配器和纪元适配器组成。 Dense Detector 是一个基线模型，它通过受 YOLOv5 启发的密集采样技术扩展了 RetinaNet。 Efficient Teacher框架引入了一种新颖的伪标签分配机制，称为伪标签分配器，它可以更精细地使用来自密集检测器的伪标签。 Epoch Adapter 是一种为密集检测器提供稳定高效的端到端半监督训练计划的方法。伪标签分配器防止在师生互学机制中出现大量低质量伪标签可能干扰 Dense Detector 的偏差的出现，Epoch Adapter 利用域和分布自适应让 Dense Detector 学习全局分布的一致特征，使训练与标记数据的比例无关。我们的实验表明，高效教师框架使用比以前的方法更少的失败次数在 VOC、COCO 标准和 COCO 附加方面取得了最先进的结果。据我们所知，这是将半监督目标检测应用于 YOLOv5 的首次尝试。代码如下：https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/efficientteacher 本文提出Efficient Teacher框架，将半监督目标检测应用于YOLOv5，解决其伪标签不一致问题。 Bowen Xu,Mingtao Chen,Wenlong Guan,Lulu Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Savvas Papaioannou,Panayiotis Kolios,Christos G. Panayiotou,Marios M. Polycarpou
title: Cooperative Simultaneous Tracking and Jamming for Disabling a Rogue Drone
title_zh: 用于禁用流氓无人机的协同同步跟踪和干扰
comment: 2020 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: 2020 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: This work investigates the problem of simultaneous tracking and jamming of a rogue drone in 3D space with a team of cooperative unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). We propose a decentralized estimation, decision and control framework in which a team of UAVs cooperate in order to a) optimally choose their mobility control actions that result in accurate target tracking and b) select the desired transmit power levels which cause uninterrupted radio jamming and thus ultimately disrupt the operation of the rogue drone. The proposed decision and control framework allows the UAVs to reconfigure themselves in 3D space such that the cooperative simultaneous tracking and jamming (CSTJ) objective is achieved; while at the same time ensures that the unwanted inter-UAV jamming interference caused during CSTJ is kept below a specified critical threshold. Finally, we formulate this problem under challenging conditions i.e., uncertain dynamics, noisy measurements and false alarms. Extensive simulation experiments illustrate the performance of the proposed approach.
summary: This work investigates the problem of simultaneous tracking and jamming of a rogue drone in 3D space with a team of cooperative unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). We propose a decentralized estimation, decision and control framework in which a team of UAVs cooperate in order to a) optimally choose their mobility control actions that result in accurate target tracking and b) select the desired transmit power levels which cause uninterrupted radio jamming and thus ultimately disrupt the operation of the rogue drone. The proposed decision and control framework allows the UAVs to reconfigure themselves in 3D space such that the cooperative simultaneous tracking and jamming (CSTJ) objective is achieved; while at the same time ensures that the unwanted inter-UAV jamming interference caused during CSTJ is kept below a specified critical threshold. Finally, we formulate this problem under challenging conditions i.e., uncertain dynamics, noisy measurements and false alarms. Extensive simulation experiments illustrate the performance of the proposed approach.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了在 3D 空间中与协作无人机 (UAV) 团队同时跟踪和干扰流氓无人机的问题。我们提出了一个分散的估计、决策和控制框架，其中无人机团队合作，以便a）最佳地选择其移动控制动作，从而实现准确的目标跟踪；b）选择所需的发射功率水平，从而导致不间断的无线电干扰，从而最终扰乱流氓无人机的运行。所提出的决策和控制框架允许无人机在 3D 空间中重新配置自身，从而实现协同同步跟踪和干扰（CSTJ）目标；同时确保 CSTJ 期间造成的无人机间干扰保持在指定的临界阈值以下。最后，我们在具有挑战性的条件下提出这个问题，即不确定的动态、噪声测量和误报。大量的模拟实验说明了所提出方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种协作式同时跟踪与干扰方法，利用无人机团队在三维空间中精确追踪并干扰恶意无人机，以实现有效禁用。
AI.motivation: 随着无人机技术的普及，恶意无人机可能对公共安全构成威胁，现有方法难以有效追踪并干扰其操作，亟需一种协同策略以应对复杂环境下的动态挑战。
AI.method: 论文提出了一种去中心化的估计、决策与控制框架，通过协调无人机的移动策略和动态调整发射功率，实现精准跟踪与持续干扰，同时抑制无人机间的相互干扰。
AI.result: 仿真实验表明，该方法在不确定动力学、噪声测量及误报等复杂条件下，能有效实现目标跟踪与干扰，确保系统稳定运行。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为应对恶意无人机威胁提供了有效的协同控制策略，验证了在复杂环境下同时实现跟踪与干扰的可行性，为无人机防御技术的发展提供了新思路。

authors_text: Antonio Giganti,Sara Mandelli,Paolo Bestagini,Marco Marcon,Stefano Tubaro
title: Super-Resolution of BVOC Maps by Adapting Deep Learning Methods
title_zh: 采用深度学习方法实现 BVOC 地图的超分辨率
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, accepted at IEEE-ICIP 2023
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, accepted at IEEE-ICIP 2023
abstract: Biogenic Volatile Organic Compounds (BVOCs) play a critical role in biosphere-atmosphere interactions, being a key factor in the physical and chemical properties of the atmosphere and climate. Acquiring large and fine-grained BVOC emission maps is expensive and time-consuming, so most available BVOC data are obtained on a loose and sparse sampling grid or on small regions. However, high-resolution BVOC data are desirable in many applications, such as air quality, atmospheric chemistry, and climate monitoring. In this work, we investigate the possibility of enhancing BVOC acquisitions, further explaining the relationships between the environment and these compounds. We do so by comparing the performances of several state-of-the-art neural networks proposed for image Super-Resolution (SR), adapting them to overcome the challenges posed by the large dynamic range of the emission and reduce the impact of outliers in the prediction. Moreover, we also consider realistic scenarios, considering both temporal and geographical constraints. Finally, we present possible future developments regarding SR generalization, considering the scale-invariance property and super-resolving emissions from unseen compounds.
summary: Biogenic Volatile Organic Compounds (BVOCs) play a critical role in biosphere-atmosphere interactions, being a key factor in the physical and chemical properties of the atmosphere and climate. Acquiring large and fine-grained BVOC emission maps is expensive and time-consuming, so most available BVOC data are obtained on a loose and sparse sampling grid or on small regions. However, high-resolution BVOC data are desirable in many applications, such as air quality, atmospheric chemistry, and climate monitoring. In this work, we investigate the possibility of enhancing BVOC acquisitions, further explaining the relationships between the environment and these compounds. We do so by comparing the performances of several state-of-the-art neural networks proposed for image Super-Resolution (SR), adapting them to overcome the challenges posed by the large dynamic range of the emission and reduce the impact of outliers in the prediction. Moreover, we also consider realistic scenarios, considering both temporal and geographical constraints. Finally, we present possible future developments regarding SR generalization, considering the scale-invariance property and super-resolving emissions from unseen compounds.
abstract_zh: 生物挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）在生物圈-大气相互作用中发挥着关键作用，是大气和气候物理和化学特性的关键因素。获取大型且细粒度的 BVOC 排放图既昂贵又耗时，因此大多数可用的 BVOC 数据都是在松散且稀疏的采样网格或小区域上获得的。然而，高分辨率 BVOC 数据在许多应用中都是理想的，例如空气质量、大气化学和气候监测。在这项工作中，我们研究了增强 BVOC 获取的可能性，进一步解释了环境与这些化合物之间的关系。我们通过比较几种最先进的图像超分辨率（SR）神经网络的性能来做到这一点，调整它们以克服大动态范围发射带来的挑战，并减少预测中异常值的影响。此外，我们还考虑现实场景，考虑时间和地理限制。最后，考虑到尺度不变性和来自不可见化合物的超分辨发射，我们提出了 SR 泛化的未来可能的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文通过改进深度学习方法，提升生物源挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）地图的超分辨率。
AI.motivation: 现有BVOC数据获取成本高且分辨率低，难以满足空气质量、大气化学和气候监测等应用需求，需通过超分辨率技术提升数据精度。
AI.method: 对比多种图像超分辨率神经网络，调整模型以适应BVOC排放的动态范围和异常值问题，并考虑时空约束的现实场景。
AI.result: 成功验证了深度学习方法在BVOC地图超分辨率中的有效性，降低了异常值影响并提升了预测精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高分辨率BVOC数据获取提供了可行方案，未来需进一步研究模型的尺度不变性及对未知化合物的扩展能力。

search_text: Super-Resolution of BVOC Maps by Adapting Deep Learning Methods 采用深度学习方法实现 BVOC 地图的超分辨率 Biogenic Volatile Organic Compounds (BVOCs) play a critical role in biosphere-atmosphere interactions, being a key factor in the physical and chemical properties of the atmosphere and climate. Acquiring large and fine-grained BVOC emission maps is expensive and time-consuming, so most available BVOC data are obtained on a loose and sparse sampling grid or on small regions. However, high-resolution BVOC data are desirable in many applications, such as air quality, atmospheric chemistry, and climate monitoring. In this work, we investigate the possibility of enhancing BVOC acquisitions, further explaining the relationships between the environment and these compounds. We do so by comparing the performances of several state-of-the-art neural networks proposed for image Super-Resolution (SR), adapting them to overcome the challenges posed by the large dynamic range of the emission and reduce the impact of outliers in the prediction. Moreover, we also consider realistic scenarios, considering both temporal and geographical constraints. Finally, we present possible future developments regarding SR generalization, considering the scale-invariance property and super-resolving emissions from unseen compounds. 生物挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）在生物圈-大气相互作用中发挥着关键作用，是大气和气候物理和化学特性的关键因素。获取大型且细粒度的 BVOC 排放图既昂贵又耗时，因此大多数可用的 BVOC 数据都是在松散且稀疏的采样网格或小区域上获得的。然而，高分辨率 BVOC 数据在许多应用中都是理想的，例如空气质量、大气化学和气候监测。在这项工作中，我们研究了增强 BVOC 获取的可能性，进一步解释了环境与这些化合物之间的关系。我们通过比较几种最先进的图像超分辨率（SR）神经网络的性能来做到这一点，调整它们以克服大动态范围发射带来的挑战，并减少预测中异常值的影响。此外，我们还考虑现实场景，考虑时间和地理限制。最后，考虑到尺度不变性和来自不可见化合物的超分辨发射，我们提出了 SR 泛化的未来可能的发展。 本文通过改进深度学习方法，提升生物源挥发性有机化合物（BVOC）地图的超分辨率。 Antonio Giganti,Sara Mandelli,Paolo Bestagini,Marco Marcon,Stefano Tubaro eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Félix Michaud,Jérôme Sueur,Maxime Le Cesne,Sylvain Haupert
title: Unsupervised classification to improve the quality of a bird song recording dataset
title_zh: 无监督分类可提高鸟鸣记录数据集的质量
abstract: Open audio databases such as Xeno-Canto are widely used to build datasets to explore bird song repertoire or to train models for automatic bird sound classification by deep learning algorithms. However, such databases suffer from the fact that bird sounds are weakly labelled: a species name is attributed to each audio recording without timestamps that provide the temporal localization of the bird song of interest. Manual annotations can solve this issue, but they are time consuming, expert-dependent, and cannot run on large datasets. Another solution consists in using a labelling function that automatically segments audio recordings before assigning a label to each segmented audio sample. Although labelling functions were introduced to expedite strong label assignment, their classification performance remains mostly unknown. To address this issue and reduce label noise (wrong label assignment) in large bird song datasets, we introduce a data-centric novel labelling function composed of three successive steps: 1) time-frequency sound unit segmentation, 2) feature computation for each sound unit, and 3) classification of each sound unit as bird song or noise with either an unsupervised DBSCAN algorithm or the supervised BirdNET neural network. The labelling function was optimized, validated, and tested on the songs of 44 West-Palearctic common bird species. We first showed that the segmentation of bird songs alone aggregated from 10% to 83% of label noise depending on the species. We also demonstrated that our labelling function was able to significantly reduce the initial label noise present in the dataset by up to a factor of three. Finally, we discuss different opportunities to design suitable labelling functions to build high-quality animal vocalizations with minimum expert annotation effort.
summary: Open audio databases such as Xeno-Canto are widely used to build datasets to explore bird song repertoire or to train models for automatic bird sound classification by deep learning algorithms. However, such databases suffer from the fact that bird sounds are weakly labelled: a species name is attributed to each audio recording without timestamps that provide the temporal localization of the bird song of interest. Manual annotations can solve this issue, but they are time consuming, expert-dependent, and cannot run on large datasets. Another solution consists in using a labelling function that automatically segments audio recordings before assigning a label to each segmented audio sample. Although labelling functions were introduced to expedite strong label assignment, their classification performance remains mostly unknown. To address this issue and reduce label noise (wrong label assignment) in large bird song datasets, we introduce a data-centric novel labelling function composed of three successive steps: 1) time-frequency sound unit segmentation, 2) feature computation for each sound unit, and 3) classification of each sound unit as bird song or noise with either an unsupervised DBSCAN algorithm or the supervised BirdNET neural network. The labelling function was optimized, validated, and tested on the songs of 44 West-Palearctic common bird species. We first showed that the segmentation of bird songs alone aggregated from 10% to 83% of label noise depending on the species. We also demonstrated that our labelling function was able to significantly reduce the initial label noise present in the dataset by up to a factor of three. Finally, we discuss different opportunities to design suitable labelling functions to build high-quality animal vocalizations with minimum expert annotation effort.
abstract_zh: Xeno-Canto 等开放音频数据库广泛用于构建数据集来探索鸟鸣曲目或通过深度学习算法训练自动鸟声分类模型。然而，此类数据库面临的问题是鸟类声音的标签很弱：每个音频记录都会有一个物种名称，但没有时间戳来提供感兴趣的鸟鸣声的时间定位。手动注释可以解决这个问题，但它们非常耗时、依赖专家，并且无法在大型数据集上运行。另一个解决方案包括使用标签功能，该功能在为每个分段的音频样本分配标签之前自动对音频录音进行分段。尽管引入标签函数是为了加速强大的标签分配，但它们的分类性能仍然大多未知。为了解决这个问题并减少大型鸟鸣数据集中的标签噪声（错误的标签分配），我们引入了一种以数据为中心的新颖标签函数，该函数由三个连续步骤组成：1）时频声音单元分割，2）每个声音单元的特征计算，3）使用无监督的 DBSCAN 算法或有监督的 BirdNET 神经网络将每个声音单元分类为鸟鸣或噪声。对 44 种西古北区常见鸟类的鸣叫声进行了优化、验证和测试。我们首先表明，根据物种的不同，仅鸟鸣的分割就聚合了 10% 到 83% 的标签噪声。我们还证明，我们的标签函数能够将数据集中存在的初始标签噪声显着降低多达三倍。最后，我们讨论了设计合适的标记功能的不同机会，以最少的专家注释工作构建高质量的动物发声。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督分类方法，通过改进标注函数减少鸟类鸣叫数据集中的标签噪声。
AI.motivation: 现有鸟类鸣叫数据集存在标签弱标注问题，手动标注效率低且依赖专家，而现有自动标注方法的分类性能尚不明确。
AI.method: 设计三步骤标注函数：时频声学单元分割、特征计算、使用DBSCAN或BirdNET对声学单元进行鸟类鸣叫/噪声分类。
AI.result: 分割步骤可减少10%-83%的标签噪声，标注函数使数据集噪声降低达3倍，验证了44种西欧常见鸟类的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过无监督分类显著降低数据集噪声，为构建高质量动物声学数据集提供了低专家依赖的解决方案。

authors_text: Jingjing Fu,Shuheng Liu,Siqi Du,Siqiao Ruan,Xuliang Guo,Weiwei Pan,Abhishek Sharma,Stefan Konigorski
title: Multimodal N-of-1 trials: A Novel Personalized Healthcare Design
title_zh: 多模式 N-of-1 试验：一种新颖的个性化医疗设计
abstract: N-of-1 trials aim to estimate treatment effects on the individual level and can be applied to personalize a wide range of physical and digital interventions in mHealth. In this study, we propose and apply a framework for multimodal N-of-1 trials in order to allow the inclusion of health outcomes assessed through images, audio or videos. We illustrate the framework in a series of N-of-1 trials that investigate the effect of acne creams on acne severity assessed through pictures. For the analysis, we compare an expert-based manual labelling approach with different deep learning-based pipelines where in a first step, we train and fine-tune convolutional neural networks (CNN) on the images. Then, we use a linear mixed model on the scores obtained in the first step in order to test the effectiveness of the treatment. The results show that the CNN-based test on the images provides a similar conclusion as tests based on manual expert ratings of the images, and identifies a treatment effect in one individual. This illustrates that multimodal N-of-1 trials can provide a powerful way to identify individual treatment effects and can enable large-scale studies of a large variety of health outcomes that can be actively and passively assessed using technological advances in order to personalized health interventions.
summary: N-of-1 trials aim to estimate treatment effects on the individual level and can be applied to personalize a wide range of physical and digital interventions in mHealth. In this study, we propose and apply a framework for multimodal N-of-1 trials in order to allow the inclusion of health outcomes assessed through images, audio or videos. We illustrate the framework in a series of N-of-1 trials that investigate the effect of acne creams on acne severity assessed through pictures. For the analysis, we compare an expert-based manual labelling approach with different deep learning-based pipelines where in a first step, we train and fine-tune convolutional neural networks (CNN) on the images. Then, we use a linear mixed model on the scores obtained in the first step in order to test the effectiveness of the treatment. The results show that the CNN-based test on the images provides a similar conclusion as tests based on manual expert ratings of the images, and identifies a treatment effect in one individual. This illustrates that multimodal N-of-1 trials can provide a powerful way to identify individual treatment effects and can enable large-scale studies of a large variety of health outcomes that can be actively and passively assessed using technological advances in order to personalized health interventions.
abstract_zh: N-of-1 试验旨在评估个体水平的治疗效果，并可用于个性化移动医疗领域的各种物理和数字干预措施。在本研究中，我们提出并应用了多模式 N-of-1 试验框架，以便纳入通过图像、音频或视频评估的健康结果。我们通过一系列 N-of-1 试验来说明该框架，这些试验研究了痤疮膏对通过图片评估的痤疮严重程度的影响。为了进行分析，我们将基于专家的手动标记方法与不同的基于深度学习的管道进行比较，第一步，我们在图像上训练和微调卷积神经网络 (CNN)。然后，我们对第一步获得的分数使用线性混合模型，以测试治疗的有效性。结果表明，基于 CNN 的图像测试提供了与基于图像专家手动评分的测试类似的结论，并确定了个体的治疗效果。这说明多模式 N-of-1 试验可以提供一种强大的方法来识别个体治疗效果，并可以实现对各种健康结果的大规模研究，这些结果可以利用技术进步进行主动和被动评估，以便进行个性化的健康干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于个性化医疗的多模态N-of-1试验框架，用于评估个体对治疗的反应。
AI.motivation: N-of-1试验可以用于评估个体对治疗的反应，但传统方法难以处理多模态数据，如图像、音频或视频。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多模态N-of-1试验框架，通过训练和微调卷积神经网络（CNN）来处理图像数据，并使用线性混合模型分析结果。
AI.result: 基于CNN的测试结果与专家手动评分结果相似，并识别出个体对治疗的反应。
AI.conclusion: 多模态N-of-1试验可以有效识别个体治疗效果，为大规模个性化健康干预提供支持。

motivation: N-of-1试验可以用于评估个体对治疗的反应，但传统方法难以处理多模态数据，如图像、音频或视频。
method: 本文提出了一种多模态N-of-1试验框架，通过训练和微调卷积神经网络（CNN）来处理图像数据，并使用线性混合模型分析结果。

search_text: Multimodal N-of-1 trials: A Novel Personalized Healthcare Design 多模式 N-of-1 试验：一种新颖的个性化医疗设计 N-of-1 trials aim to estimate treatment effects on the individual level and can be applied to personalize a wide range of physical and digital interventions in mHealth. In this study, we propose and apply a framework for multimodal N-of-1 trials in order to allow the inclusion of health outcomes assessed through images, audio or videos. We illustrate the framework in a series of N-of-1 trials that investigate the effect of acne creams on acne severity assessed through pictures. For the analysis, we compare an expert-based manual labelling approach with different deep learning-based pipelines where in a first step, we train and fine-tune convolutional neural networks (CNN) on the images. Then, we use a linear mixed model on the scores obtained in the first step in order to test the effectiveness of the treatment. The results show that the CNN-based test on the images provides a similar conclusion as tests based on manual expert ratings of the images, and identifies a treatment effect in one individual. This illustrates that multimodal N-of-1 trials can provide a powerful way to identify individual treatment effects and can enable large-scale studies of a large variety of health outcomes that can be actively and passively assessed using technological advances in order to personalized health interventions. N-of-1 试验旨在评估个体水平的治疗效果，并可用于个性化移动医疗领域的各种物理和数字干预措施。在本研究中，我们提出并应用了多模式 N-of-1 试验框架，以便纳入通过图像、音频或视频评估的健康结果。我们通过一系列 N-of-1 试验来说明该框架，这些试验研究了痤疮膏对通过图片评估的痤疮严重程度的影响。为了进行分析，我们将基于专家的手动标记方法与不同的基于深度学习的管道进行比较，第一步，我们在图像上训练和微调卷积神经网络 (CNN)。然后，我们对第一步获得的分数使用线性混合模型，以测试治疗的有效性。结果表明，基于 CNN 的图像测试提供了与基于图像专家手动评分的测试类似的结论，并确定了个体的治疗效果。这说明多模式 N-of-1 试验可以提供一种强大的方法来识别个体治疗效果，并可以实现对各种健康结果的大规模研究，这些结果可以利用技术进步进行主动和被动评估，以便进行个性化的健康干预。 本文提出了一种用于个性化医疗的多模态N-of-1试验框架，用于评估个体对治疗的反应。 Jingjing Fu,Shuheng Liu,Siqi Du,Siqiao Ruan,Xuliang Guo,Weiwei Pan,Abhishek Sharma,Stefan Konigorski stat.AP,cs.HC

authors_text: Wenxuan Tu,Bin Xiao,Xinwang Liu,Sihang Zhou,Zhiping Cai,Jieren Cheng
title: Revisiting Initializing Then Refining: An Incomplete and Missing Graph Imputation Network
title_zh: 重新审视初始化然后细化：不完整且缺失的图插补网络
abstract: With the development of various applications, such as social networks and knowledge graphs, graph data has been ubiquitous in the real world. Unfortunately, graphs usually suffer from being absent due to privacy-protecting policies or copyright restrictions during data collection. The absence of graph data can be roughly categorized into attribute-incomplete and attribute-missing circumstances. Specifically, attribute-incomplete indicates that a part of the attribute vectors of all nodes are incomplete, while attribute-missing indicates that the whole attribute vectors of partial nodes are missing. Although many efforts have been devoted, none of them is custom-designed for a common situation where both types of graph data absence exist simultaneously. To fill this gap, we develop a novel network termed Revisiting Initializing Then Refining (RITR), where we complete both attribute-incomplete and attribute-missing samples under the guidance of a novel initializing-then-refining imputation criterion. Specifically, to complete attribute-incomplete samples, we first initialize the incomplete attributes using Gaussian noise before network learning, and then introduce a structure-attribute consistency constraint to refine incomplete values by approximating a structure-attribute correlation matrix to a high-order structural matrix. To complete attribute-missing samples, we first adopt structure embeddings of attribute-missing samples as the embedding initialization, and then refine these initial values by adaptively aggregating the reliable information of attribute-incomplete samples according to a dynamic affinity structure. To the best of our knowledge, this newly designed method is the first unsupervised framework dedicated to handling hybrid-absent graphs. Extensive experiments on four datasets have verified that our methods consistently outperform existing state-of-the-art competitors.

To fill this gap, we develop a novel network termed Revisiting Initializing Then Refining (RITR), where we complete both attribute-incomplete and attribute-missing samples under the guidance of a novel initializing-then-refining imputation criterion. Specifically, to complete attribute-incomplete samples, we first initialize the incomplete attributes using Gaussian noise before network learning, and then introduce a structure-attribute consistency constraint to refine incomplete values by approximating a structure-attribute correlation matrix to a high-order structural matrix. To complete attribute-missing samples, we first adopt structure embeddings of attribute-missing samples as the embedding initialization, and then refine these initial values by adaptively aggregating the reliable information of attribute-incomplete samples according to a dynamic affinity structure. To the best of our knowledge, this newly designed method is the first unsupervised framework dedicated to handling hybrid-absent graphs. Extensive experiments on four datasets have verified that our methods consistently outperform existing state-of-the-art competitors.
abstract_zh: 随着社交网络、知识图谱等各种应用的发展，图数据在现实世界中已经无处不在。不幸的是，由于数据收集过程中的隐私保护政策或版权限制，图表通常会缺失。图数据缺失的情况大致可以分为属性不完整和属性缺失两种情况。具体来说，attribute-incomplete表示所有节点的部分属性向量不完整，attribute-missing表示部分节点的属性向量全部缺失。尽管已经付出了很多努力，但没有一个是针对两种类型的图形数据缺失同时存在的常见情况进行定制设计的。为了填补这一空白，我们开发了一种名为重新访问初始化然后精炼（RITR）的新颖网络，在新颖的初始化然后精炼插补标准的指导下，我们完成了属性不完整和属性缺失的样本。具体来说，为了完成属性不完整样本，我们首先在网络学习之前使用高斯噪声初始化不完整属性，然后引入结构-属性一致性约束，通过将结构-属性相关矩阵近似为高阶结构矩阵来细化不完整值。为了完成属性缺失样本，我们首先采用属性缺失样本的结构嵌入作为嵌入初始化，然后根据动态亲和结构自适应聚合属性不完整样本的可靠信息来细化这些初始值。据我们所知，这种新设计的方法是第一个致力于处理混合缺失图的无监督框架。对四个数据集的广泛实验已经证实，我们的方法始终优于现有的最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 提出一种处理同时存在属性不完整和属性缺失的图数据补全方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法同时处理两种缺失情况，需设计统一框架解决混合缺失问题。
AI.method: 采用初始化-细化策略，结合结构嵌入和动态亲和结构，分别处理两种缺失类型。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上验证，效果优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次提出无监督框架处理混合缺失图数据，填补研究空白。

authors_text: Jiajun Deng,Xurong Xie,Tianzi Wang,Mingyu Cui,Boyang Xue,Zengrui Jin,Guinan Li,Shujie Hu,Xunying Liu
title: Confidence Score Based Speaker Adaptation of Conformer Speech Recognition Systems
title_zh: 符合者语音识别系统的基于置信度得分的说话人适应
comment: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
comments: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
abstract: Speaker adaptation techniques provide a powerful solution to customise automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for individual users. Practical application of unsupervised model-based speaker adaptation techniques to data intensive end-to-end ASR systems is hindered by the scarcity of speaker-level data and performance sensitivity to transcription errors. To address these issues, a set of compact and data efficient speaker-dependent (SD) parameter representations are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training and test-time unsupervised speaker adaptation of state-of-the-art Conformer ASR systems. The sensitivity to supervision quality is reduced using a confidence score-based selection of the less erroneous subset of speaker-level adaptation data. Two lightweight confidence score estimation modules are proposed to produce more reliable confidence scores. The data sparsity issue, which is exacerbated by data selection, is addressed by modelling the SD parameter uncertainty using Bayesian learning. Experiments on the benchmark 300-hour Switchboard and the 233-hour AMI datasets suggest that the proposed confidence score-based adaptation schemes consistently outperformed the baseline speaker-independent (SI) Conformer model and conventional non-Bayesian, point estimate-based adaptation using no speaker data selection. Similar consistent performance improvements were retained after external Transformer and LSTM language model rescoring. In particular, on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus, statistically significant WER reductions of 1.0%, 1.3%, and 1.4% absolute (9.5%, 10.9%, and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline SI Conformer on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively. Similar WER reductions of 2.7% and 3.3% absolute (8.9% and 10.2% relative) were also obtained on the AMI development and evaluation sets.
summary: Speaker adaptation techniques provide a powerful solution to customise automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for individual users. Practical application of unsupervised model-based speaker adaptation techniques to data intensive end-to-end ASR systems is hindered by the scarcity of speaker-level data and performance sensitivity to transcription errors. To address these issues, a set of compact and data efficient speaker-dependent (SD) parameter representations are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training and test-time unsupervised speaker adaptation of state-of-the-art Conformer ASR systems. The sensitivity to supervision quality is reduced using a confidence score-based selection of the less erroneous subset of speaker-level adaptation data. Two lightweight confidence score estimation modules are proposed to produce more reliable confidence scores. The data sparsity issue, which is exacerbated by data selection, is addressed by modelling the SD parameter uncertainty using Bayesian learning. Experiments on the benchmark 300-hour Switchboard and the 233-hour AMI datasets suggest that the proposed confidence score-based adaptation schemes consistently outperformed the baseline speaker-independent (SI) Conformer model and conventional non-Bayesian, point estimate-based adaptation using no speaker data selection. Similar consistent performance improvements were retained after external Transformer and LSTM language model rescoring. In particular, on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus, statistically significant WER reductions of 1.0%, 1.3%, and 1.4% absolute (9.5%, 10.9%, and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline SI Conformer on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively. Similar WER reductions of 2.7% and 3.3% absolute (8.9% and 10.2% relative) were also obtained on the AMI development and evaluation sets.
abstract_zh: 说话人适应技术提供了强大的解决方案，可以为个人用户定制自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统。基于无监督模型的说话人自适应技术在数据密集型端到端 ASR 系统中的实际应用受到说话人级数据的稀缺和对转录错误的性能敏感性的阻碍。为了解决这些问题，使用一组紧凑且数据高效的说话人相关 (SD) 参数表示来促进最先进的 Conformer ASR 系统的说话人自适应训练和测试时无监督说话人自适应。使用基于置信度分数的对说话者级适应数据的错误较少的子集的选择来降低对监督质量的敏感性。提出了两个轻量级置信度得分估计模块来产生更可靠的置信度得分。通过使用贝叶斯学习对 SD 参数不确定性进行建模，可以解决因数据选择而加剧的数据稀疏问题。在基准 300 小时 Switchboard 和 233 小时 AMI 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的基于置信度得分的自适应方案始终优于基线说话者无关 (SI) 一致性模型和传统的非贝叶斯、不使用说话者数据选择的基于点估计的自适应。在外部 Transformer 和 LSTM 语言模型重新评分后，保留了类似的一致性能改进。特别是，在 300 小时的 Switchboard 语料库上，在 NIST Hub5'00、RT02 和 RT03 评估集上，与基线 SI Conformer 相比，分别获得了 1.0%、1.3% 和 1.4% 绝对值（9.5%、10.9% 和 11.3% 相对值）的统计显着 WER 降低。在 AMI 开发和评估集上也获得了类似的 WER 绝对降低 2.7% 和 3.3%（相对 8.9% 和 10.2%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于置信度评分的说话人自适应方法，优化Conformer语音识别系统在数据稀缺和转录错误敏感场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端ASR系统的说话人自适应技术受限于说话人数据稀缺及对转录错误的敏感性，需提升数据利用效率并降低监督质量依赖。
AI.method: 设计紧凑的说话人相关参数表示，结合置信度评分模块筛选高质量数据，并通过贝叶斯学习建模参数不确定性以缓解数据稀疏问题。
AI.result: 在Switchboard和AMI数据集上，相较基线模型实现绝对词错误率（WER）分别降低1.0-1.4%和2.7-3.3%，相对下降达9.5-11.3%和8.9-10.2%。
AI.conclusion: 置信度评分驱动的自适应方法有效提升了Conformer系统的说话人适应能力，且在语言模型重打分后仍保持性能优势。

result: 在Switchboard和AMI数据集上，相较基线模型实现绝对词错误率（WER）分别降低1.0-1.4%和2.7-3.3%，相对下降达9.5-11.3%和8.9-10.2%。
conclusion: 置信度评分驱动的自适应方法有效提升了Conformer系统的说话人适应能力，且在语言模型重打分后仍保持性能优势。
search_text: Confidence Score Based Speaker Adaptation of Conformer Speech Recognition Systems 符合者语音识别系统的基于置信度得分的说话人适应 Speaker adaptation techniques provide a powerful solution to customise automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems for individual users. Practical application of unsupervised model-based speaker adaptation techniques to data intensive end-to-end ASR systems is hindered by the scarcity of speaker-level data and performance sensitivity to transcription errors. To address these issues, a set of compact and data efficient speaker-dependent (SD) parameter representations are used to facilitate both speaker adaptive training and test-time unsupervised speaker adaptation of state-of-the-art Conformer ASR systems. The sensitivity to supervision quality is reduced using a confidence score-based selection of the less erroneous subset of speaker-level adaptation data. Two lightweight confidence score estimation modules are proposed to produce more reliable confidence scores. The data sparsity issue, which is exacerbated by data selection, is addressed by modelling the SD parameter uncertainty using Bayesian learning. Experiments on the benchmark 300-hour Switchboard and the 233-hour AMI datasets suggest that the proposed confidence score-based adaptation schemes consistently outperformed the baseline speaker-independent (SI) Conformer model and conventional non-Bayesian, point estimate-based adaptation using no speaker data selection. Similar consistent performance improvements were retained after external Transformer and LSTM language model rescoring. In particular, on the 300-hour Switchboard corpus, statistically significant WER reductions of 1.0%, 1.3%, and 1.4% absolute (9.5%, 10.9%, and 11.3% relative) were obtained over the baseline SI Conformer on the NIST Hub5'00, RT02, and RT03 evaluation sets respectively. Similar WER reductions of 2.7% and 3.3% absolute (8.9% and 10.2% relative) were also obtained on the AMI development and evaluation sets. 说话人适应技术提供了强大的解决方案，可以为个人用户定制自动语音识别 (ASR) 系统。基于无监督模型的说话人自适应技术在数据密集型端到端 ASR 系统中的实际应用受到说话人级数据的稀缺和对转录错误的性能敏感性的阻碍。为了解决这些问题，使用一组紧凑且数据高效的说话人相关 (SD) 参数表示来促进最先进的 Conformer ASR 系统的说话人自适应训练和测试时无监督说话人自适应。使用基于置信度分数的对说话者级适应数据的错误较少的子集的选择来降低对监督质量的敏感性。提出了两个轻量级置信度得分估计模块来产生更可靠的置信度得分。通过使用贝叶斯学习对 SD 参数不确定性进行建模，可以解决因数据选择而加剧的数据稀疏问题。在基准 300 小时 Switchboard 和 233 小时 AMI 数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的基于置信度得分的自适应方案始终优于基线说话者无关 (SI) 一致性模型和传统的非贝叶斯、不使用说话者数据选择的基于点估计的自适应。在外部 Transformer 和 LSTM 语言模型重新评分后，保留了类似的一致性能改进。特别是，在 300 小时的 Switchboard 语料库上，在 NIST Hub5'00、RT02 和 RT03 评估集上，与基线 SI Conformer 相比，分别获得了 1.0%、1.3% 和 1.4% 绝对值（9.5%、10.9% 和 11.3% 相对值）的统计显着 WER 降低。在 AMI 开发和评估集上也获得了类似的 WER 绝对降低 2.7% 和 3.3%（相对 8.9% 和 10.2%）。 本文提出基于置信度评分的说话人自适应方法，优化Conformer语音识别系统在数据稀缺和转录错误敏感场景下的性能。 Jiajun Deng,Xurong Xie,Tianzi Wang,Mingyu Cui,Boyang Xue,Zengrui Jin,Guinan Li,Shujie Hu,Xunying Liu eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Christian Rack,Konstantin Kobs,Tamara Fernando,Andreas Hotho,Marc Erich Latoschik
title: Versatile User Identification in Extended Reality using Pretrained Similarity-Learning
title_zh: 使用预训练的相似性学习在扩展现实中进行多功能用户识别
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Various machine learning approaches have proven to be useful for user verification and identification based on motion data in eXtended Reality (XR). However, their real-world application still faces significant challenges concerning versatility, i.e., in terms of extensibility and generalization capability. This article presents a solution that is both extensible to new users without expensive retraining, and that generalizes well across different sessions, devices, and user tasks. To this end, we developed a similarity-learning model and pretrained it on the "Who Is Alyx?" dataset. This dataset features a wide array of tasks and hence motions from users playing the VR game "Half-Life: Alyx". In contrast to previous works, we used a dedicated set of users for model validation and final evaluation. Furthermore, we extended this evaluation using an independent dataset that features completely different users, tasks, and three different XR devices. In comparison with a traditional classification-learning baseline, our model shows superior performance, especially in scenarios with limited enrollment data. The pretraining process allows immediate deployment in a diverse range of XR applications while maintaining high versatility. Looking ahead, our approach paves the way for easy integration of pretrained motion-based identification models in production XR systems.
summary: Various machine learning approaches have proven to be useful for user verification and identification based on motion data in eXtended Reality (XR). However, their real-world application still faces significant challenges concerning versatility, i.e., in terms of extensibility and generalization capability. This article presents a solution that is both extensible to new users without expensive retraining, and that generalizes well across different sessions, devices, and user tasks. To this end, we developed a similarity-learning model and pretrained it on the "Who Is Alyx?" dataset. This dataset features a wide array of tasks and hence motions from users playing the VR game "Half-Life: Alyx". In contrast to previous works, we used a dedicated set of users for model validation and final evaluation. Furthermore, we extended this evaluation using an independent dataset that features completely different users, tasks, and three different XR devices. In comparison with a traditional classification-learning baseline, our model shows superior performance, especially in scenarios with limited enrollment data. The pretraining process allows immediate deployment in a diverse range of XR applications while maintaining high versatility. Looking ahead, our approach paves the way for easy integration of pretrained motion-based identification models in production XR systems.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，各种机器学习方法对于基于扩展现实 (XR) 中的运动数据的用户验证和识别非常有用。然而，它们的实际应用仍然面临着多功能性方面的重大挑战，即在可扩展性和泛化能力方面。本文提出的解决方案既可以扩展到新用户而无需昂贵的重新培训，并且可以很好地跨不同会话、设备和用户任务进行推广。为此，我们开发了一个相似性学习模型，并在“Who Is Alyx？”上对其进行了预训练。数据集。该数据集包含广泛的任务，以及玩 VR 游戏“半条命：Alyx”的用户的动作。与之前的工作相比，我们使用了一组专门的用户来进行模型验证和最终评估。此外，我们使用一个独立的数据集扩展了此评估，该数据集具有完全不同的用户、任务和三种不同的 XR 设备。与传统的分类学习基线相比，我们的模型表现出优越的性能，特别是在注册数据有限的情况下。预训练过程允许立即部署在各种 XR 应用程序中，同时保持高度的多功能性。展望未来，我们的方法为在生产 XR 系统中轻松集成预训练的基于运动的识别模型铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于预训练相似性学习的扩展现实（XR）中用户识别方法，解决现有方法在扩展性和泛化能力上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基于运动数据的XR用户验证方法在实际应用中面临扩展性差、跨设备/任务泛化能力弱的问题，需开发无需昂贵再训练且适应多场景的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发相似性学习模型并在《Who Is Alyx？》数据集（含VR游戏多样任务数据）上预训练，通过独立验证集（含不同用户、任务及三类XR设备）评估模型，对比传统分类学习方法。
AI.result: 模型在有限注册数据场景下表现优于传统方法，预训练过程支持快速部署于多样XR应用，验证了其高泛化性和扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为生产级XR系统集成预训练运动识别模型提供了可行路径，推动XR用户识别技术的实际应用落地。

authors_text: Hojin Kim,Seunghun Lee,Sunghoon Im
title: Offline-to-Online Knowledge Distillation for Video Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于视频实例分割的离线到在线知识蒸馏
abstract: In this paper, we present offline-to-online knowledge distillation (OOKD) for video instance segmentation (VIS), which transfers a wealth of video knowledge from an offline model to an online model for consistent prediction. Unlike previous methods that having adopting either an online or offline model, our single online model takes advantage of both models by distilling offline knowledge. To transfer knowledge correctly, we propose query filtering and association (QFA), which filters irrelevant queries to exact instances. Our KD with QFA increases the robustness of feature matching by encoding object-centric features from a single frame supplemented by long-range global information. We also propose a simple data augmentation scheme for knowledge distillation in the VIS task that fairly transfers the knowledge of all classes into the online model. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly improves the performance in video instance segmentation, especially for challenging datasets including long, dynamic sequences. Our method also achieves state-of-the-art performance on YTVIS-21, YTVIS-22, and OVIS datasets, with mAP scores of 46.1%, 43.6%, and 31.1%, respectively.
summary: In this paper, we present offline-to-online knowledge distillation (OOKD) for video instance segmentation (VIS), which transfers a wealth of video knowledge from an offline model to an online model for consistent prediction. Unlike previous methods that having adopting either an online or offline model, our single online model takes advantage of both models by distilling offline knowledge. To transfer knowledge correctly, we propose query filtering and association (QFA), which filters irrelevant queries to exact instances. Our KD with QFA increases the robustness of feature matching by encoding object-centric features from a single frame supplemented by long-range global information. We also propose a simple data augmentation scheme for knowledge distillation in the VIS task that fairly transfers the knowledge of all classes into the online model. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly improves the performance in video instance segmentation, especially for challenging datasets including long, dynamic sequences. Our method also achieves state-of-the-art performance on YTVIS-21, YTVIS-22, and OVIS datasets, with mAP scores of 46.1%, 43.6%, and 31.1%, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了用于视频实例分割（VIS）的离线到在线知识蒸馏（OOKD），它将大量视频知识从离线模型转移到在线模型以进行一致的预测。与之前采用在线或离线模型的方法不同，我们的单一在线模型通过提炼离线知识来利用这两种模型。为了正确地传递知识，我们提出查询过滤和关联（QFA），它将不相关的查询过滤到确切的实例。我们的 KD 与 QFA 通过从单帧编码以对象为中心的特征并辅以远程全局信息来提高特征匹配的鲁棒性。我们还提出了一种简单的数据增强方案，用于 VIS 任务中的知识蒸馏，将所有类别的知识公平地转移到在线模型中。大量实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了视频实例分割的性能，特别是对于包括长动态序列在内的具有挑战性的数据集。我们的方法还在 YTVIS-21、YTVIS-22 和 OVIS 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，mAP 分数分别为 46.1%、43.6% 和 31.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种离线到在线的知识蒸馏方法（OOKD），用于视频实例分割（VIS），通过将离线模型的知识转移到在线模型中以提升预测一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅采用在线或离线模型进行视频实例分割，无法充分利用两者优势。OOKD旨在通过知识蒸馏结合两者的优点，提升模型鲁棒性与性能。
AI.method: 提出查询过滤与关联（QFA）机制，过滤无关查询以精准匹配实例；结合单帧对象中心特征与长距离全局信息增强特征匹配；设计简单数据增强方案以公平传递所有类别知识。
AI.result: 在YTVIS-21、YTVIS-22和OVIS数据集上分别达到46.1%、43.6%和31.1%的mAP，显著优于现有方法，尤其在长动态序列任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: OOKD通过有效知识蒸馏机制显著提升了视频实例分割性能，验证了离线与在线模型结合的潜力，为复杂场景下的VIS任务提供了新思路。

result: 在YTVIS-21、YTVIS-22和OVIS数据集上分别达到46.1%、43.6%和31.1%的mAP，显著优于现有方法，尤其在长动态序列任务中表现突出。
conclusion: OOKD通过有效知识蒸馏机制显著提升了视频实例分割性能，验证了离线与在线模型结合的潜力，为复杂场景下的VIS任务提供了新思路。
search_text: Offline-to-Online Knowledge Distillation for Video Instance Segmentation 用于视频实例分割的离线到在线知识蒸馏 In this paper, we present offline-to-online knowledge distillation (OOKD) for video instance segmentation (VIS), which transfers a wealth of video knowledge from an offline model to an online model for consistent prediction. Unlike previous methods that having adopting either an online or offline model, our single online model takes advantage of both models by distilling offline knowledge. To transfer knowledge correctly, we propose query filtering and association (QFA), which filters irrelevant queries to exact instances. Our KD with QFA increases the robustness of feature matching by encoding object-centric features from a single frame supplemented by long-range global information. We also propose a simple data augmentation scheme for knowledge distillation in the VIS task that fairly transfers the knowledge of all classes into the online model. Extensive experiments show that our method significantly improves the performance in video instance segmentation, especially for challenging datasets including long, dynamic sequences. Our method also achieves state-of-the-art performance on YTVIS-21, YTVIS-22, and OVIS datasets, with mAP scores of 46.1%, 43.6%, and 31.1%, respectively. 在本文中，我们提出了用于视频实例分割（VIS）的离线到在线知识蒸馏（OOKD），它将大量视频知识从离线模型转移到在线模型以进行一致的预测。与之前采用在线或离线模型的方法不同，我们的单一在线模型通过提炼离线知识来利用这两种模型。为了正确地传递知识，我们提出查询过滤和关联（QFA），它将不相关的查询过滤到确切的实例。我们的 KD 与 QFA 通过从单帧编码以对象为中心的特征并辅以远程全局信息来提高特征匹配的鲁棒性。我们还提出了一种简单的数据增强方案，用于 VIS 任务中的知识蒸馏，将所有类别的知识公平地转移到在线模型中。大量实验表明，我们的方法显着提高了视频实例分割的性能，特别是对于包括长动态序列在内的具有挑战性的数据集。我们的方法还在 YTVIS-21、YTVIS-22 和 OVIS 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，mAP 分数分别为 46.1%、43.6% 和 31.1%。 本文提出了一种离线到在线的知识蒸馏方法（OOKD），用于视频实例分割（VIS），通过将离线模型的知识转移到在线模型中以提升预测一致性。 Hojin Kim,Seunghun Lee,Sunghoon Im cs.CV

authors_text: Fanqi Lin,Shiyu Huang,Tim Pearce,Wenze Chen,Wei-Wei Tu
title: TiZero: Mastering Multi-Agent Football with Curriculum Learning and Self-Play
title_zh: TiZero：通过课程学习和自我比赛掌握多代理足球
comment: The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems(AAMAS2023)
comments: The 22nd International Conference on Autonomous Agents and Multiagent Systems(AAMAS2023)
abstract: Multi-agent football poses an unsolved challenge in AI research. Existing work has focused on tackling simplified scenarios of the game, or else leveraging expert demonstrations. In this paper, we develop a multi-agent system to play the full 11 vs. 11 game mode, without demonstrations. This game mode contains aspects that present major challenges to modern reinforcement learning algorithms; multi-agent coordination, long-term planning, and non-transitivity. To address these challenges, we present TiZero; a self-evolving, multi-agent system that learns from scratch. TiZero introduces several innovations, including adaptive curriculum learning, a novel self-play strategy, and an objective that optimizes the policies of multiple agents jointly. Experimentally, it outperforms previous systems by a large margin on the Google Research Football environment, increasing win rates by over 30%. To demonstrate the generality of TiZero's innovations, they are assessed on several environments beyond football; Overcooked, Multi-agent Particle-Environment, Tic-Tac-Toe and Connect-Four.
summary: Multi-agent football poses an unsolved challenge in AI research. Existing work has focused on tackling simplified scenarios of the game, or else leveraging expert demonstrations. In this paper, we develop a multi-agent system to play the full 11 vs. 11 game mode, without demonstrations. This game mode contains aspects that present major challenges to modern reinforcement learning algorithms; multi-agent coordination, long-term planning, and non-transitivity. To address these challenges, we present TiZero; a self-evolving, multi-agent system that learns from scratch. TiZero introduces several innovations, including adaptive curriculum learning, a novel self-play strategy, and an objective that optimizes the policies of multiple agents jointly. Experimentally, it outperforms previous systems by a large margin on the Google Research Football environment, increasing win rates by over 30%. To demonstrate the generality of TiZero's innovations, they are assessed on several environments beyond football; Overcooked, Multi-agent Particle-Environment, Tic-Tac-Toe and Connect-Four.
abstract_zh: 多智能体足球对人工智能研究提出了一个尚未解决的挑战。现有的工作重点是解决游戏的简化场景，或者利用专家演示。在本文中，我们开发了一个多智能体系统来玩完整的 11 对 11 游戏模式，但没有演示。这种游戏模式包含对现代强化学习算法提出重大挑战的方面；多主体协调、长期规划和非传递性。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 TiZero；一个从头开始学习的自我进化、多智能体系统。 TiZero 引入了多项创新，包括自适应课程学习、新颖的自我博弈策略以及共同优化多个智能体策略的目标。经过实验，它在 Google Research Football 环境中大幅优于以前的系统，将胜率提高了 30% 以上。为了展示 TiZero 创新的通用性，我们在足球以外的多种环境中对它们进行了评估；煮过头了，多代理粒子环境，井字棋和四子棋。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TiZero系统，通过课程学习和自博弈方法，实现无需专家示范的11对11足球多智能体协同控制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究要么局限于简化场景，要么依赖专家示范，难以应对足球游戏中的多智能体协作、长期规划等复杂挑战。
AI.method: 设计自进化多智能体系统，融合自适应课程学习、新型自博弈策略及多智能体联合策略优化目标。
AI.result: 在Google Research Football环境中胜率提升超30%，并在Overcooked、粒子环境等多场景验证方法普适性。
AI.conclusion: 课程学习与自博弈框架有效解决了多智能体协作难题，为复杂环境下的强化学习提供通用解决方案。
